Matthew1:1 Iyi ndiyo nhoroondo yamadzitateguru aJesu Kristu mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mwanakomana waAbhurahama:" 
Matthew1:2 	Abhurahama aiva baba vaIsaka, Isaka baba vaJakobho, Jakhobho baba vaJudha namadzikoma ake, navanun'una vake," 
Matthew1:3 	Judha baba vaPerezi naZera, mai vake vaiva Tamari, Perezi baba vaHezironi, Hezironi baba vaRamu," 
Matthew1:4 	Ramu baba vaAminadhabhu, Aminadhabhu baba vaNashoni, Nashoni baba vaSarimoni," 
Matthew1:5 	Sarimoni baba vaBhoazi, mai vake vari Rahabhu, Bhoazi baba vaObhedhi, mai vake vari Rute, Obhedhi baba vaJese," 
Matthew1:6 	naJese baba vamambo Dhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi aiva baba vaSoromoni, mai vake ndivo vaimbova mukadzi waUria." 
Matthew1:7 	Soromoni baba vaRehobhoamu, Rehobhoamu baba vaAbhija, Abhija baba vaAsa," 
Matthew1:8 	Asa baba vaJehoshofati, Jehoshafati baba vaJehoramu, Jehoramu baba vaUzia," 
Matthew1:9 	Uzia baba vaJotamu, Jotamu baba vaAhazi, Ahazi baba vaHezekia." 
Matthew1:10 	Hezekia baba vaManase, Manase baba vaAmoni, Amoni baba vaJosia," 
Matthew1:11 	naJosia baba vaJekonia navanun'una vake panguva yavaiva muutapwa muBhabhironi. 
Matthew1:12 	Vabva kuutapwa kuBhabhironi: Jekonia aiva baba vaShearitieri, Shearitieri baba vaZerubhabheri," 
Matthew1:13 	Zerubhabheri baba vaAbhiudhi, Abhiudhi baba vaEriakimu, Eriakimu baba vaAzori." 
Matthew1:14 	Azori baba vaZadhoki, Zadhoki baba vaAkimu, Akimu baba vaEriudhi," 
Matthew1:15 	Eriudhi baba vaEreazari, Ereazari baba vaMatani, Matani baba vaJakobho." 
Matthew1:16 Jakobho baba vaJosefa, uyo aiva murume waMaria, uyo akabereka Jesu, anonzi Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Nokudaro kwaiva nezvizvarwa gumi nezvina pamwe chete kubvira pana Abhurahama kusvika pana Dhavhidhi, zvizvarwa gumi nezvina kubva pana Dhavhidhi kusvika pakutapwa kwavo vachiendwa navo kuBhabhironi, zvizvarwa gumi nezvina kubva pakudzoka kwavo kuutapwa kusvika panguva yaKristu." 
Matthew1:18 Uku ndiko kuberekwa kwakaitwa Jesu Kristu: Maria, mai vake vainge vatsidzirwa kuroorwa naJosefa, asi vasati vagara vose, achiri mhandara, akaonekwa ava napamuviri nokuda kwaMweya Mutsvene." 
Matthew1:19 Asi nokuda kwokuti Josefa akanga ari munhu akarurama akafunga zvokumuramba chinyararire, asingamunyadzisi pavazhinji." 
Matthew1:20 Asi achiri kufunga nezvenyaya iyi, mutumwa waIshe akauya kwaari mukurota akasvikoti, “Josefa, mwana waDhavhidhi, usatya kutora Maria somukadzi wako nokuti pamuviri paava napo akapabata nokuda kwesimba raMweya Mutsvene." 
Matthew1:21 Achava nomwana mukomana wauchazotumidza zita rokuti Jesu nokuti ndiye achaponesa vanhu vake kubva muzvivi zvavo.” 
Matthew1:22 Izvi zvose zvakaitika kuti zvizadzise zvakanga zvataurwa naIshe kubudikidza navaprofita vake zvokuti: 
Matthew1:23 “Mhandara ichava napamuviri, igozvara mwana mukomana, uye vachamutumidza zita rokuti Emanueri, zvichireva kuti, ‘Mwari anesu.’ ”" 
Matthew1:24 Josefa paakapepuka, akaita sezvaakanga arayirwa nomutumwa waIshe, uye akatora Maria somukadzi wake," 
Matthew1:25 asi haana kusangana naye kusvikira azvara mwana mukomana. Akamutumidza zita rokuti Jesu. 
Matthew2:1 Mushure mokuberekwa kwaJesu muBheterehema reJudhea munguva yaMambo Herodhi, vachenjeri vaibva kumabvazuva vakasvika muJerusarema," 
Matthew2:2 uye vakabvunza vakati, “Aripiko uyo achangoberekwa anova mambo wavaJudha? Takaona nyeredzi yake kumabvazuva, uye tauya kuzomunamata.”" 
Matthew2:3 Mambo Herodhi akati achinzwa izvi, akatambudzika kwazvo pamwe chete neJerusarema rose." 
Matthew2:4 Kuzoti akakokera pamwe chete vaprista navadzidzisi vomutemo, akavabvunza kwaizoberekerwa Kristu." 
Matthew2:5 Vakapindura vachiti, “MuBheterehema reJudhea nokuti izvi ndizvo zvakanyorwa nomuprofita achiti:" 
Matthew2:6 “Asi iwe Bheterehema, munyika yeJudhea hausi muduku pamadzimambo ose aJudha, nokuti mauri muchabuda mutongi uyo achava mufudzi wavanhu vangu vaIsraeri.”" 
Matthew2:7 Ipapo Herodhi akadana Vachenjeri pakavanda akavabvunzisisa nguva chaiyo yainge yaonekwa nyeredzi. 
Matthew2:8 Akavatuma kuBheterehema akati, “Endai mundotsvakisisa mwana uyu. Kana muchinge mamuwana, mugondizivisawo kuitira kuti neniwo ndigoenda kundomunamata.”" 
Matthew2:9 Mushure mokunge vanzwa zvainge zvataurwa naMambo, vakapfuurira mberi norwendo rwavo, uye nyeredzi yavakanga vaoona kumabvazuva yakavatungamirira kusvikira yandomira panzvimbo paiva nomwana." 
Matthew2:10 Pavakaona nyeredzi, vakafara kwazvo." 
Matthew2:11 Vakati vasvika pamba apa, vakaona mwana namai vake Maria, uye vakakotamira pasi vakamunamata. Vakasunungura pfuma yavo vakapa zvipo zvegoridhe, nezvinonhuwira nemura." 
Matthew2:12 Uye vakati vayambirwa mukurota kuti vasadzokera nokuna Herodhi, vakadzokera kwavo neimwe nzira." 
Matthew2:13 Zvino kuzoti vaenda, mutumwa waShe akazviratidza kuna Josefa mukurota, akati, “Kurumidza kutora mwana namai vake mutizire kuIjipiti. Mugareko kusvikira ndakuudzai, nokuti Herodhi achatsvaka mwana uyu kuti amuuraye.”" 
Matthew2:14 Saka akabva amuka ndokutora mwana namai vake usiku akatizira kuIjipiti," 
Matthew2:15 kwaakandogara kusvikira Herodhi afa. Saizvozvo zvakazadziswa zvakanga zvataurwa naShe kubudikidza nomuprofita achiti, “Ndakadana mwanakomana wangu kubva kuIjipiti.”" 
Matthew2:16 Kuzoti Herodhi aziva kuti vachenjeri vaya vainge vamunyengera, akashatirwa kwazvo, ndokubva arayira kuti vana vechikomana vose vaiva muBheterehema nomunzvimbo yakapoteredza vaiva namakore maviri zvichidzika vaurayiwe, maererano nenguva yaakanga audzwa naVachenjeri." 
Matthew2:17 Ipapo zvakarehwa kubudikidza nomuprofita Jeremia zvakazadziswa, zvinoti:" 
Matthew2:18 “Inzwi rakanzwikwa muRama rokuchema nokuungudza kukuru, Rakeri achichema vana vake, uye achiramba kunyaradzwa nokuti havachipo.”" 
Matthew2:19 Mushure mokufa kwaHerodhi, mutumwa waShe akazviratidza kuna Josefa muIjipiti mukurota" 
Matthew2:20 akati, “Tora mwana namai vake mudzokere kunyika yeIsraeri nokuti vaya vaida kuuraya mwana vakafa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Saka akasimuka akatora mwana namai vake akaenda kunyika yeIsraeri. 
Matthew2:22 Asi paakanzwa kuti Arikerao akanga otonga muJudhea panzvimbo yababa vake Herodhi, akatya kuendako. Akati ayambirwa mukurota, akabva aenda kudunhu reGarirea," 
Matthew2:23 uye akaenda akandogara muguta rainzi Nazareta. Izvi zvakabva zvazadzisa zvakarehwa kubudikidza navaprofita zvichinzi, “Achanzi muNazareta.”" 
Matthew3:1 Mumazuva iwayo Johani Mubhabhatidzi akauya achiparidza murenje reJudhea," 
Matthew3:2 achiti, “Tendeukai, nokuti umambo hwokudenga hwava pedyo.”" 
Matthew3:3 Uyu ndiye akataurwa kubudikidza nomuprofita Isaya zvichinzi: “Inzwi rounodanidzira murenje richiti, ‘Gadzirai nzira yaShe, ruramisai migwagwa yake.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Nguo dzaJohani dzakanga dzakagadzirwa nemvere dzengamera uye akanga akasunga bhanhire redehwe muchiuno chake. Zvokudya zvake zvaiva mhashu nouchi. 
Matthew3:5 Vanhu vakabuda vakaenda kwaari vachibva muJerusarema nomuJudhea yose nomudunhu rose reJorodhani. 
Matthew3:6 Vachireurura zvivi zvavo vakabhabhatidzwa naye murwizi rweJorodhani. 
Matthew3:7 Asi paakaona vaFarisi navaSadhusi vachiuya kwaaibhabhatidzira akati kwavari, “Imi vana venyoka! Ndiani akakuyambirai kuti mutize kutsamwa kuchauya?" 
Matthew3:8 Berekai zvibereko zvakafanira kutendeuka. 
Matthew3:9 Uye musafunga kuti mungati, ‘Tina Abhurahama sababa vedu.’ Ndinokuudzai kuti Mwari anogona kumutsa vamwe vana vaAbhurahama kubva pamabwe aya." 
Matthew3:10 Demo ratoiswa pamidzi yemiti uye muti wose usingabereki zvibereko zvakanaka uchatemwa ugokandwa mumoto. 
Matthew3:11 “Ini ndinokubhabhatidzai nemvura kuti mutendeuke. Asi shure kwangu kuchauya mumwe mukuru kwandiri, wandisina kukodzera kunyange kutakura shangu dzake. Achakubhabhatidzai noMweya Mutsvene nomoto." 
Matthew3:12 Rusero rwuri muruoko rwake, uye achanatsa buriro rake, achiunganidza gorosi mudura, uye achizopisa hundi mumoto usingadzimi.”" 
Matthew3:13 Ipapo Jesu akabva kuGarirea akauya kuJorodhani kuti azobhabhatidzwa naJohani. 
Matthew3:14 Asi Johani akaedza kumudzivisa achiti, “Ini ndini ndinotofanira kubhabhatidzwa nemi, imi mouya sei kwandiri?”" 
Matthew3:15 Jesu akati, “Ngazvive saizvozvo iye zvino; zvakafanirwa kuti tiite izvi kuti tizadzise kururama kwose.” Ipapo Johani akabvuma hake." 
Matthew3:16 Jesu angobhabhatidzwa, akabuda mumvura. Panguva iyoyo denga rakazaruka, uye akaona Mweya waMwari uchiburuka senjiva uye ukasvikogara paari." 
Matthew3:17 Inzwi rakabva kudenga richiti, “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu wandinoda, wandinofarira.”" 
Matthew4:1 Ipapo Jesu akatungamirirwa naMweya Mutsvene kurenje kuti andoedzwa nadhiabhori. 
Matthew4:2 Mushure mokunge atsanya kwamazuva makumi mana nousiku huna namakumi mana, akanzwa nzara." 
Matthew4:3 Muedzi akauya kwaari akasvikoti, “Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, rayira mabwe aya kuti ave chingwa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Jesu akapindura akati, “Kwakanyorwa kuchinzi, ‘Munhu haararame nechingwa bedzi, asi neshoko rimwe nerimwe rinobva mumuromo waMwari.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Ipapo dhiabhori akamutora akaenda naye muguta dzvene uye akandomuita kuti amire pachiruvi chetemberi, akati," 
Matthew4:6 “Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, zviwisire pasi, nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: “Acharayira vatumwa vake pamusoro pako uye vachakusimudza namaoko avo kuti urege kugumburisa rutsoka rwako nebwe.”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu akamupindura akati, “Kwakanyorwawo kuchinzi, ‘Usaedza Ishe Mwari wako.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Dhiabhori akamutorazve akaenda naye pamusoro pegomo refu kwazvo uye akamuratidza ushe hwose hwenyika nokubwinya kwahwo," 
Matthew4:9 akati, “Zvose izvi ndichakupa kana ukandikotamira uye ukandinamata.”" 
Matthew4:10 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ibva pandiri Satani! Nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi, ‘Namata Ishe Mwari wako uye umushumire iye oga.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Ipapo dhiabhori akamusiya, uye vatumwa vakauya vakamushandira." 
Matthew4:12 Jesu akati anzwa kuti Johani akanga aiswa mutorongo, akadzokera kuGarirea." 
Matthew4:13 Achibva kuNazareta, akaenda akandogara kuKapenaume, guta raiva pamahombekombe egungwa mudunhu reZebhuruni neNafutari," 
Matthew4:14 kuti azadzise zvakarehwa nomuprofita Isaya achiti: 
Matthew4:15 “Nyika yeZebhuruni nenyika yeNafutari, nzira inoenda kugungwa, ichitevedza Jorodhani, Garirea ravaHedheni," 
Matthew4:16 vanhu vaigara murima vakaona chiedza chikuru; kune avo vaigara munyika yomumvuri worufu, chiedza chavhenekera.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kubva panguva iyoyo zvichienda mberi, Jesu akatanga kuparidza achiti, “Tendeukai nokuti umambo hwokudenga hwava pedyo.”" 
Matthew4:18 Jesu paakanga achifamba pedyo negungwa reGarirea, akaona varume vaviri, Simoni ainzi Petro nomunun'una wake Andirea. Vakanga vachikanda mambure avo mugungwa nokuti vaiva vabati vehove." 
Matthew4:19 Jesu akati kwavari, “Uyai munditevere, uye ndichakuitai vabati vavanhu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Pakarepo vakabva vasiya mambure avo, vakamutevera." 
Matthew4:21 Achibva ipapo, akaonazve vamwe varume vaviri vaiva mukoma nomunun'una, Jakobho mwanakomana waZebhedhi nomunun'una wake Johani. Vakanga vari mugwa nababa vavo Zebhedhi vachigadzira mambure avo. Jesu akavadana," 
Matthew4:22 uye pakarepo vakasiya igwa nababa vavo vakamutevera. 
Matthew4:23 Jesu akapota neGarirea rose achidzidzisa mumasinagoge avo nokuparidza nhau dzakanaka dzoumambo uye achiporesa hosha dzose nourwere hwose pakati pavanhu. 
Matthew4:24 Mukurumbira wake wakapararira muSiria yose, uye vanhu vakauya kwaari navose vairwara nezvirwere zvakasiyanasiyana, avo vaitambudzwa namarwadzo akanyanya, vakanga vakabatwa namadhimoni, vaiva nezvipusha, nevakanga vakafa mitezo, uye akavaporesa." 
Matthew4:25 Vanhu vazhinji kwazvo vaibva kuGarirea, Dhekapori, Jerusarema, Judhea nedunhu riri mhiri kweJorodhani vakamutevera." 
Matthew5:1 Zvino akati aona vanhu vazhinji, akakwira mugomo uye akagara pasi. Vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari," 
Matthew5:2 uye akatanga kuvadzidzisa achiti: 
Matthew5:3 “Vakaropafadzwa varombo pamweya, nokuti umambo hwokudenga ndohwavo." 
Matthew5:4 Vakaropafadzwa vanochema nokuti vachanyaradzwa. 
Matthew5:5 Vakaropafadzwa vanyoro nokuti vachagara nhaka yenyika. 
Matthew5:6 Vakaropafadzwa avo vane nzara nenyota yokuita zvakarurama nokuti vachagutswa kwazvo. 
Matthew5:7 Vakaropafadzwa vane tsitsi nokuti naivowo vachaitirwa tsitsi. 
Matthew5:8 Vakaropafadzwa vakachena pamwoyo, nokuti vachaona Mwari." 
Matthew5:9 Vakaropafadzwa vanoyananisa nokuti vachanzi vana vaMwari. 
Matthew5:10 Vakaropafadzwa vanotambudzwa nokuda kwokururama nokuti umambo hwokudenga ndohwavo. 
Matthew5:11 “Makaropafadzwa imi kana vanhu vachikutukai, vachikutambudzai uye vachikupomerai zvakaipa zvose nokuda kwangu." 
Matthew5:12 Farai mufarisise kwazvo nokuti mubayiro wenyu mukuru kudenga, nokuti nenzira imwe cheteyo vakatambudza vaprofita vakakutangirai." 
Matthew5:13 “Imi muri munyu wenyika. Asi kana munyu usisavavi ungavaviswe nei? Hauchabatsiri chinhu, kunze kwokuti uraswe ugotsikwa zvawo navanhu." 
Matthew5:14 “Imi muri chiedza chenyika. Guta riri pamusoro pegomo haringavanziki. 
Matthew5:15 Uye vanhu havangatungidzi mwenje vagouisa pasi pedengu. Asi kutoti vanouisa pachigadziko kuti uvhenekere vose vari mumba. 
Matthew5:16 Nenzira imwe cheteyo, chiedza chenyu ngachivhenekere pamberi pavanhu kuti vaone mabasa enyu akanaka, vagokudza Baba venyu vari kudenga." 
Matthew5:17 “Musafunga kuti ndakauya kuzoparadza Murayiro kana Vaprofita; handina kuuya kuzozviparadza asi kuzozvizadzisa. 
Matthew5:18 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, kuti kusvikira denga nenyika zvapfuura, hakuna vara duku sei kana chimwe chinhu chiduku sei chichabviswa paMurayiro, kusvikira zvose zvazadziswa." 
Matthew5:19 Asi ani naani anotyora mumwe chete wemirayiro miduku iyi uye achizodzidzisawo vamwe kuita zvimwe chetezvo achanzi muduku muumambo hwokudenga. Asi ani naani anochengeta uye anodzidzisa mirayiro iyi, achanzi mukuru muumambo hwokudenga." 
Matthew5:20 Nokuti ndinokuudzai zvirokwazvo kuti kana kururama kwenyu kukasapfuura kwavaFarisi nokwavadzidzisi vemirayiro, zvirokwazvo hamungapindi muumambo hwokudenga." 
Matthew5:21 “Makanzwa zvakataurwa kune vanhu vekare zvichinzi, ‘Usauraya uye ani naani anouraya achatongwa.’" 
Matthew5:22 Asi ini ndinokuudzai kuti ani naani anotsamwira hama yake achatongwa. Uyezve ani naani anoti, ‘Raka’ kuhama yake achamiswa pamberi pedare ravatongi. Asizve ani naani anoti kuhama yake, ‘Iwe benzi!’ achapara mhosva yokuti atongerwe moto wegehena." 
Matthew5:23 “Naizvozvo kana wada kupa chipo chako paaritari, ukayeuka pakarepo kuti wakatadzira hama yako," 
Matthew5:24 siya chipo chako ipapo pamberi pearitari. Tanga waenda undoyanana nehama yako, wozouya wopa chipo chako." 
Matthew5:25 “Kurumidza kutenderana nomudzivisi wako uyo ari kukuendesa kudare. Ita izvi uchiri munzira naye, kana kuti angangokuisa kumutongi uye mutongi agokuisa kumutariri, uye ugokandwa mutorongo." 
Matthew5:26 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti haungabudimo kusvikira waripa kamari kokupedzisira. 
Matthew5:27 “Makanzwa zvichinzi, ‘Usaita upombwe.’" 
Matthew5:28 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri ani naani anotarisa mukadzi neziso roruchiva atoita upombwe naye mumwoyo make. 
Matthew5:29 Kana ziso rako rorudyi richikuita kuti utadze, ribvise urirase. Zviri nani kwauri kuti urasikirwe nomumwe mutezo womuviri wako pano kuti muviri wako wose ukandwe mugehena." 
Matthew5:30 Uye kana ruoko rwako rworudyi ruchikuita kuti utadze, rucheke ururase. Zviri nani kwauri kuti urasikirwe nomumwe mutezo womuviri wako, pano kuti muviri wako wose uende kugehena." 
Matthew5:31 “Zvakanzi, ‘Ani naani anoramba mukadzi wake anofanira kumupa gwaro rokurambana.’" 
Matthew5:32 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti ani naani anoramba mukadzi wake kunze kwemhosva yokusatendeka muwaniso anomuitisa upombwe, uye ani naani anowana mukadzi akarambwa anoita upombwe." 
Matthew5:33 “Makanzwa zvakare zvichitaurwa kuvanhu vekare kare zvichinzi, ‘Usatyora mhiko dzako, asi zadzisa mhiko dzose dzaunenge waita kuna Ishe.’" 
Matthew5:34 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti, Musatongopika: kunyange nedenga nokuti ndiro chigaro chaMwari choumambo;" 
Matthew5:35 kana nenyika nokuti ndiyo chitsiko chetsoka dzake; kana Jerusarema nokuti ndiro guta raMambo Mukuru. 
Matthew5:36 Uye usapika nomusoro wako nokuti haugoni kuita kuti bvudzi rimwe chete rive jena kana dema. 
Matthew5:37 Hongu yako ngaingova ‘Hongu’, ne‘Kwete’ yako ive ‘Kwete’; zvimwe zvinopfuura izvi zvinobva kuno wakaipa." 
Matthew5:38 “Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi, ‘Ziso rinotsiviwa neziso, uye zino rinotsiviwa nezino.’" 
Matthew5:39 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti, ‘Musadzivisa munhu akaipa. Kana munhu akakurova padama rorudyi, murinzire roruboshwewo." 
Matthew5:40 Kana munhu akakukwirira kumatare achida kukutorera nguo yako, rega atorewo nejasi rako." 
Matthew5:41 Kana munhu akakumanikidza kufamba mutunhu mumwe chete, famba naye miviri." 
Matthew5:42 Kana munhu akakukumbira chinhu, mupe, uye usafuratira munhu anoda kukwereta kwauri.’" 
Matthew5:43 “Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi, ‘Ida wokwako, uvenge muvengi wako.’" 
Matthew5:44 Asi ini ndinokuudzai kuti, ‘Idai vavengi venyu, mugonyengeterera avo vanokutambudzai,’" 
Matthew5:45 kuitira kuti mugova vana vaBaba venyu vari kudenga. Ivo vanoita kuti zuva ravo ribude pane vakaipa nevakanaka uye vanonayisa mvura yavo pane vakarurama nevasakarurama. 
Matthew5:46 Kana mukangoda avo vanokudai, muchawana mubayiro wei? Vateresi havaiti zvimwe chetezvo here?" 
Matthew5:47 Kana muchingokwazisana nehama dzenyu bedzi, mungakunda vamwe pakudii? Ko, vasingatendi havaiti zvimwe chetezvo here?" 
Matthew5:48 Naizvozvo, ivai vakakwana, sezvo Baba venyu vari kudenga vari vakakwana." 
Matthew6:1 “Chenjerai kuti murege kuita ‘mabasa enyu okururama’ pamberi pavanhu kuti muonekwe navo. Kana mukaita saizvozvo, hamuzovi nomubayiro kuna Baba venyu vari kudenga." 
Matthew6:2 “Saka kana mopa kuna vanoshaya, musaridza hwamanda sezvinoitwa navanyengeri mumasinagoge nomumigwagwa kuti vakudzwe navanhu. Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti vatowana mubayiro wavo wakazara." 
Matthew6:3 Asi kana wopa kuna vanoshaya ruoko rwako rworuboshwe ngarurege kuziva zviri kuitwa noruoko rwako rworudyi," 
Matthew6:4 kuitira kuti kupa kwako kuve pakavanda. Ipapo Baba vako, vanoona zvinoitwa pakavanda, vachakupa mubayiro." 
Matthew6:5 “Uye pamunonyengetera, musava savanyengeri nokuti vanofarira kunyengetera vamire mumasinagoge napamharadzano dzenzira kuti vaonekwe navanhu. Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti vatowana mubayiro wavo wakazara." 
Matthew6:6 Asi paunonyengetera, pinda mumba mako, ugopfiga musiwo uye ugonyengetera kuna Baba vako avo vasingaonekwi. Ipapo Baba vako avo vanoona zvinoitwa pakavanda, vachakupa mubayiro." 
Matthew6:7 Uye pamunonyengetera, musangoramba muchidzokorora zvimwe chetezvo sezvinoitwa navasingatendi nokuti vanofunga kuti vachanzwikwa nokuda kwamashoko avo mazhinji." 
Matthew6:8 Musafanana navo nokuti Baba venyu vanoziva zvamunoshayiwa musati mavakumbira. 
Matthew6:9 “Zvino aya ndiwo manyengeterero amunofanira kuita: “ ‘Baba vedu vari kudenga, zita renyu ngarikudzwe," 
Matthew6:10 umambo hwenyu ngahuuye, kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe panyika sezvinoitwa kudenga." 
Matthew6:11 Tipei nhasi chingwa chedu chamazuva namazuva. 
Matthew6:12 Tiregererei zvatinokutadzirai, sezvatinoregererawo vanotitadzira isu." 
Matthew6:13 Tibatsirei kuti tisapinda mukuedzwa, uye mutinunure kubva kuno wakaipa.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Nokuti kana mukaregerera vanokutadzirai, Baba venyu vari kudenga vachakuregereraiwo." 
Matthew6:15 Asi kana musingaregereri vamwe zvitadzo zvavo, Baba venyu havazokuregererai zvitadzo zvenyu." 
Matthew6:16 “Pamunotsanya, musaunyanisa zviso sezvinoita vanyengeri nokuti vanounyanisa zviso zvavo kuti vaonekwe navanhu kuti vari kutsanya. Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti vatowana mubayiro wavo wakazara." 
Matthew6:17 Asi pamunotsanya, zorai mafuta mumisoro yenyu uye mugogeza kumeso kwenyu," 
Matthew6:18 kuitira kuti zvirege kuonekwa navanhu kuti muri kutsanya, asi zvizivikanwe chete naBaba venyu avo vasingaonekwi. Uye Baba venyu vanoona pakavandika, vachakupai mubayiro." 
Matthew6:19 “Musazviunganidzira pfuma panyika, pane zvipfukuto nengura zvinoparadza, uye pane mbavha dzinopaza dzichiba." 
Matthew6:20 Asi zviunganidzirei pfuma kudenga uko kusina zvipfukuto nengura zvinoparadza, uye kusina mbavha dzinopaza dzichiba." 
Matthew6:21 Nokuti apo pane pfuma yako ndipo pane mwoyo wakowo. 
Matthew6:22 “Ziso ndiwo mwenje womuviri. Kana maziso ako akanaka, muviri wako wose uchava nechiedza." 
Matthew6:23 Asi kana maziso ako akaipa muviri wako wose uchange uzere nerima. Zvino kana chiedza chiri mauri riri rima, richange riri rima rakakura zvakadii!" 
Matthew6:24 “Hapana angakwanise kushandira vatenzi vaviri. Achavenga mumwe uye agoda mumwe, kana kuti achazvipira kushandira mumwe uye agozvidza mumwe. Haungashandire zvose Mwari neMari." 
Matthew6:25 “Naizvozvo ndinokutaurirai kuti, musafunganya nezvoupenyu hwenyu, kuti muchadyei kana kuti muchanwei, kana nezvemiviri kuti muchapfekei. Ko, upenyu hausi hwakakosha here kudarika zvokudya, nomuviri kudarika nguo?" 
Matthew6:26 Tarirai shiri dzinobhururuka, hadzidyari kana kukohwa kana kuisa zvokudya mumatura, asi Baba venyu vari kudenga vanodzipa zvokudya. Imi hamuna kukosha kudzipfuura nokure kwazvo here?" 
Matthew6:27 Ndiani pakati penyu angawedzera awa imwe chete paupenyu hwake nokuda kwokufunganya? 
Matthew6:28 “Ko, munofunganyirei pamusoro pezvokupfeka? Tarirai kuti maruva esango anokura sei? Haashandi kana kuruka." 
Matthew6:29 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti kunyange naSoromoni mukubwinya kwake kwose, haana kumboshonga serimwe ramaruva aya." 
Matthew6:30 Zvino kana Mwari achishongedza saizvozvo uswa hwesango huripo nhasi uye mangwana huchizokandwa mumoto, haangakushongedzei kupfuura izvi here, imi vokutenda kuduku?" 
Matthew6:31 Naizvozvo musafunganya muchiti, ‘Tichadyei?’ kana kuti, ‘Tichanwei?’ kana ‘Tichapfekei?’" 
Matthew6:32 Izvi ndizvo zvinoitwa navahedheni, nokuti Baba venyu vari kudenga vanoziva kuti munoda zvinhu izvi." 
Matthew6:33 Asi tangai kutsvaka umambo hwake nokururama kwake, uye zvinhu zvose izvi zvichapiwawo kwamuri." 
Matthew6:34 Naizvozvo musafunganya nezvamangwana nokuti mangwana achazvifunganyira zvawo. Zuva rimwe nerimwe rine nhamo dzaro dzakarikwanira. 
Matthew7:1 “Usatonga kuti newewo urege kutongwa. 
Matthew7:2 Nokuti nzira yaunotonga nayo vamwe ndiyo yauchatongwa nayo, uye chiero chaunoshandisa ndicho chichashandiswa kwauri." 
Matthew7:3 “Unotarisirei kabanzu kari muziso rehama yako, asi usina hanya nepuranga riri muziso rako?" 
Matthew7:4 Ungati sei kuhama yako, ‘Rega ndibvise kabanzu kari muziso rako,’ asi iwe nguva dzose uine puranga riri muziso rako?" 
Matthew7:5 Iwe munyengeri, tanga wabvisa puranga riri muziso rako, ipapo unozoona zvakanaka kuti ukwanise kubvisa kabanzu kari muziso rehama yako." 
Matthew7:6 “Musapa imbwa zvinhu zvitsvene, uye musakanda maparera enyu kunguruve. Kana mukadaro, dzinogona kuatsikatsika pasi petsoka dzadzo, uye ipapo dzikazokutendeukirai dzokubvamburabvamburai." 
Matthew7:7 “Kumbirai mugopiwa, tsvakai mugowana, gogodzai mugozarurirwa." 
Matthew7:8 Nokuti munhu wose anokumbira anopiwa, anotsvaka anowana; uye anogogodza anozarurirwa musiwo." 
Matthew7:9 “Ndiani pakati penyu angati kana mwanakomana wake akamukumbira chingwa, omupa ibwe?" 
Matthew7:10 Kana kuti akakumbira hove iye omupa nyoka? 
Matthew7:11 Zvino imi, kunyange zvenyu makaipa, muchiziva kupa zvipo zvakanaka kuvana venyu, Baba venyu vari kudenga vachapa zvipo zvakanaka sei kuna avo vanokumbira!" 
Matthew7:12 Saka muzvinhu zvose itirai vamwe zvamunoda kuti vakuitirei imi, nokuti uyu ndiwo Murayiro naVaprofita." 
Matthew7:13 “Pindai napasuo rakamanikana nokuti suo rakafara nenzira yakapamhamha zvinotungamirira kukuparadzwa, uye vazhinji vanopinda naro." 
Matthew7:14 Asi suo duku nenzira yakamanikana ndizvo zvinotungamirira kuupenyu, uye vashoma chete, ndivo vanozviwana." 
Matthew7:15 “Chenjererai vaprofita venhema, vanouya kwamuri vakapfeka matehwe emakwai asi mukati mavo vari mapere anoparadza." 
Matthew7:16 Muchavaziva nemichero yavo. Vanhu vanganhonga mazambiringa pamuti weminzwa here, kana maonde parukato?" 
Matthew7:17 Saizvozvo muti wose wakanaka unobereka michero yakanaka, muti wakaipa unobereka michero yakaipa." 
Matthew7:18 Muti wakanaka haungabereki michero yakaipa, nemuti wakaipa haungabereki michero yakanaka." 
Matthew7:19 Muti wose usingabereki michero yakanaka unotemwa uye ugokandwa mumoto. 
Matthew7:20 Naizvozvo muchavaziva nemichero yavo. 
Matthew7:21 “Havasi vose vanoti kwandiri, ‘Ishe, Ishe’ vachapinda muushe hwokudenga, asi uyo chete anoita kuda kwaBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew7:22 Vazhinji pazuva iro vachati kwandiri, ‘Ishe, Ishe, ko, hatina kuprofita muzita renyuwo here, uye muzita renyu tikadzinga madhimoni, tikaita zvishamiso?’" 
Matthew7:23 Ipapo ndichavaudza pachena kuti, ‘Handina kutombokuzivai. Ibvai zvenyu pandiri, imi vaiti vezvakaipa!’" 
Matthew7:24 “Naizvozvo munhu anonzwa mashoko angu aya, uye akaaita, akafanana nemurume akachenjera uyo akavaka imba yake paruware." 
Matthew7:25 Mvura yakanaya, nzizi dzikazara, uye dutu remhepo rakauya rikarova imba iya, asi haina kuputsika, nokuti hwaro hwayo hwaiva paruware." 
Matthew7:26 Asi munhu wose anonzwa mashoko angu aya akasaaita, akafanana nomurume benzi akavakira imba yake mujecha." 
Matthew7:27 Mvura yakanaya, nzizi dzikazara, uye dutu remhepo rakauya rikarova imba iya uye ikawa nokuwa kukuru.”" 
Matthew7:28 Jesu akati apedza kutaura zvinhu izvi vazhinji vaivapo vakashamiswa nokudzidzisa kwake," 
Matthew7:29 nokuti akadzidzisa somunhu aiva nesimba kwete samadzidzisiro aitwa navadzidzisi vavo vomurayiro. 
Matthew8:1 Akati aburuka kubva mugomo, vanhu vazhinji vakamutevera." 
Matthew8:2 Mumwe murume aiva namaperembudzi akauya akasvikopfugama paari akati, “Ishe, kana muchida, munogona kundinatsa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesu akatambanudza ruoko rwake akabata murume uya akati, “Ndinoda. Chinatswa!” Pakarepo akabva aporeswa maperembudzi ake." 
Matthew8:4 Ipapo Jesu akati kwaari, “Ona kuti hapana waunotaurira uye ugopa chipo chakarayirwa naMozisi sechapupu kwavari.”" 
Matthew8:5 Jesu akati apinda muKapenaume, mukuru wezana akauya kwaari achikumbira rubatsiro." 
Matthew8:6 Akasvikoti, “Ishe, muranda wangu arere kumba, akafa mitezo, uye ari kurwadziwa zvikuru.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ndichauya kuzomuporesa.”" 
Matthew8:8 Mukuru wezana akapindura akati, “Ishe, handina kukodzera kuti imi mupinde mumba mangu. Asi ingotaurai henyu shoko, uye muranda wangu achapora." 
Matthew8:9 Nokuti ini pachangu ndiri munhu anorayirwa, ndine varwi pasi pangu. Ndinoudza uyu kuti, ‘Enda,’ achienda; neuyo ndichimuti, ‘Uya,’ achiuya. Ndinoti kumuranda wangu, ‘Ita izvi,’ achizviita.”" 
Matthew8:10 Jesu akati anzwa izvi, akashamiswa akati kuna avo vaimutevera, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, handisati ndaona munhu ane rutendo rwakadai muIsraeri." 
Matthew8:11 Ndinoti kwamuri, vazhinji vachabva kumabvazuva nokumadokero uye vachagara panzvimbo dzavo pamutambo pamwe chete naAbhurahama, Isaka naJakobho muumambo hwokudenga." 
Matthew8:12 Asi vadyi venhaka youshe vachakandwa kunze, kurima uko kuchava nokuchema nokurumanya kwameno.”" 
Matthew8:13 Ipapo Jesu akati kumukuru wezana, “Enda! Zvichaitika sokutenda kwawaita.” Muranda wake akabva apora panguva iyoyo." 
Matthew8:14 Jesu akati apinda mumba maPetro, akasvikowana mai vomukadzi waPetro varere vachirwara nefivha." 
Matthew8:15 Akabata ruoko rwavo fivha ndokubva yapera, uye vakasimuka ndokubva vatanga kumushandira." 
Matthew8:16 Ava madekwana, vazhinji vakanga vakabatwa namadhimoni vakauyiswa kwaari, uye akadzinga mweya iyoyo neshoko akaporesa vose vairwara." 
Matthew8:17 Izvi zvaizadzisa zvakanga zvataurwa kubudikidza nomuprofita Isaya zvichinzi: “Akatakura kurwadziwa kwedu kwose uye akatakura zvirwere zvedu zvose.” 
Matthew8:18 Jesu akati aona vanhu vazhinji vakamukomberedza akarayira kuti vayambuke vaende kune rimwe divi regungwa. 
Matthew8:19 Ipapo mumwe mudzidzisi womurayiro akauya kwaari akati, “Mudzidzisi, ndichakuteverai kwose kwamunoenda.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Makava ane mwena yawo, shiri dzina matendere adzo, asi Mwanakomana woMunhu haana paangatsamidza musoro wake.”" 
Matthew8:21 Mumwewo mudzidzi akati, “Ishe chimboregai nditange ndambonoviga baba vangu.”" 
Matthew8:22 Asi Jesu akati kwaari, “Nditevere, rega vakafa vavige vakafa vavo.”" 
Matthew8:23 Ipapo akapinda muigwa uye vadzidzi vake vakamutevera. 
Matthew8:24 Pakarepo, dutu guru rakamuka pagungwa zvokuti mafungu egungwa akapfachukira pamusoro peigwa. Asi Jesu akanga avete." 
Matthew8:25 Vadzidzi vakaenda vakandomumutsa vachiti, “Ishe, tiponesei! Tava kunyura!”" 
Matthew8:26 Akavapindura achiti, “Imi vorutendo ruduku, munotyireiko kudai?” Ipapo akasimuka akatsiura mhepo namafungu uye kukadzikama kwazvo." 
Matthew8:27 Varume ava vakashamiswa uye vakabvunza vachiti, “Munhu akaita seiko uyu? Kunyange mhepo namafungu zvinomuteerera!”" 
Matthew8:28 Akati asvika mhiri kunyika yavaGadhara, akasangana navarume vaviri vakanga vakabatwa namadhimoni. Varume ava vaiva nehasha zvokuti hapana munhu aigona kupfuura naikoko." 
Matthew8:29 Vakadanidzira vachiti, “Munodeiko kwatiri, Mwanakomana waMwari? Mauya kuzotirwadzisa here iyo nguva yakatarwa isati yasvika?”" 
Matthew8:30 Nechokure navo, kwakanga kune boka guru renguruve rakanga richifura." 
Matthew8:31 Madhimoni akakumbirisa Jesu achiti, “Kana mukatidzinga, titumirei muboka renguruve.”" 
Matthew8:32 Akati kwaari, “Endai!” Ipapo akabuda akandopinda munguruve, uye boka rose rakamhanya richidzika kumawere amahombekombe rikasvikowira mugungwa dzichibva dzafira mumvura." 
Matthew8:33 Vaya vakanga vachifudza nguruve vakamhanya vakandopinda muguta vakandotaura zvose izvi, kusanganisira nezvakanga zvaitika kuvarume vaya vakanga vane madhimoni." 
Matthew8:34 Ipapo guta rose rakabuda rikandosangana naJesu. Uye vakati vamuona, vakamukumbirisa kuti abve munyika yavo." 
Matthew9:1 Jesu akapinda mugwa akayambuka ndokusvika kuguta rokwake. 
Matthew9:2 Vamwe varume vakauya nomunhu akanga akafa mitezo, avete pabonde. Jesu akati aona kutenda kwavo akati kumunhu uya akafa mitezo, “Tsunga mwoyo, mwana, zvivi zvako zvaregererwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Vachinzwa izvi, vamwe vadzidzisi vemirayiro vakati mumwoyo yavo, “Munhu uyu ari kumhura Mwari!”" 
Matthew9:4 Achiziva pfungwa dzavo Jesu akati, “Sei muchifunga zvakaipa mumwoyo yenyu?" 
Matthew9:5 Ndezvipi zvakareruka, kuti, ‘Zvivi zvako waregererwa,’ kana kuti, ‘Simuka ufambe’?" 
Matthew9:6 Asi kuti mugoziva kuti Mwanakomana woMunhu ane simba panyika rokuregerera zvivi.” Ipapo akati kumunhu uya akanga akafa mitezo, “Simuka, tora bonde rako uende kumba.”" 
Matthew9:7 Uye murume uya akasimuka akaenda kumba kwake. 
Matthew9:8 Vanhu vazhinji pavakazviona, vakazadzwa nokutya uye vakarumbidza Mwari uyo akanga apa simba rakadai kuvanhu." 
Matthew9:9 Jesu akati achipfuurira mberi achibva ikoko, akaona mumwe murume ainzi Mateo agere pahofisi yomuteresi. Akati kwaari, “Nditevere,” uye Mateo akasimuka akamutevera." 
Matthew9:10 Jesu akati agere mumba maMateo vachidya kudya kwamanheru, vateresi vazhinji navatadzi vakauya vakadya naye navadzidzi vake." 
Matthew9:11 VaFarisi vakati vaona izvi, vakabvunza vadzidzi vake vachiti, “Sei mudzidzisi wenyu achidya navateresi navatadzi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Achinzwa izvi, Jesu akati, “Vasingarwari havatsvagi chiremba, asi vanorwara." 
Matthew9:13 Asi endai munodzidza kuti izvi zvinorevei zvinoti, ‘Ndinoda ngoni, kwete chibayiro.’ Nokuti handina kuuya kuzodana vakarurama, asi vatadzi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Vadzidzi vaJohani vakauya kuzomubvunza vachiti, “Ko, sei isu navaFarisi tichitsanya asi vadzidzi venyu vasingatsanyi.”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Zvingaitawo here kuti shamwari dzechikomba dzicheme iye achiinavo? Nguva ichasvika iyo chikomba chichabviswa kwavari, ipapo vachatsanya." 
Matthew9:16 “Hapana munhu anosonera chigamba chitsva panguo tsaru, nokuti chigamba chichabvarura nguo iya, buri racho richizobva ranyanya." 
Matthew9:17 Uye vanhu havangadiri waini itsva muhombodo tsaru. Kana vakadaro, hombodo dzichaputika, waini ichateuka uye hombodo dzichaparara. Kwete, vanodira waini itsva muhombodo itsva uye zvose zviri zviviri zvinochengetedzeka.”" 
Matthew9:18 Akati achiri kutaura izvi, mumwe mutongi akauya akasvikomupfugamira uye akati, “Mwanasikana wangu afa izvozvi. Asi uyai muzoisa ruoko rwenyu paari uye achararama.”" 
Matthew9:19 Jesu akasimuka akaenda naye pamwe chete navadzidzi vake. 
Matthew9:20 Pakarepo mumwewo mudzimai aitambudzwa nechirwere chokubuda ropa kwamakore gumi namaviri akauya shure kwake akasvikobata mupendero wenguo yake. 
Matthew9:21 Akati nechomumwoyo, “Ndikangobata chete nguo yake, ndichaporeswa.”" 
Matthew9:22 Jesu akatendeuka uye akamuona ndokubva ati kwaari, “Tsunga mwoyo mwanasikana, kutenda kwako kwakuporesa.” Mudzimai uyu akabva aporeswa pakarepo." 
Matthew9:23 Jesu akati apinda mumba momutongi uya, akawana varidzi venyere navazhinji vaiita mheremhere" 
Matthew9:24 akati, “Budai panze. Mwanasikana uyu haana kufa asi avete.” Asi vakamuseka." 
Matthew9:25 Mushure mokunge vanhu vazhinji ava vabudiswa panze, akapinda uye akasvikobata mwanasikana uya ruoko achibva amuka." 
Matthew9:26 Nhau dzezvakaitika izvi, dzakapararira nedunhu rose." 
Matthew9:27 Jesu akati achibvapo, akateverwa navarume vaviri vakanga vari mapofu, vaishevedzera vachiti, “Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, tinzwireiwo ngoni!”" 
Matthew9:28 Akati apinda mumba, mapofu aya akauya kwaari, uye Jesu akavabvunza achiti, “Munotenda here kuti ndinogona kukuitirai izvi?” Vakapindura vakati, “Hongu, Ishe.”" 
Matthew9:29 Ipapo akabata meso avo uye akati, “Maererano nokutenda kwenyu, ngazviitwe kwamuri.”" 
Matthew9:30 Uye meso avo akabva asvinudzwa. Jesu akavayambira chaizvo achiti, “Musawana wamunoudza pamusoro paizvozvi.”" 
Matthew9:31 Asi ivo vakaenda vakataura nezvake mudunhu rose iri. 
Matthew9:32 Vakati vachibuda, mumwe murume akanga ari mbeveve uye akabatwa nedhimoni akauyiswa kuna Jesu." 
Matthew9:33 Dhimoni rakati radzingwa, munhu uya akanga ari mbeveve akataura. Vanhu vazhinji vakashamiswa uye vakati, “Zvakadai hazvisati zvamboonekwa muIsraeri.”" 
Matthew9:34 Asi vaFarisi vakati, “Anodzinga madhimoni nomukuru wamadhimoni.”" 
Matthew9:35 Jesu akafamba nomumaguta ose nemisha yose, achidzidzisa mumasinagoge avo achiparidza nhau dzakanaka dzoumambo uye achiporesa zvirwere zvose nehosha dzose." 
Matthew9:36 Akati achiona vanhu vazhinji, akavanzwira tsitsi nokuti vaishushwa uye vakanga vasina simba, vakaita samakwai asina mufudzi." 
Matthew9:37 Ipapo akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Kukohwa kukuru asi vashandi vashoma." 
Matthew9:38 Naizvozvo kumbirai kuna Ishe wokukohwa kuti atumire vashandi mukukohwa kwake.” 
Matthew10:1 Akadana vadzidzi vake gumi navaviri akavapa simba rokudzinga mweya yakaipa nokuporesa marudzi ose ezvirwere namarudzi ose ehosha. 
Matthew10:2 Zvino aya ndiwo mazita avapostori gumi navaviri: wokutanga ndiSimoni ainzi (Petro) nomunun'una wake Andirea; Jakobho mwanakomana waZebhedhi nomunun'una wake Johani; 
Matthew10:3 Firipi naBhatoromeo; Tomasi naMateo muteresi; Jakhobo mwanakomana waArifeo naTadheo; 
Matthew10:4 Simoni muZiroti naJudhasi Iskarioti uyo akazomupandukira. 
Matthew10:5 Ava gumi navaviri Jesu akavatuma, akavarayira achiti, “Musaenda munzira yavaHedheni kana kupinda muguta ripi zvaro ravaSamaria." 
Matthew10:6 Asi endai kumakwai akarasika eimba yaIsraeri. 
Matthew10:7 Pamunoenda, muparidze muchiti, ‘Umambo hwokudenga hwaswedera.’" 
Matthew10:8 Poresai vanorwara, mutsai vakafa, natsai vaya vana maperembudzi, dzingai madhimoni. Makangogamuchira, chingopai henyu." 
Matthew10:9 Musatakura goridhe, kana sirivha kana ndarira, muzvikwama zvenyu;" 
Matthew10:10 musatakura hombodo yorwendo kana dzimwe nguo, shangu kana tsvimbo nokuti mushandi anofanira kurarama nomubayiro webasa rake." 
Matthew10:11 “Muguta ripi neripi nomusha upi noupi wamunenge mapinda, tsvakai munhu akakodzera uye mugogara mumba make kusvikira mabvamo." 
Matthew10:12 Pamunopinda mumusha, kwazisai vanenge varimo." 
Matthew10:13 Kana musha uyu wakakodzera, rugare rwenyu ngaruuye pauri asi kana usina kukodzera, rugare rwenyu ngarudzokere kwamuri." 
Matthew10:14 Kana ani naani zvake akasakugamuchirai, kana kuteerera mashoko enyu, gumai guruva retsoka dzenyu pamunenge mobva pamusha ipapo kana muguta imomo." 
Matthew10:15 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti zvichava nani kuSodhomu neGomora pazuva rokutongwa pane zvichaitwa kuguta iroro. 
Matthew10:16 Ndiri kukutumai samakwai pakati pamapere. Naizvozvo ivai vakachenjera senyoka uye mugova vasina mhosva senjiva. 
Matthew10:17 Chenjerai kuti vanhu vachakuisai kumatare uye vagokurovai mumasinagoge avo. 
Matthew10:18 “Nokuda kwangu, vachakuendesai pamberi pavabati namadzishe kuti muve zvapupu zvangu kwavari nokuvaHedheni." 
Matthew10:19 Asi kana vakusungai, musafunganya pamusoro pokuti muchataurei kana kuti muchataura sei. Panguva iyoyo muchapiwa zvokutaura," 
Matthew10:20 nokuti munenge musiri imi munotaura, asi Mweya waBaba venyu uchataura nomamuri." 
Matthew10:21 “Mukoma achaurayisa munun'una wake, nababa mwana wavo zvimwe chetezvo, vana vachapandukira vabereki vavo uye vachavaurayisa." 
Matthew10:22 Vanhu vose vachakuvengai nokuda kwangu, asi uyo achatsungirira kusvikira kumagumo achaponeswa." 
Matthew10:23 Kana mukatambudzwa mune rimwe guta, tizirai kune rimwe. Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti hamungapoteredzi maguta ose omuIsraeri Mwanakomana woMunhu asati adzoka." 
Matthew10:24 “Mudzidzi haasi mukuru kumudzidzisi wake, kana muranda kuna ishe wake." 
Matthew10:25 Zvakakwana kuti mudzidzi ave somudzidzisi wake nomurandawo sashe wake. Zvino kana mukuru weimba akanzi ndiBheerizebhubhi, vachadaro zvikuru sei kune veimba yake!" 
Matthew10:26 “Naizvozvo musavatya. Hapana chakavanzika chisingazobudiswi pachena kana chakavigwa chisingazozivikanwi. 
Matthew10:27 Zvandinokuudzai murima muzvitaure muchiedza; zvinozevezerwa munzeve dzenyu, muzviparidze muri pamusoro pedzimba." 
Matthew10:28 Musatya avo vanouraya muviri asi vasingagoni kuuraya mweya. Asi mutye uyo anogona kuparadza zvose muviri nomweya mugehena. 
Matthew10:29 Ko, shiri duku mbiri hadzitengeswi nesendi here? Kunyange zvakadaro hapana imwe chete yadzo inowira pasi kunze kwokunge Baba venyu vazvibvumira." 
Matthew10:30 Uye kunyange nebvudzi riri mumusoro yenyu rakaverengwa. 
Matthew10:31 Naizvozvo musatya nokuti munokosha kupfuura shiri duku zhinji. 
Matthew10:32 “Ani naani anondipupura pamberi pavanhu neniwo ndichamupupura pamberi paBaba vangu vari kudenga. 
Matthew10:33 Asi ani naani anondiramba pamberi pavanhu, neni ndichamuramba pamberi paBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew10:34 “Musafunga kuti ndakauya kuzouyisa rugare panyika. Handina kuuya kuzouyisa rugare asi munondo. 
Matthew10:35 Ndakauya kuti: “ ‘mwanakomana apesane nababa vake, mwanasikana apesane namai vake, muroora apesane navamwene vake," 
Matthew10:36 vavengi vomunhu vachava hama dzake dzomumba.’ 
Matthew10:37 “Ani naani achada baba vake kana mai vake kupfuura ini haana kukodzera kuva wangu; uye ani naani anoda mwanakomana kana mwanasikana wake kupfuura ini haana kukodzera kuva wangu. 
Matthew10:38 Uye uyo asingatakuri muchinjikwa wake akanditevera haana kukodzera kuva wangu. 
Matthew10:39 Ani naani anowana upenyu hwake acharasikirwa nahwo, asi uyo acharasikirwa noupenyu hwake nokuda kwangu achahuwana." 
Matthew10:40 “Anokugamuchirai anogamuchira ini, uye anogamuchira ini anogamuchira iye akandituma." 
Matthew10:41 Ani naani anogamuchira muprofita nokuti muprofita achagamuchira mubayiro womuprofita, uye ani naani anogamuchira munhu akarurama nokuda kwokuti akarurama, achagamuchira mubayiro womunhu akarurama." 
Matthew10:42 Uye kana munhu akapa mukombe wemvura inotonhorera kuno mumwe wavaduku ava nokuda kwokuti iye mudzidzi wangu, ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti haazorasikirwi nomubayiro wake.”" 
Matthew11:1 Jesu akati apedza kurayira vadzidzi vake gumi navaviri, akabvapo akandodzidzisa nokuparidza mumaguta omuGarirea." 
Matthew11:2 Zvino Johani ari mutorongo akanga anzwa mabasa aJesu, akabva atuma vadzidzi vake" 
Matthew11:3 kundobvunza vachiti, “Ko, ndimi iye akanga achinzi anouya here, kana kuti totarisira mumwe?”" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Dzokerai mundoudza Johani zvamuri kunzwa nezvamuri kuona:" 
Matthew11:5 Mapofu ava kuona, zvirema zvava kufamba, vana maperembudzi vanoporeswa, matsi dzonzwa, vakafa vari kumutswa, uye kuti nhau dzakanaka dziri kuparidzirwa varombo." 
Matthew11:6 Akaropafadzwa munhu asingagumburwi nokuda kwangu.” 
Matthew11:7 Vadzidzi vaJohani pavakanga voenda Jesu akatanga kuudza vanhu vazhinji nezvaJohani achiti, “Makaenda kurenje kundoonei? Rutsanga rwaizungunuswa nemhepo here?" 
Matthew11:8 Kana zvisizvo, makabuda kundoonei? Maindoona murume akanga akapfeka nguo dzakanaka here? Kwete, avo vanopfeka nguo dzakanaka vari mumizinda yamadzimambo." 
Matthew11:9 Zvino makabuda kundooneiko? Muprofita here? Hongu, ndinoti kwamuri anopfuura kwazvo muprofita." 
Matthew11:10 Iyeyu ndiye akanyorwa nezvake zvichinzi: “ ‘Ndinotuma nhume yangu mberi kwako uye achakugadzirira nzira yako mberi kwako.’ 
Matthew11:11 “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti: Pavanhu vose vakaberekwa navakadzi, hapana mukuru kuna Johani Mubhabhatidzi. Asi muduku muushe hwokudenga mukuru kwaari." 
Matthew11:12 Kubva pamazuva aJohani Mubhabhatidzi kusvikira zvino, umambo hwokudenga hwanga huchipfuurira mberi nechisimba, uye varume vechisimba vanohutora." 
Matthew11:13 Nokuti Vaprofita vose neMirayiro vakaprofita kusvikira pana Johani. 
Matthew11:14 Kana muchida kuzvigamuchira, ndiye Eria akanga achizouya." 
Matthew11:15 Uyo ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe. 
Matthew11:16 “Rudzi urwu ndingaruenzanisa nei? Vakafanana navana vari mumisika vari kudanidzira kuna vamwe vachiti: 
Matthew11:17 “ ‘Takakuridzirai hwamanda, asi hamuna kutamba; takaimba rwiyo rworufu, uye hamuna kuchema.’" 
Matthew11:18 “Nokuti Johani akanga asingadyi kana kunwa asi vakati, ‘Ane dhimoni.’" 
Matthew11:19 Mwanakomana woMunhu akanga achidya nokunwa, zvino vanoti, ‘Houno wamakaro nomunwi, shamwari yavateresi navatadzi.’ Asi uchenjeri hunozviratidza kuti hwakarurama namabasa ahwo.”" 
Matthew11:20 Ipapo Jesu akatanga kutuka maguta akanga aitwa zvishamiso zvake zvizhinji, nokuti akanga asina kutendeuka." 
Matthew11:21 “Une nhamo iwe Korazini! Une nhamo iwe Bhetisaidha! Kudai zvishamiso zvakaitwa mauri zvainge zvakaitwa muTire neSidhoni vangadai vakatendeuka kare vakapfeka masaga uye vakazvizora dota. 
Matthew11:22 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti Tire neSidhoni zvicharerukirwa pazuva rokutongwa kupfuura imi. 
Matthew11:23 Uye iwe Kapenaume, uchasimudzirwa kudenga here? Kwete, asi uchaiswa pakadzikadzika. Dai zvishamiso zvakaitwa mauri zvainge zvakaitwa muSodhomu, ringadai richiripo nanhasi." 
Matthew11:24 Asi ndinokuudza kuti guta reSodhomu richarerukirwa pazuva rokutongwa kupfuura iwe.” 
Matthew11:25 Panguva iyoyo Jesu akati, “Ndinokurumbidzai Baba, Ishe wedenga nenyika, nokuti makavanza zvinhu izvi kuna vakachenjera navakadzidza, uye mukazvizarurira kuvana vaduku." 
Matthew11:26 Hongu, Baba nokuti izvi ndizvo zvakakufadzai." 
Matthew11:27 “Zvinhu zvose zvakapiwa kwandiri naBaba vangu. Hakuna anoziva Mwanakomana kunze kwaBaba, uye hakuna anoziva Baba kunze kwoMwanakomana naavo chete Mwanakomana vaanenge asarudza kuti avazarurire." 
Matthew11:28 “Uyai kwandiri, imi mose makaneta makaremerwa, uye ndichakupai zororo." 
Matthew11:29 Takurai joko rangu, mudzidze kwandiri, nokuti ndiri munyoro uye ndine mwoyo unozvininipisa, uye muchawana zororo remweya yenyu." 
Matthew11:30 Nokuti joko rangu hariremi uye mutoro wangu wakareruka.” 
Matthew12:1 Panguva iyoyo Jesu akapfuura nomuminda yaiva nezviyo uri musi weSabata. Vadzidzi vake vakanga vava nenzara ndokubva vatanga kupurura hura hwezviyo zviya vachidya. 
Matthew12:2 VaFarisi pavakazviona, vakati kwaari, “Tarirai, vadzidzi venyu vari kuita zvisingabvumirwi nomusi weSabata.”" 
Matthew12:3 Akati kwavari, “Ko, hamuna kuverenga here zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi navamwe vake pavakanga vava nenzara?" 
Matthew12:4 Akapinda muimba yaMwari iye nevamwe vake vakadya chingwa chitsvene chavaisabvumirwa kudya, asi chaingodyiwa navaprista chete." 
Matthew12:5 Kana kuti hamuna kuverenga here muMurayiro kuti nomusi weSabata vaprista mutemberi vanosvibisa zuva iri asi vasingapiwi mhosva? 
Matthew12:6 Ndinokuudzai kuti mukuru kupfuura temberi ari pano. 
Matthew12:7 Dai maiziva zvinorehwa namashoko anoti, ‘Ndinoda ngoni, kwete zvibayiro,’ hamaizopa mhosva vasina mhosva." 
Matthew12:8 Nokuti Mwanakomana woMunhu ndiye Ishe weSabata.” 
Matthew12:9 Achipfuurira mberi kubva panzvimbo iyoyo, akapinda musinagoge ravo," 
Matthew12:10 uye makanga muno murume akanga ano ruoko rwakanga rwakakokonyara. Vachitsvaka mhosva yokupomera Jesu vakamubvunza vakati, “Zviri pamutemo here kuporesa nomusi weSabata?”" 
Matthew12:11 Akati kwavari, “Kana mumwe wenyu aine gwai, rikawira mugomba nomusi weSabata, haangatambanudzi ruoko rwake akaribudisa here?" 
Matthew12:12 Ko, zvino munhu akakosha zvakadini pane gwai! Naizvozvo zviri pamutemo kuita zvakanaka nomusi weSabata.”" 
Matthew12:13 Akati kumurume uya, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako.” Akarutambanudza rukapora rukava sorumwe." 
Matthew12:14 Asi vaFarisi vakabuda kundorangana kuti vangamuuraya sei. 
Matthew12:15 Achiziva izvi, Jesu akabva panzvimbo iyi. Vazhinji vakamutevera, akaporesa varwere vavo vose." 
Matthew12:16 Akavayambira kuti vasafamba vachitaura kuti iye ndiye ani. 
Matthew12:17 Izvi zvakanga zvichizadzisa zvainge zvataurwa nomuprofita Isaya achiti: 
Matthew12:18 “Houno muranda wangu wandakasarudza, wandinoda, anondifadza; ndichaisa Mweya wangu paari, iye achazivisa nyika kutonga kwakarurama." 
Matthew12:19 Haazokakavari kana kuridza mhere; hakuna anozonzwa inzwi rake mumigwagwa. 
Matthew12:20 Rutsanga rwakapwanyika haangarutyori, nomwenje unopfuta zvishoma haangaudzimi, kusvikira atungamirira kutonga kwakarurama mukukunda." 
Matthew12:21 Marudzi ose achaisa tariro yawo muzita rake.” 
Matthew12:22 Ipapo vakauya kwaari nomunhu akanga akabatwa nedhimoni ari bofu uye ari mbeveve, uye Jesu akamuporesa, zvokuti akagona zvose kutaura nokuona." 
Matthew12:23 Vanhu vose vakashamiswa uye vakati, “Kuti uyu angava Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi here?”" 
Matthew12:24 Asi vaFarisi pavakanzwa izvi, vakati, “NdiBheerizebhubhi chete, muchinda wamadhimoni, waanodzinga naye madhimoni.”" 
Matthew12:25 Jesu akaziva pfungwa dzavo akati kwavari, “Umambo hwose hunozvipesanisa huchaparara, uye guta ripi neripi kana imba ipi neipi inozvipesanisa haingamiri." 
Matthew12:26 Zvino kana Satani achibudisa mumwe Satani, zvinoreva kuti anozvipesanisa. Saka umambo hwake hungamira sei?" 
Matthew12:27 Zvino kana ini ndichibudisa madhimoni naBheerizebhubhi, ko, vanakomana venyu vanoabudisa naani?" 
Matthew12:28 Asi kana ndichibudisa madhimoni noMweya waMwari ipapo umambo hwaMwari hwasvika kwamuri. 
Matthew12:29 “Uyezve, munhu angapinda sei mumba momunhu ane simba uye agoenda nezvinhu zvake asina kutanga asunga munhu uyu ane simba? Ipapo anogona kuzopamba imba yake." 
Matthew12:30 “Uyo asineni anopesana neni, nouyo asingaunganidzi neni anoparadza." 
Matthew12:31 Uye naizvozvo ndinokuudzai kuti, vanhu vacharegererwa zvivi zvose nokumhura kwose asi kumhura Mweya hakuzoregererwi." 
Matthew12:32 Ani naani achataura zvakaipa pamusoro poMwanakomana woMunhu acharegererwa, asi ani naani achataura zvakaipa pamusoro poMweya Mutsvene haazoregererwi, kunyange panguva ino kana inouya." 
Matthew12:33 “Itai kuti muti uve wakanaka uye michero yawo ichava yakanaka kana kuti itai kuti muti uve wakaipa, uye michero yawo ichava yakaipa, nokuti muti uchazivikanwa nemichero yawo." 
Matthew12:34 Imi vana venyoka, zvingaitike here kuti imi makaipa kudai mutaure chipi zvacho chakanaka? Nokuti muromo unotaura zviri mumwoyo." 
Matthew12:35 Munhu akanaka anobudisa zvakanaka zvagara zviri mudura romwoyo wake, uye munhu akaipa anobudisa zvakaipa zvagara zviri mudura romwoyo wake." 
Matthew12:36 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti vanhu vachazvidavirira pamusi wokutongwa pamusoro peshoko rimwe nerimwe ravakataura risina maturo. 
Matthew12:37 Nokuti namashoko ako uchapembedzwa, uye namashoko ako uchatongwa.”" 
Matthew12:38 Ipapo vamwe vaFarisi navadzidzisi vomurayiro vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, tinoda kuona chiratidzo chechishamiso kubva kwamuri.”" 
Matthew12:39 Akavapindura akati, “Rudzi rwakaipa nerwoupombwe runokumbira chiratidzo! Asi hapana chiratidzo chichapiwa kwarwuri kunze chete kwechiratidzo chomuprofita Jona." 
Matthew12:40 Nokuti Jona sezvaakaita mazuva matatu nousiku hutatu ari mudumbu rehove huru, saizvozvo Mwanakomana woMunhu achava mumwoyo wenyika kwamazuva matatu nousiku hutatu." 
Matthew12:41 Vanhu veNinevhe vachamira pakutongwa pamwe chete norudzi urwu uye vacharupa mhosva; nokuti vakatendeuka pakuparidza kwaJona, uye zvino mukuru kuna Jona ari pano." 
Matthew12:42 Mambokadzi weZasi achasimuka pakutongwa pamwe chete norudzi urwu uye acharupa mhosva, nokuti akabva kumagumo enyika kuti azoteerera kuuchenjeri hwaSoromoni, uye zvino mukuru kuna Soromoni ari pano." 
Matthew12:43 “Kana mweya wakaipa wabva pano munhu, unofamba-famba nomunzvimbo dzakaoma uchitsvaka zororo asi unorishaya." 
Matthew12:44 Ipapo unoti, ‘Ndichadzokera kumba kwandakabva.’ Kana wasvika, unosvikowana imba iya isina ageremo, asi yakanyatsotsvairwa zvakachena nokunyatsorongedzwa zvakanaka." 
Matthew12:45 Ipapo unobva waenda kundotsvaka mimwe mweya minomwe yakaipa kukunda iwo, uye inopinda igogaramo. Uye kupedzisira kwomunhu uyu kwakaipa kupfuura kutanga kwake. Ndizvo zvazvichaita norudzi urwu rwakaipa.”" 
Matthew12:46 Jesu paakanga achiri kutaura kuvanhu vazhinji, mai vake navanun'una vake vakamira panze vachida kutaura naye." 
Matthew12:47 Mumwe akamuudza kuti, “Mai venyu navanun'una venyu vamire panze, vari kuda kutaura nemi.”" 
Matthew12:48 Akamupindura akati, “Ko, mai vangu ndiani, navanun'una vangu ndivanaani?”" 
Matthew12:49 Achinongedzera vadzidzi vake akati, “Ava ndivo mai vangu navanun'una vangu." 
Matthew12:50 Nokuti ani naani anoita kuda kwaBaba vangu vari kudenga ndiye munun'una wangu nehanzvadzi yangu, namai vangu.”" 
Matthew13:1 Musi mumwe chetewo, Jesu akabuda mumba akandogara nechokugungwa." 
Matthew13:2 Vanhu vazhinji vakamuunganira zvokuti akapinda mugwa akagaramo, ipapo vanhu vakamira kumahombekombe." 
Matthew13:3 Ipapo akavaudza zvinhu zvizhinji nemifananidzo, achiti, “Murimi akabuda kundokusha mbeu dzake." 
Matthew13:4 Paakanga achikusha mbeu, dzimwe dzakawira munzira, shiri dzikauya dzikadzidya." 
Matthew13:5 Dzimwe dzakawira parukangarahwe, padzakashaya ivhu rakakwana. Dzakamera nokukurumidza nokuti ivhu rakanga risina kudzika." 
Matthew13:6 Asi zuva rakati rabuda, mbeu dzakatsva uye dzikaoma nokuti dzakanga dzisina midzi." 
Matthew13:7 Dzimwe mbeu dzakawira muminzwa, minzwa ikakura ikadzivhunga." 
Matthew13:8 Dzimwewo mbeu dzakawira pavhu rakanaka, dzikabereka zvakapetwa kazana, kana zvakapetwa makumi matanhatu kana makumi matatu pane dzainge dzakushwa." 
Matthew13:9 Uyo ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe.” 
Matthew13:10 Vadzidzi vakauya kwaari vakasvikomubvunza vachiti, “Ko, munotaurirei kuvanhu nemifananidzo?”" 
Matthew13:11 Akapindura achiti, “Ruzivo rwezvakavanzika zvoumambo hwokudenga rwakapiwa kwamuri imi, asi kwete kwavari." 
Matthew13:12 Kune anazvo achapiwazve zvimwe, uye achava nezvakawanda. Asi ani naani asina kunyange nezvishoma zvaanazvo achazvitorerwa." 
Matthew13:13 Ndokusaka ndichitaura kwavari nemifananidzo: “Kunyange vachiona asi havaoni, kunyange vachinzwa asi havanzwi kana kunzwisisa." 
Matthew13:14 Mavari munozadzisa chiprofita chaIsaya chinoti: “ ‘Muchangoramba muchinzwa asi musinganzwisisi; muchangoramba muchiona asi musingaonesesi. 
Matthew13:15 Nokuti mwoyo yavanhu ava mikukutu, havatombonzwi nenzeve dzavo, uye vakatsinzina meso avo. Zvichida vangaona nameso avo, vakanzwa nenzeve dzavo, vakanzwisisa nemwoyo yavo, vakapinduka, uye ndigovaporesa.’" 
Matthew13:16 Asi akaropafadzwa meso enyu nokuti anoona nenzeve dzenyu nokuti dzinonzwa. 
Matthew13:17 Nokuti, ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti vaprofita vazhinji navanhu vakarurama vaida kuona zvinhu zvamuri kuona asi havana kuzviona, nokunzwa zvamuri kunzwa asi havana kuzvinzwa." 
Matthew13:18 “Teererai zvino munzwe zvinorehwa nomufananidzo womukushi: 
Matthew13:19 Kana munhu akanzwa shoko roumambo, akasarinzwisisa, akaipa anouya osvikobvuta zviya zvanga zvadyarwa mumwoyo make. Iyi ndiyo mbeu yakakushwa munzira." 
Matthew13:20 Uyo akagamuchira mbeu yakawira parukangarahwe, ndiye munhu anonzwa shoko, pakarepo origamuchira norufaro." 
Matthew13:21 Asi nokuti haana mudzi, anongorarama naro kwechinguva chipfupi. Kana nhamo kana kutambudzwa zvauya nokuda kweshoko, anokurumidza kugumburwa." 
Matthew13:22 Uyo akagamuchira mbeu yakawira muminzwa, munhu anonzwa shoko asi kufunganya kwenyika nokunyengera kwepfuma zvinorivhunga robva rashaya zvibereko." 
Matthew13:23 Asi uyo anogamuchira shoko rakawira muvhu rakanaka ndiye munhu anonzwa shoko orinzwisisa. Ndiye anobereka mbeu inoburitsa zana, kana makumi matanhatu kana makumi matatu ezvakakushwa.”" 
Matthew13:24 Jesu akavaudza mumwe mufananidzo achiti, “Umambo hwokudenga hunofananidzwa nomunhu akakusha mbeu yakanaka mumunda make." 
Matthew13:25 Asi munhu wose avete, muvengi wake akauya akakusha sawi pakati pegorosi, ndokubva aenda." 
Matthew13:26 Asi kuzoti gorosi ramera rikatumbuka, ipapo sawi rakaonekwawo." 
Matthew13:27 “Varanda vomuridzi womunda vakauya kwaari vakasvikoti, ‘Ishe, hamuna kukusha mbeu yakanaka mumunda menyu here? Ko, zvino sawi rakazobvepi?’" 
Matthew13:28 “Iye akavapindura achiti, ‘Muvengi ndiye akaita izvi.’ ” “Varanda vakamubvunza vakati, ‘Munoda kuti tiende kunoridzura here?’" 
Matthew13:29 “Akapindura akati, ‘Kwete, nokuti paya pamunodzura sawi, mungazodzura pamwe chete nezviyo." 
Matthew13:30 Regai zvikurirane pamwe chete, tozozviona pakukohwa. Panguva iyoyo ndinozoudza vakohwi kuti: Tangai kuunganidza sawi murisunge muzvisote zvichazopiswa. Mushure mozounganidza gorosi mugoriisa mudura rangu.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Akavaudzazve mumwe mufananidzo achiti, “Umambo hwokudenga hwakafanana nembeu yemasitadhi iyo yakatorwa nomunhu akaidyara mumunda make." 
Matthew13:32 Kunyange zvazvo iri iyo mbeu dukusa pambeu dzenyu, asi kana painokura ndiyo huru kwazvo pambeu dzose dzomubindu uye inova muti zvokuti shiri dzedenga dzinouya dzichimhara pamapazi awo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Akavaudzazve mumwe mufananidzo achiti, “Umambo hwokudenga hwakafanana nembiriso, iyo inotorwa nomunhukadzi oisanganisa nefurawa yakawanda, igoita kuti furawa iyi ifute.”" 
Matthew13:34 Jesu akataura zvinhu izvi zvose kuvanhu nemifananidzo. Haana chaakataura kwavari asingashandisi mifananidzo. 
Matthew13:35 Saizvozvo zvakazadziswa zvakanga zvataurwa kubudikidza nomuprofita zvichinzi: “Ndichataura nemifananidzo, ndichataura zvinhu zvakavanzika kubva pakusikwa kwenyika.”" 
Matthew13:36 Ipapo akasiya vanhu vazhinji akapinda mumba. Vadzidzisi vake vakauya kwaari vakasvikoti, “Titsanangurirei zvinorehwa nomufananidzo wamasawi mumunda.”" 
Matthew13:37 Akapindura akati, “Uyo akadyara mbeu yakanaka ndiye Mwanakomana woMunhu." 
Matthew13:38 Munda ndiyo nyika, uye mbeu yakanaka inomirira vana voumambo. Masawi ndiwo vanakomana vowakaipa," 
Matthew13:39 muvengi anoadyara ndiye dhiabhori. Kukohwa ndiko kuguma kwenyika, uye vakohwi ndivo vatumwa." 
Matthew13:40 “Sokudzurwa kunoitwa masawi achipiswa mumoto, ndizvo zvazvichaita pakuguma kwenyika." 
Matthew13:41 Mwanakomana woMunhu achatuma vatumwa vake uye vachadzura kubva muumambo hwake zvose zvinokonzera chivi navose vanoita zvakaipa. 
Matthew13:42 Vachavakanda muvira romoto umo muchava nokuchema nokurumanya kwameno. 
Matthew13:43 Ipapo vakarurama vachapenya sezuva vari muumambo hwaBaba vavo. Uyo ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe. 
Matthew13:44 “Umambo hwaMwari hwakafanana nepfuma yakavigwa mumunda. Mumwe murume akati aiwana, akaivigazve, uye ipapo mukufara kwake, akaenda akandotengesa zvose zvaaiva nazvo ndokutenga munda iwoyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Umambo hwokudenga hwakafananazve nomutengesi wezvinhu anotsvaka maparera akaisvonaka. 
Matthew13:46 Akati awana rimwe rawo rinokosha akaenda akandotengesa zvose zvaakanga anazvo uye akaritenga. 
Matthew13:47 “Zvakare umambo hwokudenga hwakafanana nousvasvi hwakakandwa mugungwa uye hukabata marudzi ose ehove. 
Matthew13:48 Pahwakanga hwazara vabati vehove vakahukwevera kunze kumahombekombe. Ipapo vakagara pasi vakasarudza hove dzakanaka vakadziisa mumidziyo, asi dzakaipa vakadzirasa." 
Matthew13:49 Izvi ndizvo zvazvichaita pakuguma kwenyika. Vatumwa vachauya vagotsaura vakaipa kubva kune vakarurama," 
Matthew13:50 uye vagovakanda muvira romoto, kuchava nokuchema nokurumanya kwameno.”" 
Matthew13:51 Jesu akabvunza akati, “Manzwisisa zvinhu izvi zvose here?” Vakapindura vakati, “Hongu.”" 
Matthew13:52 Akati kwavari, “Naizvozvo mudzidzisi mumwe nomumwe womurayiro akadzidziswa nezvoumambo hwokudenga akafanana nomuridzi weimba anoburitsa pfuma itsva netsaru muimba yake yokuchengetera zvinhu.”" 
Matthew13:53 Jesu akati apedza mifananidzo iyi, akabvapo." 
Matthew13:54 Akapinda muguta rokwake akatanga kudzidzisa vanhu musinagoge ravo, uye vakashamiswa nazvo. Vakabvunza vachiti, “Murume uyu akawanepi uchenjeri uhu namasimba ezvishamiso aya?" 
Matthew13:55 Ko, haasi mwanakomana womuvezi here? Mai vake havasi Maria here, navanun'una vake vanoti Jakobho, Josefa, Simoni naJudhasi?" 
Matthew13:56 Uye hanzvadzi dzake hadzisi pakati pedu dzose here? Ko, zvino murume uyu akawanepi zvinhu zvose izvi?”" 
Matthew13:57 Vakagumburwa naye. Asi Jesu akati kwavari, “Muprofita haashayiwi kukudzwa asi munyika yake nomumba make.”" 
Matthew13:58 Uye haana kuzoita zvishamiso zvizhinji imomo nokuda kwokusatenda kwavo. 
Matthew14:1 Panguva iyoyo mambo Herodhi akanzwa nezvaJesu 
Matthew14:2 uye akati kuvaranda vake, “Uyu ndiJohani Mubhabhatidzi; amuka kubva kuvakafa! Ndokusaka masimba ezvishamiso achishanda maari.”" 
Matthew14:3 Zvino Herodhi ainge abata Johani akamusunga achibva amuisa mutorongo nokuda kwaHerodhiasi mudzimai waFiripi, munun'una wake," 
Matthew14:4 sezvo Johani ainge ati kwaari, “Hautenderwi kutora mukadzi uyu.”" 
Matthew14:5 Herodhi aida kuuraya Johani asi aitya vanhu nokuti vaimuona somuprofita. 
Matthew14:6 Asi zuva rokupemberera kuberekwa kwaHerodhi rakati rasvika, mwanasikana waHerodhiasi akatamba pamberi pavo uye zvikafadza Herodhi kwazvo," 
Matthew14:7 zvokuti akamuvimbisa nemhiko kuti aizomupa chipi nechipi chaaizokumbira. 
Matthew14:8 Arayirwa namai vake mwanasikana akati, “Ndipei pano musoro waJohani Mubhabhatidzi uri mundiro.”" 
Matthew14:9 Mambo akasuwiswa nazvo, asi nokuda kwemhiko yake uye navaainge agere navo pakudya, akarayira kuti upiwe kwaari," 
Matthew14:10 ndokutuma vanhu kundogura musoro waJohani mutorongo. 
Matthew14:11 Uye musoro wake wakauyiwa nawo uri mundiro uye ukapiwa kumusikana, iye akaenda nawo kuna mai vake." 
Matthew14:12 Vadzidzi vaJohani vakauya vakatora mutumbi wake vakandouviga. Vakazoenda vakandoudza Jesu. 
Matthew14:13 Jesu paakanzwa zvakanga zvaitika, akabvapo negwa ari oga akaenda kurenje. Vachinzwa izvi, vanhu vazhinji vakamutevera netsoka vachibva kumaguta." 
Matthew14:14 Paakabuda mugwa, Jesu akaona vanhu vazhinji, akavanzwira tsitsi uye akaponesa varwere vavo." 
Matthew14:15 Zvino ava madekwana, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vakati, “Tiri musango, uye kwava kusviba. Endesai vanhu ava, kuti vaende mumisha vandozvitengera zvokudya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Havafaniri kuenda. Imi vapei chavangadye.”" 
Matthew14:17 Ivo vakapindura vakati, “Pano tinongova nezvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri.”" 
Matthew14:18 Akati, “Uyai nazvo kuno kwandiri.”" 
Matthew14:19 Uye akarayira kuti vanhu vagare pasi pauswa. Akatora zvingwa zvishanu nehove dziya mbiri akatarira kudenga akavonga, akazviropafadza uye akazvimedura. Ipapo akazvipa kuvadzidzi uye vadzidzi vakapa vanhu." 
Matthew14:20 Vose vakadya vakaguta, uye vadzidzi vakaunganidza zvimedu zvainge zvasara zvikazadza matengu gumi namaviri." 
Matthew14:21 Vanhu vakadya vaisvika varume zviuru zvishanu pasingaverengwi vakadzi navana. 
Matthew14:22 Pakarepo Jesu akaudza vadzidza vake kuti vapinde mugwa vafanotungamira kuenda kune rimwe divi, iye ndokusara achiendesa vanhu vazhinji ava." 
Matthew14:23 Mushure mokuendesa vanhu vazhinji ava, akakwira mugomo ari oga kundonyengetera. Madekwana akasvika iye achingovako ari oga," 
Matthew14:24 asi igwa rakanga rava chinhambwe chikuru kwazvo kubva kunyika asi richitambudzwa namasaisai nokuti mhepo yairwisana naro. 
Matthew14:25 Panguva yechina yousiku Jesu akaenda kwavari, achifamba pamusoro pegungwa." 
Matthew14:26 Vadzidzi pavakamuona achifamba pamusoro pegungwa vakatya kwazvo. Vakaridza mhere nokutya vakati, “Hero dzangaradzimu!”" 
Matthew14:27 Asi pakarepo Jesu akati kwavari, “Musatya, ndini!”" 
Matthew14:28 Petro akapindura akati, “Ishe, kana murimi ndirayirei kuti ndiuye kwamuri ndichifamba pamusoro pemvura.”" 
Matthew14:29 Iye akati, “Uya.” Ipapo Petro akabuda mugwa akafamba pamusoro pemvura akananga kuna Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Asi akati achiona mhepo ine simba, akatya, ndokubva atanga kunyura, achibva adanidzira achiti, “Ishe, ndiponesei!”" 
Matthew14:31 Pakarepo Jesu akatambanudza ruoko rwake akamubata, uye akati kwaari, “Iwe wokutenda kuduku, sei wakahadzika?”" 
Matthew14:32 Uye vakati vapinda mugwa, mhepo ikanyarara." 
Matthew14:33 Zvino vaya vaiva mugwa vakamunamata vachiti, “Chokwadi muri Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Matthew14:34 Kuzoti vayambukira mhiri, vakaburukira paGenesareti." 
Matthew14:35 Uye varume venzvimbo iyoyo vakati vamuziva, vakatumira shoko mudunhu rose rakapoteredza. Vanhu vakauya navarwere vavo vose kwaari" 
Matthew14:36 uye vakamukumbira zvikuru kuti abvumire varwere kuti vangobata mupendero wenguo yake uye vose vakamubata vakaporeswa. 
Matthew15:1 Ipapo vanyori navaFarisi vakauya kuna Jesu vachibva kuJerusarema uye vakamubvunza vachiti," 
Matthew15:2 “Sei vadzidzi venyu vachityora tsika dzavakuru? Havashambi maoko avo vasati vadya!” 
Matthew15:3 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Ko, imi munotyorerei murayiro waMwari nokuda kwetsika dzenyu?" 
Matthew15:4 Nokuti Mwari akati, ‘Kudza baba vako namai vako’ uye, ‘Ani naani anotuka baba kana mai vake anofanira kuurayiwa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Asi imi munoti kana munhu akati kuna baba vake kana mai vake, ‘Chinhu chipi nechipi chamaiti munozogamuchira kubva kwandiri, chava chipo chakakumikidzwa kuna Mwari," 
Matthew15:6 haachafaniri kukudza baba vake nacho. Saizvozvo munoshayisa shoko raMwari simba nokuda kwetsika dzenyu. 
Matthew15:7 Imi vanyengeri! Isaya akaprofita kwazvo pamusoro penyu achiti: 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Vanhu ava vanondikudza nemiromo yavo, asi mwoyo yavo iri kure neni." 
Matthew15:9 Vanondinamata pasina; vachidzidzisa dzidziso nemirayiro yavanhu.’ ” 
Matthew15:10 Jesu akadana vanhu vazhinji kwaari akati, “Teererai, munzwisise." 
Matthew15:11 Icho chinopinda mumuromo momunhu hachimusvibisi, asi chinobuda mumuromo make ndicho chinomusvibisa.”" 
Matthew15:12 Ipapo vadzidzi vakauya kwaari vakamubvunza vachiti, “Munoziva here kuti vaFarisi vagumburwa pavanzwa shoko iri?”" 
Matthew15:13 Akapindura akati, “Muti mumwe nomumwe usina kusimwa naBaba vangu vokudenga uchadzurwa." 
Matthew15:14 Vasiyei vakadaro, vatungamiriri vamapofu. Kana bofu rikatungamirira rimwe bofu, vose vachawira mugomba.”" 
Matthew15:15 Petro akati, “Titsanangurirei mufananidzo uyu.”" 
Matthew15:16 Jesu akavabvunza akati, “Nemiwo hamusati mava kunzwisisa?" 
Matthew15:17 Hamuoniwo here kuti chose chinopinda mumuromo chinopinda mudumbu chichizobuda kunze! 
Matthew15:18 Asi zvinhu zvinobuda mumuromo zvinobva mumwoyo, izvozvi ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu." 
Matthew15:19 Nokuti mumwoyo munobuda pfungwa dzakaipa, umhondi, upombwe, unzenza, umbavha, uchapupu hwenhema nokureva nhema pamusoro pavamwe vanhu." 
Matthew15:20 Izvi ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu, asi kudya asina kushamba maoko hazvimusvibisi.”" 
Matthew15:21 Jesu akabvapo akaenda kudunhu reTire neSidhoni. 
Matthew15:22 Mumwe mukadzi muKenani womunzvimbo iyi akauya achidanidzira achiti, “Ishe, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, ndinzwirei ngoni! Mwanasikana wangu ari kutambudzwa zvikuru nedhimoni rakamubata.”" 
Matthew15:23 Jesu haana chaakapindura. Ipapa vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vakasvikoti, “Mudzingei nokuti ari kuramba achidanidzira kwatiri.”" 
Matthew15:24 Akati kwavari, “Ndakatumwa kumakwai akarasika eIsraeri chete.”" 
Matthew15:25 Mukadzi uya akauya akasvikopfugama pamberi pake akati, “Ishe, ndibatsireiwo!”" 
Matthew15:26 Akapindura akati, “Hazvina kunaka kutora chingwa chavana muchichikandira imbwa.”" 
Matthew15:27 Mukadzi uya akati, “Hongu Ishe, kunyange nembwa dzinodyawo zvimedu zvinodonha kubva patafura yatenzi wadzo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Ipapo Jesu akapindura akati, “Mai, mune kutenda kukuru! Chikumbiro chenyu chanzwikwa.” Mwanasikana wake akabva aporeswa kubva panguva iyoyo." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu akabvapo akatevedza gungwa reGarirea. Ipapo akakwira mugomo akagara pasi. 
Matthew15:30 Uye vanhu vazhinji vakauya kwaari navakaremara, mapofu, mhetamakumbo, mbeveve navamwe vazhinji, vakasvikovaisa patsoka dzake uye akavaporesa." 
Matthew15:31 Vanhu vakashamiswa kuona mbeveve dzichitaura, mhetamakumbo dzichitwasanudzwa, vakaremara vachifamba namapofu achiona. Vakarumbidza Mwari weIsraeri." 
Matthew15:32 Jesu akadana vadzidzi vake akati kwavari, “Ndiri kunzwa tsitsi pamusoro pavanhu ava; vanga vachingova neni kwamazuva matatu uye havachina chokudya. Handidi kuti ndivaendese vaine nzara nokuti vangaziya nenzara munzira.”" 
Matthew15:33 Vadzidzi vake vakapindura vachiti, “Ndokupi kwatingawana chingwa chinokwana vanhu vose ava muno musango makadai?”" 
Matthew15:34 Jesu akabvunza akati, “Mune zvingwa zvingani?” Ivo vakati, “Tine zvinomwe notuhove tushomashoma.”" 
Matthew15:35 Akarayira kuti vanhu vose vagare pasi. 
Matthew15:36 Ipapo akatora zvingwa zvinomwe zviya nehove dziya, uye akati avonga, akazvimedura ndokuzvipa kuvadzidzi, ivowo ndokupa vanhu vose." 
Matthew15:37 Vose vakadya vakaguta. Mushure, vadzidzi vakanhongera zvimedu zvakanga zvasara zvikazadza matengu manomwe." 
Matthew15:38 Vanhu vakadya vaiva varume zviuru zvina, vakadzi navana vasingaverengerwi." 
Matthew15:39 Mushure mokunge Jesu aendesa vanhu vazhinji ava, akapinda mugwa ndokubva aenda kudunhu reMagadhani." 
Matthew16:1 VaFarisi navaSadhusi vakauya kuna Jesu vakamuedza nokumukumbira kuti avaratidze chiratidzo chinobva kudenga. 
Matthew16:2 Akavapindura achiti, “Panosvika nguva yamadekwana munoti, ‘Mamiriro okunze achange akanaka nokuti denga rakatsvuka.’" 
Matthew16:3 Uye mangwanani munoti, ‘Nhasi kuchanaya mvura ine dutu nokuti denga rakatsvuka uye kwakakwidibira.’ Munoziva kududzira zvinoonekwa mudenga, asi hamugoni kududzira zviratidzo zvenguva." 
Matthew16:4 Rudzi rwakaipa rwoupombwe runotsvaka chiratidzo, asi hapana chichapiwa kwarwuri kunze kwechiratidzo chaJona.” Ipapo Jesu akavasiya, uye akaenda kumwe." 
Matthew16:5 Pavakayambuka mhiri kwegungwa, vadzidzi vakakanganwa kutakura chingwa." 
Matthew16:6 Jesu akati kwavari, “Chenjerai mungwarire mbiriso yavaFarisi navaSadhusi.”" 
Matthew16:7 Vakakurukura nezvenyaya iyi pakati pavo vakati, “Anodaro nokuti hatina kuuya nechingwa.”" 
Matthew16:8 Achiziva izvi Jesu akavabvunza akati, “Imi vokutenda kuduku, ko, muri kutauriranei pakati penyu nezvokusava nechingwa?" 
Matthew16:9 Hamusati mava kunzwisisa here? Hamurangariri here zvingwa zvishanu zvavanhu vane zviuru zvishanu uye kuti makazadza matengu mangani ezvamakaunganidza? 
Matthew16:10 Kana kuti zvingwa zvinomwe zvavanhu zviuru zvina uye kuti makazadza matengu mangani ezvamakaunganidza? 
Matthew16:11 Hamunzwisisi sei kuti ndanga ndisingatauri kwamuri nezvechingwa? Asi chenjererai mbiriso yavaFarisi navaSadhusi.” 
Matthew16:12 Ipapo vakanzwisisa kuti ainge asingavaudzi kuti vachenjerere mbiriso inoshandiswa muchingwa, asi nezvedzidziso yavaFarisi navaSadhusi." 
Matthew16:13 Jesu akati asvika kudunhu reKesaria Firipi, akabvunza vadzidzi vake akati, “Vanhu vanoti Mwanakomana woMunhu ndiani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Vakati, “Vamwe vanoti Johani Mubhabhatidzi, vamwewo vanoti Eria, vamwewo vachiti Jeremia kana mumwe wavaprofita.”" 
Matthew16:15 Akabvunza akati, “Ko, imi munoti ndini ani?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petro akapindura akati, “Ndimi Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari mupenyu.”" 
Matthew16:17 Jesu akapindura akati, “Wakaropafadzwa iwe Simoni mwanakomana waJona, nokuti izvi hazvina kuzarurirwa kwauri nomunhu asi naBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew16:18 Ndinoti kwauri, iwe ndiwe Petro, paruware urwu ndichavaka kereke yangu, kunyange masuwo eHadhesi haangaikundi." 
Matthew16:19 Ndichakupa kiyi dzoumambo hwokudenga; chose chaunosunga pano pasi chichasungwa kudenga, uye chose chaunosunungura pano pasi nokudenga chichasunungurwa.”" 
Matthew16:20 Ipapo akayambira vadzidzi vake kuti vasaudze ani zvake kuti iye ndiye Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kubva panguva iyoyo Jesu akatanga kutsanangurira vadzidzi vake kuti anofanira kuenda kuJerusarema kundotambudzwa zvizhinji pamaoko avakuru navaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vemirayiro uye kuti anofanira kuurayiwa nokumutswazve pazuva retatu. 
Matthew16:22 Petro akamutora padivi akatanga kumutsiura, akati, “Hazviitiki, Ishe. Izvi hazvisi kuzoitika kwamuri!”" 
Matthew16:23 Jesu akatendeukira kwaari akati, “Enda shure kwangu Satani! Uri chigumburiso kwandiri nokuti hauna zvinhu zvaMwari mupfungwa dzako asi zvavanhu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Ipapo Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Kana paine anoda kunditevera, ngaazvirambe, atakure muchinjikwa wake, anditevere." 
Matthew16:25 Nokuti ani naani anoda kuchengetedza upenyu hwake acharasikirwa nahwo, asi ani naani anorasikirwa noupenyu hwake nokuda kwangu achahuwana." 
Matthew16:26 Ko, munhu achabatsirwa nei kana akawana nyika yose, asi achirasikirwa noupenyu hwake? Kana kuti munhu acharipeiko kuti adzikinure upenyu hwake?" 
Matthew16:27 Nokuti Mwanakomana woMunhu achauya ari mukubwinya kwaBaba vake aine vatumwa vake ipapo achapa mubayiro kuno mumwe nomumwe maererano namabasa ake. 
Matthew16:28 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti vamwe vamire pano havazofi vasati vaona Mwanakomana woMunhu achiuya muumambo hwake.” 
Matthew17:1 Mushure memazuva matanhatu Jesu akatora Petro naJakhobho naJohani munun'una waJakhobho akakwira navo mugomo refu vari voga. 
Matthew17:2 Ipapo akashanduka pamberi pavo. Chiso chake chakapenya sezuva uye nguo dzake dzikachena sechiedza. 
Matthew17:3 Pakarepo Mozisi naEria vakangoerekana voonekwa vamire vachitaura naJesu. 
Matthew17:4 Petro akati kuna Jesu, “Ishe zvakatinakira kuva pano. Kana muchida ndingavaka matumba matatu, rimwe renyu, rimwe raMozisi nerimwe raEria.”" 
Matthew17:5 Achiri kutaura kudaro, gore raipenya rakabva ravakwidibira inzwi rikabuda mugore richiti, “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu wandinodisa, anondifadza. Munzwei!”" 
Matthew17:6 Vadzidzi vakati vanzwa izvi, vakawira pasi nezviso zvavo vachitya kwazvo." 
Matthew17:7 Asi Jesu akauya akavabata. Akati, “Mukai. Musatya.”" 
Matthew17:8 Pavakasimudza misoro vachitarisa vakazongoona Jesu ava oga. 
Matthew17:9 Pavakanga vava kuburuka kubva mugomo, Jesu akavarayira achiti, “Musamboudza ani zvake zvamaona izvi kusvikira Mwanakomana woMunhu amutswa kubva kuvakafa.”" 
Matthew17:10 Vadzidzi vakamubvunza vakati, “Ko, sei vadzidzisi vemirayiro vachiti Eria anofanira kutanga kuuya?”" 
Matthew17:11 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ichokwadi kuti Eria achauya agovandudza zvinhu zvose." 
Matthew17:12 Asi ndinokuudzai kuti Eria akatouya kare asi havana kumuziva, uye vakaita kwaari zvavaida. Saizvozvo Mwanakomana woMunhu achatambudzwa pamaoko avo.”" 
Matthew17:13 Ipapo vadzidzi vakanzwisisa kuti aitaura kwavari nezvaJohani Mubhabhatidzi. 
Matthew17:14 Vakati vasvika kuvanhu vazhinji, mumwe murume akauya akasvikopfugama pamberi paJesu akati," 
Matthew17:15 “Ishe, donzwiraiwo mwanakomana wangu tsitsi. Ane zvipusha uye ari kutambudzika kwazvo. Kazhinji zvino muwisira mumoto kana mumvura." 
Matthew17:16 Ndauya naye kuvadzidzi venyu asi havana kugona kumuporesa.” 
Matthew17:17 Jesu akapindura akati, “Haiwa, imi rudzi rusingatendi uye rwakatsauka, ndichagara nemi kusvikira rinhiko? Uyai nomukomana uyu kwandiri.”" 
Matthew17:18 Jesu akatuka dhimoni rikabva rabuda mumukomana uya achibva apora kubva panguva iyoyo. 
Matthew17:19 Ipapo vadzidzi vakauya kuna Jesu vari voga vakamubvunza vachiti, “Ko, takonewa sei kuridzinga?”" 
Matthew17:20 Akavapindura achiti, “Nokuda kwokuti mune kutenda kudiki. Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti dai maiva nokutenda kudiki hako semhodzi yemasitadhi maigona kuti kugomo iri, ‘Ibva apa uende uko,’ zvichiitika. Hapana chamunozokundikana kuita." 
Matthew17:21 Asi rudzi urwu rwomweya runongobviswa chete nokunyengetera nokutsanya.” 
Matthew17:22 Vakati vaungana muGarirea Jesu akati kwavari, “Mwanakomana woMunhu achaiswa mumaoko avanhu." 
Matthew17:23 Vachamuuraya asi pazuva retatu achamutswa.” Uye vadzidzi vakasuwa kwazvo. 
Matthew17:24 Jesu navadzidzi vake vakati vasvika muKapenaume, vateresi vomutemberi vakauya kuna Petro vakabvunza vachiti, “Ko, mudzidzisi wenyu haaripi mutero womutemberi here?”" 
Matthew17:25 Akapindura akati, “Hongu, anoripa.” Petro paakapinda mumba, Jesu ndiye akatanga kutaura achiti, “Unofungei, Simoni? Madzimambo enyika anotora mutero kuvana vavo here kana kuti kuna vamwe?”" 
Matthew17:26 Petro akapindura akati, “Kuna vamwe.” Jesu akati, “Saka vana vakasununguka." 
Matthew17:27 Asi kuti tisavagumbura enda kugungwa unokanda chiredzo chako mumvura. Tora hove yaunotanga kubata, wovhura muromo wayo, uchawana muine mari inokwana mutero wangu newako, uvape.”" 
Matthew18:1 Panguva iyoyo vadzidzi vakauya kuna Jesu uye vakamubvunza vachiti, “Ndianiko mukuru pana vose muumambo hwokudenga?”" 
Matthew18:2 Akadana mwana muduku ndokumumisa pakati pavo. 
Matthew18:3 Uye akati, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, kana musina kushanduka mukava savana vaduku, hamungatongopindi muumambo hwokudenga." 
Matthew18:4 Naizvozvo ani naani anozvininipisa somwana uyu ndiye achava mukuru muumambo hwokudenga. 
Matthew18:5 “Uye ani naani anogamuchira mwana muduku souyu muzita rangu anogamuchira ini. 
Matthew18:6 Asi ani naani anoita kuti mumwe wavaduku vanotenda kwandiri atadze, zvaiva nani kwaari kuti asungirirwe guyo guru muhuro make agonyudzwa mugungwa makadzika." 
Matthew18:7 “Ine nhamo nyika nokuda kwezvinhu zvinoita kuti vanhu vatadze! Zvinhu izvozvo zvinofanira kuuya asi ane nhamo munhu anoita kuti zviitike. 
Matthew18:8 Ruoko rwako kana rutsoka rwako zvichikuita kuti utadze, zvidimure uzvirasire kure. Zviri nani kupinda muupenyu wakaremara kana kuti uchikamhina, pano kupinda mumoto usingadzimi uine maoko maviri namakumbo maviri." 
Matthew18:9 Kana ziso rako richikuita kuti utadze ribvise urirasire kure. Zviri nani kuti upinde muupenyu uine ziso rimwe chete pane kunge uine maziso maviri asi ugokandwa mumoto wegehena. 
Matthew18:10 “Onai kuti hamuzvidze mumwe wavaduku ava. Ndinokuudzai kuti vatumwa vavo kudenga vanogaroona chiso chaBaba vangu vari kudenga. 
Matthew18:11 Nokuti Mwanakomana woMunhu akauya kuzoponesa chakarasika. 
Matthew18:12 “Imi munofungei? Kana munhu ane makwai zana, rimwe chete rawo rikarasika, haangasiyi makumi mapfumbamwe ane pfumbamwe mumakomo achinotsvaka rakarasika here?" 
Matthew18:13 Uye kana akariwana, ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti anorifarira kukunda makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe asina kurasika." 
Matthew18:14 Nenzira imwe cheteyo Baba venyu vari kudenga havafariri kuti mumwe wavaduku ava arasike. 
Matthew18:15 “Kana hama yako yakutadzira enda umuudze mhosva yake, muri vaviri chete. Kana akakunzwa wodzora hama yako." 
Matthew18:16 Asi akaramba kuteerera, enda nomumwe kana vaviri kuitira kuti ‘nyaya imwe neimwe isimbiswe nezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu.’" 
Matthew18:17 Kana akaramba kuteerera, uudze kereke, kana akaramba kuteerera kunyange kereke, umutore zvako somuhedheni kana muteresi." 
Matthew18:18 “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti chose chamuchasunga pano pasi chichasungwa kudenga, nechamunosunungura pano pasi chichasunungurwa kudenga." 
Matthew18:19 “Ndinokuudzai zvakare kuti kana vaviri venyu mukabvumirana pane chamunokumbira kuna Baba vangu vari kudenga, muchachiitirwa." 
Matthew18:20 Nokuti panoungana vaviri kana vatatu muzita rangu, neni ndiripo pakati pavo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Ipapo Petro akauya kuna Jesu uye akamubvunza achiti, “Ishe, kanganiko kandingaregerera hama yangu kana achinditadzira? Kanomwe here?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu akapindura akati, “Kwete kanomwe chete, asi kakapetwa makumi manomwe ane nomwe." 
Matthew18:23 “Naizvozvo, umambo hwokudenga hwakafanana namambo aida kuripirwa zvikwereti zvake navaranda vake." 
Matthew18:24 Paakatanga kuzviongorora, murume ainge aine chikwereti chamatarenda zviuru gumia akauyiswa kwaari." 
Matthew18:25 Sezvo ainge asingakwanisi kuripa chikwereti ichi, tenzi wake akaronga kuti iye nomudzimai wake, navana vake nezvose zvaaiva nazvo zvitengeswe kuti zviripe chikwereti." 
Matthew18:26 “Muranda uya akazviwisira pamberi patenzi wake akamukumbira zvikuru achiti, ‘Ndiitireiwo mwoyo murefu, ndicharipa hangu zvose.’" 
Matthew18:27 Tenzi womuranda uya akamunzwira tsitsi, ndokubva adzima chikwereti chose chiya, uye akamuregedza achienda zvake." 
Matthew18:28 “Asi muranda uya paakabuda, akasangana nomumwewo muranda saiye ainge aine chikwereti chake chamadhenari zana. Akamubata ndokutanga kumudzipa. Akati, ‘Ndipe chikwereti changu!’" 
Matthew18:29 “Muranda uya saiye akapfugama ndokumukumbira zvikuru achiti, ‘Ndiitirewo mwoyo murefu, ndichakupa chikwereti chako.’" 
Matthew18:30 “Asi akaramba. Pamusoro pezvo akamusungisa uye akaita kuti aiswe mutorongo kusvikira aripa chikwereti chose. 
Matthew18:31 Vamwe varanda vakati vaona zvakanga zvaitika, zvakavatambudza zvikuru ndokubva vanoudza tenzi wavo zvose zvakanga zvaitika." 
Matthew18:32 “Tenzi akadana muranda uya akati, ‘Iwe muranda akaipa. Ndakadzima chikwereti changu chawaiva nacho nokuti wakandikumbira zvikuru." 
Matthew18:33 Saka hawaifanira here kuva netsitsi kuno mumwe wako sezvandakakuitira iwe?’ 
Matthew18:34 Nehasha tenzi wake akamuisa kune vejeri kuti arangwe zvinorwadza kusvikira aripa chikwereti chose chaaiva nacho. 
Matthew18:35 “Izvi ndizvo zvichaitirwa mumwe nomumwe wenyu naBaba vangu vari kudenga kana musingaregereri hama yenyu nomwoyo wose.” 
Matthew19:1 Jesu akati apedza kutaura zvinhu izvi, akabva kuGarirea akaenda kudunhu reJudhea mhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Matthew19:2 Vanhu vazhinji zhinji vakamutevera uye akavaporesa ikoko. 
Matthew19:3 Vamwe vaFarisi vakauya kwaari kuzomuedza. Vakamubvunza vachiti, “Zviri pamutemo here kuti murume arambe mukadzi wake nokuda kwechikonzero chipi nechipi zvacho?”" 
Matthew19:4 Akavapindura achiti, “Hamuna kuverenga here kuti kubva pakutanga Musiki akavaita munhurume nomunhukadzi," 
Matthew19:5 akati, ‘Nokuda kwaizvozvo murume achasiya baba namai vake agobatanidzwa nomukadzi wake, vaviri ava vachava nyama imwe chete?’" 
Matthew19:6 Saka havachisiri vaviri asi mumwe chete. Naizvozvo chabatanidzwa naMwari pamwe chete, hapana munhu anofanira kuchiparadzanisa.”" 
Matthew19:7 Vakabvunzazve vachiti, “Sei Mozisi akarayira kuti murume ape mukadzi wake rugwaro rwokumuramba obva amuendesa?”" 
Matthew19:8 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Mozisi akakubvumirai kuramba vakadzi venyu nokuda kwoukukutu hwemwoyo yenyu. Asi zvainge zvisina kudaro kubva pakutanga." 
Matthew19:9 Ndinokuudzai kuti ani naani anoramba mukadzi wake, kunze chete nokuda kwoupombwe, akazowana mumwe mukadzi, atoita upombwe.”" 
Matthew19:10 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Kana ari iwo mamiriro azvakaita pakati pomurume nomukadzi, zviri nani kusawana.”" 
Matthew19:11 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari, “Haasi wose anogamuchira shoko iri, asi kune avo chete vakaripirwa." 
Matthew19:12 Nokuti kune ngomwa dzakaberekwa dzakadaro; dzimwe dziriko dzakaitwa navanhu; dzimwe dzakazviita ngomwa nokuda kwoumambo hwokudenga. Uyo anogona kugamuchira shoko iri ngaarigamuchire.” 
Matthew19:13 Ipapo vana vaduku vakauyiswa kuna Jesu kuti aise maoko ake pamusoro pavo, uye kuti avanyengeterere. Asi vadzidzi vakatsiura vaya vakanga vauya navo." 
Matthew19:14 Jesu akati, “Regai vana vaduku vauye kwandiri, musavadzivisa, nokuti umambo hwokudenga ndohwavakadai.”" 
Matthew19:15 Akati aisa maoko ake pamusoro pavo, akabva ipapo." 
Matthew19:16 Zvino mumwe murume akauya kuna Jesu akamubvunza achiti, “Mudzidzisi, ndechipi chinhu chakanaka chandingaita kuti ndiwane upenyu husingaperi?”" 
Matthew19:17 Jesu akati kwaari, “Unondibvunzireiko pamusoro pezvakanaka? Kunongova noMumwe chete akanaka. Kana uchida kupinda muupenyu, teerera mirayiro.”"
