Matthew19:18 Murume uya akabvunza achiti, “Ipiko?” Jesu akapindura akati, “ ‘Usauraya, usaita upombwe, usaba, usapupura nhema." 
Matthew19:19 Kudza baba vako namai vako uye ude muvakidzani wako sokuzvida kwaunozviita iwe.’ ” 
Matthew19:20 Jaya riya rakati, “Zvose ndakazvichengeta. Chii chandichiri kushayiwa?”" 
Matthew19:21 Jesu akati, “Kana uchida kuva wakakwana, enda unotengesa zvose zvaunazvo ugopa varombo, ugozova nepfuma kudenga. Ipapo ugouya wonditevera.”" 
Matthew19:22 Jaya riya parakanzwa izvi, rakaenda rakasuwa kwazvo nokuti raiva nepfuma zhinji kwazvo." 
Matthew19:23 Ipapo Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, zvakaoma kuti mupfumi apinde muumambo hwokudenga." 
Matthew19:24 Ndinotizve zvakareruka kuti ngamera ipinde nepaburi retsono pano mupfumi kuti apinde muumambo hwaMwari.” 
Matthew19:25 Vadzidzi vakati vanzwa izvi vakakatyamara zvikuru vakabvunza vachiti, “Ndiani zvino achaponeswa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Jesu akavatarisa akati, “Kuvanhu izvi hazvigoneki asi kuna Mwari zvinhu zvose zvinogoneka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Petro akamupindura akati, “Takasiya zvose kuti tikuteverei! Zvino tichawaneiko?”" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, kuti pakuvandudzwa kwezvinhu zvose, Mwanakomana woMunhu paachagara pachigaro chake chokubwinya, imi makanditevera muchagarawo pazvigaro gumi nezviviri muchitonga marudzi gumi namaviri eIsraeri." 
Matthew19:29 Uye vose vakasiya dzimba, kana vakoma kana vanun'una kana hanzvadzi kana baba kana mai kana vana kana minda nokuda kwangu vachagamuchira zvakapetwa kazana, uye vachagara nhaka youpenyu husingaperi." 
Matthew19:30 Asi vazhinji vokutanga vachava vokupedzisira uye navazhinji vokupedzisira vachava vokutanga. 
Matthew20:1 “Nokuti umambo hwokudenga hwakafanana nomuridzi womunda akabuda mangwananingwanani kundotsvaka vanhu vokuti vazoshanda mumunda wake wemizambiringa. 
Matthew20:2 Akabvumirana navo kuti aizovapa dhinari pazuva, ndokubva avaendesa mumunda wake wemizambiringa." 
Matthew20:3 “Nenguva inenge yechitatu akabuda ndokuona vamwe vamire pamusika vasina chavaiita. 
Matthew20:4 Akati kwavari, ‘Nemiwo endai mundoshanda mumunda wangu wemizambiringa, ndichakupai zvakakodzera.’" 
Matthew20:5 Saka vakaenda. “Akabudazve nenguva dzinenge dzechitanhatu nedzepfumbamwe akaita zvimwe chetezvo. 
Matthew20:6 Nenguva inenge yegumi neimwe akabuda akawanazve vamwe vamire. Akavabvunza achiti, ‘Seiko, maswera makangomira pano zuva rose musina chamuri kuita?’" 
Matthew20:7 “Vakapindura vachiti, ‘Nokuti hapana munhu atipa basa.’ Akati kwavari, ‘Nemiwo endai mundoshanda mumunda wangu wemizambiringa.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Akati ava madekwana, muridzi womunda wemizambiringa akati kumutariri wake, ‘Dana vashandi ugovapa mubayiro wavo, uchitanga navapedzisira kupiwa basa kusvikira kune vokutanga.’" 
Matthew20:9 “Vashandi vainge vaenda kundoshanda nenguva inenge yegumi neimwe vakauya uye mumwe nomumwe wavo akagamuchira dhinari. 
Matthew20:10 Saka pakasvika vaya vakanga vatanga kushanda, vakatarisira kupiwa zvakawanda. Asi mumwe nomumwe wavo akapiwa dhinari." 
Matthew20:11 Vakati vagamuchira mari iyi vakatanga kutsutsumwira muridzi womunda. 
Matthew20:12 Vakati, ‘Varume ava vapedzisira vangoshanda awa imwe chete, asi mavaenzanisa nesu tatakura mutoro webasa uye tikapiswa nezuva.’" 
Matthew20:13 “Asi akapindura mumwe wavo achiti, ‘Shamwari, handina chandakukanganisira. Ko, hauna kutenderana neni kushandira dhinari here?" 
Matthew20:14 Tora mubayiro wako uende. Ndinoda kupa munhu ashanda kwokupedzisira zvakafanana nezvandakupa. 
Matthew20:15 Ko, handina kodzero here yokuita zvandinoda nemari yangu? Kana kuti iwe une godo nokuda kwokupa kwangu zvakawanda.’" 
Matthew20:16 “Saka vokupedzisira vachava vokutanga uye vokutanga vachava vokupedzisira.” 
Matthew20:17 Zvino Jesu paakanga achikwira kuJerusarema, akatora vadzidzi vake gumi navaviri parutivi akati kwavari," 
Matthew20:18 “Tiri kukwira kuenda kuJerusarema, uye Mwanakomana woMunhu achaiswa kuvaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro. Vachamutongera rufu" 
Matthew20:19 uye vagomuisa kuvaHedheni kuti asekwe agorohwa uye arovererwe pamuchinjikwa. Pazuva retatu achamutswa kuti ave mupenyu!” 
Matthew20:20 Ipapo mai vavanakomana vaZebhedhi vakauya kuna Jesu navanakomana vavo, vakapfugama pamberi pake vaine chikumbiro." 
Matthew20:21 Akabvunza akati, “Munodeiko?” Ivo vakati, “Itaiwo kuti mumwe wavanakomana vangu vaviri ava agare kuruoko rwenyu rworudyi uye mumwe kuruboshwe rwenyu muumambo hwenyu.”" 
Matthew20:22 Jesu akati, kwavari, “Hamuzivi zvamuri kukumbira. Mungagona kunwa mukombe wandichazonwa here?” Vakapindura vachiti, “Tinogona.”" 
Matthew20:23 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo muchanwa mumukombe wangu, asi zvokuti mugare kurudyi kana kuruboshwe rwangu, handisini ndinopa. Nzvimbo idzi ndedzaavo vakadzigadzirirwa naBaba vangu.”" 
Matthew20:24 Vane gumi vakati vanzwa izvi vakatsamwira mukoma nomunun'una ava. 
Matthew20:25 Jesu akavadana pamwe chete uye akati, “Munoziva kuti vatongi vavaHedheni vanobata ushe pamusoro pavo uye machinda avo makuru anoshandisa simba pamusoro pavo." 
Matthew20:26 Ngazvirege kudaro kwamuri. Asi ani naani anoda kuva mukuru pakati penyu anofanira kuva muranda wenyu," 
Matthew20:27 uye ani naani anoda kuva wokutanga anofanira kuva nhapwa yenyu," 
Matthew20:28 sezvazvakangoita kuti Mwanakomana woMunhu haana kuuya kuzoshandirwa asi kuzoshandira, nokupa upenyu hwake sorudzikinuro rwavazhinji.”" 
Matthew20:29 Jesu navadzidzi vake pavakabva kuJeriko, vanhu vazhinji kwazvo vakamutevera." 
Matthew20:30 Varume vaviri vaiva mapofu vakanga vagere parutivi rwenzira, pavakanzwa kuti Jesu ainge apfuura nepo vakadanidzira vachiti, “Ishe, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, tinzwireiwo ngoni!”" 
Matthew20:31 Vanhu vazhinji vakavatsiura vakavarayira kuti vanyarare, asi ivo vakanyanya kudanidzirisa, vachiti, “Ishe, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, tinzwireiwo ngoni!”" 
Matthew20:32 Jesu akamira akavadana, akavabvunza achiti, “Munoda kuti ndikuitirei chiiko?”" 
Matthew20:33 Vakapindura vachiti, “Ishe, tinoda kuona.”" 
Matthew20:34 Jesu akavanzwira tsitsi uye akabata meso avo. Pakarepo vakabva vaona uye vakamutevera. 
Matthew21:1 Vakati voswedera kuJerusarema uye vasvika muBhetifage pagomo reMiorivhi, Jesu akatuma vadzidzi vaviri," 
Matthew21:2 achiti kwavari, “Endai kumusha wamakatarisana nawo uye imomo muchaona mbongoro yakasungirirwa pamwe chete nomwana wayo. Mudzisunungure muuye nadzo kwandiri." 
Matthew21:3 Kana pano munhu anotaura chinhu kwamuri, mumuudze kuti, Ishe anodzida uye achadzidzosa nokukurumidza.”" 
Matthew21:4 Izvi zvakaitika kuti zvizadzise zvakataurwa kubudikidza nomuprofita achiti: 
Matthew21:5 “Muti kuMwanasikana weZioni, ‘Tarira, Mambo wako anouya kwauri, ari munyoro, akatasva mbongoro, ari pamusoro pomwana wembongoro.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Vadzidzi vakaenda vakandoita sezvavakanga varayirwa naJesu. 
Matthew21:7 Vakauya nembongoro nomwana wayo, vakaisa nguo dzavo pamusoro padzo, uye Jesu akagara pamusoro padzo." 
Matthew21:8 Vanhu vazhinji vakawarira nguo dzavo mumugwagwa, vamwewo vakatema mapazi emiti vakaawarira mumugwagwa." 
Matthew21:9 Vazhinji vakanga vakatungamira mberi navaya vakanga vachitevera vakadanidzira vachiti: “Hosana kuMwanakomana waDhavhidhi!” “Akaropafadzwa uyo anouya muzita raIshe!” “Hosana kumusoro-soro!” 
Matthew21:10 Jesu akati apinda muJerusarema, guta rose rakazungunuswa, vakabvunza vachiti, “Ndianiko uyu?”" 
Matthew21:11 Vazhinji vakati, “Uyu ndiye Jesu, muprofita anobva kuNazareta kuGarirea.”" 
Matthew21:12 Jesu akapinda munzvimbo yetemberi akadzinga vose vaitenga nokutengesa. Akapidigura tafura dzavaitsinhanha mari nezvigaro zvavaitengesa njiva. 
Matthew21:13 Akati kwavari, “Kwakanyorwa kuchinzi, ‘Imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunyengetera,’ asi imi mava kuiita ‘bako ramakororo.’ ”" 
Matthew21:14 Mapofu navakaremara vakauya kwaari kutemberi, uye akavaporesa." 
Matthew21:15 Asi vaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro pavakaona zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvaakaita, uye vana vachidanidzira mutemberi vachiti, “Hosana kuMwanakomana waDhavhidhi,” vakatsamwa." 
Matthew21:16 Vakamubvunza vakati, “Uri kunzwa zviri kurehwa navana ava here?” Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Hongu, hamuna kurava here panoti: “ ‘Pamiromo yavana navacheche makaisa rumbidzo’?”" 
Matthew21:17 Uye akavasiya akabuda muguta umu akaenda kuBhetani kwaakandovata. 
Matthew21:18 Mangwanani-ngwanani, paakanga ari munzira achidzokera kuguta, akanzwa nzara." 
Matthew21:19 Achiona muonde pedyo nomugwagwa, akatsaukira pauri asi haana kuwana chinhu pauri kunze kwamashizha. Ipapo akati kwauri, “Ngakurege kuva nemicherozve pauri!” Pakarepo muti uya wakabva wasvava." 
Matthew21:20 Vadzidzi vakati vazviona, vakakatyamara, vakati, “Ko, muonde uyu wabva wasvava pakarepo sei?”" 
Matthew21:21 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti kana mune kutenda uye musingakahadziki, hamungaiti zvaitwa kumuonde uyu, asi munogonawo kuti kugomo iri, ‘Enda undozvikanda mugungwa’ uye zvichaitika." 
Matthew21:22 Kana muchitenda, muchagamuchira zvose zvamunokumbira mukunyengetera.”" 
Matthew21:23 Jesu akapinda muruvazhe rwetemberi, uye paakanga achidzidzisa, vaprista vakuru navakuru vavanhu vakauya kwaari. Vakamubvunza vakati, “Muri kuita zvinhu izvi nesimba ripi? Uye ndiani akakupai simba irori?”" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu akapindura akati, “Nemiwo ndichakubvunzai mubvunzo mumwe chete. Kana mukandipindura ndichakuudzaiwo simba randiri kuita naro zvinhu izvi." 
Matthew21:25 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohani rwakabvepi? Rwakabva kudenga here kana kuvanhu?” Vakataurirana pakati pavo uye vakati, “Kana tikati, ‘Rwakabva kudenga’ achazobvunza kuti, ‘Zvino makaregerei kumutenda?’" 
Matthew21:26 Asi kana tikati, ‘Rwakabva kuvanhu,’ tinotya vanhu, nokuti vose vanotenda kuti Johani aiva muprofita.”" 
Matthew21:27 Saka vakapindura Jesu vakati, “Hatizivi.” Ipapo iye akati, “Neni handingakuudzeiwo simba randinoita naro zvinhu izvi.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Munofungei nazvo? Paiva nomurume aiva navanakomana vaviri. Akaenda kuno wokutanga akati, ‘Mwanangu, enda nhasi unoshanda mumunda wemizambiringa.’" 
Matthew21:29 “Akavapindura achiti, ‘Handidi,’ asi pashure akazvidemba uye akazoenda hake." 
Matthew21:30 “Ipapo baba vaya vakazoenda kuno mumwe mwanakomana vakasvikomuudza zvimwe chetezvo. Iye akapindura achiti, ‘Ndichaenda, baba’ asi haana kuenda." 
Matthew21:31 “Ndoupiko pavaviri ava akaita zvaidiwa nababa vake?” Vakapindura vachiti, “Wokutanga.” Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, vateresi nezvifeve vari kukutangirai kupinda muumambo hwaMwari." 
Matthew21:32 Nokuti Johani akauya kwamuri kuti azokuratidzai nzira yokururama, uye hamuna kumutenda, asi vateresi nezvifeve vakatenda. Uye kunyange mushure mokunge maona izvi hamuna kutendeuka mukamutenda." 
Matthew21:33 “Inzwai mumwe mufananidzo. Kwakanga kuno mumwe murume akanga arima munda wake wemizambiringa. Akaukomberedza noruzhowa, akacherera chisviniro chewaini uye akavaka shongwe. Ipapo akasiya munda womuzambiringa kuvarimi vaimupa mari uye iye akaenda parwendo rurefu." 
Matthew21:34 Nguva yokukohwa yakati yasvika, akatuma varanda vake kuvarimi vaya kuti vandotora michero yake." 
Matthew21:35 “Varimi vakabata varanda vaya, vakarova mumwe, vakauraya mumwe, uye vakataka wechitatu namabwe." 
Matthew21:36 Ipapo akatumazve vamwe varanda kwavari, vakawanda kupfuura vokutanga, varimi vakavaitira zvimwe chetezvo." 
Matthew21:37 Pakupedzisira akatuma mwanakomana wake kwavari. Akati, ‘Vacharemekedza mwanakomana wangu.’" 
Matthew21:38 “Asi varimi pavakaona mwanakomana vakataurirana vakati, ‘Uyu ndiye mudyi wenhaka. Uyai timuuraye, tigotora nhaka yake.’" 
Matthew21:39 Saka vakamutora vakamubudisa kunze kwemunda wemizambiringa vakamuuraya. 
Matthew21:40 “Naizvozvo, panouya muridzi womunda womuzambiringa achaiteiko kuvarimi avo?”" 
Matthew21:41 Vakapindura vakati, “Achaparadza varimi vakaipa ava, uye achapa munda womuzambiringa kuna vamwe varimi avo vachazomupa mugove wake wezvirimwa pakukohwa.”" 
Matthew21:42 Jesu akati kwavari, “Hamuna kutomborava here muMagwaro panoti: “ ‘Ibwe rakarambwa navavaki ndiro rakazova musoro wekona. Ishe akaita izvi, uye zvinoshamisa pamberi pedu’?" 
Matthew21:43 “Naizvozvo ndinokuudzai kuti umambo hwaMwari huchatorwa kubva kwamuri huchipiwa kuvanhu vachabereka zvibereko zvahwo. 
Matthew21:44 Uyo anowira pamusoro pebwe iri achavhunika kuita zvidimbu zvidimbu asi uyo warichawira achapwanyiwa.” 
Matthew21:45 Vaprista vakuru navaFarisi pavakanzwa mifananidzo yaJesu, vakaziva kuti aitaura nezvavo." 
Matthew21:46 Vakatsvaka nzira yokuti vamusunge nayo, asi vakatya vanhu vazhinji nokuti vakanga vachiti muprofita." 
Matthew22:1 Jesu akataurazve kwavari nemifananidzo achiti," 
Matthew22:2 “Umambo hwokudenga hwakafanana namambo akagadzirira mwanakomana wake mutambo wesvitsa. 
Matthew22:3 Akatuma varanda vake kuna avo vainge vakakokwa kumutambo kuti vachiuya, asi vakaramba kuuya." 
Matthew22:4 “Ipapo akatumazve vamwe varanda achiti, ‘Taurirai vose vakakokwa kuti ndagadzirira mabiko: Ndabaya nzombe nemombe dzakakodzwa uye zvose zvagadzirirwa. Uyai kumutambo wesvitsa.’" 
Matthew22:5 “Asi hapana akateerera uye vakaenda mumwe kumunda wake, mumwewo kune rimwe basa rake." 
Matthew22:6 Vamwe vavo vakabata varanda vake vakavaitira zvakaipa uye vakavauraya. 
Matthew22:7 Mambo akatsamwa kwazvo. Akatuma hondo yake kundoparadza vaurayi vaya uye akapisa guta ravo. 
Matthew22:8 “Ipapo akati kuvaranda vake, ‘Mutambo wesvitsa wagadzirirwa asi vaya vandakakoka vakanga vasingakodzeri kuti vauye." 
Matthew22:9 Endai kumharadzano dzenzira mundokoka kumutambo ani zvake wamuchawana.’ 
Matthew22:10 Saka varanda vakaenda mumigwagwa vakandokokorodza vose vavakagona kuwana, vose vakanaka nevakaipa, uye imba yesvitsa ikazara navakanga vakokwa." 
Matthew22:11 “Asi mambo akati apinda kuzoona vakanga vakokwa, akaona munhu imomo akanga asina nguo yesvitsa." 
Matthew22:12 Akamubvunza akati, ‘Shamwari, wapinda seiko muno usina nguo yesvitsa?’ Munhu uya akashaya chokureva." 
Matthew22:13 “Ipapo mambo akaudza varanda vake akati, ‘Musungei maoko namakumbo mumukande panze, murima, umo muchava nokuchema nokurumanya kwameno.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Nokuti vazhinji vakakokwa asi vakasarudzwa vashoma.” 
Matthew22:15 Ipapo vaFarisi vakabuda vakandoronga kuti vamubate namashoko ake. 
Matthew22:16 Vakatuma vadzidzi vavo kwaari pamwe chete navaHerodhi. Vakati, “Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti muri munhu akarurama uye kuti munodzidzisa nzira yaMwari zviri maererano nechokwadi. Hamutsauswi navanhu nokuti hamutarisi kuti ndivanaani." 
Matthew22:17 Tiudzei zvino kuti imi, munoti kudini? Zvakanaka here kutera mutero kuna Kesari kana kuti hazvina?”" 
Matthew22:18 Asi Jesu, achiziva kuipa kwavo, akati, “Imi vanyengeri munondiedzereiko?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndiratidzei mari inoshandiswa pakutera mutero.” Vakamuvigira dhenari 
Matthew22:20 uye akavabvunza akati, “Ko, mufananidzo uyu ndowaani uye runyoro urwu ndorwaani?”" 
Matthew22:21 Vakapindura vakati, “NdezvaKesari.” Ipapo akati kwavari, “Ipai kuna Kesari zvaKesari, uye kuna Mwari zvaMwari.”" 
Matthew22:22 Vakati vanzwa izvi, vakashamiswa. Saka vakamusiya vakaenda." 
Matthew22:23 Pazuva rimwe chetero vaSadhusi, avo vanoti hakuna kumuka kwavakafa, vakauya kwaari nomubvunzo." 
Matthew22:24 Vakati, “Mudzidzisi, Mozisi akatiudza kuti murume akafa asina vana munun'una wake anofanira kuwana chirikadzi agomuberekera vana." 
Matthew22:25 Zvino pakati pedu paiva navanakomana vomunhu mumwe vanomwe. Wokutanga akawana mukadzi ndokubva iye afa, uye sezvo akanga asina vana, akasiyira munun'una wake mukadzi." 
Matthew22:26 Zvimwe chetezvo zvakaitika kuno wechipiri nowechitatu kusvikira kuno wechinomwe. 
Matthew22:27 Pakupedzisira mukadzi akazofawo. 
Matthew22:28 Zvino pakumuka kwavakafa, achava mukadzi waaniko pavanomwe vaya sezvo vose vaiva varume vake?”" 
Matthew22:29 Jesu akavapindura akati, “Ndipo pamunorasika ipapo nokuti hamuzivi Magwaro kana simba raMwari." 
Matthew22:30 Pakumuka kwavakafa vanhu havawani kana kuwanikwa, vachange vakaita savatumwa kudenga." 
Matthew22:31 Asi pane zvokumuka kwavakafa, hamuna kuverenga here zvakarehwa naMwari kwamuri, achiti," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ndini Mwari waAbhurahama naMwari waIsaka naMwari waJakhobho’? Haasi Mwari wavakafa asi wavapenyu.” 
Matthew22:33 Vanhu vazhinji vakati vanzwa izvi, vakashamiswa nokudzidzisa kwake." 
Matthew22:34 Vanzwa kuti Jesu akanga akunda vaSadhusi, vaFarisi vakaungana pamwe chete." 
Matthew22:35 Mumwe wavo aiva nyanzvi pane zvemirayiro akamuedza nomubvunzo unoti," 
Matthew22:36 “Mudzidzisi, ndoupi murayiro mukuru muMurayiro?”" 
Matthew22:37 Jesu akapindura akati, “ ‘Ida Ishe Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose nokufunga kwako kwose.’" 
Matthew22:38 Uyu ndiwo murayiro mukuru uye wokutanga. 
Matthew22:39 Wechipiri wakafanana nawo unoti, ‘Ida muvakidzani wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe.’" 
Matthew22:40 Murayiro wose naVaprofita zvakabatanidzwa pamirayiro iyi miviri.” 
Matthew22:41 VaFarisi pavakanga vachakaungana pamwe chete, Jesu akavabvunza akati," 
Matthew22:42 “Munofungei nezvaKristu? Mwana waani?” Vakapindura vachiti, “Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Akati kwavari, “Ko, zvino sei Dhavhidhi achitaura noMweya akamuti, ‘Ishe’? nokuti anoti," 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Ishe akati kuna Ishe wangu: Gara kuruoko rwangu rworudyi, kusvikira ndaisa vavengi vako pasi petsoka dzako.’ ”" 
Matthew22:45 “Zvino kana Dhavhidhi achimuti, ‘Ishe’ angagova mwanakomana wake sei?”" 
Matthew22:46 Hapana akagona kutaura shoko rimwe, uye kubva pazuva iroro zvichienda mberi hapana akazoshinga kumubvunza mimwezve mibvunzo." 
Matthew23:1 Ipapo Jesu akataura kuvanhu vazhinji nokuvadzidzi vake achiti," 
Matthew23:2 “Vadzidzisi vomurayiro navaFarisi vagere pachigaro chaMozisi. 
Matthew23:3 Saka munofanira kuvateerera muite zvinhu zvose zvavanokuudzai. Asi musaita zvavanoita, nokuti havaiti zvavanoparidza." 
Matthew23:4 Vanosunga mitoro inorema voitakudza pamafudzi avanhu, asi ivo pachavo havadi kusimudza munwe kuti vaibvise." 
Matthew23:5 Vanoita zvinhu zvose kuti vaonekwe navanhu. Vanotambanudza mafirakiteri avo uye vanorebesa pfunha dzenguo dzavo. 
Matthew23:6 Vanoda zvigaro zvapamberi pamitambo nezvigaro zvapamusorosoro mumasinagoge. 
Matthew23:7 Vanofarira kukwaziswa pamisika uye kuti vanzi ‘Rabhi’ navanhu.” 
Matthew23:8 “Asi imi hamufaniri kunzi ‘Rabhi’ nokuti munongova naTenzi mumwe chete uye mose muri hama. 
Matthew23:9 Musadana ani zvake ari panyika muchiti, ‘Baba’ nokuti munongova naBaba mumwe chete uye vari kudenga." 
Matthew23:10 Uye musadaidzwa muchinzi ‘mudzidzisi’ nokuti muno Mudzidzisi mumwe chete iye Kristu. 
Matthew23:11 Mukuru pakati penyu ndiye achava muranda wenyu. 
Matthew23:12 Nokuti ani naani anozvikudza achaninipiswa uye ani naani anozvininipisa achakudzwa. 
Matthew23:13 “Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, vanyengeri! Nokuti munopfigira vanhu umambo hwedenga vachizviona. Imi pachenyu hamupindi, uye vaya vanoedza kupinda hamuvatenderi." 
Matthew23:14 Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, vanyengeri! Munoparadza dzimba dzechirikadzi, uye munoita minyengetero mirefu kuti muonekwe. Naizvozvo muchatongwa zvakaomesesa." 
Matthew23:15 “Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, vanyengeri! Munofamba panyika napamakungwa kuti mutendeutse munhu mumwe chete. Kana atendeuka munomuita mwanakomana wegehena kakapetwa kaviri panemi." 
Matthew23:16 “Mune nhamo imi vatungamiri mapofu! Imi munoti, ‘Kana munhu akapika netemberi, hazvina hazvo mhosva, asi kana munhu akapika negoridhe romutemberi anosungwa nemhiko yake.’" 
Matthew23:17 Imi mapenzi amapofu! Chikuru chii: Goridhe netemberi inoita kuti goridhe rive dzvene? 
Matthew23:18 Uyezve imi munoti, ‘Kana munhu upi zvake akapika nearitari hazvirevi chinhu, asi kana munhu upi zvake akapika nechipo chiri pairi, asungwa nemhiko yake.’" 
Matthew23:19 Imi mapofu! Chikuru chii: Chipo kana kuti aritari inoita kuti chipo chive chitsvene? 
Matthew23:20 Naizvozvo, uyo anopika nearitari anopika nayo nezvose zviri pairi." 
Matthew23:21 Uye uyo anopika netemberi anopika nayo uye naiye anogara mairi. 
Matthew23:22 Uye uyo anopika netemberi anopika nechigaro choushe chaMwari uye naiye anogara pachiri. 
Matthew23:23 “Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, imi vanyengeri! Munopa chegumi chezvose zvinonhuwira zvinoti: mindi, anisi nekumini. Asi moshaya hanya nezvinhu zvinokosha zvomurayiro zvinoti: kururamisira, ngoni nokutendeka. Maifanira kuita izviwo musingakanganwi zvokutanga." 
Matthew23:24 Imi vatungamiri mapofu, munomimina nyunyu asi muchimedza ngamera." 
Matthew23:25 “Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, imi vanyengeri! Munosuka mikombe nendiro kunze asi mukati menyu muzere namakaro nokusazvidzora." 
Matthew23:26 Iwe bofu romuFarisi! Tanga wachenesa mukati momukombe nendiro, uye ipapo kunze kwazvo kuchachenawo." 
Matthew23:27 “Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, imi vanyengeri! Makafanana namakuva akacheneswa kunze anotaridzika kuva akanaka kunze asi mukati muzere mapfupa avanhu vakafa nezvinhu zvose zvine tsvina." 
Matthew23:28 Nenzira imwe cheteyo, munoonekwa navanhu kunze semakarurama asi mukati menyu muzere nounyengeri uye nohuipi." 
Matthew23:29 “Mune nhamo imi vadzidzisi vomurayiro nemi vaFarisi, imi vanyengeri! Munovaka makuva avaprofita nokushongedza makuva avakarurama." 
Matthew23:30 Uye moti, ‘Dai takanga tararama pamazuva amadzitateguru edu, tingadai tisina kubatsirana navo pakuteura ropa ravaprofita.’" 
Matthew23:31 Saka muri kuzvipupurira pachenyu kuti muri zvizvarwa zvaivavo vakaponda vaprofita. 
Matthew23:32 Zvino chizadzisai chiyero chechivi chamadzitateguru enyu! 
Matthew23:33 “Imi nyoka! Imi vana venyoka! Muchatiza seiko kutongwa kunokuendesai kugehena? 
Matthew23:34 Naizvozvo ndiri kukutumirai vaprofita navachenjeri navadzidzisi. Vamwe vavo muchavauraya uye muchavaroverera pamuchinjikwa; vamwe muchavarova mumasinagoge enyu uye muchavadzingirira kubva kune rimwe guta kusvikira kune rimwe guta. 
Matthew23:35 Uye nokudaro, ropa ravakarurama vose rakateurwa panyika richauya pamusoro penyu kubvira paropa raAbheri akanga akarurama kusvikira paropa raZakaria mwanakomana waBherekia uyo wamakauraya pakati petemberi nearitari." 
Matthew23:36 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti zvose izvi zvichava pamusoro porudzi urwu. 
Matthew23:37 “Iwe Jerusarema, Jerusarema! Iwe unouraya vaprofita nokutaka namabwe avo vanotumirwa kwauri, kazhinji sei kandaidisa kuunganidza vana vako sezvinoita nhunzvi yehuku inounganidza hukwana dzayo pasi pamapapiro ayo." 
Matthew23:38 Tarira, wasiyirwa imba yako rangova dongo." 
Matthew23:39 Ndinokuudza kuti, hauchazondionizve kusvikira wati, ‘Akaropafadzwa anouya muzita raIshe.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Jesu akabuda mutemberi, uye paakanga achifamba kudaro, vadzidzi vake vakaswedera kwaari vakamuratidza dzimba dzetemberi." 
Matthew24:2 Iye akati kwavari, “Muri kuona zvinhu izvi zvose here? Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti hakuna ibwe richasara pano riri pamusoro perimwe; ose achawisirwa pasi.”" 
Matthew24:3 Jesu akati agara paGomo reMiorivhi, vadzidzi vakauya kwaari vari voga vakati, “Tiudzei kuti zvinhu izvi zvichaitika rini, uye kuti chiratidzo chokuuya kwenyu nokuguma kwenyika chichava chei?”" 
Matthew24:4 Jesu akapindura akati, “Chenjerai kuti murege kunyengerwa nomunhu." 
Matthew24:5 Nokuti vazhinji vachauya muzita rangu vachiti, ‘Ndini Kristu,’ uye vachinyengera vazhinji." 
Matthew24:6 Muchanzwa nezvehondo uye neguhu rehondo, asi chenjerai kuti murege kuvhundutswa nazvo. Zvinhu zvakadaro zvinofanira kuitika asi kuguma kunenge kusati kwasvika." 
Matthew24:7 Nokuti rudzi ruchamukira rumwe rudzi noumambo huchamukira humwe umambo. Kuchava nenzara nokudengenyeka kwenyika munzvimbo dzakasiyana-siyana. 
Matthew24:8 Asi zvose izvi mavambo okurwadziwa kwokubereka. 
Matthew24:9 “Ipapo muchaiswa kuna vanokutambudzai mugourayiwa, uye muchavengwa nendudzi dzose nokuda kwangu." 
Matthew24:10 Panguva iyoyo vazhinji vachadzokera shure kubva pakutenda uye vachamukirana vagovengana," 
Matthew24:11 uye vaprofita vazhinji venhema vachamuka uye vachanyengera vanhu vazhinji. 
Matthew24:12 Nokuda kwokuwanda kwokusarurama, rudo rwavazhinji ruchatonhora." 
Matthew24:13 Asi uyo achatsungirira kusvikira kumagumo, achaponeswa." 
Matthew24:14 Uye vhangeri iri roumambo richaparidzwa munyika yose souchapupu kumarudzi ose, ipapo kuguma kuchasvika." 
Matthew24:15 “Saka pamunoona ‘nyangadzi yokuparadza’ yakataurwa nomuprofita Dhanieri, imire panzvimbo tsvene, anoverenga nganzwisise," 
Matthew24:16 ipapo vari muJudhea ngavatizire kumakomo. 
Matthew24:17 Uyo ari padenga reimba yake ngaarege kuburuka kuti andotora chinhu chipi zvacho chiri mumba make. 
Matthew24:18 Ari mumunda ngaarege kudzokera kundotora nguo yake. 
Matthew24:19 Zvichaoma sei mumazuva iwayo kuvakadzi vane mimba navaya vanoyamwisa! 
Matthew24:20 Nyengeterai kuti kutiza kwenyu kurege kuitika panguva yechando kana nomusi weSabata. 
Matthew24:21 Nokuti ipapo pachava nenhamo huru isina kumbovapo kubva pakuvamba kwenyika kusvika zvino uye haizombovapozve. 
Matthew24:22 Dai mazuva iwayo asina kutapudzwa, hapana munhu airarama, asi nokuda kwavasanangurwa, mazuva iwayo achatapudzwa." 
Matthew24:23 Panguva iyoyo, mukanzwa munhu anoti kwamuri, ‘Tarirai, hoyu Kristu!’ kana kuti, ‘Hoyo Kristu,’ musazvitenda." 
Matthew24:24 Nokuti kuchamuka vanaKristu venhema navaprofita venhema avo vachaita zviratidzo nezvishamiso kuti vanyengere kunyange navasanangurwa kana zvichigoneka. 
Matthew24:25 Tarirai, ndafanokuudzai zvisati zvaitika." 
Matthew24:26 “Saka kana munhu upi zvake akakuudzai kuti, ‘Tarirai uyo ari kurenje,’ musabuda kuti muendeko kana kuti akati, ‘Tarirai, ari mudzimba dzomukati,’ musazvitenda." 
Matthew24:27 Sezvinoita mheni inopenya kumabvazuva ichionekwawo kumavirira, ndizvo zvichaita kuuya kwoMwanakomana woMunhu." 
Matthew24:28 Pose pano mutumbi ndipo pachaungana magora. 
Matthew24:29 “Pakarepo shure kwokutambudzika kwamazuva iwayo, ‘zuva richasviba, uye mwedzi hauzovheneki; nyeredzi dzichawa kubva kudenga, namasimba omuchadenga achazungunuswa.’" 
Matthew24:30 “Ipapo chiratidzo choMwanakomana woMunhu chichaonekwa kudenga, uye ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzichachema. Vachaona Mwanakomana woMunhu achiuya ari mumakore okudenga nesimba nokubwinya kukuru." 
Matthew24:31 Uye achatuma vatumwa vake nokurira kwehwamanda kukuru uye vachaunganidza vasanangurwa vake kubva kumhepo ina dzenyika, kubva kuno rumwe rutivi rwedenga kusvikira kuno rumwe." 
Matthew24:32 “Zvino dzidzai chidzidzo ichi kubva pamuonde: Panopfava matavi awo uye mashizha awo otungira, munoziva kuti zhizha rava padyo." 
Matthew24:33 Saizvozvowo, nemiwo pamunoona zvinhu zvose izvi muzive kuti nguva yangu yava pedyo, yava pamusiwo." 
Matthew24:34 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti rudzi urwu harungatongopfuuri kusvikira zvinhu zvose izvi zvaitika. 
Matthew24:35 Denga nenyika zvichapfuura asi mashoko angu haangatongopfuuri. 
Matthew24:36 “Hapana anoziva musi kana nguva kunyange vatumwa vokudenga kana Mwanakomana, asi Baba chete." 
Matthew24:37 Sezvazvakanga zvakaita pamazuva aNoa, ndizvo zvazvichaita pakuuya kwoMwanakomana woMunhu." 
Matthew24:38 Nokuti sapamazuva iwayo mafashamu asati auya, vanhu vaidya nokunwa, vaiwana, nokuwanikwa kusvikira pazuva iro Noa akapinda muareka," 
Matthew24:39 uye vakanga vasingazivi chinhu pamusoro pezvaizoitika kusvikira mafashamu avakukura vose. Ndizvo zvazvichaita pakuuya kwoMwanakomana woMunhu. 
Matthew24:40 Varume vaviri vachange vari mumunda, mumwe achatorwa uye mumwe achasiyiwa." 
Matthew24:41 Vakadzi vaviri vachange vachikuya paguyo, mumwe achatorwa uye mumwe achasiyiwa." 
Matthew24:42 “Naizvozvo, garai makagadzirira nokuti hamuzivi zuva iro Ishe wenyu achauya naro." 
Matthew24:43 Asi nzwisisai izvi: Dai muridzi weimba aiziva kuti inguva ipi yousiku ichauya mbavha, angadai airinda uye haaizotendera kuti imba yake ipazwe." 
Matthew24:44 Naizvozvo nemiwo garai makagadzirira nokuti Mwanakomana woMunhu achauya nenguva yamusingamutarisiri. 
Matthew24:45 “Ndiani zvino muranda akatendeka uye akachenjera uyo akaiswa natenzi wake kuti atarire varanda veimba yake kuti agovapa zvokudya panguva yakafanira? 
Matthew24:46 Akaropafadzwa muranda uyo anowanikwa achiita izvozvo pakudzoka kwatenzi wake. 
Matthew24:47 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti achamugadza kuti ave mutariri wepfuma yake yose. 
Matthew24:48 Asi ngatimboti muranda uyo akaipa uye oti mumwoyo make, ‘Tenzi wangu achange asipo kwenguva refu,’" 
Matthew24:49 uye ipapo iye otanga kurova vamwe varanda uye kudya nokunwa nezvidhakwa. 
Matthew24:50 Tenzi womuranda uyo achauya pazuva raasingatarisire napanguva yaasingazivi. 
Matthew24:51 Achasvikomugura-gura agomuisa panzvimbo imwe chete navanyengeri apo pachava nokuchema nokurumanya kwameno. 
Matthew25:1 “Panguva iyoyo umambo hwokudenga huchange hwakafanana navasikana gumi, vakatora mwenje yavo vakabuda kundochingamidza chikomba." 
Matthew25:2 Vashanu vavo vakanga vari mapenzi uye vashanu vavo vakanga vakachenjera. 
Matthew25:3 Mapenzi vaya vakatora mwenje yavo asi havana kuisa mafuta mairi. 
Matthew25:4 Kunyange zvakadaro, vakachenjera vakatora mafuta mumidziyo pamwe chete nemwenje yavo." 
Matthew25:5 Chikomba chakanonoka kusvika, vakabatwa nehope ndokuvata." 
Matthew25:6 “Pava pakati pousiku vakanzwa nemheremhere: ‘Chikomba chauya! Budai mumuchingamidze!’ 
Matthew25:7 “Ipapo vasikana vose vakamuka uye vakagadziridza mwenje yavo. 
Matthew25:8 Mapenzi akati kuna vakachenjera, ‘Tipeiwo mamwe emafuta enyu; mwenje yedu yava kudzima.’" 
Matthew25:9 “Vakapindura vakati, ‘Kwete, zvimwe haangakwaniri isu nemi tose. Asi endai kuna vaya vanotengesa mafuta mugondozvitengera mamwe.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Asi vachiri munzira kundotenga mafuta, chikomba chakasvika. Vasikana vakanga vakagadzirira vakapinda naye mumutambo wesvitsa uye musuo ukapfigwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Pashure vamwe vaya vakadzokawo. Vakati, ‘Ishe! Ishe! Tizarurireiwo musuo!’" 
Matthew25:12 “Asi akavapindura achiti, ‘Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, handikuzivei.’" 
Matthew25:13 “Naizvozvo garai makagadzirira nokuti hamuzivi musi kana nguva. 
Matthew25:14 “Zvakare, zvichaita somurume akabuda kuti afambe rwendo, akadana varanda vake akavachengetesa pfuma yake." 
Matthew25:15 Kuno mumwe akapa matarenda mashanua emari, uye kuno mumwe matarenda maviri, uye kuno mumwe tarenda rimwe chete, mumwe nomumwe maererano nokugona kwake. Ipapo akaenda zvake parwendo rwake." 
Matthew25:16 Murume akapiwa matarenda mashanu akaenda pakarepo akandoshandisa mari yake akawanazve mamwe mashanu. 
Matthew25:17 Saizvozvo uya aiva namatarenda maviri akawana mamwe maviri. 
Matthew25:18 Asi murume akanga apiwa tarenda rimwe chete akaenda akandochera gomba muvhu ndokuviga mari yatenzi wake. 
Matthew25:19 “Shure kwenguva refu tenzi wavaranda vaya akadzoka akagadzirisa nezvemari idzi navo. 
Matthew25:20 Murume akanga apiwa matarenda mashanu akauya namamwe mashanu, akati, ‘Tenzi, makandipa matarenda mashanu, tarirai ndakawana mamwe mashanu.’" 
Matthew25:21 “Tenzi wake akapindura akati, ‘Waita zvakanaka iwe muranda akanaka, akatendeka! Wanga wakatendeka pazvinhu zvishoma; ndichakuita mutariri wezvinhu zvizhinji. Pinda mumufaro watenzi wako!’" 
Matthew25:22 “Murume akanga apiwa matarenda maviri akauyawo. Akati, ‘Tenzi makandipa matarenda maviri, tarirai ndakawanazve mamwe maviri.’" 
Matthew25:23 “Tenzi wake akapindura akati, ‘Waita zvakanaka, iwe muranda akanaka, akatendeka! Wanga wakatendeka pazvinhu zvishoma, ndichakuita mutariri wezvinhu zvizhinji. Pinda mumufaro watenzi wako!’" 
Matthew25:24 “Ipapo murume akanga apiwa tarenda rimwe chete akauya, akati, ‘Tenzi, ndakaziva kuti muri munhu akaoma, munokohwa pamusina kudyara uye munounganidza pamusina kukusha mbeu." 
Matthew25:25 Nokudaro ndakatya ndikandocherera tarenda renyu muvhu. Tarirai, pfuma yenyu iyi.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Tenzi wake akapindura akati, ‘Iwe muranda akaipa, ano usimbe! Saka wakanga uchiziva zvako kuti ndinokohwa pandisina kudyara nokuunganidza pandisina kukusha mbeu?" 
Matthew25:27 Zvino ungadai wakachengetesa mari yangu kune vamabhangi kuitira kuti pakudzoka kwangu ndaizoiwana yabereka. 
Matthew25:28 “ ‘Mutorerei tarenda iri mupe kune uyo ane matarenda gumi. 
Matthew25:29 Nokuti wose anazvo achapiwa zvimwe, achava nezvakawanda. Ani naani asina, kunyange nezvaanazvo achazvitorerwa." 
Matthew25:30 Uye chikandai muranda uyo asingabatsiri kunze kurima, uko kuchava nokuchema nokurumanya kwameno.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Mwanakomana woMunhu paanouya nokubwinya kwake, uye vatumwa vose vanaye, achagara pachigaro chake choushe mukubwinya kwokudenga." 
Matthew25:32 Ndudzi dzose dzichaunganidzwa pamberi pake, achatsaura vanhu mumwe kubva kuno mumwe somufudzi anotsaura makwai kubva kumbudzi." 
Matthew25:33 Achaisa makwai kurudyi rwake, uye mbudzi kuruboshwe rwake." 
Matthew25:34 “Ipapo Mambo achati kuna avo vari kurudyi rwake, ‘Uyai imi makaropafadzwa naBaba vangu, mutore nhaka yenyu, umambo hwamakagadzirirwa kubva pakusikwa kwenyika." 
Matthew25:35 Nokuti ndakanga ndine nzara mukandipa chokudya, ndakanga ndine nyota, mukandipa chokunwa, ndakanga ndiri mweni mukandipinza mumba," 
Matthew25:36 ndakanga ndisina zvokupfeka mukandipfekedza, ndakanga ndichirwara mukandipepa, ndakanga ndiri mutorongo mukandishanyira.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Ipapo vakarurama vachamupindura vachiti, ‘Ishe, takakuonai riniko mune nzara tikakupai chokunwa?" 
Matthew25:38 Takakuonai riniko muri mweni tikakupinzai mumba, kana musina zvokupfeka tikakupfekedzai?" 
Matthew25:39 Takakuonai riniko muchirwara kana muri mutorongo tikakushanyirai?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Mambo achapindura achiti, ‘Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, chose chamakaitira mumwe wavaduku vehama dzangu idzi, makazviitira ini.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Ipapo achati kune avo vari kuruboshwe rwake, ‘Ibvai kwandiri imi makatukwa mupinde mumoto usingadzimi wakagadzirirwa dhiabhori navatumwa vake." 
Matthew25:42 Nokuti ndakanga ndine nzara mukasandipa chokudya, ndakanga ndine nyota, mukasandipa chokunwa," 
Matthew25:43 ndakanga ndiri mweni mukasandipinza mumba, ndakanga ndisina zvokupfeka mukasandipfekedza, ndakanga ndichirwara uye ndiri mutorongo mukasandishanyira.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Naizvozvo vachapindura vachiti, ‘Ishe, takakuonai riniko mune nzara kana mune nyota kana muri mweni kana musina zvokupfeka kana muchirwara kana muri mutorongo tikasakubatsirai?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Achapindura achiti, ‘Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, zvose zvamusina kuitira mumwe wavaduku ava, hamuna kuzviitira ini.’" 
Matthew25:46 “Ipapo vachaenda mukurangwa kusingaperi, asi vakarurama vachipinda muupenyu husingaperi.”" 
Matthew26:1 Jesu akati apedza kutaura zvinhu izvi zvose, akati kuvadzidzi vake," 
Matthew26:2 “Sezvamunoziva, Pasika yasarirwa namazuva maviri kuti isvike, Mwanakomana woMunhu achaendeswa kuti andorovererwa pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Matthew26:3 Ipapo vaprista vakuru navakuru vavanhu vakandoungana mumuzinda womuprista mukuru, ainzi Kaifasi," 
Matthew26:4 uye vakarangana kuti vasunge Jesu namano vagomuuraya. 
Matthew26:5 Vakati, “Asi kwete panguva yoMutambo nokuti pangaita bope pakati pavanhu.” namazana amadhora" 
Matthew26:6 Jesu paakanga ari muBhetani mumba momurume ainzi Simoni waMaperembudzi," 
Matthew26:7 mumwe mukadzi akauya kwaari nechinu chamafuta anonhuwira, omutengo mukuru, akasvikoadururira pamusoro wake, agere patafura." 
Matthew26:8 Vadzidzi vakati vachiona izvi, vakatsamwa uye vakati, “Kuparadza kwakadai kwaitirweiko?" 
Matthew26:9 Mafuta anonhuwira angadai atengeswa nomutengo mukuru kwazvo uye mari yacho yapiwa varombo.” 
Matthew26:10 Achiziva izvi, Jesu akati kwavari, “Munotambudzireiko mukadzi uyu? Andiitira chinhu chakanaka kwazvo." 
Matthew26:11 Varombo munavo nguva dzose, asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose." 
Matthew26:12 Paadira mafuta anonhuwira pamuviri wangu, azviita kuti agadzirire kuvigwa kwangu." 
Matthew26:13 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, kwose kwose kuchaparidzwa vhangeri iri munyika yose, zvaaita izvi zvichange zvichitaurwawo kuti vamurangarire nazvo.”" 
Matthew26:14 Ipapo mumwe wavane gumi navaviri, ainzi Judhasi Iskarioti, akaenda kuvaprista vakuru" 
Matthew26:15 akandobvunza achiti, “Muchandipei kana ndikamuuyisa kwamuri?” Saka vakamuverengera makumi matatu esirivha." 
Matthew26:16 Kubva ipapo zvichienda mberi Judhasi akamirira mukana wokuti amuise kwavari. 
Matthew26:17 Pazuva rokutanga roMutambo weZvingwa Zvisina Mbiriso, vadzidzi vakauya kuna Jesu vakasvikomubvunza vachiti, “Ndokupi kwamunoda kuti tindokugadzirirai kuti mugodyira Pasika?”" 
Matthew26:18 Akavapindura akati, “Endai muguta kuno mumwe murume munosvikomuudza kuti, ‘Mudzidzisi anoti: Nguva yangu yakatarwa yava pedyo. Ndichapemberera Pasika navadzidzi vangu mumba mako.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Saka vadzidzi vakaita sokurayirwa kwava kanga vaitwa vakandogadzira Pasika. 
Matthew26:20 Ava madekwana Jesu akagara patafura navane gumi navaviri. 
Matthew26:21 Vari pakati pokudya akati, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti mumwe wenyu achandipandukira.”" 
Matthew26:22 Vakasuwa zvikuru uye vakatanga, mumwe nomumwe kuti, “Chokwadi, ndini here, Ishe?”" 
Matthew26:23 Jesu akapindura akati, “Munhu aisa ruoko neni mundiro, ndiye achandipandukira" 
Matthew26:24 Mwanakomana woMunhu achaenda hake sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa nezvake. Asi ane nhamo munhu uyo anopandukira Mwanakomana woMunhu! Zvingadai zvaiva nani kwaari dai asina kuberekwa.” 
Matthew26:25 Zvino Judhasi uyo aizomupandukira akati, “Chokwadi, ndini here, Rabhi?” Jesu akapindura akati, “Hongu, ndiwe.”" 
Matthew26:26 Vachiri kudya, Jesu akatora chingwa, akavonga akachimedura, uye akapa vadzidzi vake, achiti, “Torai mudye; uyu ndiwo muviri wangu.”" 
Matthew26:27 Ipapo akatora mukombe, akavonga uye akavapa achiti, “Inwai mose." 
Matthew26:28 Iri iropa rangu resungano itsva rinodururirwa vazhinji kuti vagoregererwa zvivi zvavo. 
Matthew26:29 Ndinokuudzai kuti, handichazonwi zvibereko zvomuzambiringa kubvira zvino kusvikira zuva iro randichazvinwa patsva nemi muumambo hwaBaba vangu.”" 
Matthew26:30 Vakati vaimba rwiyo, vakabuda vakaenda kuGomo reMiorivhi." 
Matthew26:31 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari, “Usiku huno imi mose muchatiza nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: “ ‘Ndicharova mufudzi, boka ramakwai rigopararira.’" 
Matthew26:32 Asi mushure mokunge ndamuka, ndichafanotungamira kuGarirea.”" 
Matthew26:33 Petro akapindura akati, “Kunyange vamwe vose vakatiza nokuda kwenyu, ini handizoiti izvozvo.”" 
Matthew26:34 Jesu akati, “Ndinokuudza chokwadi kuti usiku huno chaihwo, jongwe risati rarira uchandiramba katatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Asi Petro akati kwaari, “Kunyange ndichifanira kufa nemi, handingatongokurambai.” Vamwe vadzidzi vose vakadarowo." 
Matthew26:36 Ipapo Jesu akaenda navadzidzi vake kunzvimbo inonzi Getsemani, uye akati kwavari, “Garai pano ini ndichienda apo kundonyengetera.”" 
Matthew26:37 Akatora Petro navanakomana vaZebhedhi vaviri akaenda navo, uye akatanga kuva neshungu, uye akatambudzika." 
Matthew26:38 Ipapo akati kwavari, “Mweya wangu uri kushungurudzika kwazvo kusvika pakufa. Garai pano uye murinde pamwe chete neni.”" 
Matthew26:39 Akaenda mberi zvishoma, akawira pasi nechiso chake akanyengetera achiti, “Baba vangu, kana zvichibvira mukombe uyu ngaubviswe kwandiri. Asi kwete kuda kwangu asi kuda kwenyu.”" 
Matthew26:40 Ipapo akadzokera kuvadzidzi vake akavawana vavata. Akabvunza Petro achiti, “Varume, matadza kurinda neni kweawa imwe chete?" 
Matthew26:41 Rindai uye munyengetere kuti murege kupinda mukuedzwa. Mweya unoda, asi muviri wakaneta.”" 
Matthew26:42 Akaendazve kechipiri akanyengetera achiti, “Baba vangu, kana zvisingagoni kuti mukombe uyu ubviswe kwandiri kunze kwokutenge ndaunwa, kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe.”" 
Matthew26:43 Paakadzoka, akavawanazve vavata nokuti meso avo akanga azere nehope." 
Matthew26:44 Saka akavasiya akaendazve uye akanyengetera kechitatu, achitaura zvimwe chetezvo." 
Matthew26:45 Ipapo akadzokazve kuvadzidzi akati kwavari, “Muchakavata uye muchakazorora here? Tarirai, nguva yava pedyo, uye Mwanakomana woMunhu ari kupandukirwa achiiswa mumaoko avatadzi." 
Matthew26:46 Simukai, ngatichiendai! Anondipandukira uya ouya!”" 
Matthew26:47 Paakanga achiri kutaura kudaro, Judhasi, mumwe wevane gumi navaviri akasvika. Akauya navanhu vazhinji vakanga vakabata minondo netsvimbo, vakanga vatumwa navaprista, vakuru navakuru vavanhu." 
Matthew26:48 Zvino uya akamupandukira ainge avaudza chiratidzo achiti, “Uyo wandinotsvoda ndiye; mumusunge.”" 
Matthew26:49 Judhasi akaenda pakarepo kuna Jesu akati, “Kwaziwai, Rabhi!” uye akamutsvoda." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Shamwari, ita zvawavinga.” Ipapo varume vakaswedera pedyo vakabata Jesu, vakamusunga." 
Matthew26:51 Ipapo mumwe waavo vaiva naJesu akavhomora munondo wake ndokugura nzeve yomuranda womuprista mukuru. 
Matthew26:52 Zvino Jesu akati kwaari, “Dzorera munondo wako mumuhara mawo, nokuti vose vanovhomora munondo vachafa nomunondo." 
Matthew26:53 Unofunga kuti handigoni here kukumbira kuna Baba vangu, vakandipa iye zvino, vatumwa vanopfuura mapoka makumi gumi namaviri?" 
Matthew26:54 Asi Magwaro angagozadziswa sei anoti zvinofanira kuitika saizvozvo?” 
Matthew26:55 Panguva iyoyo Jesu akati kuvanhu vazhinji vaivapo, “Ko, ndinotungamira vapanduki here zvamauya neminondo netsvimbo kuzondibata? Mazuva ose ndaigara mutemberi ndichidzidzisa uye hamuna kundisunga." 
Matthew26:56 Asi izvi zvose zvaitika kuti zvakanyorwa navaprofita zvizadziswe.” Ipapo vadzidzi vose vakamusiya uye vakatiza. 
Matthew26:57 Vaya vakanga vasunga Jesu vakaenda naye kuna Kayafasi, muprista mukuru, uko kwakanga kwakaungana vadzidzisi vomurayiro navamwe vakuru." 
Matthew26:58 Asi Petro akamutevera ari chinhambwe kusvikira paruvazhe rwomuprista mukuru. Akapinda akagara pasi pamwe chete navarindi kuti aone maperero azvo. 
Matthew26:59 Vaprista vakuru nedare rose ramakurukota vakanga vachitsvaka zvapupu zvenhema kuti zvipomere Jesu mhosva kuti vamuuraye. 
Matthew26:60 Asi havana zvavakawana, kunyange zvazvo zvapupu zvenhema zvakauya pamberi. Pakupedzisira, vaviri vakauya" 
Matthew26:61 vakati, “Munhu uyu akati, ‘Ndinogona kuputsa temberi yaMwari ndigoivakazve namazuva matatu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Ipapo muprista mukuru akasimuka akati kuna Jesu, “Ko, haupinduri here? Uchapupu uhu hunorehwa navarume ava pamusoro pako ndohwei?”" 
Matthew26:63 Asi Jesu akaramba anyerere. Muprista mukuru akati kwaari, “Ndinokurayira, sezvo wapika naMwari mupenyu, kuti, ‘Tiudze kana uri iwe Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari.’ ”" 
Matthew26:64 Jesu akapindura akati, “Hongu, ndizvo zvamataura. Asi ndinoti kwamuri mose: Munguva inouya muchaona Mwanakomana woMunhu agere kurudyi rwaSamasimba uye achiuya ari mumakore okudenga.”" 
Matthew26:65 Ipapo muprista mukuru akabvarura nguo dzake akati, “Ataura zvinomhura. Tichagodirei zvimwe zvapupu? Tarirai, zvino manzwa kumhura kwake." 
Matthew26:66 Munofungei nazvo?” Vakapindura vachiti, “Anofanira kufa!”" 
Matthew26:67 Ipapo vakamusvipira mate kumeso uye vakamurova netsiva. Vamwe vakamurova nembama 
Matthew26:68 uye vakati, “Profita kwatiri, Kristu. Ndiani akurova?”" 
Matthew26:69 Zvino Petro akanga agere panze muruvazhe, uye mumwe muranda wechisikana akauya kwaari akati, “Newewo wakanga una Jesu weGarirea.”" 
Matthew26:70 Asi akaramba pamberi pavo vose achiti, “Handizivi zvauri kutaura nezvazvo.”" 
Matthew26:71 Ipapo akabuda akandomira pasuo apo paakaonekwa nomumwe musikana uyo akati kuvanhu vose vaivapo, “Munhu uyu akanga ana Jesu weNazareta.”" 
Matthew26:72 Akarambazve, akapika achiti, “Murume uyu handimuzivi!”" 
Matthew26:73 Mushure mechinguva, vaya vakanga vamirepo vakaenda kuna Petro vakasvikoti, “Zvechokwadi uri mumwe wavo nokuda kwamatauriro ako.”" 
Matthew26:74 Ipapo akatanga kuzvituka uye akapika kwavari achiti, “Murume uyu handimuzivi!” Pakarepo jongwe rakarira." 
Matthew26:75 Ipapo Petro akarangarira shoko rakanga rataurwa naJesu rokuti: “Jongwe risati rarira uchandiramba katatu.” Ipapo akabuda kunze akandochema zvikuru. 
Matthew27:1 Mangwanani-ngwanani vaprista vose vakuru navakuru vavanhu vakabvumirana kuti Jesu aurayiwe. 
Matthew27:2 Vakamusunga, vakaenda naye vakandomuisa kuna Pirato uyo aiva mubati." 
Matthew27:3 Judhasi uya akanga amupandukira akati, aona kuti Jesu atongerwa rufu, akazvidemba kwazvo ndokubva adzosera makumi matatu esirivha aya kuvaprista vakuru navakuru." 
Matthew27:4 Akasvikoti, “Ndatadza, nokuti ndapandukira ropa risina mhosva.” Vakamupindura vachiti, “Zvinei nesu? Ndezvako izvo.”" 
Matthew27:5 Saka Judhasi akakanda mari iya mutemberi akabva akaenda akandozvisungirira. 
Matthew27:6 Vaprista vakuru vakanhonga mari iya vakati, “Hazvitenderwi nomurayiro kuti tiise mari iyi mudura remari, sezvo iri mari yeropa.”" 
Matthew27:7 Saka vakazotenderana kuti vaishandise kutenga munda womuumbi wehari kuti ugova nzvimbo yokuviga vatorwa. 
Matthew27:8 Naizvozvo wakanzi Munda Weropa kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
Matthew27:9 Ipapo zvakabva zvazadziswa zvakataurwa nomuprofita Jeremia zvinoti, “Vakatora makumi matatu esirivha, mutengo waakatengeswa nawo navanhu veIsraeri," 
Matthew27:10 uye vakaashandisa kutenga nawo munda womuumbi wehari, sokurayirwa kwandakaitwa naIshe.”" 
Matthew27:11 Panguva iyoyo Jesu akamira pamberi pomubati, uye mubati akamubvunza achiti, “Ndiwe mambo wavaJudha here?” Jesu akapindura achiti, “Hongu, ndizvo zvamataura.”" 
Matthew27:12 Paakapomerwa navaprista vakuru navakuru vavanhu, haana chaakapindura." 
Matthew27:13 Ipapo Pirato akamubvunza achiti, “Iwe haunzwi here uchapupu hwezvavari kukupomera izvi?”" 
Matthew27:14 Asi, Jesu akaramba anyerere, akasapindura kunyange chimwe zvacho, mubati akashamiswa kwazvo." 
Matthew27:15 Zvino yaiva tsika yomubati pamutambo kusunungura musungwa mumwe chete anenge asarudzwa navanhu vazhinji. 
Matthew27:16 Panguva iyoyo vaiva nomusungwa ainge anetsa kwazvo ainzi Bharabhasi. 
Matthew27:17 Saka vanhu vazhinji vakati vaungana, Pirato akavabvunza akati, “Ndoupi wamunoda kuti ndikusunungurirei: Bharabhasi kana kuti Jesu anonzi Kristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Nokuti aiziva kuti vakanga vamuisa kwaari nokuda kwegodo. 
Matthew27:19 Pirato akati agere pachigaro chokutonga mukadzi wake akamutumira shoko iri rokuti: “Usawana chaunoita nomurume uyo asina mhosva, nokuti hope dzandarota nezvake usiku hwanhasi dzanditambudza kwazvo.”" 
Matthew27:20 Asi vaprista vakuru navakuru vavanhu vakakurudzira vanhu vazhinji kuti vakumbire Bharabhasi uye kuti Jesu aurayiwe. 
Matthew27:21 Mubati akabvunza akati, “Ndoupi pavaviri ava wamunoda kuti ndikusunungurirei?” Vakapindura vakati, “Bharabhasi!”" 
Matthew27:22 Pirato akabvunza akati, “Zvino ndichaiteiko naJesu anonzi Kristu?” Vakapindura vakati, “Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa!”" 
Matthew27:23 Pirato akabvunzazve achiti, “Nemhaka yei? Mhosva yake ndeyei?” Vanhu vazhinji vaya vakaramba vachidanidzira vachiti, “Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa!”" 
Matthew27:24 Pirato akati aona kuti hapana kwaaisvika, asi kuti bope rakanga rotanga, akatora mvura akashamba maoko ake pamberi pavanhu akati, “Handina mhosva yeropa romunhu uyu. Zvionerei.”" 
Matthew27:25 Vanhu vose vakapindura vachiti, “Ropa rake ngarive pamusoro pedu napamusoro pevana vedu.”" 
Matthew27:26 Ipapo akavasunungurira Bharabhasi, asi akaita kuti Jesu arohwe, uye akamupa kwavari kuti arovererwe pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew27:27 Ipapo varwi vomubati vakatora Jesu vakaenda naye mumuzinda womubati uye vakaunganidza hondo yose paari. 
Matthew27:28 Vakamubvisa nguo dzake vakamupfekedza nguo tsvuku. 
Matthew27:29 Vakaruka korona yeminzwa vakaiisa pamusoro wake. Vakamubatisa mudonzvo muruoko rwake rworudyi vakapfugama pamberi pake uye vakamuseka vachiti, “Kwaziwai, Mambo wavaJudha!”" 
Matthew27:30 Vakamusvipira mate vakamutorera tsvimbo iya uye vakaramba vachimurova nayo musoro. 
Matthew27:31 Shure kwokumuseka, vakamupfekedza nguo dzake chaidzo uye vakaenda naye kunomuroverera pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew27:32 Vakati vobuda, vakasangana nomurume aibva kuSairini ainzi Simoni, uye vakamumanikidza kuti atakure muchinjikwa." 
Matthew27:33 Vakasvika panzvimbo inonzi Gorokota, (zvinoreva kuti Nzvimbo yeDehenya)." 
Matthew27:34 Ipapo vakapa Jesu waini yakasanganiswa nenduru, kuti anwe, asi akati airavira akaramba kuinwa." 
Matthew27:35 Vakati vamuroverera pamuchinjikwa, vakagovana nguo dzake vachiita zvokukanda mijenya." 
Matthew27:36 Uye vakagara pasi, vakamurinda." 
Matthew27:37 Pamusoro pake vakaisa rugwaro rwemhosva yake rwaiti: “UYU NDIJESU, MAMBO WAVAJUDHA.”" 
Matthew27:38 Makororo maviri akarovererwawo pamwe chete naye, mumwe kurudyi mumwe kuruboshwe." 
Matthew27:39 Vaya vaipfuura napo, vakamutuka vachidzungudza misoro yavo" 
Matthew27:40 uye vachiti, “Iwe uri kuzoputsa temberi uchizoivakazve mumazuva matatu, chizviponesa! Buruka pamuchinjikwa kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari!”" 
Matthew27:41 Nenzira imwe cheteyo, vaprista vakuru, navadzidzisi vomurayiro navakuru vakamuseka vachiti," 
Matthew27:42 “Akaponesa vamwe, asi haagoni kuzviponesa! Ndiye Mambo weIsraeri! Ngaaburuke zvino pamuchinjikwa tigotenda kwaari." 
Matthew27:43 Anovimba naMwari ngaachimununura iye zvino kana achimuda, nokuti akati, ‘Ndiri Mwanakomana waMwari.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Nenzira imwe cheteyo makororo akanga arovererwa pamwe chete naye akamutukawo. 
Matthew27:45 Kubva panguva yechitanhatu kusvika panguva yepfumbamwe rima rakavapo panyika yose. 
Matthew27:46 Nenguva inenge yepfumbamwe, Jesu akadanidzira nenzwi guru achiti, “Eroi, Eroi, rama sabhakitani?” zvichireva kuti, “Mwari wangu! Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko?”" 
Matthew27:47 Vamwe vakanga vamirepo vakati vanzwa izvozvo, vakati, “Ari kudana Eria.”" 
Matthew27:48 Pakarepo mumwe wavo akamhanya akatora chipanje. Akachizadza newaini yevhiniga ndokuchiisa pachimuti, achibva apa Jesu kuti anwe." 
Matthew27:49 Vamwe vakati, “Zvino musiyei ari oga. Regai tione kana Eria achiuya kuzomuponesa.”" 
Matthew27:50 Uye Jesu akati adanidzira nenzwi guru, akabudisa mweya wake." 
Matthew27:51 Panguva iyoyo chidzitiro chomutemberi chakabvaruka napakati kubva kumusoro kusvika pasi. Nyika yakadengenyeka, uye mabwe akatsemuka." 
Matthew27:52 Makuva akazaruka, mitumbi yavatsvene vazhinji vakanga vakafa ikamutswa kuupenyu." 
Matthew27:53 Vakabuda mumakuva, uye shure kwokumuka kwaJesu vakapinda muguta dzvene uye vakaonekwa navanhu vazhinji." 
Matthew27:54 Mukuru wezana navaya vaakanga anavo vakarinda Jesu, pavakaona kudengenyeka kwenyika nezvose zvakanga zvaitika, vakatya kwazvo, uye vakati, “Zvechokwadi, anga ari Mwanakomana waMwari!”" 
Matthew27:55 Vakadzi vazhinji vakanga varipo, vachitarira vari kure. Vakanga vatevera Jesu kubva kuGarirea kuti vamuriritire pane zvaaida." 
Matthew27:56 Pakati pavo paiva naMaria Magadharena, Maria mai vaJakhobho naJosefa, namai vavanakomana vaZebhedhi." 
Matthew27:57 Kwakati kwovira, kwakauya mumwe murume mupfumi aibva kuArimatea, ainzi Josefa, akanga avawo mudzidzi waJesu." 
Matthew27:58 Akaenda kuna Pirato akandokumbira mutumbi waJesu, uye Pirato akarayira kuti aupiwe." 
Matthew27:59 Josefa akatora mutumbi akauputira nomucheka wakachena," 
Matthew27:60 akauisa muguva rake idzva raakanga achera padombo. Akakungurutsira ibwe guru pamuromo weguva ndokubva aenda. 
Matthew27:61 Maria Magadharena nomumwe Maria vakanga varipo vagere pakatarisana neguva. 
Matthew27:62 Zuva rakatevera, iro rakatevera Zuva roKugadzirira, vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakaenda kuna Pirato." 
Matthew27:63 Vakasvikoti, “Ishe, tinorangarira kuti achiri mupenyu, munyengeri uya akati, ‘Mushure mamazuva matatu, ndichamukazve.’" 
Matthew27:64 Saka rayirai kuti guva rake richengetedzwe kwazvo kusvika pazuva retatu. Zvimwe vadzidzi vake vangauye vakaba mutumbi wake vakaudza vanhu kuti akamutswa kuvakafa. Kunyengera kwokupedzisira uku kuchaipa kukunda kwokutanga.” 
Matthew27:65 Pirato akapindura akati, “Torai, varindi. Endai, mundochengetedza guva iroro semaziviro enyu.”" 
Matthew27:66 Saka vakaenda vakandoita kuti richengetedzwe nokuisa chisimbiso pabwe, uye nokuisa varindi." 
Matthew28:1 Mushure meSabata, ava mambakwedza nomusi wokutanga wevhiki, Maria Magadharena nomumwe Maria vakaenda kundoona guva." 
Matthew28:2 Pakava nokudengenyeka kwenyika kukuru nokuti mutumwa waShe akabva kudenga akaenda paguva akasvikokungurutsa ibwe riya akagara pamusoro paro. 
Matthew28:3 Kuonekwa kwake kwakanga kwakaita semheni uye nguo dzake dzakanga dzakachena sechando. 
Matthew28:4 Varindi vakamutya kwazvo zvokuti vakadedera vakaita savanhu vafa. 
Matthew28:5 Mutumwa akati kuvakadzi vaya, “Musatya nokuti ndinoziva kuti muri kutsvaka Jesu uyo akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew28:6 Haapo pano; amuka sokutaura kwaakaita. Uyai muone panzvimbo paakanga avete. 
Matthew28:7 Zvino kurumidzai muende kundoudza vadzidzi vake kuti, ‘Amuka kubva kuvakafa uye kuti afanotungamira kuGarirea. Muchanomuona ikoko.’ Zvino ndakuudzai.”" 
Matthew28:8 Saka vakadzi ava vakakurumidza kubva paguva vachitya asi vakazadzwa nomufaro, uye vakamhanya kundoudza vadzidzi vake." 
Matthew28:9 Pakarepo Jesu akasangana navo, akati, “Kwaziwai.” Vakauya kwaari vakabata tsoka dzake uye vakamunamata." 
Matthew28:10 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari, “Musatya. Endai mundoudza hama dzangu kuti vaende kuGarirea; ikoko ndiko kwavachanondiona.”" 
Matthew28:11 Vakadzi vaya vachiri munzira, vamwe vevarindi vakaenda muguta vakandotaurira vaprista vakuru zvose zvakanga zvaitika." 
Matthew28:12 Vaprista vakuru vakati vasangana navakuru, uye vafunga zano, vakapa varwi mari zhinji" 
Matthew28:13 vakavaudza kuti, “Imi munofanira kutaura muchiti, ‘Vadzidzi vake vakauya usiku vakamuba isu tivete.’" 
Matthew28:14 Kana chiziviso ichi chikasvika munzeve dzomubati, isu tichaita kuti agutsikane uye imi musawira mudambudziko.”" 
Matthew28:15 Saka varwi vakatora mari iya vakaita sezvavakanga varayirwa. Uye shoko iri rakaparadzirwa kwazvo pakati pavaJudha kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
Matthew28:16 Ipapo vadzidzi gumi nomumwe vakaenda kuGarirea, kugomo ravainge vaudzwa naJesu kuti vaende." 
Matthew28:17 Vakati vamuona, vakamunamata, asi vamwe vakakahadzika." 
Matthew28:18 Ipapo Jesu akasvika pavari akati, “Simba rose kudenga napanyika rakapiwa kwandiri." 
Matthew28:19 Naizvozvo endai mudzidzise ndudzi dzose, muchivabhabhatidza muzita raBaba, neroMwanakomana neroMweya Mutsvene," 
Matthew28:20 uye muchivadzidzisa kuti vachengete zvose zvandakakurayirai. Uye zvechokwadi ndinemi kusvikira pakuguma kwenyika.” 
Mark1:1 Kutanga kwevhangeri raJesu Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Mark1:2 Kwakanyorwa muna Isaya muprofita kuchinzi: “Ndichatuma nhume yangu mberi kwako, uyo achagadzira nzira yako,”" 
Mark1:3 “inzwi rounodana murenje, richiti, ‘Gadzirai nzira yaShe, ruramisai migwagwa yake.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Uye saizvozvo Johani akauya, achibhabhatidza murenje uye achiparidza rubhabhatidzo rwokutendeuka kuti varegererwe zvivi." 
Mark1:5 Nyika yose yeJudhea navanhu vose veJerusarema vakaenda kwaari. Vachireurura zvivi zvavo, vakabhabhatidzwa naye muRwizi rweJorodhani." 
Mark1:6 Johani aipfeka nguo dzamakushe engamera, nebhanhire reganda muchiuno chake, uye aidya mhashu nouchi hwesango." 
Mark1:7 Uye iyi ndiyo yakanga iri mharidzo yake: “Shure kwangu kuchauya mumwe ane simba kupfuureni wandisina kufanira kusunungura rukanda rweshangu dzake. 
Mark1:8 Ndinokubhabhatidzai nemvura, asi iye achakubhabhatidzai noMweya Mutsvene.”" 
Mark1:9 Panguva iyoyo Jesu akauya achibva kuNazareta muGarirea uye akabhabhatidzwa naJohani muJorodhani. 
Mark1:10 Jesu paakanga ava kubuda mumvura, akaona denga richizarurwa uye Mweya achiburukira pamusoro pake senjiva." 
Mark1:11 Uye inzwi rakauya richibva kudenga richiti, “Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu, wandinoda, wandinofarira kwazvo.”" 
Mark1:12 Pakarepo Mweya akamutumira kurenje," 
Mark1:13 uye akanga ari murenje kwamazuva makumi mana, achiedzwa naSatani. Akanga ari pamwe chete nemhuka dzesango uye vatumwa vakamushandira." 
Mark1:14 Mushure mokunge Johani aiswa mutorongo, Jesu akaenda kuGarirea, achiparidza vhangeri raMwari." 
Mark1:15 Akati, “Nguva yasvika. Umambo hwaMwari hwaswedera. Tendeukai mutende vhangeri!”" 
Mark1:16 Jesu paakanga achifamba pamahombekombe eGungwa reGarirea, akaona Simoni nomunun'una wake Andirea vachikanda usvasvi mugungwa, nokuti vakanga vari vabati vehove." 
Mark1:17 Jesu akati, “Uyai munditevere, uye ndichakuitai vabati vavanhu.”" 
Mark1:18 Pakarepo vakasiya usvasvi hwavo vakamutevera. 
Mark1:19 Akati afamba chinhambwe zvishoma, akaona Jakobho mwanakomana waZebhedhi nomunun'una wake Johani vari mugwa, vachigadzira usvasvi hwavo." 
Mark1:20 Haana kunonoka, akavadana, uye vakasiya baba vavo, Zebhedhi mugwa vaine vashandi vavo, vakamutevera." 
Mark1:21 Vakaenda kuKapenaume, uye nomusi weSabata, Jesu akapinda musinagoge akatanga kudzidzisa." 
Mark1:22 Vanhu vakashamiswa nokudzidzisa kwake, nokuti akavadzidzisa somunhu ane simba, asingaiti savadzidzisi vomurayiro." 
Mark1:23 Pakarepo mumwe munhu akanga ari musinagoge ravo akanga akabatwa nomweya wakaipa akadanidzira achiti," 
Mark1:24 “Munodeiko kwatiri, imi Jesu weNazareta? Mauya kuzotiparadza here? Ndinoziva kuti ndimi ani— ndimi Mutsvene waMwari!”" 
Mark1:25 Jesu akamurayira akati, “Nyarara! Buda maari!”" 
Mark1:26 Mweya wakaipa wakamuzunza-zunza ndokubva wabuda maari nenzwi guru. 
Mark1:27 Vanhu vose vakashamiswa kwazvo zvokuti vakabvunzana vachiti, “Chiiko ichi? Idzidziso itsva ine simba! Anorayira kunyange mweya yakaipa, uye ichimuteerera.”" 
Mark1:28 Mukurumbira wake wakapararira munyika yose yeGarirea. 
Mark1:29 Vakati vachangobva musinagoge, vakaenda naJakobho naJohani kumba kwaSimoni naAndirea." 
Mark1:30 Ambuya vaSimoni vakanga vavete pamubhedha vachirwara nefivha, uye vakaudza Jesu nezvavo." 
Mark1:31 Saka akaenda kwavari, akabata ruoko rwavo akavabatsira kusimuka. Fivha yakabva mavari vakatanga kuvashandira." 
Mark1:32 Manheru acho iwayo zuva ravira, vanhu vakauya kuna Jesu navose vairwara navakanga vakabatwa namadhimoni." 
Mark1:33 Guta rose rakaungana pamukova," 
Mark1:34 uye Jesu akaporesa vazhinji vakanga vane zvirwere zvakasiyana-siyana. Akadzingawo madhimoni mazhinji, asi akanga asingatenderi madhimoni kuti ataure nokuti akanga achiziva kuti iye ndiani." 
Mark1:35 Mangwanani-ngwanani, kuchakasviba, Jesu akamuka akabuda mumba akaenda kunzvimbo yaakanga ari oga, ikoko akandonyengetera." 
Mark1:36 Simoni navamwe vake vakaenda kundomutsvaka," 
Mark1:37 uye vakati vamuwana, vakati, “Vanhu vose vanokutsvakai!”" 
Mark1:38 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ngatiendei kune imwe nzvimbo, kumisha iri pedyo, kuti ndinoparidzawo ikoko. Ndizvo zvandakauyira.”" 
Mark1:39 Saka akafamba nomuGarirea yose, achiparidza mumasinagoge avo uye achidzinga madhimoni." 
Mark1:40 Mumwe murume akanga ana maperembudzi akauya kwaari akapfugama, akamukumbira zvikuru achiti, “Kana muchida, munogona kundinatsa.”" 
Mark1:41 Jesu akamunzwira ngoni, akatambanudza ruoko rwake akabata murume uya. Akati, “Ndinoda. Chinatswa!”" 
Mark1:42 Pakarepo maperembudzi akabva paari uye akaporeswa. 
Mark1:43 Jesu akamuendesa pakarepo akamuyambira zvikuru achiti," 
Mark1:44 “Chenjera kuti urege kuudza mumwe munhu. Asi enda, undozviratidza kumuprista ugobayira chipiriso chakarayirwa naMozisi chokuporeswa kwako, chive chapupu kwavari.”" 
Mark1:45 Asi iye akabuda akatanga kutaura akasununguka, achiparadzira shoko iro. Nokuda kwaizvozvo, Jesu haana kuzogona kupinda muguta zviri pachena asi akagara kunze, kunzvimbo dzakanyarara. Kunyange zvakadaro vanhu vakaramba vachiuya kwaari vachibva kumativi ose." 
Mark2:1 Shure kwamazuva mashoma shoma, Jesu akati apindazve muKapenaume, vanhu vakanzwa kuti akanga auya kumusha." 
Mark2:2 Saka vazhinji vakaungana zvokuti mumba makasara musisina nzvimbo kunyange kunze kwomukova, uye akaparidza shoko kwavari." 
Mark2:3 Vamwe varume vakasvika, vakauya kwaari nomunhu akanga akafa mutezo, akatakurwa navarume vana." 
Mark2:4 Sezvo vakanga vasingagoni kusvika naye kuna Jesu nokuda kwokuwanda kwavanhu, vakazarura denga reimba pamusoro paJesu uye, vakati variputsa, vakaburutsa nhoo pakanga pavete uya munhu akanga akafa mutezo." 
Mark2:5 Jesu akati aona kutenda kwavo, akati kuno uya akanga akafa mutezo, “Mwanakomana, zvivi zvako zvaregererwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Zvino vamwe vadzidzisi vomurayiro, vakanga vagere ipapo, vachifunga mumwoyo yavo, vachiti," 
Mark2:7 “Munhu uyu anotaura sei achidaro? Ari kumhura Mwari! Ndianiko anoregerera zvivi asi Mwari oga?” 
Mark2:8 Pakarepo Jesu akazviziva mumweya wake kuti ndizvo zvavakanga vachifunga mumwoyo yavo, uye akati kwavari, “Seiko muchifunga zvinhu izvi?" 
Mark2:9 Ndezvipiko zvakareruka: Kuti kuno wakafa mutezo, ‘Zvivi zvako zvaregererwa,’ kana kuti, ‘Simuka, tora nhoo yako ufambe?’" 
Mark2:10 Asi kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana woMunhu ane simba panyika rokuregerera zvivi.” Akati kuna akanga akafa mutezo," 
Mark2:11 “Ndinoti kwauri, simuka, tora nhoo yako uende kumba.”" 
Mark2:12 Akasimuka kubva panhoo yake, akatora nhoo yake akafamba akabuda vose vachizviona. Izvi zvakashamisa munhu wose uye vakarumbidza Mwari vachiti, “Hatina kumboona chinhu chakadai!”" 
Mark2:13 Ipapo Jesu akabudazve akaenda kugungwa. Vanhu vazhinji zhinji vakauya kwaari uye akatanga kuvadzidzisa. 
Mark2:14 Paaifamba achitevedza gungwa, akaona Revhi mwanakomana waArifiasi agere paitererwa mutero. Jesu akati kwaari, “Nditevere,” ipapo Revhi akasimuka akamutevera." 
Mark2:15 Jesu paakanga achidya kudya kwamanheru paimba yaRevhi, vateresi vazhinji na“vatadzi” vakanga vachidya naye, uye navadzidzi vake, nokuti kwaiva navazhinji vaimutevera." 
Mark2:16 Vadzidzisi vomurayiro, ivo vaFarisi vakati vachimuona achidya na“vatadzi” uye navateresi, vakabvunza vadzidzi vake vakati, “Seiko achidya navateresi uye na‘vatadzi’?”" 
Mark2:17 Akati achinzwa izvozvo, Jesu akati kwavari, “Vasingarwari havatsvaki chiremba, asi vanorwara. Handina kuuya kuzodana vakarurama, asi vatadzi.”" 
Mark2:18 Zvino vadzidzi vaJohani navaFarisi vakanga vachitsanya. Vamwe vanhu vakauya vakabvunza Jesu vakati, “Sei vadzidzi vaJohani navadzidzi vavaFarisi vachitsanya, asi venyu vasingatsanyi?”" 
Mark2:19 Jesu akapindura akati, “Shamwari dzechikomba dzingatsanya seiko kana iye achinavo? Havangadaro, kana iye achinavo." 
Mark2:20 Asi nguva ichasvika ichabviswa chikomba kwavari, uye pazuva iroro vachatsanya." 
Mark2:21 “Hakuna munhu anoisa chigamba chitsva panguo tsaru. Kana akadaro, chigamba chitsva chichabvarura chitsaru, zvoita kuti buri racho rinyanye kukura." 
Mark2:22 Uye hakuna munhu anodira waini itsva muhombodo dzamatehwe tsaru. Kana akaita izvozvo, waini ichaputitsa matehwe, uye zvose waini nedehwe rewaini zvichaparara. Kwete, anodira waini itsva muhombodo itsva.”" 
Mark2:23 Mumwe musi weSabata, Jesu akanga achipfuura nomuminda yezviyo, uye vadzidzi vake vakati vachifamba naye, vakatanga kutanha hura dzezviyo." 
Mark2:24 VaFarisi vakati kwaari, “Tarirai, seiko vachiita zvisingatenderwi nomusi weSabata.”" 
Mark2:25 Akapindura akati, “Hamuna kumboverenga here zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi iye navamwe vake pavakanga vashayiwa zvokudya uye vonzwa nzara?" 
Mark2:26 Mumazuva aAbhiatari muprista mukuru, akapinda mumba maMwari akadya chingwa chakatsaurwa, chinongotenderwa kudyiwa navaprista chete. Uye akapawo vamwe vaaiva navo.”" 
Mark2:27 Ipapo akati kwavari, “Sabata rakaitirwa munhu, munhu haana kuitirwa Sabata." 
Mark2:28 Saka mwanakomana woMunhu ndiye Ishe kunyange weSabata.” 
Mark3:1 Pane imwe nguva akapinda musinagoge, uye imomo makanga mune murume akanga ane ruoko rwakanga rwakakokonyara." 
Mark3:2 Vamwe vavo vakanga vachitsvaka mhosva yavangapomera Jesu, saka vakamutarisisa kuti vaone kana aizomuporesa nomusi weSabata." 
Mark3:3 Jesu akati kumunhu akanga ane ruoko rwakakokonyara, “Simuka umire pamberi pavanhu vose.”" 
Mark3:4 Ipapo Jesu akavabvunza akati, “Ndezvipiko zvinotenderwa nomusi weSabata: kuita zvakanaka kana kuita zvakaipa, kuponesa munhu kana kuuraya?” Asi vakaramba vanyerere." 
Mark3:5 Atsamwa, akatarisa vanhu vose vakanga vakamukomberedza, uye ashungurudzwa nokuda kwokusindimara kwemwoyo yavo akati kumunhu, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako.” Akarutambanudza, uye ruoko rwake rukaporeswa." 
Mark3:6 Ipapo vaFarisi vakabuda vakatanga kurangana navaHerodhi kuti vangauraya sei Jesu. 
Mark3:7 Jesu akabva kugungwa navadzidzi vake, uye vanhu vazhinji vaibva kuGarirea vakamutevera." 
Mark3:8 Vakati vanzwa zvose zvaakanga achiita, vanhu vazhinji vakauya kwaari vachibva kuJudhea, Jerusarema, Idhumea, uye namatunhu ari mhiri kweJorodhani, neakapoteredza Tire neSidhoni." 
Mark3:9 Akaudza vadzidzi vake kuti vamuswededzere igwa duku, kuitira kuti vanhu varege kumutsikirira nokuda kwokuwanda kwavo." 
Mark3:10 Ainge aporesa vazhinji, zvokuti vaya vakanga vane zvirwere vakanga vachisundana vachiuya mberi kuti vamubate." 
Mark3:11 Pose paaionekwa nemweya yakaipa, yaiwira pasi pamberi pake uye yaidanidzira ichiti, “Ndimi Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Mark3:12 Asi iye akairayira kwazvo kuti irege kutaura kuti iye ndiani. 
Mark3:13 Jesu akakwira pagomo akadana kwaari vaya vaaida, uye vakauya kwaari." 
Mark3:14 Akasarudza vane gumi navaviri akavati vapostori, kuti vagare naye uye kuti agozovatuma kuti vandoparidza" 
Mark3:15 uye kuti vave nesimba rokudzinga madhimoni. 
Mark3:16 Ava ndivo gumi navaviri vaakasarudza: Simoni (uyo waakatumidza zita rokuti Petro); 
Mark3:17 Jakobho mwanakomana waZebhedhi nomunun'una wake Johani (avo vaakatumidza zita rokuti Bhoanerigesi, kureva kuti Vanakomana voKutinhira);" 
Mark3:18 Andirea, Firipi, Bhatoromeo, Mateo, Tomasi, Jakobho mwanakomana waArifasi, Tadheo, Simoni muZeroti" 
Mark3:19 naJudhasi Iskarioti, uyo akamupandukira." 
Mark3:20 Ipapo Jesu akapinda mune imwe imba, uyezve vazhinji vakaungana, zvokuti iye navadzidzi vake vakanga vasingagoni kunyange kudya." 
Mark3:21 Mhuri yake yakati yazvinzwa, vakaenda kundomubata, nokuti vakati, “Ava kupenga.”" 
Mark3:22 Uye vadzidzisi vomurayiro vaibva kuJerusarema vakati, “Akabatwa nomweya waBheerizebhubhi! Ari kudzinga madhimoni nomuchinda wamadhimoni.”" 
Mark3:23 Saka Jesu akavadana akataura kwavari nomufananidzo achiti, “Ko, Satani angadzinga sei Satani?" 
Mark3:24 Kana umambo huchizvipesanisa, umambo ihwohwo hahugoni kumira." 
Mark3:25 Kana imba ichizvipesanisa, imba iyoyo haigoni kumira." 
Mark3:26 Uye kana Satani achizvipikisa pachake uye achizvipesanisa, haangagoni kumira; kuguma kwake kwasvika." 
Mark3:27 Zviripo ndezvokuti, hakuna munhu angapinda mumba momunhu ane simba uye akatakura zvinhu zvake, kana asina kutanga asunga murume wacho ane simba. Ipapo angagona kupamba imba yake." 
Mark3:28 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti zvivi zvose nokumhura kwavanhu kwose zvicharegererwa. 
Mark3:29 Asi ani naani anomhura Mweya Mutsvene haazomboregererwi; ane mhosva yechivi chisingaperi.” 
Mark3:30 Akataura izvozvo nokuti vakanga vachiti, “Ano mweya wakaipa.”" 
Mark3:31 Ipapo mai vaJesu navanun'una vake vakauya. Vakatuma munhu kundomudana ivo vamire panze. 
Mark3:32 Vazhinji vakanga vagere vakamukomberedza, uye vakamuudza kuti, “Mai venyu navanun'una venyu vari kukutsvakai panze.”" 
Mark3:33 Iye akati, “Vanamai vangu navanun'una vangu ndivanaaniko?”" 
Mark3:34 Ipapo akatarisa kuna avo vakanga vagere vakaita denderedzwa vakamupoteredza akati, “Ava ndivo mai vangu navanun'una vangu!" 
Mark3:35 Ani naani anoita kuda kwaMwari ndiye munun'una wangu nehanzvadzi, uye namai vangu.”" 
Mark4:1 Jesu akatanga kudzidzisazve ari pagungwa. Vanhu vakanga vakaungana vakamukomberedza vari vazhinji zhinji zvokuti akabva apinda mugwa akagara mariri ari mugungwa, asi vanhu vose vari kumahombekombe." 
Mark4:2 Akavadzidzisa zvinhu zvizhinji nemifananidzo, uye mukudzidzisa kwake akati," 
Mark4:3 “Teererai! Murimi akabuda kundokusha mbeu yake. 
Mark4:4 Paakanga achikusha mbeu, dzimwe dzakawira munzira, uye shiri dzakasvika dzikadzidya." 
Mark4:5 Dzimwe dzakawira murukangarabwe, madzisina kuwana ivhu rakawanda. Dzakakurumidza kumera, nokuti ivhu rakanga riri shoma." 
Mark4:6 Asi zuva rakati rabuda, mbeu dzakapiswa nezuva, uye dzikaoma nokuti dzakanga dzisina midzi." 
Mark4:7 Dzimwe dzakawira pakati peminzwa, minzwa ikakura ikavhunga mbeu, nokudaro hadzina kubereka zvibereko." 
Mark4:8 Uye dzimwe dzakawira pavhu rakanaka. Dzakamera dzikakura uye dzikabereka kakapetwa makumi matatu, makumi matanhatu, kana kunyange zana.”" 
Mark4:9 Ipapo Jesu akati, “Ane nzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe.”" 
Mark4:10 Paakanga ava oga, vane gumi navaviri uye navamwe vakanga vakamukomberedza vakamubvunza pamusoro pomufananidzo uyu." 
Mark4:11 Akati kwavari, “Chakavanzika choumambo hwaMwari chakapiwa kwamuri. Asi kuna avo vari kunze, zvinhu zvose zvinotaurwa nemifananidzo" 
Mark4:12 kuitira kuti, “ ‘zvimwe vangaramba vachiona, asi varege kuonesesa; uye vachinzwa, asi varege kunzwisisa; kana kuti vangatendeuka uye vakaregererwa!’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari, “Hamunzwisisi mufananidzo uyu here? Munganzwisisa seiko mufananidzo upi zvawo?" 
Mark4:14 Murimi anokusha shoko. 
Mark4:15 Vamwe vanhu vakaita setsanga yakawira munzira, munokushwa shoko. Pavanongorinzwa, Satani anouya otora shoko rakushwa mukati mavo." 
Mark4:16 Vamwe vakaita setsanga yakawira parukangarabwe, vanonzwa shoko uye nokukurumidza vorigamuchira nomufaro." 
Mark4:17 Asi sezvo vasina midzi, vanongotsungirira kwenguva pfupi. Panongosvika nhamo kana kutambudzwa nokuda kweshoko, vanokurumidza kuwa." 
Mark4:18 Uye vamwe, setsanga yakawira pakati peminzwa, vanonzwa shoko;" 
Mark4:19 asi kufunganya nezvoupenyu huno, kunyengera kwoupfumi uye zvishuwo zvezvimwe zvinhu zvinopinda zvigovhunga shoko, zvichirishayisa zvibereko." 
Mark4:20 Vamwe vakaita setsanga yakawira pavhu rakanaka, vanonzwa shoko, vorigamuchira, uye vobereka zvibereko, kakapetwa makumi matatu, makumi matanhatu kana kunyange zana pane zvinenge zvakushwa.”" 
Mark4:21 Akati kwavari, “Munouya nomwenje kuzouisa pasi pedengu here kana pasi pomubhedha? Handiti munouisa pachigadziko chawo here?" 
Mark4:22 Nokuti hapana chakavigwa chisingazooneswi, uye hapana chakavanzika chisingazobudi pachena." 
Mark4:23 Munhu ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe.” 
Mark4:24 Akaenderera mberi achiti, “Chenjererai kwazvo zvamunonzwa. Nechiyero chamunoshandisa, muchayererwawo uye kunyange zvakawanda." 
Mark4:25 Ani naani anazvo achapiwa zvimwe; ani naani asina, achatorerwa kunyange nezvaanazvo.”" 
Mark4:26 Akatizve, “Umambo hwaMwari hwakafanana nomunhu anokusha mbeu muvhu." 
Mark4:27 Usiku namasikati, kunyange akavata kana akamuka, mbeu inomera igokura, kunyange zvazvo asingazivi kuti zvinoitika sei." 
Mark4:28 Ivhu riri roga rinobereka zviyo, kutanga chipande, kwozoti hura, kwozoitawo tsanga dzakakora muhura." 
Mark4:29 Panongoibva zviyo, anozvicheka nejeko, nokuti kukohwa kwasvika.”" 
Mark4:30 Akatizve, “Umambo hwaMwari tingahufananidza neiko kana kuti tingaita mufananidzo upiko kuti tihutsanangure?" 
Mark4:31 Hwakafanana netsanga yemastadhi, inova tsanga duku duku yaunodyara muvhu." 
Mark4:32 Asi kana yadyarwa, inokura uye igova muti mukuru kupfuura miti yose yomubindu, una matavi makuru zvokuti shiri dzedenga dzinogona kugara mumumvuri wawo.”" 
Mark4:33 Nemimwe mifananidzo yakadai, Jesu akataura shoko kwavari, zvose zvavaigona kunzwisisa." 
Mark4:34 Haana kutaura chinhu chimwe kwavari asingashandisi mufananidzo. Asi paainge ari oga navadzidzi vake, aivatsanangurira zvose." 
Mark4:35 Zuva iroro ava madekwana, akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Ngatiyambukirei kuno rumwe rutivi.”" 
Mark4:36 Vakasiya vanhu vazhinji, vakaenda naye mugwa, sezvaakanga ari. Pakanga pane mamwewo magwa aaiva nawo." 
Mark4:37 Dutu rinotyisa rakauya, uye mafungu akarova igwa, zvokuti rakanga rava pedyo nokunyura." 
Mark4:38 Jesu akanga ari mushure megwa, avete pamutsago. Vadzidzi vake vakamumutsa vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, hamuna hanya here kana tikanyura?”" 
Mark4:39 Akamuka, akarayira mhepo uye akati kumafungu, “Nyarara! Dzikama!” Ipapo mhepo yakapera uye kukadzikama zvikuru." 
Mark4:40 Akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Munotyireiko zvakadai? Hamusati mava nokutenda here?”" 
Mark4:41 Vakatya uye vakabvunzana vachiti, “Ndianiko uyu? Kunyange mhepo namafungu zvinomuteerera!”" 
Mark5:1 Vakayambuka mhiri kwegungwa kunyika yavaGeraseni. 
Mark5:2 Jesu akati abuda mugwa, mumwe murume akanga ano mweya wakaipa akauya achibva kumakuva kuti azosangana naye." 
Mark5:3 Murume uyu aigara kumakuva, uye kwakanga kusisina munhu aigona kumusungazve, kunyange kana nengetani." 
Mark5:4 Nokuti kazhinji aisungwa maoko namakumbo, asi aidambura ngetani napakati uye achivhuna simbi dzaiva pamakumbo ake. Hakuna munhu aiva nesimba rokumukunda." 
Mark5:5 Usiku namasikati aingochema uye achizvicheka-cheka namabwe ari pakati pamakuva uye nomuzvikomo. 
Mark5:6 Akati aona Jesu achiri chinhambwe, akamhanya akandowira pamabvi ake mberi kwake." 
Mark5:7 Akadanidzira nenzwi riri pamusoro achiti, “Munodeiko kwandiri, Jesu, Mwanakomana waMwari woWokumusoro-soro? Pikai kuna Mwari kuti hamuzonditambudzi!”" 
Mark5:8 Nokuti Jesu akanga ati kwaari, “Buda mumunhu uyu, iwe mweya wakaipa!”" 
Mark5:9 Ipapo Jesu akamubvunza akati, “Zita rako ndiwe ani?” Akapindura akati, “Zita rangu ndiRegioni, nokuti tiri vazhinji.”" 
Mark5:10 Uye akakumbira akumbirazve kuna Jesu kuti arege kuidzinga kubva munyika iyo. 
Mark5:11 Boka guru renguruve raifura riri pazvikomo zvaiva pedyo nenzvimbo iyi. 
Mark5:12 Madhimoni akakumbirisa kuna Jesu akati, “Titumei henyu pakati penguruve, titenderei henyu kuti tinopinda madziri.”" 
Mark5:13 Akaatendera, uye mweya yakaipa yakabuda ikaenda ikandopinda munguruve. Boka rinenge zviuru zviviri pakuwanda, rakamhanya richiburukira kumawere rikapinda mugungwa uye rikanyuramo." 
Mark5:14 Vaya vakanga vachifudza nguruve vakatiza vakandozivisa izvi muguta nomumaruwa, uye vanhu vakabuda kuti vandoona zvakanga zvaitika." 
Mark5:15 Vakati vasvika kuna Jesu, vakaona murume uya akanga akabatwa neRegioni ramadhimoni, agere ipapo, akapfeka uye ava munhu kwaye; uye vakatya." 
Mark5:16 Vaya vakanga vazviona vakavaudza zvakanga zvaitika kumunhu akanga akabatwa namadhimoni, uye vakataura nezvenguruvewo." 
Mark5:17 Ipapo vanhu vakatanga kukumbira Jesu kuti abve munyika yavo. 
Mark5:18 Jesu paakanga opinda mugwa, munhu akanga akabatwa namadhimoni akakumbira zvikuru kuti aende naye." 
Mark5:19 Jesu haana kumutendera, asi akati kwaari, “Chienda kumba kumhuri yako undovaudza zvawaitirwa naShe, uye kuti akunzwira ngoni sei.”" 
Mark5:20 Saka murume uyu akabva akaenda uye akatanga kutaura muDhekapori zvinhu zvikuru zvaakanga aitirwa naJesu. Uye vanhu vose vakashamiswa. 
Mark5:21 Jesu akati ayambukazve mhiri negwa kuno rumwe rutivi rwegungwa, vazhinji zhinji vakaungana vakamukomberedza paakanga ari pagungwa." 
Mark5:22 Ipapo mumwe wavabati vomusinagoge, ainzi Jairosi, akasvikapo. Paakaona Jesu akawira patsoka dzake" 
Mark5:23 uye akamukumbirisa zvikuru achiti, “Mwanasikana wangu mudiki ava kufa. Ndapota uyai muise maoko enyu pamusoro kuti agoporeswa uye ararame.”" 
Mark5:24 Saka Jesu akaenda naye. Vazhinji zhinji vakatevera vachimanikidzirana. 
Mark5:25 Uye pakanga pano mukadzi aiva nechirwere chokubuda ropa kwamakore gumi namaviri. 
Mark5:26 Akanga atambudzika zvikuru uye achirapwa navanachiremba vazhinji uye akanga apedza zvose zvaaiva nazvo, asi pachinzvimbo chokuva nani akatonyanyisa kurwara." 
Mark5:27 Akati anzwa nezvaJesu, akauya mushure make mukati mavazhinji uye akabata nguo yake," 
Mark5:28 nokuti akati mumwoyo make, “Kana ndikangobata nguo dzake, ndichaporeswa.”" 
Mark5:29 Pakarepo tsime reropa rake rakapwa uye akanzwa mumuviri wake kuti akanga asunungurwa kubva pakutambudzika kwake. 
Mark5:30 Pakarepo Jesu akanzwa kuti simba rakanga rabuda maari. Akatendeukira kuruzhinji rwavanhu akabvunza achiti, “Ndianiko abata nguo dzangu?”" 
Mark5:31 Vadzidzi vake vakati, “Muri kuona vanhu vachikutsimbirirai, zvino moti, ‘Ndianiko andibata?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Asi Jesu akaramba achitarisa-tarisa kuti aone kuti ndiani akanga aita izvozvo. 
Mark5:33 Ipapo mukadzi, achiziva zvakanga zvaitika kwaari, akauya akawira patsoka dzake, uye achidedera nokutya, akamuudza chokwadi chose." 
Mark5:34 Iye akati kwaari, “Mwanasikana, kutenda kwako kwakuporesa. Enda norugare uye usunungurwe pakutambudzika kwako.”" 
Mark5:35 Jesu achiri kutaura, vamwe varume vakauya vachibva kumba kwaJairosi, mukuru wesinagoge. Vakati, “Mwanasikana wenyu afa. Muchanetsereiko mudzidzisi?”" 
Mark5:36 Asina hanya nezvavakanga vataura, Jesu akati kumukuru wesinagoge, “Usatya; tenda bedzi.”" 
Mark5:37 Haana kutendera mumwe munhu kuti amutevere kunze kwaPetro, Jakobho naJohani munun'una waJakobho." 
Mark5:38 Vakati vasvika pamba pomukuru wesinagoge, Jesu akanzwa mheremhere, vanhu vachichema nokuungudza zvikuru." 
Mark5:39 Akapinda akati kwavari, “Ko, mheremhere ndeyeiko nokuungudza uku? Mwana haana kufa asi avete.”" 
Mark5:40 Asi vakamuseka. Asi akavabudisa vose panze, akatora baba namai vomwana navadzidzi vaakanga anavo, vakapinda makanga muno mwana." 
Mark5:41 Akamubata noruoko akati kwaari, “Tarita kumi!” (zvichireva kuti, “Musikana, ndinoti kwauri, muka!”)" 
Mark5:42 Pakarepo musikana akasimuka akafamba-famba (akanga ana makore gumi namaviri okuberekwa). Nokuda kwaizvozvi, vakashamiswa zvikuru." 
Mark5:43 Akarayira nokurayira kukuru kuti parege kuva nomunhu anoziva nezvazvo, uye akavaudza kuti vamupe zvokudya." 
Mark6:1 Jesu akabva ipapo akaenda kuguta rokwake, vadzidzi vake vachimutevera." 
Mark6:2 Sabata rakati rasvika, akatanga kudzidzisa musinagoge, uye vazhinji vakamunzwa vakashamiswa. Vakabvunza vachiti, “Munhu uyu akawanepi zvinhu izvi? Uchenjeri hupi uhu hwaakapiwa hwokuti anotoita zvishamiso?" 
Mark6:3 Ko, haasiye muvezi here? Ko, haasiye mwanakomana waMaria here nomukoma waJakobho, Josefa, Judhasi naSimoni? Ko, hanzvadzi dzake hadzisi pano nesu here?” Uye vakagumburwa naye." 
Mark6:4 Jesu akati kwavari, “Muprofita haakudzwi muguta romunyika yokwake, pakati pehama dzake, nomumba make chete.”" 
Mark6:5 Haana kugona kuita zvishamiso zvipi zvazvo imomo, kunze kwokuisa maoko ake pamusoro pavanhu vashoma vairwara uye akavaporesa." 
Mark6:6 Uye akashamiswa nokusatenda kwavo. 
Mark6:7 Akadana kwaari vane gumi navaviri akavatuma vari vaviri vaviri uye akavapa simba pamusoro pemweya yakaipa. 
Mark6:8 Akavarayira achiti, “Musatora chinhu parwendo kunze kwetsvimbo; musatora chingwa, kana hombodo, kana mari muzvikwama zvenyu." 
Mark6:9 Mupfeke shangu asi kwete nguo yechipiri. 
Mark6:10 Pose pamunopinda mumba, garai imomo kusvikira mabva muguta iroro." 
Mark6:11 Uye kana pane nzvimbo icharamba kukugamuchirai kana kukuteererai, muzunze guruva retsoka dzenyu pamunenge mobva, chive chapupu pamusoro pavo.”" 
Mark6:12 Vakabuda vakaenda kundoparidza kuti vanhu vatendeuke. 
Mark6:13 Vakadzinga madhimoni mazhinji uye vakazodza mafuta vanhu vazhinji vairwara uye vakavaporesa. 
Mark6:14 Mambo Herodhi akanzwa nezvazvo, nokuti zita raJesu rakanga rozivikanwa kwazvo. Vamwe vakanga vachiti, “Johani Mubhabhatidzi akamutswa kubva kuvakafa; uye ndokusaka zviratidzo zvesimba zvichiitika.”" 
Mark6:15 Vamwe vakati, “NdiEria.” Uye vamwezve vakati, “Ndiye muprofita, akaita somumwe wavaprofita vekare.”" 
Mark6:16 Asi Herodhi akati anzwa izvozvo, akati, “Johani, murume wandakagura musoro, akamutswa kubva kuvakafa!”" 
Mark6:17 Nokuti Herodhi pachake akanga arayira kuti Johani asungwe, uye akaita kuti asungwe nengetani uye aiswe mutorongo. Akaita izvi nokuda kwaHerodhiasi mukadzi womunun'una wake Firipi waakanga awana." 
Mark6:18 Nokuti Johani akanga ati kuna Herodhi, “Hazvitenderwi kuti utore mukadzi womunun'una wako.”" 
Mark6:19 Saka Herodhiasi akachengeta ruvengo mumwoyo make pamusoro paJohani uye akada kumuuraya. Asi akanga asingakwanisi kuita izvozvo," 
Mark6:20 nokuti Herodhi aitya Johani uye akamudzivirira, achimuziva somunhu akanga akarurama nomutsvene. Herodhi akati anzwa Johani, akakanganisika zvikuru; asi akanga achifarira kumuteerera." 
Mark6:21 Pakupedzisira mukana wakazovapo. Pazuva rokuberekwa kwake, Herodhi akaitira vabati vake vakuru, navakuru vamauto uye navarume vaitungamirira muGarirea mabiko." 
Mark6:22 Mwanasikana waHerodhiasi akati apinda akatamba, akafadza Herodhi navakanga vakokwa kuzodya. Mambo akati kumusikana, “Ndikumbire chipi zvacho chaunoda, uye ndichakupa chinhu ichocho.”" 
Mark6:23 Uye akamuvimbisa nemhiko achiti, “Chose chauchakumbira ndichakupa chinhu ichocho, kusvikira pahafu youmambo hwangu.”" 
Mark6:24 Akabuda kunze akandoti kuna mai vake, “Ndichakumbireiko?” Ivo vakati, “Musoro waJohani Mubhabhatidzi.”" 
Mark6:25 Pakarepo musikana akamhanya akapinda kuna mambo nechikumbiro akati, “Ndinoda kuti mundipe iye zvino musoro waJohani Mubhabhatidzi mundiro umu.”" 
Mark6:26 Mambo akatambudzika zvikuru, asi nokuda kwemhiko yake uye nokuda kwevaakanga achidya navo, haana kuda kumurambira."
