Luke18:25 Zvirokwazvo, zviri nyore kwazvo kuti ngamera ipinde napaburi retsono pano kuti mupfumi apinde muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke18:26 Vaya vakazvinzwa izvozvo vakabvunza vachiti, “Ndianiko zvino angaponeswa?”" 
Luke18:27 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Zvisingagoneki kuvanhu zvinogoneka kuna Mwari.”" 
Luke18:28 Petro akati kwaari, “Takasiya zvose zvataiva nazvo kuti tikuteverei!”" 
Luke18:29 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, hakuna munhu akasiya musha, kana mukadzi, kana munun'una, kana vabereki, kana vana nokuda kwoumambo hwaMwari," 
Luke18:30 asingazogamuchiri zvakapetwa kakawanda munguva ino, uye upenyu husingaperi munguva inouya.”" 
Luke18:31 Jesu akatsaura parutivi vane gumi navaviri akavaudza kuti, “Tiri kuenda kuJerusarema, uye zvose zvakanyorwa navaprofita pamusoro poMwanakomana woMunhu zvichazadziswa." 
Luke18:32 Achaiswa mumaoko avahedheni. Vachamuseka, vachamutuka, nokumupfira mate, vachamurova uye vachamuuraya." 
Luke18:33 Pazuva rechitatu achamukazve.” 
Luke18:34 Vadzidzi hapana chavakanzwisisa pachinhu ichi. Zvairehwa zvacho zvakanga zvakavanzika kwavari, uye havana kuziva zvaakanga achitaura pamusoro pazvo." 
Luke18:35 Jesu akati aswedera pedyo neJeriko, mumwe murume akanga ari bofu akanga agere parutivi pomugwagwa achipemha." 
Luke18:36 Akati achinzwa vanhu vazhinji vakanga vachipfuura, akabvunza kuti chii chakanga chichiitika." 
Luke18:37 Vakamuudza kuti, “Jesu weNazareta ari kupfuura napano.”" 
Luke18:38 Iye akadanidzira akati, “Jesu, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, ndinzwireiwo ngoni!”" 
Luke18:39 Vaya vakanga vachitungamira vakamutsiura vakamuudza kuti anyarare, asi iye akanyanyisa kudanidzira achiti, “Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, ndinzwireiwo ngoni!”" 
Luke18:40 Jesu akamira ndokurayira kuti murume uyu auyiswe kwaari. Akati aswedera pedyo, Jesu akamubvunza akati," 
Luke18:41 “Unoda kuti ndikuitireiko?” Iye akapindura akati, “Ishe, ndinoda kuti ndione.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesu akati kwaari, “Chiona; kutenda kwako kwakuporesa.”" 
Luke18:43 Pakarepo akaona akatevera Jesu, achirumbidza Mwari. Vanhu vose vakati vachizviona, naivowo vakarumbidza Mwari." 
Luke19:1 Jesu akapinda muJeriko uye akanga achipfuura nomo. 
Luke19:2 Maiva nomurume ainzi Zakeo; akanga ari mukuru wavateresi uye akanga akapfuma kwazvo. 
Luke19:3 Akauya achida kuona Jesu kuti ndiani, asi nokuda kwokuti akanga ari munhu mupfupi, akatadza kuona nokuda kwavanhu vazhinji." 
Luke19:4 Nokudaro akamhanyira mberi akandokwira mumuti womuonde kuti amuone, sezvo Jesu akanga achienda naipapo." 
Luke19:5 Jesu akati asvika panzvimbo iyoyo, akatarisa kumusoro ndokuti kwaari, “Zakeo, buruka nokukurumidza. Ndinofanira kundogara mumba mako nhasi.”" 
Luke19:6 Saka akakurumidza kuburuka akamugamuchira nomufaro. 
Luke19:7 Vanhu vose vakaona izvi vakatanga kugunun'una vachiti, “Aenda kundova mueni wo‘mutadzi.’ ”" 
Luke19:8 Asi Zakeo akasimuka akamira pamberi paShe akati, “Tarirai, Ishe! Pano, uye iye zvino, ndinopa hafu yepfuma yangu kuvarombo, uye kana ndakanyengera ani zvake pachinhu chipi zvacho, ndichadzosera zvava zvina.”" 
Luke19:9 Jesu akati kwaari, “Nhasi ruponeso rwasvika mumba muno, nokuti murume uyu mwanakomanawo waAbhurahama." 
Luke19:10 Nokuti Mwanakomana woMunhu akauya kuzotsvaka nokuponesa chakarasika.” 
Luke19:11 Pavakanga vachiri kuteerera izvozvo, akaenderera mberi achivaudza mufananidzo, nokuti akanga ava pedyo neJerusarema uye vanhu vakafunga kuti umambo hwaMwari hwaizokurumidza kuonekwa pakarepo." 
Luke19:12 Akati, “Mumwe murume weimba huru, akaenda kunyika iri kure kuti andogadzwa kuti ave mambo uye agodzoka." 
Luke19:13 Saka akadana varanda vake gumi akavapa zviuru gumi zvamadhora. Akati, ‘Shandisai mari iyi kusvikira ndadzoka.’" 
Luke19:14 “Asi varanda vake vaimuvenga vakatuma nhume dzikamutevera kuti dzindoti, ‘Munhu uyu hatidi kuti ave mambo wedu.’" 
Luke19:15 “Akandogadzwa kuti ave mambo, kunyange zvakadaro, akadzoka kumusha. Ipapo akatuma shoko kuvaranda vaakanga apa mari, achida kuziva zvavakanga vawana nayo." 
Luke19:16 “Wokutanga akasvika akati, ‘Ishe chiuru chenyu chamadhora chakabereka zvimwe zviuru gumi.’" 
Luke19:17 “Tenzi wake akati, ‘Zvakanaka, muranda wangu akanaka! Nokuti wanga wakatendeka pazvinhu zviduku duku, uchatonga pamusoro pamaguta gumi.’" 
Luke19:18 “Wechipiri akasvika akati, ‘Ishe, chiuru chenyu chamadhora chakabereka zvimwe zviuru zvishanu.’" 
Luke19:19 “Tenzi wake akapindura akati, ‘Iwe uchatonga pamusoro pamaguta mashanu.’" 
Luke19:20 “Ipapo mumwe muranda akasvika akati, ‘Ishe, hechino chiuru chenyu chamadhora; ndakachichengeta ndakachisungirira mumucheka." 
Luke19:21 Ndakanga ndichikutyai, nokuti muri munhu ano mwoyo wakaoma. Munotora zvamusina kuisapo nokukohwa zvamusina kudyara.’" 
Luke19:22 “Tenzi wake akapindura akati, ‘Ndichakutonga namashoko ako pachako, iwe muranda akaipa! Waiziva kuti ndiri munhu ane mwoyo wakaoma, ndinotora zvandisina kuisapo, nokukohwa zvandisina kudyara?" 
Luke19:23 Seiko zvino usina kuisa mari yangu mubhangi, kuitira kuti pakudzoka kwangu ndizoitora yawanda?’" 
Luke19:24 “Ipapo akati kuna avo vakanga vamire pedyo, ‘Mutorerei chiuru chake chamadhora muchipe kuno uyo ane zviuru gumi.’" 
Luke19:25 “Vakati, ‘Ishe anotova nezviuru gumi zvamadhora nechakare!’" 
Luke19:26 “Iye akapindura akati, ‘Ndinoti kwamuri, mumwe nomumwe anazvo, achapiwa zvimwe, asi uyo asina, achatorerwa kunyange nechaanacho." 
Luke19:27 Asi vaya vavengi vangu vakanga vasingadi kuti ndive mambo wavo, uyai navo pano muvauraye pamberi pangu.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Shure kwokunge Jesu ataura izvi, akapfuurira mberi, akakwira kuJerusarema." 
Luke19:29 Akati asvika kuBhetifage neBhetania paGomo reMiorivhi, akatuma vadzidzi vake vaviri achiti," 
Luke19:30 “Endai kumusha wakatarisana nemi, uye pamunongopindamo, muchawana mwana wembongoro asina kumbotasvwa nomunhu akasungirirwamo. Muisunungure mugouya nayo pano." 
Luke19:31 Kana pane munhu anokubvunzai achiti, ‘Seiko muchiisunungura?’ muvaudze kuti, ‘Ishe anoida.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Vaya vakanga vatumwa mberi vakaenda vakandowana zvakaita sezvaakanga avaudza chaizvo. 
Luke19:33 Pavakanga vachisunungura mwana wembongoro uyu, muridzi wacho akavabvunza akati, “Seiko muchisunungura mwana wembongoro uyu?”" 
Luke19:34 Ivo vakamupindura vakati, “Ishe anoida.”" 
Luke19:35 Vakauya nayo kuna Jesu, vakaisa nguo dzavo pamusoro pomwana wembongoro ndokubva vakwidza Jesu pairi." 
Luke19:36 Paakanga achifamba, vanhu vakawaridzira nguo dzavo mumigwagwa." 
Luke19:37 Akati asvika pedyo nenzvimbo ine nzira yaitenukira paGomo reMiorivhi, vazhinji vose vavadzidzi vakatanga kupembera vachirumbidza Mwari namanzwi makuru nokuda kwezviratidzo zvose zvavakanga vaona, vachiti:" 
Luke19:38 “Akaropafadzwa mambo anouya muzita raShe!” “Rugare ngaruve kudenga, nembiri kumusoro-soro!”" 
Luke19:39 Vamwe vaFarisi vakanga vari pakati pavanhu vazhinji vakati kuna Jesu, “Mudzidzisi, tsiurai vadzidzi venyu!”" 
Luke19:40 Akapindura akati, “Ndinokuudzai kuti, kana vakanyarara, matombo achadanidzira.”" 
Luke19:41 Akati aswedera kuJerusarema uye achiona guta, akachema pamusoro paro" 
Luke19:42 akati, “Dai iwe, kunyange iyewe, waiziva chete pazuva rino zvinhu zvaizokupa rugare, asi zvino zvakavanzwa pameso ako." 
Luke19:43 Mazuva achasvika pamusoro pako ayo vavengi vako vachakuvakira muchinjiziri vagokukomberedza uye vagokumanikidza kumativi ose. 
Luke19:44 Vachakupwanyira pasi, iwe navana vari mukati mamasvingo ako. Havazongosiyi ibwe pamusoro perimwe nokuti hauna kuziva nguva yokushanyirwa kwako naMwari.”" 
Luke19:45 Ipapo akapinda mutemberi akatanga kubudisa vaya vakanga vachitengesa. 
Luke19:46 Akati kwavari, “Kwakanyorwa kuchinzi, ‘Imba yangu ichava yokunyengeterera,’ asi mava kuiita ‘bako ramakororo.’ ”" 
Luke19:47 Aidzidzisa zuva rimwe nerimwe mutemberi. Asi vaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro uye navatungamiri pakati pavanhu vakanga vachiedza kumuuraya. 
Luke19:48 Asi vakanga vasingawani nzira yokuita izvozvo, nokuti vanhu vose vakanga vakanamatira pamashoko ake." 
Luke20:1 Nerimwe ramazuva paakanga achidzidzisa vanhu mutemberi uye achiparidza vhangeri, vaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro, pamwe chete navakuru, vakasvika kwaari." 
Luke20:2 Vakati kwaari, “Tiudzei kuti munoita zvinhu izvi nesimba ripi? Ndiani akakupai simba iri?”" 
Luke20:3 Akapindura akati, “Neniwo ndichakubvunzai mubvunzo. Ndiudzei," 
Luke20:4 ‘Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohani rwakabva kudenga here kana kuti kuvanhu?’ ” 
Luke20:5 Vakataurirana pakati pavo vakati, “Kana tikati, ‘Rwakabva kudenga,’ iye achati, ‘Seiko musina kumutenda?’" 
Luke20:6 Asi kana tikati, ‘Rwakabva kuvanhu,’ vanhu vose vachatitaka namabwe, nokuti vanotenda kuti Johani akanga ari muprofita.”" 
Luke20:7 Saka ivo vakazoti, “Hatizivi kuti rwakabvepi.”" 
Luke20:8 Jesu akati, “Neniwo handichakuudzei simba randinoita naro zvinhu izvi.”" 
Luke20:9 Akaenderera mberi akaudza vanhu mufananidzo uyu akati, Mumwe murume akadyara munda wake wemizambiringa, akaupa kuna vamwe varimi kwechinguva achibva aenda kure kune imwe nyika kwenguva refu." 
Luke20:10 Panguva yokukohwa, akatuma muranda kuvarimi kuti vamupe zvimwe zvezvibereko zvemizambiringa. Asi varimi vakamurova vakamuendesa asina chinhu." 
Luke20:11 Akatumazve mumwe muranda, asi naiyewo vakamurova uye vakamuitira zvinonyadzisa ndokumudzosazve asina chinhu." 
Luke20:12 Akatumazve mumwe wechitatu, uyu vakamukuvadza ndokumukanda kunze." 
Luke20:13 “Ipapo muridzi womunda wemizambiringa akati, ‘Ndichaita seiko? Ndichatuma mwanakomana wangu, iye wandinoda; zvimwe vachamuremekedza.’" 
Luke20:14 “Asi varimi vakati vachimuona, vakataurirana pachavo vakati, ‘Uyu ndiye mudyi wenhaka. Ngatimuurayei nhaka igova yedu.’" 
Luke20:15 Saka vakamubudisa mumunda wemizambiringa ndokubva vamuuraya. “Zvino muridzi womunda womuzambiringa achaitei kwavari? 
Luke20:16 Achauya agouraya varimi avo agopa vamwe varimi munda womuzambiringa.” Vanhu vakati vanzwa izvozvo, vakati, “Dai zvakadai zvikasatomboitika!”" 
Luke20:17 Jesu akavatarisisa uye akavabvunza akati, “Zvino zvakanyorwa zvinoreveiko zvinoti: “ ‘Ibwe rakarambwa navavaki ndiro razova musoro wekona’?" 
Luke20:18 Mumwe nomumwe anowira padombo iroro achavhunika-vhunika asi uyo warinowira achapwanyiwa.” 
Luke20:19 Vadzidzisi vomurayiro navaprista vakuru vakatsvaka nzira yokumusunga pakarepo, nokuti vaiziva kuti akanga ataura mufananidzo uyu pamusoro pavo. Asi vakanga vachitya vanhu." 
Luke20:20 Vakaramba vachimucherechedza, vakatuma vasori, vakanga vachinyepedzera kuva vakatendeka. Vakanga vane tariro yokuti vamubate iye Jesu pachinhu chaanenge ataura kuitira kuti vagomuisa kusimba noutongi hwomubati." 
Luke20:21 Saka vasori vakamubvunza vachiti, “Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti munotaura uye munodzidzisa zvakarurama, uye kuti hamusi mutsauri wavanhu asi munodzidzisa nzira yaMwari zviri maererano nezvokwadi." 
Luke20:22 Ko, zvakanaka here kuti tiripe mutero kuna Kesari kana kuti kwete?”" 
Luke20:23 Akaona kunyengera kwavo akati kwavari," 
Luke20:24 “Ndiratidzei dhenari. Ko, mufananidzo norunyoro zviripo ndezvaani?”" 
Luke20:25 Vakapindura vakati, “NdezvaKesari.” Iye akati kwavari, “Ipai Kesari zvaKesari uye mugopa Mwari zvaMwari.”" 
Luke20:26 Vakanga vasingagoni kumuteya nezvaakanga ataura ipapo pane vanhu. Vakashamiswa nokupindura kwake, vakanyarara." 
Luke20:27 Vamwe vaSadhusi, vanoti hakuna kumuka kwavakafa, vakauya nomubvunzo kuna Jesu." 
Luke20:28 Vakati, “Mudzidzisi, Mozisi akatinyorera kuti kana mukoma womunhu akafa akasiya mukadzi asina vana, murume anofanira kuwana chirikadzi iyo amutsire mukoma wake vana." 
Luke20:29 Zvino pakanga pane vanakomana vanomwe. Wokutanga akawana mukadzi, akafa asina mwana." 
Luke20:30 Wechipiri akamuwana uye akafa asina mwana. 
Luke20:31 Uye wechitatu akamuwana, uye nenzira imwe cheteyo, vose vari vanomwe vakafa, vachisiya pasina vana." 
Luke20:32 Pakupedzisira, mukadzi akafawo." 
Luke20:33 Zvino mukadzi uyu achava waaniko pakumuka kwavakafa sezvo akanga ari mukadzi kwavari vose vari vanomwe?” 
Luke20:34 Jesu akapindura akati, “Vanhu venyika ino vanowana nokuwanikwa." 
Luke20:35 Asi vaya vanoonekwa kuti vakakodzera kurarama munyika iyo nomukumuka kwavakafa, havazowani kana kuwanikwa," 
Luke20:36 uye havazofizve; nokuti vafanana navatumwa. Vana vaMwari, sezvo vari vana vokumuka kwavakafa." 
Luke20:37 Asi panhoroondo yegwenzi, kunyange naMozisi akaratidza kuti vakafa vanomutswa, nokuti anoti, Ishe ndiye ‘Mwari waAbhurahama, naMwari waIsaka, uye naMwari waJakobho.’" 
Luke20:38 Haasi Mwari wavakafa, asi wavapenyu, nokuti kwaari vose vapenyu.”" 
Luke20:39 Vamwe vadzidzisi vomurayiro vakati, “Mataura zvakanaka, mudzidzisi!”" 
Luke20:40 Uye hakuna akazoda kumubvunzazve mimwe mibvunzo. 
Luke20:41 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari, “Seiko vachiti Kristu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi?" 
Luke20:42 Dhavhidhi pachake anotaura mubhuku raMapisarema achiti: “ ‘Ishe akati kuna She wangu: Gara kuruoko rwangu rworudyi 
Luke20:43 kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako.’ 
Luke20:44 Dhavhidhi anomuti, ‘Ishe.’ Anogova mwanakomana wake seiko?”" 
Luke20:45 Vanhu vose vachakateerera, Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake," 
Luke20:46 “Chenjererai vadzidzisi vomurayiro. Vanoda kufamba-famba vakapfeka nguo refu, uye vachifarira kukwaziswa pamisika, nokuva nezvigaro zvapamusoro-soro mumasinagoge uye nenzvimbo dzinokudzwa pamabiko." 
Luke20:47 Vanoparadza dzimba dzechirikadzi uye kuti vaonekwe, vanoita minyengetero mirefu, Vanhu vakadai vacharangwa zvakaomarara kwazvo.”" 
Luke21:1 Akati achitarira, Jesu akaona vapfumi vachiisa zvipo zvavo muchivigiro chepfuma chomutemberi." 
Luke21:2 Akaonawo chirikadzi murombo ichiisa tumari tuviri tuduku twendarira. 
Luke21:3 Akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, chirikadzi iyi murombo yaisa mari zhinji kupfuura vamwe vose." 
Luke21:4 Vanhu vose ava vapa zvipo zvavo zvichibva papfuma yavo zhinji; asi uyu, nourombo hwake aisa zvose zvaanga achararama nazvo.”" 
Luke21:5 Vamwe vadzidzi vake vakanga vachitaura pamusoro pamashongedzerwo akanga akaitwa temberi namatombo akanaka uye nezvipo zvakanga zvakumikidzwa kuna Mwari. Asi Jesu akati," 
Luke21:6 “Zvamuoona pano izvi, nguva ichasvika yokuti ibwe rimwe haringaregwi riri pamusoro perimwe; rimwe nerimwe rawo richarasirwa pasi.”" 
Luke21:7 Vakamubvunza vakati, “Mudzidzisi, zvinhu izvi zvichaitika rinhiko? Uye chiratidzo chichava chipi chokuti izvozvo zvava kuzoitika?”" 
Luke21:8 Akapindura akati, “Chenjererai kuti murege kunyengerwa. Nokuti vazhinji vachauya muzita rangu, vachiti ivo, ‘Ndini iye,’ uye ‘Nguva yava pedyo.’ Musavatevera." 
Luke21:9 Kana mukanzwa zvehondo uye nokumukirana, musavhundutswa. Zvinhu izvozvi zvinofanira kutanga kuitika, asi kuguma hakuzosviki pakarepo.”" 
Luke21:10 Ipapo akati kwavari, “Rudzi ruchamukira rudzi, uye umambo huchamukira humwe umambo." 
Luke21:11 Kuchava nokudengenyeka kukuru, nzara nehosha kunzvimbo dzakasiyana-siyana, uye zvinhu zvinotyisa nezviratidzo zvikuru zvinobva kudenga." 
Luke21:12 “Asi izvi zvose zvisati zvaitika, vachakubatai vagokutambudzai. Vachakuisai kumasinagoge nokumatorongo uye muchamiswa pamberi pamadzimambo navabati, uye zvose nokuda kwezita rangu." 
Luke21:13 Izvi zvichaita kuti imi muve zvapupu kwavari. 
Luke21:14 Asi shingai mundangariro dzenyu, musatanga kufunganya kuti muchazvidzivirira sei." 
Luke21:15 Nokuti ndichakupai mashoko nouchenjeri zvokuti hakuna munhu pavavengi venyu achagona kuzviramba kana kuzvipikisa. 
Luke21:16 Muchapandukirwa kunyange navabereki venyu, vanun'una, hama neshamwari, uye vachauraya vamwe venyu." 
Luke21:17 Vanhu vose vachakuvengai nokuda kwangu. 
Luke21:18 Asi hapana bvudzi romusoro wenyu richaparara. 
Luke21:19 Nokutsungirira kwenyu, muchawana upenyu." 
Luke21:20 “Pamunoona Jerusarema rakombwa nehondo, muchaziva kuti kuparadzwa kwaro kwava pedyo." 
Luke21:21 Ipapo vaya vari muJudhea ngavatizire kumakomo, vari muguta ngavabude, uye vari muruwa ngavarege kupinda muguta." 
Luke21:22 Nokuti iyi ndiyo nguva yokurangwa kuti zvose zvakanyorwa zvizadziswe. 
Luke21:23 Haiwa, zvichatyisa seiko mumazuva iwayo kumadzimai ane mimba navanoyamwisa! Kuchava nenhamo huru munyika nokutsamwa pamusoro porudzi urwu." 
Luke21:24 Vachaurayiwa nomunondo uye vachaitwa vasungwa kundudzi dzose. Jerusarema richatsikwa navaHedheni kusvikira nguva dzavaHedheni dzazadziswa. 
Luke21:25 “Kuchava nezviratidzo pazuva, pamwedzi napanyeredzi. Panyika, ndudzi dzichatambudzika uye dzichakanganiswa nokutinhira uye namasaisai egungwa." 
Luke21:26 Vanhu vachapera simba nokutya, nokutarisira zvichawira nyika, nokuti hondo dzokudenga dzichazungunuswa." 
Luke21:27 Panguva iyo vachaona Mwanakomana woMunhu achiuya mugore nesimba nokubwinya kukuru. 
Luke21:28 Panotanga kuitika zvinhu izvi, mumire mugosimudza misoro yenyu, nokuti dzikinuro yenyu yoswedera.”" 
Luke21:29 Akavaudza mufananidzo uyu akati, “Tarirai muti womuonde nemiti yose." 
Luke21:30 Painenge ichitungira mashizha, munogona kuona pachenyu nokuziva kuti zhizha rava pedyo." 
Luke21:31 Nokudarowo, pamunoona zvinhu izvi zvichiitika, muzive kuti umambo hwaMwari hwava pedyo." 
Luke21:32 “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, rudzi urwu harungatongopfuuri kusvikira zvinhu izvi zvaitika." 
Luke21:33 Denga nenyika zvichapfuura, asi mashoko angu haangatongopfuuri." 
Luke21:34 “Chenjerai, kuti mwoyo yenyu irege kuremedzwa nokudyisa, kudhakwa nokufunganya kwoupenyu, kuti zuva iro rirege kukuwirai seriva musina kuzvitarisira." 
Luke21:35 Nokuti richasvika pamusoro pavose vagere pamusoro penyika yose. 
Luke21:36 Garai makagadzirira, uye munyengetere kuti mugogona kupunyuka pazvose izvo zvava kuda kuitika, uye kuti mugogona kumira pamberi poMwanakomana woMunhu.”" 
Luke21:37 Zuva rimwe nerimwe Jesu aidzidzisa patemberi, uye madekwana oga oga achindopedza usiku hwose ari muGomo reMiorivhi," 
Luke21:38 uye vanhu vose vaiuya patemberi mangwananingwanani kuti vazomunzwa. 
Luke22:1 Zvino Mutambo weZvingwa Zvisina Mbiriso, unonzi Pasika, wakanga woswedera," 
Luke22:2 uye vaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro vakanga vachitsvaka nzira yavangabata nayo Jesu, nokuti vakanga vachitya vanhu." 
Luke22:3 Ipapo Satani akapinda muna Judhasi, ainzi Iskarioti, mumwe wavane gumi navaviri." 
Luke22:4 Uye Judhasi akaenda kuvaprista vakuru navakuru vavarindi vetemberi akandorangana navo kuti angapandukira Jesu sei. 
Luke22:5 Vakafara uye vakatenderana kuti vaizomupa mari. 
Luke22:6 Akatenda, akatsvaka mukana wokuti aise Jesu kwavari pasina vanhu vazhinji." 
Luke22:7 Ipapo zuva reZvingwa Zvisina Mbiriso rakasvika, iro raifanira kubayirwa gwayana rePasika." 
Luke22:8 Jesu akatuma Petro naJohani, achiti, “Endai mundotigadzirira Pasika tidye.”" 
Luke22:9 Vakati, “Munoda kuti tikugadzirirei kupiko?”" 
Luke22:10 Iye akapindura akati, “Pamunopinda muguta, muchasangana nomurume akatakura chirongo chemvura. Mumutevere iyeye kuimba yaanosvikopinda," 
Luke22:11 mugoti kumuridzi wemba, ‘Mudzidzisi ari kubvunza kuti: Imba yavaeni iripiko, umo mandingadyira Pasika navadzidzi vangu?’" 
Luke22:12 Achakuratidzai imba huru yapamusoro, yakarongedzwa zvose. Mugadzire imomo.”" 
Luke22:13 Vakaenda vakandowana zvinhu zvakangoita sezvavakanga vaudzwa naJesu. Saka vakagadzira Pasika imomo. 
Luke22:14 Nguva yakati yasvika, Jesu navapostori vake vakagara patafura." 
Luke22:15 Uye akati kwavari, “Ndanga ndichidisa kwazvo kuti ndidye Pasika iyi nemi ndisati ndatambudzika." 
Luke22:16 Nokuti ndinoti kwamuri, handichazoidyizve kusvikira yazadzisika muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke22:17 Akati atora mukombe, akavonga akati, “Torai mukombe uyu mugovane pakati penyu." 
Luke22:18 Nokuti ndinoti kwamuri, handichazonwizve chibereko chomuzambiringa kusvikira umambo hwaMwari hwasvika.”" 
Luke22:19 Uye akatora chingwa, akavonga akachimedura, uye akavapa, achiti, “Uyu ndiwo muviri wangu wakapiwa kwamuri; itai izvi muchindirangarira.”" 
Luke22:20 Saizvozvo, vakati vapedza chirariro akatora mukombe, akati, “Mukombe uyu ndiyo sungano itsva muropa rangu, rinodururirwa imi." 
Luke22:21 Asi ruoko rwaiye achandipandukira runeni patafura. 
Luke22:22 Mwanakomana woMunhu achaenda sezvazvakatemwa, asi ane nhamo munhu uyo anomupandukira.”" 
Luke22:23 Vakatanga kubvunzana pakati pavo kuti angava ani pavari angaita chinhu ichi. 
Luke22:24 Uyewo nharo dzakamuka pakati pavo dzokuti ndiani wavo aifungidzirwa kuti angava mukuru wavose. 
Luke22:25 Jesu akati kwavari, “Madzimambo avahedheni ane simba pamusoro pavo; uye vaya vanobata nesimba pamusoro pavo vanozviti vabatsiri." 
Luke22:26 Asi imi hamufaniri kuita saizvozvo. Asi, mukuru pakati penyu mose anofanira kuva somuduku kuna vose, uye uyo anotonga ngaaite souya anoshanda." 
Luke22:27 Nokuti ndianiko mukuru kuno mumwe, uyo agere patafura kana kuti uya anoshanda? Ko, haazi iye agere patafura here? Asi ini ndiri pakati penyu saiye anoshanda." 
Luke22:28 Imi ndimi vaya vakamira neni pamiedzo yangu. 
Luke22:29 Uye ndinokupai umambo, sababa vangu vakandipa umambo," 
Luke22:30 kuitira kuti mugodya nokunwa patafura yangu muumambo hwangu, mugogara pazvigaro zvoushe, muchitonga marudzi gumi navaviri avaIsraeri." 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni, Satani akumbira kuti akuzungure segorosi." 
Luke22:32 Asi ndakunyengeterera, Simoni, kuti rutendo rwako rurege kupera. Uye paunenge watendeuka, usimbise hama dzako.”" 
Luke22:33 Asi iye akapindura akati, “Ishe, ndakagadzirira kuenda nemi mutorongo uye kufa nemi.”" 
Luke22:34 Jesu akapindura akati, “Petro, ndinoti kwauri, jongwe risati rarira nhasi, ucharamba iwe katatu, kuti unondiziva.”" 
Luke22:35 Ipapo Jesu akabvunza akati, “Pandakakutumai musina chikwama, hombodo kana shangu pane chinhu chamakashayiwa here?” Ivo vakati, “Hapana.”" 
Luke22:36 Akati kwavari, “Asi iye zvino kana une chikwama, chitore, uyewo nehombodo; uye kana usina munondo, tengesa nguo yako ugoutenga." 
Luke22:37 Kwakanyorwa kuchinzi, ‘Iye akaverengwa pamwe chete navadariki’ uye ndinoti kwamuri, izvi zvinofanira kuzadziswa mandiri. Hongu, zvakanyorwa pamusoro pangu zvava kusvika pakuzadziswa.”" 
Luke22:38 Vadzidzi vakati, “Tarirai, Ishe, heyi minondo miviri.” Akapindura akati, “Zvaringana.”" 
Luke22:39 Jesu akabuda sezvaaisiita mazuva ose akaenda kuGomo reMiorivhi, uye vadzidzi vake vakamutevera." 
Luke22:40 Akati asvika panzvimbo iyo, akati kwavari, “Nyengeterai kuti murege kupinda mukuedzwa.”" 
Luke22:41 Akabva pavari akaenda mberi kwavo chinhambwe chingasvika dombo rapotserwa, akapfugama ndokunyengetera achiti," 
Luke22:42 “Baba, kana muchida, bvisai mukombe uyu pandiri; asi ngakurege kuva kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwenyu kuitwe.”" 
Luke22:43 Mutumwa akabva kudenga akazviratidza kwaari uye akamusimbisa. 
Luke22:44 Uye ari pakutambudzika, akanyengetera zvikuru, uye ziya rake rakanga rakaita samadonhwe eropa anodonhera pasi." 
Luke22:45 Akati achisimuka kubva pakunyengetera, akadzokera kuvadzidzi, akasvikovawana vavata, vaneteswa nokusuwa." 
Luke22:46 Akasvikovabvunza achiti, “Seiko mavata? Mukai munyengetere kuti murege kuwira mukuedzwa.”" 
Luke22:47 Achiri kutaura, vanhu vazhinji vakasvika, uye uya ainzi Judhasi, mumwe wavane gumi navaviri, akanga achivatungamirira. Akaswedera kuna Jesu kuti amutsvode," 
Luke22:48 asi Jesu akamubvunza akati, “Judhasi, uri kupandukira Mwanakomana woMunhu nokutsvoda here?”" 
Luke22:49 Vateveri vaJesu vakati vaona zvakanga zvoda kuitika vakati, “Ishe, tivabaye neminondo yedu here?”" 
Luke22:50 Uye mumwe wavo akatema muranda womuprista mukuru, akagura nzeve yake yokurudyi." 
Luke22:51 Asi Jesu akapindura achiti, “Zvaringana!” Uye akabata nzeve yomurume uya akamuporesa." 
Luke22:52 Ipapo Jesu akati kuvaprista vakuru navabati vaichengeta temberi, navakuru vakanga vamuvinga, “Ko, ini ndiri mupanduki mukuru here, zvamauya neminondo netsvimbo?" 
Luke22:53 Mazuva ose ndakanga ndinemi mutemberi, uye hamuna kundibata. Asi ino ndiyo nguva yenyu, yokutonga kwerima.”" 
Luke22:54 Ipapo vakamubata, vakaenda naye vakandomuisa mumba momuprista mukuru. Petro akamutevera ari nechokure." 
Luke22:55 Asi vakati vabatidza moto pakati poruvazhe uye vagara pasi pamwe chete, Petro akagara pakati pavo." 
Luke22:56 Musikana akanga ari mushandi akamuona agerepo muchiedza chomoto. Akamunan'anidza akati, “Murume uyu aivawo naJesu.”" 
Luke22:57 Asi iye akaramba izvozvo uye akati, “Iwe mukadzi, handimuzivi ini.”" 
Luke22:58 Kwapera chinguvana, mumwezve akamuona akati, “Newewo uri mumwe wavo.” Petro akapindura akati, “Iwe murume, handizi!”" 
Luke22:59 Shure kweawa imwe chete mumwezve akauya akati, “Zvirokwazvo munhu uyu akanga anaye, nokuti muGarirea.”" 
Luke22:60 Petro akapindura akati, “Iwe murume, handitombozivi zvauri kutaura nezvazvo!” Achiri kutaura, jongwe rakabva rarira." 
Luke22:61 Ishe akatendeuka akatarisa akanyatsonanga Petro. Ipapo Petro akarangarira shoko rakanga rataurwa kwaari naShe rokuti, “Nhasi jongwe risati rarira, uchandiramba katatu.”" 
Luke22:62 Ipapo akabuda kunze akandochema zvikuru. 
Luke22:63 Varume vakanga vachirinda Jesu vakatanga kumuseka nokumurova. 
Luke22:64 Vakamusunga kumeso vakati, “Profita! Ndiani akurova?”" 
Luke22:65 uye vakataura zvimwe zvinhu zvizhinji kwaari vachimutuka. 
Luke22:66 Kuzoti kwaedza dare ravakuru vavanhu, vose vaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro, vakasangana pamwe chete, uye Jesu akamiswa pamberi pavo." 
Luke22:67 Vakati, “Kana uri Kristu, tiudze.” Jesu akapindura akati, “Kana ndikakuudzai, hamunganditendi," 
Luke22:68 uye kana ndikakubvunzai, hamungandipinduri." 
Luke22:69 Asi kubva zvino, Mwanakomana woMunhu achagara kuruoko rworudyi rwaMwari ane simba.”" 
Luke22:70 Vose vakabvunza vachiti, “Ko, zvino iwe ndiwe Mwanakomana waMwari here?” Iye akapindura akati, “Mareva zvakanaka, zvamati ndini iye.”" 
Luke22:71 Ipapo vakati, “Tichadazve humwe uchapupu here? Tazvinzwa zvabva mumuromo make.”" 
Luke23:1 Ipapo ungano yose yakasimuka ikaenda naye kuna Pirato. 
Luke23:2 Uye vakatanga kumupomera mhosva, vachiti, “Takawana munhu uyu achitsausa rudzi rwedu. Haabvumirani nokuripa mutero kuna Kesari uye anozviti ndiye Kristu, mambo.”" 
Luke23:3 Saka Pirato akabvunza Jesu achiti, “Ndiwe mambo wavaJudha here?” Jesu akapindura akati, “Hongu, ndizvo zvamareva.”" 
Luke23:4 Ipapo Pirato akati kuvaprista vakuru navanhu vazhinji, “Handiwani hwaro hwemhosva inopomerwa murume uyu.”" 
Luke23:5 Asi ivo vakaramba vachiti, “Anomutsa vanhu nedzidziso yake muJudhea rose. Akatanga kuGarirea uye atosvika kwose kuno uku.”" 
Luke23:6 Anzwa izvi, Pirato akabvunza kuti murume uyu akanga ari muGarirea here." 
Luke23:7 Akati anzwa kuti Jesu akanga ari pasi poutongi hwaHerodhi, akabva amutumira kuna Herodhi, uyo aivawo muJerusarema panguva iyoyo." 
Luke23:8 Herodhi akati achiona Jesu, akafara zvikuru, nokuti akanga achishuva kumuona kwenguva refu. Kubva pane zvaakanga ambonzwa nezvake, ainge achitarisira kuti amuone achiita zvishamiso." 
Luke23:9 Akamubvunza mibvunzo mizhinji, asi Jesu haana kumupindura." 
Luke23:10 Vaprista vakuru navadzidzisi vomurayiro vakanga vamire ipapo, vachinyanya kumupomera mhosva." 
Luke23:11 Ipapo Herodhi navarwi vake vakamuzvidza uye vakamuseka. Vakamupfekedza nguo youmambo, vakamudzosera kuna Pirato." 
Luke23:12 Musi uyo, Herodhi naPirato vakava shamwari, kare kwavo, vakanga vachimbovengana." 
Luke23:13 Pirato akaunganidza vaprista vakuru, vatongi, navanhu," 
Luke23:14 akati kwavari, “Mauyisa munhu uyu kwandiri somunhu anomutsa vanhu kuti vamukire hurumende. Ndanyatsomuongorora pamberi penyu uye ndashaya hwaro hwemhosva yamunomupomera." 
Luke23:15 Kunyange naHerodhi, nokuti amudzosa kwatiri; sezvamunoona, haana kuita chinhu chingafanira kutongerwa rufu." 
Luke23:16 Naizvozvo, ndichamurova ndigomuregedza.”" 
Luke23:17 (Nokuti aifanira kuvasunungurira mumwe munhu pamutambo.) 
Luke23:18 Vose pamwe chete vakadanidzira vachiti, “Murume uyu ngaafe! Tisunungurirei Bharabhasi!”" 
Luke23:19 (Bharabhasi akanga aiswa mujeri nokuda kwebope raakanga amutsa muguta, uye nemhaka yokuuraya.)" 
Luke23:20 Sezvaakanga achida kusunungura Jesu, Pirato akataurazve navo." 
Luke23:21 Asi ivo vakaramba vachidanidzira vachiti, “Murovererei! Murovererei!”" 
Luke23:22 Akati kwavari kechitatu, “Sei? Murume uyu atadzeiko? Handina kuwana mhosva yokuti atongerwe rufu paari. Naizvozvo, ndichaita kuti arohwe ndigomusunungura.”" 
Luke23:23 Asi vakaramba vachidanidzira nenzwi guru vachiti aifanira kurovererwa pamuchinjikwa, uye kudanidzira kwavo kukakunda." 
Luke23:24 Saka Pirato akatonga kuti zvavakakumbira zviitwe. 
Luke23:25 Akasunungura murume akanga aiswa mujeri nokuda kwebope uye nokuuraya, uyo wavakanga vakumbira, ndokubva avapa Jesu kuti vaite zvavanoda naye." 
Luke23:26 Vakati voenda naye, vakabata murume ainzi Simoni weKurini, uyo akanga achibva muruwa, vakamutakudza muchinjikwa ari mushure maJesu." 
Luke23:27 Vanhu vazhinji zhinji vakamutevera, pamwe chete navakadzi vakanga vachichema uye vachiungudza." 
Luke23:28 Jesu akatendeuka akati kwavari, “Vanasikana veJerusarema, musandichema ini; zvichemei imi navana venyu." 
Luke23:29 Nokuti nguva ichasvika iyo yamuchati, ‘Vakaropafadzwa vakadzi vasingabereki, izvo zvizvaro zvisina kumbobereka, namazamu asina kumboyamwisa!’" 
Luke23:30 Ipapo “vachati kumakomo, ‘Wirai pamusoro pedu!’ nokuzvikomo, ‘Tifukidzei!’" 
Luke23:31 Nokuti kana vanhu vachiita zvinhu izvi pamuti munyoro, chiiko chichaitika kune wakaoma?”" 
Luke23:32 Vamwezve varume vaviri, vose vakanga vari mbavha, vakatorwawo pamwe chete naye kuti vandourayiwa." 
Luke23:33 Vakati vasvika panzvimbo yainzi Dehenya, vakamuroverera ipapo, pamwe chete nembavha, mumwe kurudyi rwake, mumwe kuruboshwe rwake." 
Luke23:34 Jesu akati, “Baba, varegererei, nokuti havazivi zvavari kuita.” Vakagovana nguo dzake vachikanda mijenya." 
Luke23:35 Vanhu vakamira vakatarira, uye kunyange vatongi vakamuseka. Vakati, “Akaponesa vamwe; ngaazviponese iye pachake kana ari Kristu waMwari, iye Musanangurwa.”" 
Luke23:36 Varwi vakasvikawo vakamuseka. Vakamupa waini yevhiniga 
Luke23:37 vakati, “Kana uri mambo wavaJudha, chizviponesa.”" 
Luke23:38 Pamusoro pake pakanga pane chiziviso chakanga chakanyorwa kuti: UYU NDIYE MAMBO WAVAJUDHA. 
Luke23:39 Mumwe wembavha dzakanga dzakarembera pamwe chete naye akamutuka achiti, “Ko, ndiwe Kristu here? Zviponese ugoponesa nesuwo!”" 
Luke23:40 Asi imwe mbavha yakamutsiura ikati, “Hautyi Mwari here iwe, sezvo uri pakutongwa kumwe cheteko?" 
Luke23:41 Isu tiri kutongwa zvakarurama, nokuti tiri kupiwa zvakafanira mabasa edu. Asi munhu uyu haana chakaipa chaakaita.”" 
Luke23:42 Ipapo akati, “Jesu, mundirangarirewo pamunenge masvika muumambo hwenyu.”" 
Luke23:43 Jesu akamupindura akati, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri, nhasi uchava neni muparadhiso.”" 
Luke23:44 Zvino yakanga yava nguva inenge yechitanhatu, rima rikava pamusoro penyika yose kusvikira panguva yepfumbamwe," 
Luke23:45 nokuti zuva rakamira kuvhenekera. Uye chidzitiro chetemberi chakabvarurwa napakati. 
Luke23:46 Jesu akadanidzira nenzwi guru achiti, “Baba, ndinoisa mweya wangu mumaoko enyu.” Akati ataura izvi, akabudisa mweya wake." 
Luke23:47 Mukuru wezana, akati achiona zvakanga zvaitika, akarumbidza Mwari achiti, “Zvirokwazvo uyu anga ari munhu akarurama.”" 
Luke23:48 Vanhu vose vakanga vakaungana kuzopupura chiitiko ichi, vakaona zvakanga zvaitika, vakazvirova zvipfuva zvavo uye vakadzokera." 
Luke23:49 Asi vakanga vachimuziva, pamwe chete navakadzi vakanga vamutevera vachibva kuGarirea, vakamira nechokure, vakatarisa zvinhu zvose izvi." 
Luke23:50 Zvino kwakanga kuno mumwe murume ainzi Josefa, nhengo yedare ramakurukota, munhu akanga akanaka uye akarurama," 
Luke23:51 uyo akanga asina kubvumirana navo pakuronga kwavo uye nokuita kwavo. Aibva kuguta ravaJudha reArimatea uye akanga akamirira umambo hwaMwari. 
Luke23:52 Asvika kuna Pirato, akakumbira mutumbi waJesu." 
Luke23:53 Ipapo akauburutsa, akauputira nomucheka akauisa muguva rakanga racherwa paruware, rakanga risina kumbovigwa munhu." 
Luke23:54 Rakanga riri zuva rokugadzirira, uye Sabata rakanga rava kuda kutanga." 
Luke23:55 Vakadzi vaya vakanga vauya naJesu vachibva kuGarirea vakatevera Josefa vakaona guva uye kuti mutumbi wake wakanga waradzikwa sei mariri. 
Luke23:56 Ipapo vakaenda kumba vakandogadzira zvinonhuwira namafuta anonhuwira. Asi vakazorora nomusi weSabata vachiteerera murayiro. 
Luke24:1 Nomusi wokutanga wevhiki, mambakwedza, vakadzi vaya vakatora zvinonhuwira zvavakanga vagadzira vakaenda kuguva." 
Luke24:2 Vakawana ibwe rakungurutswa kubva paguva," 
Luke24:3 asi vakati vapinda, vakashayiwa mutumbi waIshe Jesu." 
Luke24:4 Pavakanga vachiri kushamisika nazvo, pakarepo varume vaviri vakanga vakapfeka nguo chena dzaipenya semheni vakamira parutivi pavo." 
Luke24:5 Mukutya kwavo, vakadzi vaya vakakotama pasi nezviso zvavo, asi varume ava vakati kwavari, “Seiko muchitsvaka mupenyu pakati pavakafa?" 
Luke24:6 Haapo pano; amuka! Rangarirai zvaakakuudzai, paakanga achinemi muGarirea kuti:" 
Luke24:7 ‘Mwanakomana woMunhu anofanira kuiswa mumaoko avatadzi, arovererwe pamuchinjikwa agomukazve pazuva rechitatu.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Ipapo vakarangarira mashoko ake. 
Luke24:9 Vakati vadzoka kubva kuguva, vakataurira vane gumi nomumwe zvinhu zvose izvi, uye nokuna vamwe vose." 
Luke24:10 VanaMaria Magadharena, naJohana, Maria mai vaJakobho, uye navamwe vavaiva navo ndivo vakandoudza vapostori izvozvo." 
Luke24:11 Asi havana kutenda vakadzi ava, nokuti mashoko avo ainge upenzi kwavari." 
Luke24:12 Zvisinei hazvo, Petro, akasimuka, akamhanyira kuguva. Akakotama, akaona micheka iri yoga, ndokubva adzokera kumba, achishamisika mumwoyo make nezvakanga zvaitika." 
Luke24:13 Zvino musi mumwe chete iwoyo, varume vaviri vakanga vachienda kumusha wainzi Emausi, makiromita anenge gumi nerimwe chete kubva kuJerusarema." 
Luke24:14 Vakanga vachitaurirana pamusoro pezvinhu zvose zvakanga zvaitika. 
Luke24:15 Vachiri kutaura nokukurukurirana pamusoro pezvinhu izvi, Jesu pachake akabva asvika uye akafamba navo;" 
Luke24:16 asi meso avo akabatwa zvokuti havana kumuziva. 
Luke24:17 Akavabvunza akati, “Muri kukurukurirana pamusoro peiko, zvamuri kufamba kudai?” Vakamira vakanyarara, zviso zvavo zvakasuwa." 
Luke24:18 Mumwe wavo ainzi Kiropasi, akati kwaari, “Ndiwe woga mushanyi muJerusarema asingazivi zvinhu zvakaitikamo mumazuva ano aya here?”" 
Luke24:19 Jesu akati, “Zveiko?” Vakapindura vachiti, “ZvaJesu weNazareta. Aiva muprofita, aiva nesimba mushoko napamabasa pamberi paMwari uye nokuvanhu vose." 
Luke24:20 Vaprista vakuru navatongi vedu vakamuendesa kuti andotongerwa rufu, saka vakamuroverera pamuchinjikwa;" 
Luke24:21 asi isu takanga tichitarisira kuti ndiye akanga achizodzikinura vaIsraeri. Pamusoro paizvozvo, ratova zuva rechitatu kubvira pazvakaitika." 
Luke24:22 Uyezve vamwe vakadzi vokwedu vatishamisa. Vaenda kuguva nhasi mambakwedza 
Luke24:23 asi havana kuwana mutumbi wake urimo. Vauya vakatiudza kuti vaona chiratidzo chavatumwa, avo vati iye mupenyu." 
Luke24:24 Ipapo dzimwe shamwari dzedu dzaenda kuguva dzikawana zviri izvo chaizvo zvanga zvataurwa navakadzi vaya, asi iye havana kumuona.”" 
Luke24:25 Iye akati kwavari, “Haiwa imi vokusanzwisisa, uye vane mwoyo inononoka kutenda zvose zvakarehwa navaprofita!" 
Luke24:26 Ko, Kristu akanga asingafaniri kutambudzika pazvinhu izvi agozopinda mukubwinya kwake here?”" 
Luke24:27 Ipapo akatanga naMozisi navaprofita vose, akavatsanangurira zvakanyorwa pamusoro pake mumagwaro." 
Luke24:28 Kuzoti vava kusvika mumusha mavakanga vachienda, Jesu akaita sokunge oda kupfuurira." 
Luke24:29 Asi vakamugombedzera zvikuru vachiti, “Garai nesu, nokuti kwava kudoka; zuva rava kuvira.” Saka akapinda kuti andogara navo." 
Luke24:30 Akati agara navo patafura, akatora chingwa, akavonga, akachimedura akatanga kuvapa." 
Luke24:31 Ipapo meso avo akasvinudzwa vakamuziva, akabva anyangarika pamberi pavo." 
Luke24:32 Vakabvunzana vachiti, “Ko, mwoyo yedu yanga isingapisi neiko mukati medu zvaanga achitaura nesu mumugwagwa uye achitizarurira magwaro?”" 
Luke24:33 Vakasimuka panguva iyoyo vakadzokera kuJerusarema. Ikoko, vakandowana vane gumi nomumwe navamwe vavaiva navo, vakaungana pamwe chete" 
Luke24:34 uye vachiti, “Ichokwadi! Ishe amuka uye azviratidza kuna Simoni.”" 
Luke24:35 Ipapo vaviri ava vakataura zvakanga zvaitika munzira, uye kuti vakaziva sei Jesu paakamedura chingwa." 
Luke24:36 Pavakanga vachiri kutaura pamusoro pazvo, Jesu pachake akasvikomira pakati pavo akati, “Rugare ngaruve nemi.”" 
Luke24:37 Vakavhunduka uye vakatya, vachifunga kuti vaona mweya." 
Luke24:38 Iye akati kwavari, “Munotambudzika neiko, uye seiko kukahadzika kuchimuka mupfungwa dzenyu?" 
Luke24:39 Tarisai maoko angu netsoka dzangu. Ndini iye! Ndibatei muone; mweya hauna nyama namapfupa, sezvamunoona ndinazvo ini.”" 
Luke24:40 Akati areva izvi, akavaratidza maoko ake netsoka dzake." 
Luke24:41 Uye pavakanga vachigere kutenda nokuda kwomufaro uye vachishamiswa, akavabvunza akati, “Mune chokudya here pano?”" 
Luke24:42 Vakamupa chimedu chehove yakagochwa," 
Luke24:43 uye akatora akaidya pamberi pavo. 
Luke24:44 Akati kwavari, “Izvi ndizvo zvandaikuudzai ndichinemi kuti: Zvinhu zvose zvakanyorwa pamusoro pangu muMurayiro waMozisi, naVaprofita nomuMapisarema zvinofanira kuzadziswa.”" 
Luke24:45 Ipapo akazarura ndangariro dzavo kuti vanzwisise Magwaro. 
Luke24:46 Akati kwavari, “Izvi ndizvo zvakanyorwa kuti: Kristu achatambudzika agomuka kuvakafa pazuva rechitatu," 
Luke24:47 uye kuti kutendeuka nokuregererwa kwezvivi kuchaparidzirwa kumarudzi ose muzita rake, kutanga paJerusarema." 
Luke24:48 Imi muri zvapupu zvezvinhu izvi. 
Luke24:49 Ndichakutumirai chipikirwa chakavimbiswa naBaba; asi imi garai muguta kusvikira mafukidzwa nesimba rinobva kumusoro.” 
Luke24:50 Akati avatungamirira kunze kweguta pedyo neBhetania, akatambanudza maoko ake akavaropafadza." 
Luke24:51 Achiri kuvaropafadza, akabva pavari akatorwa akakwidzwa kudenga." 
Luke24:52 Ipapo vakamunamata ndokubva vadzokera kuJerusarema nomufaro mukuru. 
Luke24:53 Uye vakaramba vari mutemberi, vachirumbidza Mwari nguva dzose." 
John1:1 Pakutanga Shoko rakanga riripo, uye Shoko rakanga riri kuna Mwari, uye Shoko rakanga riri Mwari." 
John1:2 Iye aiva kuna Mwari kubva pakutanga. 
John1:3 Zvinhu zvose zvakaitwa kubudikidza naye; kunze kwake hakuna kana chinhu chakaitwa pane izvo zvakaitwa. 
John1:4 Maari maiva noupenyu, uye upenyu ihwohwo hwaiva chiedza chavanhu." 
John1:5 Chiedza chinovhenekera murima, asi rima harina kuchikunda." 
John1:6 Pakanga pano murume akatumwa achibva kuna Mwari; zita rake rainzi Johani. 
John1:7 Iye akauya sechapupu kuzopupurira chiedza chiya, kuitira kuti vanhu vatende kubudikidza naye." 
John1:8 Akanga asiri iye chiedza pachake; akauya chete ari sechapupu kuchiedza. 
John1:9 Chiedza chezvokwadi chinovhenekera vanhu vose chainge chichizouya munyika. 
John1:10 Akanga ari munyika, uye kunyange nyika yakaitwa kubudikidza naye, nyika haina kumuziva." 
John1:11 Akauya kuna avo vakanga vari vake, asi vokwake havana kumugamuchira." 
John1:12 Asi kuna vose vakamugamuchira, kuna avo vakatenda muzita rake, akavapa simba rokuti vave vana vaMwari," 
John1:13 vana vasina kuberekwa neropa kana nokufunga kwomunhu kana nokuda kwomurume, asi vakaberekwa naMwari." 
John1:14 Shoko rakava nyama uye rakagara pakati pedu. Takaona kubwinya kwake, kubwinya kwaIye Mumwe Oga, akabva kuna Baba, azere nenyasha uye nechokwadi." 
John1:15 Johani anopupura nezvake. Anodanidzira achiti, “Uyu ndiye uya wandakati, ‘Anouya mumashure mangu anondipfuura ini nokuti akanditangira.’ ”" 
John1:16 Kubva pakuzara kwake takagamuchira nyasha pamusoro penyasha. 
John1:17 Nokuti murayiro wakapiwa kubudikidza naMozisi; nyasha nezvokwadi zvakauya kubudikidza naJesu Kristu. 
John1:18 Hakuna akamboona Mwari, asi Mwanakomana Iye Mumwe Oga, ari pachipfuva chaBaba, akaita kuti azivikanwe." 
John1:19 Zvino uku ndiko kwaiva kupupura kwaJohani vaJudha veJerusarema pavakatuma vaprista navaRevhi kuti vanomubvunza kuti iye aimbova ani. 
John1:20 Haana kurega kupupura, asi akanyatsopupura pachena achiti, “Handisini Kristu.”" 
John1:21 Vakamubvunza vakati, “Zvino ndiwe aniko? Ndiwe Eria here?” Iye akati, “Handizi iye.” “Uri muprofita here?” Akapindura akati, “Kwete.”" 
John1:22 Pakupedzisira vakati, “Ndiwe aniko? Tipindure tigondotaurira vatituma. Unozviti aniko?”" 
John1:23 Johani akapindura namashoko omuprofita Isaya achiti, “Ndini inzwi reanodana murenje, richiti, ‘Ruramisai nzira yaShe.’ ”" 
John1:24 Zvino vamwe vaFarisi vakanga vatumwa 
John1:25 vakamubvunza vachiti, “Seiko zvino uchibhabhatidza kana usiri Kristu, kana Eria uye kana Muprofita?”" 
John1:26 Johani akapindura akati, “Ini ndinobhabhatidza nemvura, asi pakati penyu pamire mumwe wamusingazivi." 
John1:27 Ndiye anouya shure kwangu, handikodzeri kusunungura rukanda rweshangu dzake.”" 
John1:28 Izvi zvose zvakaitika paBhetani mhiri kwaJorodhani, uko kwaibhabhatidzira Johani." 
John1:29 Chifume chamangwana Johani akaona Jesu achiuya kwaari akati, “Tarirai, Gwayana raMwari, rinobvisa chivi chenyika!" 
John1:30 Ndiye wandaireva pandakati, ‘Murume anouya shure kwangu akandipfuura nokuti akanditangira.’" 
John1:31 Ini pachangu ndakanga ndisingamuzivi, asi zvandakauyira ndichibhabhatidza nemvura ndezvokuti iye aratidzwe kuIsraeri.”" 
John1:32 Ipapo Johani akapupura uchapupu uhu achiti, “Ndakaona mweya achiburuka kubva kudenga akaita senjiva akamhara pamusoro pake." 
John1:33 Ndingadai ndisina kumuziva, asi uya akandituma kuti ndizobhabhatidza nemvura ndiye akandiudza achiti, ‘Murume uyo waunoona Mweya achiburuka uye achigara paari, ndiye achazovabhabhatidza noMweya Mutsvene.’" 
John1:34 Ndazviona uye ndinopupura kuti uyu ndiye Mwanakomana waMwari.” 
John1:35 Chifume chamangwana Johani akanga aripozve navadzidzi vake vaviri. 
John1:36 Akati achiona Jesu achipfuura akati, “Tarirai, Gwayana raMwari!”" 
John1:37 Vadzidzi vaviri vakati vachimunzwa achitaura izvi, vakatevera Jesu." 
John1:38 Jesu akatendeuka akavaona vachitevera akavabvunza akati, “Munodeiko?” Ivo vakati, “Rabhi” (ndiko kuti Mudzidzisi), “munogarepiko?”" 
John1:39 Akapindura akati, “Uyai muzokuona.” Saka vakaenda vakandoona paaigara, vakaswera naye kwezuva rimwe chete. Yakanga iri nguva inenge yegumi." 
John1:40 Andirea munun'una waPetro, ndiye wavamwe vaviri akanga anzwa zvakanga zvarehwa naJohani uye akanga atoteverawo Jesu." 
John1:41 Chinhu chokutanga chakaitwa naAndirea ndechokuti akatsvaka Simoni mukoma wake akati kwaari, “Tamuwana Mesiya” (ndiko kuti Kristu)." 
John1:42 Uye akauya naye kuna Jesu. Jesu akatarisa kwaari akati, “Ndiwe Simoni mwanakomana waJohani. Iwe uchanzi Kefasi” (ndiko kuti, kana zvichishandurwa, Petro)." 
John1:43 Zuva rakatevera Jesu akafunga zvokuenda kuGarirea. Akati awana Firipi akati kwaari, “Nditevere.”" 
John1:44 Firipi, aibvawo kuguta reBhetisaidha saAndirea naPetro," 
John1:45 Firipi akawana Natanieri akati kwaari, “Tamuwana uya akanyorwa nezvake naMozisi muMurayiro, uyewo akanyorwa nezvake navaprofita, Jesu weNazareta, mwanakomana waJosefa.”" 
John1:46 Natanieri akati, “Nazareta! Pane chinhu chakanaka chingabva kuNazareta here?” Firipi akati, “Uya uone.”" 
John1:47 Jesu akati achiona Natanieri achiuya, akati kwaari, “Houno muIsraeri wechokwadi, asina kunyengera maari.”" 
John1:48 Natanieri akamubvunza akati, “Mandiziva seiko?” Jesu akapindura akati, “Ndakuona pawanga uri pasi pomuonde Firipi asati akudana.”" 
John1:49 Ipapo Natanieri akati, “Rabhi, ndimi Mwanakomana waMwari; ndimi Mambo weIsraeri.”" 
John1:50 Jesu akati, “Unotenda nokuti ndakuudza kuti ndakuona uri pasi pomuonde. Uchaona zvinhu zvikuru kupinda izvozvo.”" 
John1:51 Ipapo akatizve, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, muchaona denga richizaruka, uye vatumwa vaMwari vachikwira nokuburuka pamusoro poMwanakomana woMunhu.”" 
John2:1 Pazuva rechitatu muchato wokuwana wakaitwa paKana yomuGarirea. Mai vaJesu vaivapo," 
John2:2 uye Jesu navadzidzi vake vakanga vakokwawo kumuchato uyu. 
John2:3 Waini yakati yapera, mai vaJesu vakati kwaari, “Havachina waini.”" 
John2:4 Jesu akapindura akati, “Nhai mai, munondipinzireiko mune izvi? Nguva yangu haisati yakwana.”" 
John2:5 Mai vake vakati kuvaranda, “Itai zvose zvaanokuudzai.”" 
John2:6 Pakare ipapo pakanga pana makate amabwe matanhatu, anoshandiswa navaJudha patsika dzavo dzokushamba, rimwe nerimwe raizara namarita ari pakati pamakumi mapfumbamwe nezana namakumi mana." 
John2:7 Jesu akati kuvaranda, “Zadzai makate nemvura.” Saka vakaazadza kusvikira pamuromo." 
John2:8 Ipapo akavaudza akati, “Chicherai imwe zvino mugoipa kumukuru womutambo.” Vakaita saizvozvo." 
John2:9 Uye mukuru womutambo akaravira mvura yakanga yashandurwa ikava waini. Haana kuziva kwayakanga yabva, kunyange zvazvo varanda vakanga vachera mvura vaiziva havo. Ipapo akadana chikomba parutivi" 
John2:10 akati, “Munhu wose anotanga kubudisa waini inonaka chose, zvino shure kwokunge vanhu vakakokwa vambonwa kwazvo, ipapo anozobudisa isinganaki; asi iwe wapa yakaisvonaka kusvikira zvino.”" 
John2:11 Ichi chiratidzo chokutanga, Jesu akachiita paKana yomuGarirea. Nokudaro akaratidza kubwinya kwake, uye vadzidzi vake vakatenda kwaari." 
John2:12 Shure kwaizvozvo akaburuka akaenda kuKapenaume namai vake, navanun'una vake uye navadzidzi vake. Vakagara ikoko kwamazuva mashoma." 
John2:13 Pasika yavaJudha yakati yava pedyo, Jesu akakwira kuJerusarema." 
John2:14 Muzvivanze zvetemberi akawana vanhu vachitengesa mombe, makwai nenjiva, uye vamwe vakanga vagere patafura vachitsinhanha mari." 
John2:15 Saka akaruka tyava yerwodzi, akadzinga vose kubva panzvimbo yetemberi, zvose makwai nemombe; akarasa kwose kwose mari yavakanga vachitsinhana, uye akapidigura tafura dzavo." 
John2:16 Akati kuna avo vakanga vachitengesa njiva, “Budisai zvinhu izvi muno! Hamufaniri kushandura imba yababa vangu muchiita musika wokutengeserana!”" 
John2:17 Vadzidzi vake vakarangarira kuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi, “Kushingairira imba yenyu kuchandipedza.”" 
John2:18 Ipapo vaJudha vakati kwaari, “Ungatipa chiratidzo chipi chingatiradza pachena kuti unoita zvinhu izvi zvose nesimba ripi?”" 
John2:19 Jesu akavapindura akati, “Paradzai temberi iyi, uye ini ndichaivakazve mumazuva matatu.”" 
John2:20 VaJudha vakapindura vakati, “Zvakatora makore makumi mana namatanhatu kuti temberi iyi ivakwe, uye iwe uchaimutsa mumazuva matatu?”" 
John2:21 Asi temberi yaaireva waiva muviri wake. 
John2:22 Shure kwokumuka kwake kubva kuvakafa, vadzidzi vake vakarangarira zvaakanga ambotaura. Ipapo vakatenda Magwaro namashoko akanga ataurwa naJesu." 
John2:23 Zvino paakanga ari muJerusarema paMutambo wePasika, vanhu vazhinji vakaona zviratidzo zvaakanga achiita uye vakatenda muzita rake." 
John2:24 Asi Jesu haana kuvimba navo, nokuti aiziva vanhu vose." 
John2:25 Akanga asingatsvaki uchapupu hwomunhu pamusoro pomunhu nokuti akanga achiziva zvakanga zviri mumunhu. 
John3:1 Zvino kwakanga kuno mumwe murume weboka ravaFarisi ainzi Nikodhimo, nhengo yedare ravaJudha raitonga." 
John3:2 Akauya kuna Jesu usiku akati, “Rabhi, tinoziva kuti muri mudzidzisi akabva kuna Mwari. Nokuti hakuna munhu angagona kuita zviratidzo zvamunoita kana Mwari asinaye.”" 
John3:3 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ndinokuudza chokwadi, hakuna munhu angaona umambo hwaMwari kana asina kuberekwa patsva.”" 
John3:4 Nikodhimo akabvunza akati, “Munhu angaberekwa seiko iye ava mukuru? Zvirokwazvo haangagoni kupinda mudumbu ramai vake kechipiri kuti aberekwe patsva!”" 
John3:5 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ndinokuudza chokwadi, hakuna munhu angapinda muumambo hwaMwari kana asina kuberekwa nemvura uye noMweya." 
John3:6 Nyama inobereka nyama, asi Mweya anobereka Mweya." 
John3:7 Haufaniri kushamiswa nezvandareva ndichiti, ‘Unofanira kuberekwa patsva.’" 
John3:8 Mhepo inovhuvhuta ichienda kwainoda. Unonzwa inzwi rayo, asi haugoni kuziva kwainobva kana kwainoenda. Ndizvo zvakaitawo vose vakaberekwa noMweya.”" 
John3:9 Nikodhimo akati, “Zvingaitika seiko izvi?”" 
John3:10 Jesu akati, “Iwe uri mudzidzisi wavaIsraeri, asi haunzwisisi zvinhu izvi?" 
John3:11 Ndinokuudza chokwadi, tinotaura zvatinoziva, uye tinopupura zvatakaona, asi hazvo, imi vanhu hamutongogamuchiri uchapupu hwedu." 
John3:12 Ndataura kwauri pamusoro pezvinhu zvapanyika uye hautendi; zvino ungatenda sei kana ndikataura pamusoro pezvinhu zvokudenga? 
John3:13 Hakuna munhu akamboenda kudenga kunze kwaiye akabva kudenga, iye Mwanakomana woMunhu." 
John3:14 Mozisi sezvaakasimudza nyoka murenje, saizvozvo Mwanakomana woMunhu anofanira kusimudzwawo," 
John3:15 kuti ani naani anotenda kwaari ave noupenyu husingaperi. 
John3:16 “Nokuti Mwari akada nyika nokudaro, kuti akapa Mwanakomana wake mumwe oga, kuti ani naani anotenda kwaari arege kufa asi ave noupenyu husingaperi." 
John3:17 Nokuti Mwari haana kutuma Mwanakomana wake panyika kuti atonge nyika, asi kuti nyika iponeswe kubudikidza naye." 
John3:18 Ani naani anotenda kwaari haatongwi, asi ani naani asingatendi atotongwa nokuti haana kutenda muzita roMwanakomana mumwe oga waMwari." 
John3:19 Kutongwa ndokuku: Chiedza chakasvika munyika, asi vanhu vakada rima panzvimbo yechiedza nokuti mabasa avo akanga akaipa." 
John3:20 Mumwe nomumwe anoita zvakaipa anovenga chiedza, uye haapindi muchiedza nokuti anotya kuti mabasa ake angaiswa pachena." 
John3:21 Asi ani naani anorarama muchokwadi anouya muchiedza, kuitira kuti zvaakaita zvionekwe pachena kuti zvakaitwa kubudikidza naMwari.”" 
John3:22 Shure kwaizvozvo, Jesu navadzidzi vake vakabuda vakaenda kunyika yeJudhea, uko kwaakandogara navo kwechinguva, uye akabhabhatidza." 
John3:23 Zvino Johaniwo aibhabhatidza paAenoni pedyo neSarimu nokuti pakanga pane mvura zhinji, uye vanhu vakanga vachiramba vachiuya kuti vazobhabhatidzwa." 
John3:24 (Panguva iyi, Johani akanga asati aiswa mutorongo.)" 
John3:25 Nharo dzakamuka pakati pavamwe vadzidzi vaJohani nomumwe muJudha pamusoro penyaya dzokuzvinatsa nokushamba. 
John3:26 Vakauya kuna Johani uye vakati kwaari, “Rabhi, uya murume wamakanga muinaye mhiri kwaJorodhani, iye wamakapupura nezvake, onai, ari kubhabhatidza, uye vanhu vose vari kuenda kwaari.”" 
John3:27 Johani akapindura achiti, “Munhu anongogamuchira chete zvaanenge apiwa zvichibva kudenga." 
John3:28 Imi pachenyu mungandipupurira kuti ndakati, ‘Ini handisini Kristu, asi ndakatumwa mberi kwake.’" 
John3:29 Mwenga ndowechikomba. Shamwari inoshandira chikomba inomira ichimunzwa uye inozara nomufaro painonzwa inzwi rechikomba. Mufaro uyo ndowangu, uye iye zvino wakwana." 
John3:30 Anofanira kuva mukuru; ini ndinofanira kudukupiswa. 
John3:31 “Uyo anobva kumusoro ndiye ari pamusoro pavose; uyo anobva panyika ndowenyika, uye anotaura somunhu anobva panyika. Uyo anobva kudenga ndiye ari pamusoro pavose." 
John3:32 Iye anopupura zvaakaona nezvaakanzwa, asi hakuna munhu anogamuchira uchapupu hwake." 
John3:33 Munhu anohugamuchira, anopupura kuti Mwari ndowechokwadi." 
John3:34 Nokuti uyo akatumwa naMwari anotaura mashoko aMwari, nokuti Mwari anopa Mweya asingayeri." 
John3:35 Baba vanoda mwanakomana uye vakaisa zvose mumaoko ake. 
John3:36 Ani naani anotenda muMwanakomana ano upenyu husingaperi, asi ani naani anoramba Mwanakomana haangaoni upenyu, nokuti kutsamwa kwaMwari kunogara pamusoro pake.”" 
John4:1 VaFarisi vakanzwa kuti Jesu akanga achiteverwa navanhu vazhinji uye achibhabhatidza vadzidzi vakawanda kupfuura Johani," 
John4:2 kunyange zvake akanga asiri Jesu aibhabhatidza, asi vadzidzi vake." 
John4:3 Ishe akati anzwa izvi, akabva kuJudhea akadzokera kuGarirea zvakare." 
John4:4 Zvino akanga achifanira kupfuura nomuSamaria. 
John4:5 Saka akasvika paguta romuSamaria rainzi Saika, pedyo nomunda wakanga wapiwa kuna Josefa nababa vake Jakobho." 
John4:6 Tsime raJakobho raiva ipapo, uye Jesu, aneta sezvo akanga achibva parwendo, akagara pasi patsime ipapo. Yakanga iri nguva inenge yechitanhatu." 
John4:7 Mukadzi muSamaria akati auya kuzochera mvura, Jesu akati kwaari, “Ndipewo mvura yokunwa?”" 
John4:8 (Vadzidzi vake vakanga vapinda muguta kuti vandotenga zvokudya.) 
John4:9 Mukadzi muSamaria akati kwaari, “Iwe uri muJudha uye ini ndiri muSamaria. Seiko uchikumbira kwandiri mvura yokunwa?” (Nokuti vaJudha havadyidzani navaSamaria.)" 
John4:10 Jesu akamupindura akati, “Dai waiziva chipo chaMwari uye kuti ndiani anokumbira mvura kwauri, ungadai wakumbira kwaari uye angadai akupa mvura mhenyu.”" 
John4:11 Mukadzi akati, “Ishe, hamuna chamungacheresa nacho uye tsime rakadzika. Ko, mvura mhenyu mungaiwanepi?" 
John4:12 Ko, imi muri mukuru here, kuna baba vedu Jakobho, avo vakatipa tsime uye vakanwa pariri ivo pachavo, sezvakaitawo vanakomana vavo namakwai avo nemombe?”" 
John4:13 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ani naani anonwa mvura iyi achava nenyotazve," 
John4:14 asi ani naani anonwa mvura yandichamupa haangatongovi nenyota. Zvirokwazvo, mvura yandichamupa ini ichava maari chitubu chemvura inoerera kuupenyu husingaperi.”" 
John4:15 Mukadzi akati kwaari, “Ishe, ndipei mvura iyi kuitira kuti ndirege kuzova nenyotazve uye ndirege kuramba ndichingouya kuzochera mvura pano.”" 
John4:16 Iye akati, “Enda, undodana murume wako ugodzoka pano.”" 
John4:17 Akapindura akati, “Handina murume.” Jesu akati kwaari, “Wareva zvakanaka pawati hauna murume." 
John4:18 Chokwadi ndeichi, wakava navarume vashanu, uye murume waunaye zvino haazi murume wako. Zvawabva mukutaura ndicho chokwadi.”" 
John4:19 Mukadzi akati, “Ishe, ndinoona kuti muri muprofita." 
John4:20 Madzibaba edu ainamata pagomo iri, asi imi vaJudha munoti, nzvimbo yatinofanira kunamata tiri ndimo muJerusarema.”" 
John4:21 Jesu akati, “Mai, nditendei, nguva inouya yamuchanamata Baba musiri pagomo rino kana muJerusarema." 
John4:22 Imi vaSamaria munonamata chamusingazivi; isu tinonamata chatinoziva, nokuti ruponeso runobva kuvaJudha." 
John4:23 Asi nguva inouya uye yatouya zvino apo vanamati vechokwadi vachanamata Baba mumweya nomuzvokwadi, nokuti ndivo vanamati vanotsvakwa naBaba kuti vamunamate." 
John4:24 Mwari mweya, uye vanomunamata vanofanira kumunamata mumweya nomuzvokwadi.”" 
John4:25 Mukadzi akati, “Ndinoziva kuti Mesiya anonzi Kristu ari kuuya. Paanouya, acharondedzera zvinhu zvose kwatiri.”" 
John4:26 Ipapo Jesu akataura akati, “Ini ndiri kutaura newe ndini iye.”" 
John4:27 Pakarepo vadzidzi vake vakadzokera kwaari uye vakashamiswa vachiona achitaura nomukadzi. Asi hapana akamubvunza kuti, “Unodei?” kana kuti “Munotaurireiko naye?”" 
John4:28 Ipapo, asiya chirongo chake, mukadzi akadzokera kuguta akandoti kuvanhu," 
John4:29 “Uyai, muone murume anditaurira zvinhu zvose zvandakaita. Kuti uyu angava iye Kristu here?”" 
John4:30 Vakabuda muguta vakapinda munzira yavo vakananga kwaari. 
John4:31 Vanhu vasati vasvika, vadzidzi vake vakafanomukurudzira vachiti, “Rabhi, imbowanai chamungadya.”" 
John4:32 Asi iye akati kwavari, “Ndine chokudya chandinodya chamusingazivi.”" 
John4:33 Ipapo vadzidzi vake vakati kuno mumwe nomumwe wavo, “Asi pano munhu amuvigira zvokudya kanhi?”" 
John4:34 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvokudya zvangu ndiko kuita kuda kwowakandituma uye nokupedza basa rake." 
John4:35 Ko, imi hamuti here, ‘Kwasara mwedzi mina ipapo kucheka kwobva kwasvika?’ Ndinoti kwamuri, svinurai meso enyu uye mutarise kuminda! Yatoibva kuti ikohwewe." 
John4:36 Kunyange iye zvino mukohwi anopiwa mubayiro wake, kunyange izvozvi anokohwa zvibereko zvoupenyu husingaperi, kuitira kuti mukushi nomukohwi vagofara pamwe chete." 
John4:37 Nokuti tsumo inoti, ‘Mumwe anokusha uye mumwe anokohwa ndeyezvokwadi.’" 
John4:38 Ndakakutumai kunokohwa zvamusina kushandira. Vamwe vakaita basa rakaoma, uye imi makakohwa mubayiro wokubata kwavo.”" 
John4:39 VaSamaria vazhinji vaibva muguta iro vakatenda kwaari nokuda kwouchapupu hwomukadzi hwokuti, “Akanditaurira zvose zvandakaita.”" 
John4:40 Saka vaSamaria vakasvika kwaari, vakamukumbira kuti agare navo, nokudaro akagarapo kwamazuva maviri." 
John4:41 Uye nokuda kwamashoko ake vamwezve vazhinji vakava vatendi. 
John4:42 Ivo vakati kumukadzi uya, “Hatichatongotendi nokuda kwezvawataura chete; uye zvino tazvinzwira pachedu, uye tinoziva kuti murume uyu chokwadi ndiye Muponesi wenyika.”" 
John4:43 Mazuva maviri akati apfuura, akabva akaenda kuGarirea." 
John4:44 Zvino Jesu pachake akanga ambopupura kuti muprofita haakudzwi munyika yokwake. 
John4:45 Akati asvika muGarirea, vaGarirea vakamugamuchira. Vakanga vaona zvose zvaakanga aita muJerusarema pamutambo wePasika, nokuti naivowo vaivapo." 
John4:46 Akashanyirazve Kana yomuGarirea, uko kwaakanga ashandura mvura ikava waini. Uye ikoko kwakanga kuno mumwe mutariri wamambo akanga ane mwanakomana wake akanga avete achirwara paKapenaume." 
John4:47 Murume uyu akati anzwa kuti Jesu asvika muGarirea achibva kuJudhea, akaenda kwaari akandomukumbira kuti auye azoporesa mwanakomana wake, uyo akanga ava pedyo nokufa." 
John4:48 Jesu akati kwaari, “Kana imi vanhu musina kuona zviratidzo nezvishamiso, hamungatongotendi.”" 
John4:49 Mutariri wamambo akati, “Ishe, burukai muuye mwana wangu asati afa.”" 
John4:50 Jesu akapindura akati, “Enda hako. Mwanakomana wako achararama.” Murume uyu akagamuchira shoko raJesu akaenda." 
John4:51 Achiri munzira varanda vake vakasangana naye namashoko okuti mukomana akanga apora. 
John4:52 Akati abvunza nguva yakatanga mwana kunzwa zviri nani, ivo vakati kwaari, “Fivha yakabva paari nezuro panguva dzechinomwe.”" 
John4:53 Ipapo baba vaya vakayeuka kuti ndiyo yakanga iri nguva chaiyo paakanzi naJesu, “Mwanakomana wako achararama.” Saka iye neimba yake yose vakatenda." 
John4:54 Ichi ndicho chakanga chiri chiratidzo chechipiri chakaitwa naJesu, abva kuJudhea ava kuGarirea." 
John5:1 Shure kwaizvozvo, Jesu akakwira kuJerusarema kumutambo wavaJudha." 
John5:2 Zvino muJerusarema mune dziva riri pedyo neSuo raMakwai, rinonzi Bhetesdha nechiHebheru, uye rakapoteredzwa namabiravira mashanu." 
John5:3 Imomo vanhu vazhinji vakaremara vaisivatamo, mapofu, zvirema navakafa mitezo." 
John5:4 Nguva nenguva mutumwa waShe aiburukiramo achibvongodza mvura. Munhu aitanga kupinda mudziva shure kwenguva ipi zvayo yainge yabvongodzwa mvura aiporeswa pachirwere chipi zvacho chaainge anacho. 
John5:5 Mumwe murume akanga arimo akanga arwara kwamakore makumi matatu namasere. 
John5:6 Jesu akati amuona avete imomo, uye aiziva kuti akanga aita mararamiro iwayo kwenguva refu, akamubvunza akati, “Unoda kuporeswa here?”" 
John5:7 Murwere akati, “Ishe, handina munhu anondibatsira kuti ndipinde mudziva mvura painenge yabvongodzwa. Ndichiri kuedza kupinda, mumwe anonditangira.”" 
John5:8 Ipapo Jesu akati kwaari, “Simuka! Tora rukukwe rwako ufambe.”" 
John5:9 Pakarepo murume uyu akaporeswa; akatora rukukwe rwake akafamba. Zuva rakaitika izvi raiva reSabata. 
John5:10 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakati kumunhu uya akanga aporeswa, “Nhasi iSabata; murayiro unokurambidza kuti utakure rukukwe rwako.”" 
John5:11 Asi iye akapindura akati, “Munhu andiporesa ati kwandiri, ‘Takura rukukwe rwako ufambe.’ ”" 
John5:12 Saka vakamubvunza vakati, “Ndianiko munhu uyu akutaurira kuti urutakure ufambe?”" 
John5:13 Munhu uya akanga aporeswa akanga asingazivi kuti ainge ari ani, nokuti Jesu akanga apinda mukati meungano yakanga iripo." 
John5:14 Shure kwaizvozvo, Jesu akamuwana ari mutemberi uye akati kwaari, “Tarira, wapora; Usatadzazve kuti urege kuwirwa nechimwe chinhu chakaipisisa.”" 
John5:15 Murume akabva akaenda akandoudza vaJudha kuti ndiJesu akanga amuporesa. 
John5:16 Saka nokuda kwokuti Jesu akanga achiita zvinhu izvi nomusi weSabata, vaJudha vakamutambudza." 
John5:17 Jesu akati kwavari, “Baba vangu vanoramba vari pabasa ravo kusvikira nhasi chaiye, uye neniwo, ndiri kushanda.”" 
John5:18 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, vaJudha vakaedza zvakanyanya kwazvo kuti vamuuraye; nokuti akanga asingaputsi Sabata chete, asi akanga achitiwo Mwari ndiBaba vake, achizvienzanisa naMwari." 
John5:19 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi, Mwanakomana haagoni kuita chinhu ari oga; anongogona kuita zvaanoona Baba vake vachiita, nokuti zvose zvinoitwa naBaba, Mwanakomana anozviitawo." 
John5:20 Nokuti Baba vanoda Mwanakomana uye vanomuratidza zvose zvavanoita ivo. Hongu, kuti imi mushamiswe, vachamuratidza kunyange zvinhu zvikuru kwazvo kupfuura izvi." 
John5:21 Nokuti sezvo Baba vachimutsa vakafa uye vachivapa upenyu, saizvozvo Mwanakomana anopa upenyu kuno uyo waanofarira kuti ape." 
John5:22 Pamusoro paizvozvo, Baba havatongi munhu, asi vakapa mwanakomana kutonga kwose," 
John5:23 kuti vose vakudze Mwanakomana sokukudza kwavanoita Baba. Uyo asingakudzi Mwanakomana, haakudzi Baba vakamutuma." 
John5:24 “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, ani naani anonzwa shoko rangu uye achitenda uyo akandituma, ano upenyu husingaperi uye haachazotongwi, abva murufu uye aenda kuupenyu." 
John5:25 Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, nguva inouya uye yatosvika zvino yokuti vakafa vachanzwa inzwi roMwanakomana waMwari uye avo vanonzwa vachararama." 
John5:26 Nokuti sezvo Baba vano upenyu mavari, saizvozvowo vakapa Mwanakomana kuti ave noupenyu maari." 
John5:27 Uye vakamupa simba rokuti atonge nokuti ndiye Mwanakomana woMunhu. 
John5:28 “Musashamiswa pane izvi, kuti nguva inouya apo vose vari mumakuva avo vachanzwa inzwi rake" 
John5:29 uye vachamuka; vose vakaita zvakanaka vachamuka vachienda kuupenyu, uye avo vakaita zvakaipa vachamuka vachienda kukutongwa." 
John5:30 Ini ndoga handigoni kuita chinhu; ndinongotonga sezvandinenge ndanzwa, uye kutonga kwangu kwakarurama, nokuti handitsvaki kuzvifadza asi iye akandituma." 
John5:31 “Kana ndichizvipupurira, uchapupu hwangu hahuna maturo." 
John5:32 Pano mumwe anondipupurira, uye ndinoziva kuti uchapupu hwake pamusoro pangu ndohwechokwadi." 
John5:33 “Makatuma nhume kuna Johani naiye akapupurira chokwadi. 
John5:34 Hazvirevi kuti ndinogamuchira kupupura kwavanhu; asi ndareva izvi kuti muponeswe. 
John5:35 Johani akanga ari mwenje unopfuta nokuvhenekera, uye imi makasarudza kufara kwenguva duku muchiedza chake." 
John5:36 “Ndino uchapupu hukuru kupfuura hwaJohani. Nokuti iro basa chairo randakapiwa naBaba kuti ndiripedze, uye randiri kuita, rinondipupurira kuti Baba vakandituma." 
John5:37 Uye ivo Baba vakandituma vakapupura pachavo pamusoro pangu. Hamuna kutombonzwa inzwi ravo kana kuona chimiro chavo," 
John5:38 uye shoko ravo harigari mukati menyu, nokuti hamutendi iye waakatuma." 
John5:39 Munoshingaira kunzvera magwaro nokuti munofunga kuti mune upenyu husingaperi maari. Magwaro iwaya anopupura pamusoro pangu," 
John5:40 asi imi munoramba kuuya kwandiri kuti muve noupenyu. 
John5:41 “Handigamuchiri kurumbidza kunobva kuvanhu," 
John5:42 asi ndinokuzivai. Ndinoziva kuti hamuna rudo rwaMwari mumwoyo yenyu. 
John5:43 Ndakauya muzita raBaba vangu, asi hamundigamuchiri; asi kana mumwewo zvake akauya muzita rake, muchamugamuchira." 
John5:44 Mungatenda seiko kana muchikudzana pachenyu asi musingashingairiri kuwana kurumbidzwa kunobva kuna Mwari oga? 
John5:45 “Asi musafunga kuti ndichakupomerai mhosva pamberi paBaba. Mupomeri wenyu ndiMozisi, wamunoisa tariro yenyu maari." 
John5:46 Dai maitenda Mozisi, mungadai maitendawo ini, nokuti akanyora nezvangu." 
John5:47 Asi sezvo musingatendi zvaakanyora, muchatenda seiko zvandinoreva?”" 
John6:1 Shure kwaizvozvi, Jesu akayambuka akaenda mhiri kumahombekombe eGungwa reGarirea (ndiro Gungwa reTibheriasi)," 
John6:2 uye vazhinji zhinji vakamutevera nokuti vakanga vaona zviratidzo zvaakanga aita pavarwere. 
John6:3 Ipapo Jesu akakwira pagomo akagara pasi navadzidzi vake. 
John6:4 Mutambo wavaJudha wePasika wakanga wava pedyo. 
John6:5 Jesu akati asimudza meso ake akaona vanhu vazhinji zhinji vachiuya kwaari, akati kuna Firipi, “Tichatenga chingwa kupiko chokuti vanhu ava vadye?”" 
John6:6 Akabvunza izvi achida chete kumuedza, nokuti akanga atoziva kare mupfungwa dzake zvaakanga achizoita." 
John6:7 Firipi akamupindura akati, “Mubayiro unoshandirwa kwemwedzi misere haugoni kutenga chingwa chinokwana mumwe nomumwe hake, kuti awane chimedu!”" 
John6:8 Mumwe wavadzidzi vake, Andirea, munun'una waPetro, akati," 
John6:9 “Houno mukomana ane zvingwa zviduku zvebhari nehove mbiri, asi zvingasvikepiko pakati pavanhu vakawanda zvakadai?”" 
John6:10 Jesu akati, “Itai kuti vanhu vagare pasi.” Panzvimbo iyo pakanga pano uswa huzhinji kwazvo, uye varume vakagara pasi vakanga vachikarosvika zviuru zvishanu." 
John6:11 Ipapo Jesu akatora zvingwa zviya, akavonga, uye akazvigovera kuna vaya vakanga vagara pasi mumwe nomumwe paaida napo. Akaita zvimwe chetezvo nehove." 
John6:12 Vakati vadya vose, akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Unganidzai zvimedu zvose zvasara. Musarega zvichiraswa.”" 
John6:13 Saka vakazviunganidza zvikazara matengu gumi namaviri nezvimedu zvezvingwa zvebhari zvishanu, zvakanga zvasiyiwa navaya vakanga vadya." 
John6:14 Vanhu vakati vaona chiratidzo chakanga chaitwa naJesu, vakatanga kuti, “Zvirokwazvo uyu ndiye muprofita aifanira kuuya panyika.”" 
John6:15 Jesu, akaziva kuti vaida kumumanikidza kuti vamuite mambo, akabvazve, akaenda kugomo ari oga." 
John6:16 Nguva yamadekwana yakati yasvika, vadzidzi vake vakaburuka vakaenda kugungwa," 
John6:17 uko kwavakandopinda mugwa vakasimuka vakayambuka mhiri kwegungwa vakananga kuKapenaume. Zvino kwakanga kwasviba, uye Jesu akanga asati ava pavari." 
John6:18 Mhepo ine simba yakanga ichivhuvhuta uye kukava namafungu ane hasha. 
John6:19 Vakati vakwasva igwa kwamakiromita angaita mashanu kana matanhatu, vakaona Jesu achiuya kuigwa, achifamba pamusoro pemvura; uye vakatya zvikuru." 
John6:20 Asi iye akati kwavari, “Ndini; musatya.”" 
John6:21 Ipapo vakafara kumugamuchira mugwa; pakarepo igwa rakasvika kumahombekombe kwavakanga vakananga. 
John6:22 Fume mangwana, vanhu vazhinji vakanga vasara mhiri kwegungwa vakatanga kuona kuti pakanga pachingova neigwa rimwe chete ipapo, uye kuti Jesu haana kunge apinda mariri kuti aende navadzidzi vake, asi kuti vakanga vaenda vari voga." 
John6:23 Ipapo mamwe magwa aibva kuTibheriasi akasvika pedyo nenzvimbo yakanga yadyirwa chingwa navanhu shure kwokuvonga kwaShe. 
John6:24 Vazhinji vakati vaona kuti Jesu navadzidzi vake vakanga vasisipo, vakapinda mumagwa ndokuenda kuKapenaume vachitsvaka Jesu." 
John6:25 Vakati vamuwana ari mhiri kwegungwa vakamubvunza vakati, “Rabhi, makauya kuno riniko?”" 
John6:26 Jesu akapindura akati, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, muri kunditsvaka, kwete nokuda kwokuti makaona zviratidzo, asi nokuda kwokuti makadya zvingwa uye mukaguta." 
John6:27 Musashandira zvokudya zvinopera, asi shandirai zvokudya zvinogara kuupenyu husingaperi zvamuchapiwa noMwanakomana woMunhu. Mwari Baba vakaisa chisimbiso chavo paari.”" 
John6:28 Ipapo vakamubvunza vakati, “Tinofanira kuita seiko kuti tiite mabasa anodikanwa naMwari?”" 
John6:29 Jesu akapindura akati, “Basa raMwari nderiri: kuti mutende kuna iye waakatuma.”" 
John6:30 Saka vakamubvunza vakati, “Muchatiradza chiratidzo cheiko chatingaona kuti tigokutendai? Muchaiteiko?" 
John6:31 Madzibaba edu akadya mana murenje; sezvazvakanyorwa zvichinzi: ‘Akavapa chingwa chakabva kudenga kuti vadye.’ ” 
John6:32 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, haasi Mozisi akakupai chingwa chakabva kudenga, asi kuti ndiBaba vangu vanokupai chingwa chezvokwadi chinobva kudenga." 
John6:33 Nokuti chingwa chaMwari ndiye anoburuka achibva kudenga uye achipa upenyu kunyika.” 
John6:34 Ivo vakati, “Ishe, kubva zvino zvichienda mberi, tipei chingwa ichi.”" 
John6:35 Ipapo Jesu akataura achiti “Ndini chingwa choupenyu. Ani naani anouya kwandiri haangatongovi nenzara, uye ani naani anotenda kwandiri haangatongovi nenyota." 
John6:36 Asi sezvandakakuudzai, makandiona uye hamutendi nazvino." 
John6:37 Zvose zvandinopiwa naBaba zvichauya kwandiri, uye ani naani anouya kwandiri handingatongomurasiri kure." 
John6:38 Nokuti ndakaburuka kudenga kuti ndirege kuzoita kuda kwangu asi kuda kwaiye akandituma. 
John6:39 Uye uku ndiko kuda kwaiye akandituma, kuti ndirege kurasikirwa navose vaakandipa, asi kuti ndivamutse pazuva rokupedzisira." 
John6:40 Nokuti kuda kwaBaba vangu ndiko kuti ani naani anotarira kuMwanakomana anokutenda maari achava noupenyu husingaperi, uye ndichamumutsa pazuva rokupedzisira.”" 
John6:41 Ipapo, vaJudha vakatanga kugunun'una pamusoro pake nokuti akati, “Ndini chingwa chakaburuka kubva kudenga.”" 
John6:42 Vakati, “Ko, uyu haasi Jesu, mwanakomana waJosefa here, watinoziva baba vake namai vake? Zvino anotaura sei achiti, ‘Ndakaburuka kubva kudenga’?”" 
John6:43 Jesu akapindura akati, “Regai kugunun'una pakati penyu." 
John6:44 Hakuna munhu angauya kwandiri kunze kwokunge Baba vakandituma vamukweva, uye ndichamumutsa pazuva rokupedzisira." 
John6:45 Muvaprofita makanyorwa muchinzi: ‘Vose vachadzidziswa naMwari.’ Ani naani anoteerera kuna Baba uye anodzidza kubva kwavari anouya kwandiri. 
John6:46 Hakuna munhu akaona Baba kunze kwouyo anobva kuna Mwari; ndiye chete akaona Baba. 
John6:47 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, uyo anotenda ndiye ano upenyu husingaperi." 
John6:48 Ndini chingwa choupenyu. 
John6:49 Madzitateguru enyu akadya mana mugwenga, asi vakafa." 
John6:50 Asi hechino chingwa chinobva kudenga, chinoti kana munhu akadya haangafi." 
John6:51 Ndini chingwa chipenyu chakaburuka kubva kudenga. Kana munhu upi zvake akadya chingwa ichi, achararama nokusingaperi. Chingwa ichi inyama yangu, yandichapa nokuda kwoupenyu hwenyika.”" 
John6:52 Ipapo vaJudha vakatanga kukakavadzana zvikuru pakati pavo vachiti, “Munhu uyu angatipa nyama yake kuti tiidye seiko?”" 
John6:53 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndinokuudzai chokwadi kuti, kana musingadyi nyama yoMwanakomana woMunhu nokunwa ropa rake, hamuna upenyu mamuri." 
John6:54 Ani naani anodya nyama yangu nokunwa ropa rangu anogara mandiri, uye ini maari." 
John6:55 Nokuti nyama yangu ndicho chokudya chaicho. 
John6:56 Ani naani anodya nyama yangu uye anonwa ropa rangu anogara mandiri, neni maari." 
John6:57 Sezvo Baba vapenyu vakandituma uye ndichararama nokuda kwaBaba, saizvozvo uyo anodya pandiri achararama nokuda kwangu." 
John6:58 Ichi ndicho chingwa chakaburuka kubva kudenga. Madzitateguru enyu akadya mana uye akafa, asi ani naani anodya chingwa ichi achararama nokusingaperi.”" 
John6:59 Akataura izvi paakanga achidzidzisa ari musinagoge muKapenaume. 
John6:60 Pavakanzwa izvi, vadzidzi vake vazhinji vakati, “Kudzidzisa uku kwakaoma. Ndianiko angakugamuchira?”" 
John6:61 Aiziva zvake kuti vadzidzi vake vakanga vachigunun'una pamusoro paizvozvi, Jesu akati kwavari, “Izvi zvinokugumburai here?" 
John6:62 Muchaita sei kana mukaona Mwanakomana woMunhu achikwira achienda kwaaimbova kare! 
John6:63 Mweya ndiye anopa upenyu, nyama haina chainobatsira. Mashoko andataura kwamuri ndiwo mweya, uye ane upenyu." 
John6:64 Asi vamwe venyu varipo vasingatendi.” Nokuti Jesu akanga achiziva kubva pakutanga kuti ndivanaani pakati pavo vakanga vasingatendi uye kuti ndiani aizomupandukira. 
John6:65 Akaenderera mberi achiti, “Ndokusaka ndakakuudzai kuti hakuna munhu angauya kwandiri kunze kwokunge azvipiwa naBaba.”" 
John6:66 Kubva panguva iyi vadzidzi vake vazhinji vakadzokera shure uye vakasazomutevera. 
John6:67 Jesu akabvunza vane gumi navaviri akati, “Nemiwo hamusi kuda kuenda here?”" 
John6:68 Simoni akati, “Ishe, tichaenda kuna aniko? Imi mune mashoko oupenyu husingaperi." 
John6:69 Tinotenda uye tinoziva kuti ndimi Mutsvene waMwari.” 
John6:70 Ipapo Jesu akati, “Handina kukusarudzai, imi vane gumi navaviri here? Asi mumwe wenyu ndidhiabhori!”" 
John6:71 Akanga achireva Judhasi, mwanakomana waSimoni Iskarioti, uyo, kunyange akanga ari mumwe wavane gumi navaviri, aizomupandukira." 
John7:1 Shure kwaizvozvo, Jesu akafamba muGarirea, asingadi kuenda kuJudhea nokuti vaJudha vaikoko vakanga vachitsvaka kumuuraya." 
John7:2 Asi Mutambo waMatumba wavaJudha wakati wava pedyo," 
John7:3 vanun'una vaJesu vakati kwaari, “Munofanira kubva pano muende kuJudhea, kuitira kuti vadzidzi venyu vagoona zvishamiso zvamunoita." 
John7:4 Hakuna munhu anoda kuva nomukurumbira anoita zvinhu zvake muchivande. Sezvo muchiita zvinhu izvi, chizviratidzai imi kunyika.”" 
John7:5 Nokuti kunyange vanun'una vake chaivo vakanga vasingatendi kwaari. 
John7:6 Naizvozvo Jesu akati kwavari, “Nguva yangu yakanaka haisati yasvika; asi kwamuri, nguva ipi zvayo yakangonaka." 
John7:7 Nyika haigoni kukuvengai, asi ini inondivenga nokuti ndinopupura kuti zvainoita zvakaipa." 
John7:8 Endai henyu imi kuMutambo. Ini handisati ndoenda kuMutambo uyu, nokuti nguva yakanaka kwandiri haisati yasvika.”" 
John7:9 Akati areva izvi, akagara muGarirea." 
John7:10 Zvisinei hazvo, shure kwokuenda kwavanun'una vake kuMutambo, iye akazoendawo, kwete pachena, asi muchivande." 
John7:11 Zvino vaJudha vakamutsvaka uye vakabvunza paMutambo kuti, “Munhu uya aripiko?”" 
John7:12 Vanhu vazhinji vaingozeverana nezvake kwose kwose. Vamwe vaiti, “Munhu akanaka,” vamwe vachiti, “Kwete, anonyengera vanhu.”" 
John7:13 Asi kwakanga kusina munhu aitaura izvozvo pachena nokuda kwokutya vaJudha. 
John7:14 Mutambo wakati wava pakati, Jesu ndipo paakazokwira kutemberi uye akatanga kudzidzisa." 
John7:15 VaJudha vakashamiswa uye vakabvunza vakati, “Murume uyu akawana ruzivo rwakadai seiko iye asina kudzidza?”" 
John7:16 Jesu akapindura akati, “Kudzidzisa kwangu hakuzi kwangu pachangu. Kunobva kuna iye akandituma." 
John7:17 Kana munhu akasarudza kuita kuda kwaMwari, achazoona kuti kudzidzisa kwangu kunobva kuna Mwari kana kuti ndinongotaura ndoga." 
John7:18 Uyo anotaura zvake anoita izvozvo kuti azviwanire kukudzwa, asi uyo anoshandira kukudzwa kwaiye akamutuma ndiye munhu wechokwadi; hapana zvokunyengera paari." 
John7:19 Ko, Mozisi haana kukupai murayiro here? Asi hapana kana mumwe wenyu anochengeta murayiro. Seiko muchiedza kundiuraya?”" 
John7:20 Vanhu vazhinji vakapindura vakati, “Une dhimoni iwe. Ndianiko anoda kukuuraya?”" 
John7:21 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndakaita chishamiso chimwe chete, asi imi mose muri kushamiswa nazvo." 
John7:22 Asi nokuda kwokuti Mozisi akakupai kudzingiswa (kunyange zvazvo kusina kubva kuna Mozisi, asi kumadzibaba enyu), imi munodzingisa mwana nomusi weSabata." 
John7:23 Zvino kana mwana achigona kudzingiswa nomusi weSabata kuti murayiro waMozisi urege kuputswa, seiko muchinditsamwira nokuda kwokuti ndaporesa munhu nomusi weSabata?" 
John7:24 Regai kutonga nezvinoonekwa zvomunhu, asi tongai zvakarurama.”" 
John7:25 Panguva iyoyo vamwe vanhu veJerusarema vakatanga kubvunzana vachiti, “Ko, uyu haasiye munhu uya wavari kuedza kuuraya here?" 
John7:26 Hoyu ari pano, ari kutaura zvake pachena, uye havatauri kana shoko kwaari. Ko, vakuru vatenderana kanhi kuti ndiye Kristu?" 
John7:27 Asi tinoziva kunobva munhu uyu; Kristu paanouya, hakuna munhu achaziva kwaanobva.”" 
John7:28 Ipapo Jesu, achiri kudzidzisa ari mutemberi, akadanidzira achiti, “Hongu, munondiziva, uye munoziva kwandinobva. Handisi pano nokuda kwangu, asi uyo akandituma ndiye wechokwadi. Imi hamumuzivi," 
John7:29 asi ini ndinomuziva nokuti ndinobva kwaari, uye ndiye akandituma.”" 
John7:30 Ipapo vakaedza kumubata, asi hapana munhu akaisa ruoko paari, nokuti nguva yake yakanga ichigere kusvika." 
John7:31 Kunyange zvakadaro, vazhinji pakati pavanhu vakatenda kwaari. Vakati, “Kristu paanouya, achaita zviratidzo zvizhinji kupfuura murume uyu here?”" 
John7:32 VaFarisi vakanzwa vanhu vazhinji vachiita zevezeve rezvinhu zvakadai pamusoro pake. Ipapo vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakatuma varindi vomutemberi kuti vandomusunga. 
John7:33 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndinongova nemi kwechinguva chiduku, uye ipapo ndichazoenda kuna iye akandituma." 
John7:34 Muchanditsvaka, asi hamuchazondiwani; uye pandinenge ndiri, hamugoni kusvikapo.”" 
John7:35 VaJudha vakataurirana vachiti, “Munhu uyu ari kuda kuenda kupiko kwatisingazomuwani? Achaenda here kuvanhu vedu vakapararira pakati pavaGiriki, agondodzidzisa vaGiriki?" 
John7:36 Anga achireveiko paati, ‘Muchanditsvaka, asi hamuchazondiwani,’ uye ‘Pandinenge ndiri, imi hamugoni kusvikapo’?”" 
John7:37 Pazuva rokupedzisira uye zuva guru roMutambo, Jesu akasimuka akadanidzira nenzwi guru achiti, “Kana pane munhu ane nyota, ngaauye kwandiri azonwa." 
John7:38 Ani naani anotenda kwandiri, sezvazvakarehwa muRugwaro, hova dzemvura mhenyu dzichayerera dzichibva mukati make.”" 
John7:39 Nokutaura uku, akanga achireva zvoMweya Mutsvene, uyo waizogamuchirwa navaya vanotenda kwaari. Nokuti Mweya wakanga usati wapiwa, sezvo Jesu akanga asati akudzwa." 
John7:40 Vakati vanzwa mashoko ake, vamwe vanhu vakati, “Zvirokwazvo murume uyu muprofita.”" 
John7:41 Vamwe vakati, “Ndiye Kristu.” Asi vamwe vakati, “Kristu angabva seiko kuGarirea?" 
John7:42 Rugwaro harutauri here kuti Kristu achabva kurudzi rwaDhavhidhi uye nokuBheterehema, guta raigara Dhavhidhi?”" 
John7:43 Nokudaro vanhu vakapesana nokuda kwaJesu. 
John7:44 Vamwe vakada kumubata, asi hapana akaisa ruoko paari." 
John7:45 Pakupedzisira varindi vetemberi vakadzokera kuvaprista vakuru nokuvaFarisi, vakavabvunza vakati, “Seiko musina kuuya naye kuno?”" 
John7:46 Varindi vakati kwavari, “Hakuna munhu akatombotaura nenzira inoitwa nomurume uyu.”" 
John7:47 VaFarisi vakati, “Munoreva kuti atokunyengerai nemiwo?" 
John7:48 Pane mumwe wavatongi kana wavaFarisi ava kutenda kwaari here? 
John7:49 Kwete! Asi vanhu vazhinji ava vasingatongozivi murayiro, vakatukwa ava.”" 
John7:50 Nikodhimo, uya akanga amboenda kuna Jesu uye akanga ari mumwe wavo, akati," 
John7:51 “Ko, murayiro wedu unopomera munhu mhosva asina kutanga ambonzwikwa kuti zvionekwe kuti ari kuitei here?”" 
John7:52 Vakapindura vakati, “Newewo uri weGarireasu? Nzvera, uye uchaona kuti hakuna muprofita anobva kuGarirea.”" 
John7:53 Ipapo mumwe nomumwe akaenda kumba kwake. 
John8:1 Asi Jesu akaenda kuGomo reMiorivhi. 
John8:2 Panguva dzamambakwedza akazviratidzazve mutemberi, vanhu vakamuunganira, uye akagara pasi kuti avadzidzise." 
John8:3 Vadzidzisi vomurayiro navaFarisi vakapinda nomukadzi akanga abatwa achiita upombwe. Vakamuita kuti amire pamberi peboka 
John8:4 uye vakati kuna Jesu, “Mudzidzisi, mukadzi uyu abatwa achiita upombwe." 
John8:5 MuMurayiro Mozisi akatirayira kuti titake namabwe vakadzi vakadai. Zvino imi munoti kudii?” 
John8:6 Vakanga vachishandisa mubvunzo uyu kuti vamuteye, vawane hwaro hwokumupa mhosva. Asi Jesu akakotama akatanga kunyora pasi nomunwe wake." 
John8:7 Vakati varamba vachimubvunza, akatwasuka akati kwavari, “Kana pane asina chivi pakati penyu, ngaave iye wokutanga kupotsera dombo kwaari.”" 
John8:8 Akakotamazve akanyora pasi. 
John8:9 Vakati vanzwa izvi, vose vakatanga kubva vachiita mumwe mumwe, kutanga vakuru, kusvikira Jesu asara oga, uye mukadzi achakangomirapo." 
John8:10 Jesu akatwasuka akati kwaari, “Mai, varipiko vaya vanga vachikupomera mhosva? Hapana akutonga here?”" 
John8:11 Iye akati, “Hapana, Ishe.” Jesu akati, “Neniwo handikupi mhosva. Chienda zvino uye usiye upenyu hwako hwechivi.”" 
John8:12 Jesu achitaurazve navanhu, akati, “Ndini chiedza chenyika. Ani naani anonditevera haangatongofambi murima, asi achava nechiedza choupenyu.”" 
John8:13 VaFarisi vakamupikisa vachiti, “Hezvo, uri kuratidza wani kuti unozvipupurira pachako; uchapupu hwako hahuna maturo.”" 
John8:14 Jesu akapindura akati, “Kunyange dai ndikazvipupurira pachangu, uchapupu hwangu ndohwechokwadi, nokuti ndinoziva kwandakabva uye nokwandinoenda. Asi imi hamuzivi kwandinobva kana kwandinoenda." 
John8:15 Munotonga nameso enyama; ini handitongi munhu. 
John8:16 Asi kana ndikatonga, kutonga kwangu kwakarurama, nokuti handizi ndoga. Ndinotonga naBaba, vakandituma." 
John8:17 Mumurayiro wenyu makanyorwa kuti kupupura kwavanhu vaviri ndokwechokwadi. 
John8:18 Ini ndini ndinozvipupurira pachangu; mumwe anondipupurira ndiBaba, vakandituma.”" 
John8:19 Ipapo vakamubvunza vakati, “Baba vako varipiko?” Jesu akapindura akati, “Hamundizivi ini kana Baba vangu. Dai maindiziva mungadai maizivawo Baba vangu.”" 
John8:20 Akataura mashoko aya paakanga achidzidzisa ari mutemberi pedyo nenzvimbo yaiiswa zvipo. Asi hapana munhu akamubata, nokuti nguva yake yakanga isati yasvika." 
John8:21 Jesu akatizve kwavari, “Ndiri kuenda, uye imi muchanditsvaka, uye muchafira muzvivi zvenyu. Kwandinoenda, imi hamungauyiko.”" 
John8:22 Izvi zvakaita kuti vaJudha vabvunzane vachiti, “Achazviuuraya here? Ndizvo zvaanoreva here zvaanoti, ‘Kwandinoenda, imi hamungauyiko?’ ”" 
John8:23 Asi akaenderera mberi achiti, “Imi muri vapasi; ini ndinobva kumusoro. Muri venyika ino; ini handizi wenyika ino." 
John8:24 Ndakuudzai kuti muchafira muzvivi zvenyu; kana musingatendi kuti ndini iye, zvirokwazvo muchafira muzvivi zvenyu.”" 
John8:25 Vakati kwaari, “Ndiwe aniko?” Jesu akapindura akati, “Izvozvo zvandanguri ndataura kare kuti ndini iye." 
John8:26 Ndine zvizhinji zvandinoda kutonga pamusoro penyu. Asi uyo akandituma akavimbika, uye zvandakanzwa kwaari ndizvo zvandinoudza nyika.”" 
John8:27 Havana kunzwisisa kuti akanga achivaudza nezvaBaba.
