2Corinthians1:16 Ndakaronga kukushanyirai ndiri parwendo rwangu rwokuenda kuMasedhonia, uye ndaizodzokazve nokwamuri kana ndobva kuMasedhonia, uye kuti muzondiendesa parwendo rwangu kuJudhea." 
2Corinthians1:17 Pandakaronga izvi, ndakazviita ndisingarevesi here? Kana kuti ndinoita urongwa hwangu nenzira yenyama here, zvokuti ndingati nenzira imwe cheteyo, “Hongu, hongu” uye “Kwete, kwete.”" 
2Corinthians1:18 Asi zvirokwazvo naMwari akatendeka, shoko redu kwamuri harizi “Hongu” kana “Kwete.”" 
2Corinthians1:19 Nokuti Mwanakomana waMwari, Jesu Kristu, uyo akaparidzwa pakati penyu neni naSirasi uye naTimoti, akanga asiri, “Hongu” kana “Kwete”, asi maari zvakagara zviri “Hongu.”" 
2Corinthians1:20 Nokuti hazvinei kuti Mwari akativimbisa zvinhu zvizhinji zvakadii, zvose i“Hongu” muna Kristu. Uye kubudikidza naiye tinoti “Ameni” kuti Mwari akudzwe." 
2Corinthians1:21 Zvino ndiMwari anoita kuti tose imi nesu timire takasimba muna Kristu. Akatizodza," 
2Corinthians1:22 akaisawo chisimbiso patiri chokuti tava vake, uye akaisa Mweya wake mumwoyo medu kuti ave rubatso, achipa chisimbiso chezvichauya." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ndinodana Mwari kuti ave chapupu changu kuti handina kuzouya kuKorinde nokuti ndakakunzwirai tsitsi. 
2Corinthians1:24 Kwete nokuti tinoda kuremedza kutenda kwenyu, asi kuti tinobatsirana nemi kuti muve nomufaro, nokuti makamira zvakasimba nokuda kwokutenda." 
2Corinthians2:1 Saka ndakati mumwoyo mangu handingaitizve rumwe rwendo kwamuri runokutambudzai. 
2Corinthians2:2 Nokuti kana ndichikuchemedzai, ndianiko achasara kuti andifadze kunze kwenyu imi vandinochemedza?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ndakanyora nenzira iyi kuitira kuti kana ndasvika ndirege kutsamwiswa navaya vaifanira kundifadza. Ndakanga ndine tariro mamuri mose, kuti muchagoverana neni mumufaro wangu." 
2Corinthians2:4 Nokuti ndakakunyorerai ndino kusuwa kukuru, nokurwadziwa mumwoyo uye nemisodzi mizhinji, kwete kuti ndikuchemedzei asi kuti ndikuzivisei udzamu hworudo rwangu kwamuri." 
2Corinthians2:5 Kana mumwe akauyisa kuchema, haana kuchemedza ini sokuchemedza kwaakaita imi mose, ndisingatauri mashoko akawanda." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kurova uku kwavanhu vazhinji kwakamuringana. 
2Corinthians2:7 Asi zvino, munofanira kumuregerera nokumunyaradza, kuitira kuti arege kuodzwa mwoyo kwazvo neshungu dzakanyanya." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ndinokukurudzirai, naizvozvo, kuti mumutsiridze rudo rwenyu kwaari." 
2Corinthians2:9 Chikonzero chakaita kuti ndikunyorerei chaiva chokuti ndione kana makanga muchigona kumira nokuteerera muzvinhu zvose. 
2Corinthians2:10 Kana muchiregerera munhu upi zvake neniwo ndinomuregerera. Uye zvandakaregerera, kana pane chinhu chandingaregerera, ndakaregerera pamberi paKristu nokuda kwenyu," 
2Corinthians2:11 kuitira kuti Satani arege kutinyengera. Nokuti mano ake tinoaziva. 
2Corinthians2:12 Zvino pandakaenda kuTroasi kundoparidza vhangeri raKristu uye ndikaona kuti Ishe akanga andizarurira musuo," 
2Corinthians2:13 ndakanga ndisina rugare mumwoyo mangu, nokuti handina kuwanako Tito hama yangu. Saka ndakaonekana navo ndikaenda kuMasedhonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Asi Mwari ngaavongwe, anotikundisa nguva dzose pakufamba kwedu muna Kristu uye kubudikidza nesu anoratidza kwose kwose munhuwi woruzivo rwake." 
2Corinthians2:15 Nokuti isu tiri munhuwi wakanaka waKristu kuna Mwari pakati paavo vari kuponeswa navari kuparara. 
2Corinthians2:16 Kuno mumwe tiri munhuwi worufu; kuno mumwewo tiri munhuwi woupenyu. Zvino ndianiko angakwanisa basa rakadai? 
2Corinthians2:17 Nokuti hatina kufanana navazhinji vanokanganisa shoko raMwari vachida kuwana mugove kubva pariri. Asi, tinotaura muna Kristu nokutendeka pamberi paMwari, savanhu vakatumwa naMwari." 
2Corinthians3:1 Tava kutangazve kuzvirumbidza here? Kana kuti tinotsvaka here, savamwe, tsamba dzinoenda kwamuri kana dzinobva kwamuri dzinotirumbidza?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Imi pachenyu ndimi tsamba yedu, yakanyora pamwoyo yedu, inozivikanwa uye inoverengwa navanhu vose." 
2Corinthians3:3 Munoonekwa kuti muri tsamba yakabva kuna Kristu, basa roushumiri hwedu, yakanyorwa, kwete neingi, asi noMweya waMwari mupenyu, kwete pamahwendefa amabwe, asi pamahwendefa emwoyo yavanhu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Kutenda kwakadai souku tinako kubudikidza naKristu pamberi paMwari. 
2Corinthians3:5 Kwete nokuti tinogona isu pachedu, zvokuti titi chakati ndechedu, asi kugona kwedu kunobva kuna Mwari." 
2Corinthians3:6 Akatigonesa savashumiri vesungano itsva, kwete yakanyorwa asi yoMweya; nokuti tsamba inouraya, asi Mweya anopa upenyu." 
2Corinthians3:7 Zvino kana kushumira kwakauyisa rufu, kwakanga kwakatemwa namavara pamabwe, kwakauya nokubwinya zvokuti vaIsraeri vakanga vasingagoni kuramba vakatarisa pachiso chaMozisi nokuda kwokubwinya kwacho, kunyange kwakanga kuchipfuura hako," 
2Corinthians3:8 ko, kushumira kwaMweya hakungavi nokubwinya kukuru here?" 
2Corinthians3:9 Kana kushumira kwakauyisa kutongwa kuvanhu kuchibwinya, ko, kuzoti kushumira kunouyisa kururama kunobwinya zvikuru sei!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Nokuti chaibwinya hachisisina kubwinya zvino kana tichichienzanisa nokubwinya kunochipfuura. 
2Corinthians3:11 Uye kana chakanga chichizopfuura chakauya nokubwinya, ko, kuzoti chinogara chichava nokubwinya kukuru sei!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Naizvozvo, zvatine tariro yakadai, takashinga zvikuru." 
2Corinthians3:13 Hatina kufanana naMozisi aiisa chifukidziro pachiso chake kuti vaIsraeri varege kuchitarisa kupenya pakwainge kwava kupera. 
2Corinthians3:14 Asi ndangariro dzavo dzakapofumadzwa, nokuti chifukidziro chimwe chetecho chichiripo kana sungano yakare ichiverengwa. Hachina kubviswa, nokuti chinongobviswa chete muna Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:15 Kunyange kusvikira zuva ranhasi kana Mozisi achiverengwa, chifukidziro chinofukidza mwoyo yavo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Asi kana munhu akatendeukira kuna She chete, chifukidziro chinobviswa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Zvino Ishe ndiye Mweya, uye pane Mweya waShe, pano kusununguka." 
2Corinthians3:18 Zvino isu, vane zviso zvisina kufukidzwa tose tinoratidza kubwinya kwaShe, tiri kushandurwa kuti tifanane naye nokubwinya kunoramba kuchiwedzerwa, kunobva kuna Ishe, anova iye Mweya." 
2Corinthians4:1 Naizvozvo, sezvo tine ushumiri uhu kubudikidza netsitsi dzaMwari, hatiori mwoyo." 
2Corinthians4:2 Asi takaramba zvinhu zvakavanzika uye nenzira dzinonyadzisa; hatishandisi unyengeri, uye hatiminamisi shoko raMwari. Asi pakuratidza kwedu zvokwadi, tinozvireverera muhana yomunhu wose pamberi paMwari." 
2Corinthians4:3 Uye kunyange zvazvo vhangeri redu rakafukidzwa, rakafukidzwa kuna avo vari kuparara." 
2Corinthians4:4 Vasingatendi vakapofumadzwa ndangariro dzavo namwari wenyika ino, kuti varege kuona chiedza chevhangeri rokubwinya kwaKristu, anova mufananidzo waMwari." 
2Corinthians4:5 Nokuti hatizviparidzi isu, asi Jesu Kristu saShe, uye isu savaranda venyu nokuda kwaJesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Nokuti Mwari akati, “Chiedza ngachipenye murima,” akaita kuti chiedza chake chipenye mumwoyo yedu kuti tiwane chiedza choruzivo rwokubwinya kwaMwari muchiso chaKristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Asi pfuma iyi tinayo mumidziyo yevhu kuratidza kuti simba iri rinopfuura zvose rinobva kuna Mwari kwete kwatiri. 
2Corinthians4:8 Tinomanikidzwa kumativi ose, asi hatipwanyiwi; tinokanganiswa, asi hatina kuora mwoyo;" 
2Corinthians4:9 tinotambudzwa, asi hatina kusiyiwa; takawisirwa pasi, asi hatina kuparadzwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Tinoramba tichitakura nguva dzose mumuviri wedu kufa kwaJesu, kuti upenyu hwaJesu huratidzwewo mumuviri wedu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Nokuti isu vapenyu tinoramba tichiiswa kurufu nokuda kwaJesu, kuti upenyu hwake huratidzwe mumuviri wedu unofa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Saka naizvozvo kufa kunobata matiri, asi upenyu hunobata mamuri." 
2Corinthians4:13 Kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: “Ndakatenda; naizvozvo ndikataura.” Nomweya mumwe chete iwoyo wokutenda takatendawo uye naizvozvo tinotaura," 
2Corinthians4:14 nokuti tinoziva kuti iye akamutsa Ishe wedu Jesu kubva kuvakafa achazotimutsawo pamwe chete naJesu uye agotisvitsa pamberi pake pamwe chete nemi. 
2Corinthians4:15 Izvi zvose zvinoitwa nokuda kwenyu, kuitira kuti nyasha dziri kusvikira vanhu vazhinji dziwanze kuvonga kuti Mwari akudzwe." 
2Corinthians4:16 Naizvozvo hatiori mwoyo. Kunyange zvazvo kunze tichiparara, asi mukati tiri kuvandudzwa zuva nezuva." 
2Corinthians4:17 Nokuti chiedza chedu nokutambudzika kwedu kwechinguva chiduku zviri kutiitira kubwinya kusingaperi, kukuru kupfuura zvose." 
2Corinthians4:18 Naizvozvo hatitarisi zvinoonekwa, asi zvisingaonekwi. Nokuti zvinoonekwa zvinopfuura, asi zvisingaonekwi zvinogara nokusingaperi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Zvino tinoziva kuti kana imba yedu yapanyika yatinogara mairi iyi yaparadzwa, tine imba inobva kuna Mwari, imba isina kuvakwa namaoko avanhu, inogara nokusingaperi kudenga." 
2Corinthians5:2 Pari zvino tinogomera, tichishuva kupfekedzwa muviri wedu wokudenga," 
2Corinthians5:3 nokuti kana tichinge tapfekedzwa, hatizowanikwi takashama." 
2Corinthians5:4 Nokuti kana tiri mutende ino, tinogomera uye tichiremerwa, nokuti hatishuvi kugara tisina kupfekedzwa muviri wedu wokudenga, kuti icho chinofa chimedzwe noupenyu." 
2Corinthians5:5 Zvino Mwari ndiye akatigadzirira chinhu ichi, uye akatipawo Mweya sorubatso, achisimbisa zvinouya." 
2Corinthians5:6 Naizvozvo tinotsunga mwoyo nguva dzose uye tinoziva kuti kana tichigara mumuviri, tiri kure naIshe." 
2Corinthians5:7 Tinorarama nokutenda, kwete nokuona." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ndinoti tinotsunga mwoyo, kuti, zviri nani kubva mumuviri uye ndive kumusha naShe." 
2Corinthians5:9 Saka chinangwa chedu ndechokuti timufadze, kunyange tiri mumuviri kana kunyange tisingagarimo." 
2Corinthians5:10 Nokuti tose tinofanira kumira pamberi pechigaro chokutonga chaKristu, kuti mumwe nomumwe apiwe zvakamufanira pazvinhu zvaakaita nomuviri wake, zvingava zvakanaka kana zvakaipa." 
2Corinthians5:11 Zvino, sezvo tichiziva kuti kutya Ishe chii, tinoedza kugombedzera vanhu. Zvatiri zviri pachena kuna Mwari, uye ndinovimbawo kuti zviri pachena kuhana dzenyu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Hatisi kuedza kuzvirumbidza kwamuri zvakare, asi tiri kukupai mukana wokuti muzvirumbidze nokuda kwedu, kuti mugone kupindura vaya vanozvirumbidza nokuda kwezvinhu zvinoonekwa panzvimbo yezvinhu zviri mumwoyo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Kana tichipenga, tinodaro nokuda kwaMwari; kana tiri vanhu kwavo, tinodaro nokuda kwenyu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Nokuti rudo rwaKristu runotimanikidza, nokuti tinoziva mumwe chete akafira vose, uye naizvozvo vose vakafa." 
2Corinthians5:15 Uye iye akafira vose, uye naizvozvo vose havachafaniri kuzviraramira pachavo asi iye akavafira uye akamutswazve kubva kuvakafa." 
2Corinthians5:16 Saka kubva zvino hatitongozivi munhu namaziviro enyika. Kunyange zvedu takaziva Kristu kare nenzira iyi, hatichamuzivi saizvozvo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Naizvozvo kana munhu ava muna Kristu, ava chisikwa chitsva; zvakare zvapfuura, zvinhu zvose zvava zvitsva!" 
2Corinthians5:18 Zvose izvi zvakabva kuna Mwari, akatiyananisa naye kubudikidza naKristu uye akatipa ushumiri hwokuyananisa:" 
2Corinthians5:19 ndiko kuti Mwari akanga achiyananisa nyika kwaari muna Kristu, asingaverengeri vanhu zvivi zvavo. Uye akatipa shoko rokuyananisa." 
2Corinthians5:20 Naizvozvo tiri vamiririri vaKristu, sokunge Mwari ari kusvitsa chikumbiro chake kubudikidza nesu. Tinokukumbirai nokuda kwaKristu tichiti: Yananiswai naMwari." 
2Corinthians5:21 Mwari akaita kuti uyo akanga asina chivi ave chivi nokuda kwedu, kuitira kuti maari tive kururama kwaMwari." 
2Corinthians6:1 Savashandi pamwe chete naMwari tinokukurudzirai kuti murege kugamuchira nyasha dzaMwari pasina. 
2Corinthians6:2 Nokuti iye anoti, “Ndakakunzwa panguva yenyasha dzangu, uye pazuva roruponeso ndakakubatsira.” Ndinokuudzai, zvino nguva yenyasha dzaMwari, zvino ndiyo nguva yoruponeso." 
2Corinthians6:3 Hatiisi chigumbuso munzira yomunhu, kuti ushumiri hwedu hurege kuzvidzwa." 
2Corinthians6:4 Asi savaranda vaMwari tinozvirumbidza pane zvakanaka munzira dzose: mukutsungirira kukuru; mumatambudziko; kuomerwa, uye nenhamo;" 
2Corinthians6:5 mukurohwa, kusungwa nomubope; mukushanda zvakaoma, mukusavata nokushayiwa zvokudya;" 
2Corinthians6:6 mukuchena, kunzwisisa, mwoyo murefu nengoni muMweya Mutsvene uye nomurudo rwechokwadi;" 
2Corinthians6:7 mushoko rechokwadi uye nomusimba raMwari; nenhumbi dzokurwa nadzo dzokururama kuruoko rworudyi nokuruboshwe," 
2Corinthians6:8 mukukudzwa nomukusakudzwa, muguhu rakaipa neguhu rakanaka; tiri vechokwadi, asi tichionekwa savanyengeri;" 
2Corinthians6:9 tinozivikanwa tichionekwa setisingazivikanwi; tinofa, asi tichiramba tichirarama, tinorohwa asi hatifi;" 
2Corinthians6:10 savanochema, asi tichigara tichifara; savarombo, asi tichipfumisa vazhinji; setisina chinhu, asi tinazvo zvose." 
2Corinthians6:11 Takataura kwamuri pachena, imi vaKorinde, uye takazarura mwoyo yedu kwamuri." 
2Corinthians6:12 Hatisi kukunyimai rudo rwedu, asi imi munotinyima rwenyu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Sokutsinhana kwakanaka, ndinotaura sokuvana vangu, zaruraiwo mwoyo yenyu." 
2Corinthians6:14 Musasungwa zvisina kufanira pajoko rimwe chete navasingatendi. Nokuti kururama kungava noukama hweiko nokusarurama? Kana kuti chiedza chingawadzana seiko nerima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Ko, Kristu anganzwanana seiko naBheriari? Ko, mutendi angava nomugove weiko neasingatendi?" 
2Corinthians6:16 Ko, temberi yaMwari ingatenderana seiko nezvifananidzo? Nokuti tiri temberi yaMwari mupenyu. Sezvakarehwa naMwari, achiti, “Ndichagara pakati pavo ndigofamba navo, uye ndichava Mwari wavo, ivo vagova vanhu vangu.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 “ ‘Saka budai mubve pakati pavo uye muzvitsaure,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe. ‘Musabata chinhu chine tsvina, ini ndigokugamuchirai.’ ”" 
2Corinthians6:18 “ ‘Ndichava baba venyu, uye imi muchava vanakomana vangu navanasikana vangu,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Wamasimba Ose.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Shamwari dzinodikanwa, sezvo tine zvipikirwa izvi, ngatizvinatsei kubva pazvinhu zvinosvibisa muviri nomweya, tichikwanisa utsvene pakutya Mwari." 
2Corinthians7:2 Tigadzirireiwo nzvimbo mumwoyo yenyu. Hatina munhu watakatadzira, hatina munhu watakanyengera, hatina munhu watakaitira zvisakarurama." 
2Corinthians7:3 Handitauri izvi kuti ndikupei mhosva; ndakambotaura kare kuti imi muri mumwoyo yedu zvokuti tingagona kurarama kana kufa pamwe chete nemi. 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndinovimba nemi zvikuru; ndinozvirumbidza zvikuru nokuda kwenyu. Ndinokurudzirwa zvikuru; mumatambudziko edu ose mufaro wangu hauna magumo. 
2Corinthians7:5 Nokuti patakasvika kuMasedhonia, muviri wedu uyu hauna kuwana zororo, asi takatambudzwa kumativi ose, zvaiti kukakavara kunze, kutya nechomukati." 
2Corinthians7:6 Asi Mwari anonyaradza vakaora mwoyo, akatinyaradza pakauya Tito," 
2Corinthians7:7 kwete nokuda kwokuuya kwake bedzi, asiwo nokuda kwokunyaradza kwamakamupa. Akatiudza nezvokundishuva kwenyu, kusuwa kwenyu kukuru, nokuva nehanya kwenyu pamusoro pangu, saka mufaro wangu wakava mukuru kwazvo." 
2Corinthians7:8 Kunyange zvazvo ndakakuchemedzai netsamba yangu, handizvidembi nokuda kwaizvozvo. Kunyange zvangu ndakazvidemba, ndinoona kuti tsamba yangu yakakurwadzai, asi kwenguva duku chete," 
2Corinthians7:9 asi zvino ndinofara, kwete nokuti makachema, asi nokuti kusuwa kwenyu kwakaita kuti mutendeuke. Nokuti makava nokusuwa kukuru sezvaidiwa naMwari uye nokudaro hamuna kukuvadzwa nesu nenzira ipi zvayo." 
2Corinthians7:10 Nokuti kusuwa kwouMwari kunouyisa kutendeuka uko kunotungamirira kuruponeso uye hakuuyisi kudemba, asi kusuwa kwenyika kunouyisa rufu." 
2Corinthians7:11 Tarirai zvaitwa mamuri nokusuwa uku kwouMwari: kushinga kukuru kwakadii, ishungu dzakadii kuti muzvichenese, kutsamwa kwakadii nokutya kwakadii nechishuvo chakadii, nehanya yakadii, nokuda kuona kururamisira kuchiitwa kwakadii. Pazvinhu zvose mazviratidza kuti hamuna mhosva panyaya iyi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Saka kunyange zvangu ndakakunyorerai, ndakanga ndisingazviiti nokuda kwaiye akaita zvakaipa, kana nokuda kwaiye akaitirwa zvakaipa, asi kuti pamberi paMwari mugone kuzvionera kuti makazvipira sei kwatiri." 
2Corinthians7:13 Naizvozvi zvose tinokurudzirwa. Pamusoro pokukurudzirwa kwedu, takanyanya kufadzwa zvikuru nokuona mufaro wakanga una Tito, nokuti mweya wake wakasimbiswa nemi mose." 
2Corinthians7:14 Nokuti ndakanga ndazvirumbidza kwaari pamusoro penyu, uye hamuna kundinyadzisa. Asi sezvo zvose zvatakataura pamusoro penyu zvaiva chokwadi, saka kuzvirumbidza kwedu kuna Tito pamusoro penyu kwakaratidza kuti ndokwechokwadiwo." 
2Corinthians7:15 Uye rudo rwake kwamuri rukuru kwazvo paanorangarira kuti mose makanga muchiteerera, pamakamugamuchira nokutya nokudedera." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndinofara kuti ndinogona kuvimba nemi zvizere. 
2Corinthians8:1 Uye zvino, hama, tinoda kuti muzive pamusoro penyasha dzakapiwa naMwari kukereke dzeMasedhonia." 
2Corinthians8:2 Pakati pokuedzwa kukuru, mufaro wavo mukuru nokushayiwa kwavo kukuru zvakaita kuti vape zvizhinji." 
2Corinthians8:3 Nokuti ndinopupura kuti vakapa napavaigona napo, uye kunyange kutopfuura pavaigona napo. Vakaita zvose izvi nokuda kwavo," 
2Corinthians8:4 vakakumbirisa kwazvo kwatiri kuti vawane mukana wokugoverana nesu muushumiri uhu kuvatsvene. 
2Corinthians8:5 Uye havana kuita sezvataifunga bedzi, asi kuti vakazvipa ivo pachavo kutanga kuna Ishe teverezvo vakapa kwatiri maererano nokuda kwaMwari." 
2Corinthians8:6 Saka takakumbira zvikuru Tito, kuti sezvaakanga atanga, apedzisewo basa iri renyasha kwamuri." 
2Corinthians8:7 Asi sezvamakapfuurisa pazvinhu zvose, pakutenda, pakutaura, pakuziva, napakushingaira kwose uye nomurudo rwenyu, onaiwo kuti mugonesese munyasha idzi dzokupa." 
2Corinthians8:8 Handizi kukurayirai, asi kuti ndinoda kuedza kutendeka kworudo rwenyu nokukuenzanisa nokushingaira kwavamwe." 
2Corinthians8:9 Nokuti munoziva nyasha dzaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu, kuti kunyange zvake akanga ari mupfumi, asi nokuda kwenyu akava murombo, kuitira kuti kubudikidza nourombo hwake imi mugopfumiswa." 
2Corinthians8:10 Uye herino zano rangu pane zvichakubatsirai pachinhu ichi: Gore rakapera makava vokutanga kwete pakupa chete asiwo pakuva nechishuvo chokuzviita. 
2Corinthians8:11 Zvino pedzisai basa, kuitira kuti shungu dzenyu dzokuda kuita izvi, dzienzaniswe nokuzvizadzisa kwenyu, maererano napamunogona napo." 
2Corinthians8:12 Nokuti kana chido chiripo, chipo chinogamuchirwa, maererano nezvine munhu, kwete maererano nezvaasina." 
2Corinthians8:13 Chishuvo chedu hachisi chokuti vamwe varerukirwe asi imi muchiremerwa, asi kuti pave nokuenzana." 
2Corinthians8:14 Panguva ino kuwana kwenyu kuchavawanisa zvavanoshayiwa, kuitirawo kuti kuwana kwavo kugokuwanisaiwo zvamunoshayiwa. Ipapo pachava nokuenzana," 
2Corinthians8:15 sezvazvakanyorwa zvichinzi: “Akaunganidza zvakawanda haana kuva nezvakawandisa, uye akaunganidza zvishoma haana kuva nezvishoma shoma.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Ndinovonga Mwari, akaisa mumwoyo maTito hanya seyandinayo kwamuri." 
2Corinthians8:17 Nokuti Tito haana kugamuchira chikumbiro chedu bedzi, asi kuti ari kuuyawo kwamuri nokushingaira kukuru uye nokuda kwake hake." 
2Corinthians8:18 Uye tiri kumutumira kwamuri pamwe chete nehama inorumbidzwa nekereke dzose paushumiri hwevhangeri. 
2Corinthians8:19 Hazvisizvo zvoga, akasarudzwawo nekereke kuti atiperekedze pakutakura chipo, chatiri kundopa kuti tikudze Ishe pachake uye kuti tiratidze shungu dzedu dzokuda kubatsira." 
2Corinthians8:20 Tinoda kuchenjerera kuti kurege kuva nomunhu angatipa mhosva pamusoro pamabatiro atichaita chipo ichi chikuru. 
2Corinthians8:21 Nokuti tiri kuedza kwazvo kuita zvakanaka, kwete pamberi paShe chete asiwo pamberi penyu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Pamusoro pezvo, tiri kutuma hama yedu pamwe chete navo uyo akaratidza kwatiri nenzira dzakawanda kuti anoshingaira, uye zvino kunyanya nokuda kwokuvimba kwake kukuru nemi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Kana ari Tito, ndiye shamwari yangu nomubati pamwe chete neni pakati penyu; kana dziri hama dzedu, ndivo vamiririri vekereke uye kukudzwa kwaKristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Naizvozvo ratidzai varume ava chiratidzo chorudo rwenyu uye chikonzero chokuzvirumbidza kwenyu, kuitira kuti kereke dzigogona kuzviona." 
2Corinthians9:1 Handifaniri kunge ndichikunyorerai pamusoro poushumiri kuvatsvene. 
2Corinthians9:2 Nokuti ndinoziva kuda kwamunako kuti mubatsire, uye ndakanga ndichizvirumbidza nokuda kwaizvozvo kuna veMasedhonia, ndichivaudza kuti kubvira gore rakapera, imi vari muAkaya makanga matogadzirira kupa; uye kushingaira kwenyu kwakamutsa vazhinji vavo kuti vapewo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Asi ndiri kutumira hama kuitira kuti kuzvirumbidza kwedu pamusoro penyu nokuda kwenyaya iyi kurege kuratidzwa pasina chinhu, asi kuti muve makagadzirira sezvandakataura kuti muite." 
2Corinthians9:4 Nokuti zvimwe kana vamwe veMasedhonia vakauya neni uye vakakuwanai musina kugadzirira, isu tisingarevi chimwe chinhu pamusoro penyu, tichanyadziswa nokuda kwokuti takanga tichivimba nemi." 
2Corinthians9:5 Saka ndakaona zvakafanira kuti ndikurudzire hama kuti dzikushanyirei pachine nguva uye kuti mugopedzisa kugadzirira nezvechipo chikuru chamakavimbisa. Ipapo chichava chipo chakagadzirirwa chakapiwa nomufaro, kwete sechipo chokumanikidzirwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Rangarirai chinhu ichi: Ani naani anodyara zvishoma achakohwawo zvishoma, uye ani naani anodyara zvizhinji achakohwawo zvizhinji." 
2Corinthians9:7 Munhu mumwe nomumwe ngaape sezvaakafunga mumwoyo make kuti ape, kwete kupa achitsutsumwa kana kuti achimanikidzwa, nokuti Mwari anoda munhu anopa nomufaro." 
2Corinthians9:8 Uye Mwari anogona kuita kuti nyasha dziwande kwamuri, kuitira kuti muzvinhu zvose, panguva dzose, muine zvose zvamunoda, muchakwanisa kuita mabasa ose akanaka." 
2Corinthians9:9 Sezvazvakanyorwa zvichinzi: “Akaparadzira zvipo zvake kuvarombo; kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi.” 
2Corinthians9:10 Zvino iye anopa mbeu kumudyari nechingwa chokudya achakupaiwo uye achakupaiwo mbeu zhinji yokudyara uye agokupaiwo kukohwa kukuru kwokururama kwenyu. 
2Corinthians9:11 Muchapfumiswa pane zvose kuti mugogona kupa panguva dzose, uye kubudikidza nesu kupa kwenyu kuchaita kuti Mwari avongwe." 
2Corinthians9:12 Ushumiri uhu hwamunoita, hahusi hwokungopa vanhu vaMwari zvavanoshayiwa bedzi, asi kuti huri kufashukirawo mukuvonga kuzhinji kuna Mwari." 
2Corinthians9:13 Nokuda kwoushumiri uhwo hwamakazviratidza nahwo, vanhu vacharumbidza Mwari nokuda kwokuteerera kwenyu kunoenderana nokupupura kwenyu vhangeri raKristu, uye nokuda kwokugoverana kwenyu navo zvizhinji uye navamwe vose." 
2Corinthians9:14 Uye muminyengetero yavo pamusoro penyu mwoyo yavo ichakushuvai, nokuda kwenyasha huru kwazvo dzamakapiwa naMwari." 
2Corinthians9:15 Mwari ngaavongwe nokuda kwechipo chake chisingagoni kurondedzerwa! 
2Corinthians10:1 Nounyoro nokuzvidzora kwaKristu, ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, ini Pauro, “ndinotya” zvikuru kana ndichitarisana nemi chiso nechiso asi, “handityi” kana ndisipo!" 
2Corinthians10:2 Ndinokukumbirisai zvikuru kuti kana ndichinge ndasvika kwamuri ndirege kuzova nokushinga kwandinofanira kuva nako kuna vanhu avo vanofunga kuti tinorarama namararamiro enyika ino. 
2Corinthians10:3 Nokuti kunyange dai tichigara zvedu munyika, hatirwi hondo sezvinoita nyika ino." 
2Corinthians10:4 Nhumbi dzatinorwa nadzo hadzizi nhumbi dzenyika ino. Asi dzine simba raMwari rokuputsa nhare. 
2Corinthians10:5 Tinoputsa kukakavara nokunyengera kwose kunozvikudza kuchipikisa kuziva Mwari, uye tinotapa mifungo yose kuti iteerere Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Uye tichange takagadzirira kuranga kuita kwose kwokusateerera, kana kuteerera kwenyu kuchinge kwazadziswa." 
2Corinthians10:7 Imi muri kungoonera zvinhu pamusoro bedzi. Kana munhu achivimba kuti iye ndowaKristu, ngaarangarirewo zvakare kuti isu tiri vaKristu sezvaakaitawo iye." 
2Corinthians10:8 Nokuti kunyange dai ndichizvirumbidza pachena pamusoro pesimba ratakapiwa naIshe rokukuvakai kwete rokukuputsirai pasi, handinganyadziswi nazvo." 
2Corinthians10:9 Handidi kuedza kuita sendinokutyisidzirai netsamba dzangu. 
2Corinthians10:10 Nokuti vamwe vanoti, “Tsamba dzake dzina mashoko makukutu uye dzine chisimba, asi iye pachake haatyisi uye kutaura kwake hakuna maturo.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Vanhu vakadai vanofanira kuziva kuti zvatiri mumatsamba edu kana tisipo, ndizvo zvatichava pakuita kwedu kana tavapo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Hatidi kuedza kuzvienzanisa kana kuzvifananidza navamwe vanozvirumbidza. Pavanozviera vachizvienzanisa naivo pachavo, havana kuchenjera." 
2Corinthians10:13 Zvisinei, isu hatingazvirumbidzi kupfuura mwero wakafanira, asi tinogumisa mwero wokuzvirumbidza kwedu pabasa ratakapiwa naMwari, basa rinosvika kunyange kwamuri." 
2Corinthians10:14 Hatizi kupfurikidza mwero pakuzvirumbidza kwedu, sezvazvaizova kana dai takanga tisina kuuya kwamuri, nokuti takasvika kwamuri nevhangeri raKristu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Uyezve hatipfuuri miganhu yedu nokuzvirumbidza pamusoro pebasa rakaitwa navamwe. Tariro yedu ndeyokuti, pamunoramba muchikura pakutenda kwenyu, mashandiro edu pakati penyu achakurawo kwazvo," 
2Corinthians10:16 kuitira kuti tigoparidza vhangeri kumatunhu ari mberi kwenyu. Nokuti hatidi kuzvirumbidza nebasa rakaitwa kare munzvimbo dzavamwe vanhu. 
2Corinthians10:17 Asi, “Anozvirumbidza ngaazvirumbidze muna She.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Nokuti haazi uyo anozvirumbidza achanzi akatendeka, asi uyo anorumbidzwa naShe." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ndinovimba kuti muchava nomwoyo murefu zvishoma nokuda kwoupenzi hwangu; asi mava kutozviita kare. 
2Corinthians11:2 Ndine godo pamusoro penyu negodo raMwari. Ndakakuitai vakavimbika kumurume mumwe chete, kuna Kristu, kuitira kuti ndigozogona kukusvitsai kwaari semhandara yakachena." 
2Corinthians11:3 Asi ndinotya kuti sokunyengerwa kwakaita Evha nenyoka nemano ayo, ndangariro dzenyu dzingangotsauswa kubva pakururama nokuchena kwomwoyo, pakuzvipira kuna Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Nokuti kana mumwe akauya kwamuri achiparidza mumwe Jesu kunze kwaJesu watakaparidza, kana kuti mukagamuchira mumwe mweya wakasiyana nouyo wamakagamuchira, kana rimwe vhangeri rakasiyana neramakagamuchira, munogona kuzvigamuchira zviri nyore kwazvo." 
2Corinthians11:5 Asi handifungi kuti ndiri muduku napaduku pose ku “vapostori vanopfuura vamwe vose.” 
2Corinthians11:6 Ndingava zvangu ndisinganatsi pakutaura, asi ndino ruzivo. Takanyatsojekesa izvi kwamuri nenzira dzose." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ndakatadza here zvandakazvininipisa kuitira kuti imi mugokudzwa nokuparidzwa kwevhangeri raMwari kwamuri pachena pasina mutengo? 
2Corinthians11:8 Ndakabira dzimwe kereke pandakagamuchira rubatsiro kubva kwavari kuitira kuti ndigone kukushumirai. 
2Corinthians11:9 Uye pandakanga ndiri pakati penyu ndichishayiwa chimwe chinhu, handina kuva mutoro kuna ani zvake, nokuti hama dzakabva kuMasedhonia dzakandipa zvandaishayiwa. Handina kuda kuva mutoro nenzira ipi zvayo pakati penyu, uye ndicharamba ndichidaro." 
2Corinthians11:10 Zvirokwazvo sezvo chokwadi chaKristu chiri mandiri, hakuna munhu mudunhu reAkaya achandidzivisa pakuzvirumbidza uku." 
2Corinthians11:11 Seiko? Nokuti handikudei here? Mwari anoziva kuti ndinokudai! 
2Corinthians11:12 Uye ndicharamba ndichiita zvandiri kuita kuti ndishayise nzira kuna avo vanotsvaka mukana wokuti vaenzaniswe nesu pazvinhu zvavanozvirumbidza nazvo. 
2Corinthians11:13 Nokuti vanhu vakadai ndivo vapostori venhema, varume vanonyengera, vanozvishandura vachizviita vapostori vaKristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Uye naizvozvo hazvishamisi, nokuti Satani pachake anozvishandura achizviita mutumwa wechiedza." 
2Corinthians11:15 Naizvozvowo hazvishamisi, kana varanda vake vachizvishandura vachizviita varanda vokururama. Magumo avo achava sezvakafanira maitiro avo." 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinopamhidza kuti: Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anonditi ndiri benzi. Asi kana muchidaro, naizvozvo ndigamuchirei sebenzi, kuitira kuti ndigozvirumbidzawo zvishoma." 
2Corinthians11:17 Mukuzvirumbidza pachangu, handizi kutaura sezvinobva kuna She, asi sebenzi." 
2Corinthians11:18 Sezvo vazhinji vachizvirumbidza nenzira inoitwa nenyika, neniwo ndichazvirumbidza." 
2Corinthians11:19 Nokuti makava nomwoyo murefu nomufaro kumapenzi sezvo makachenjera! 
2Corinthians11:20 Nokuti munoitira mwoyo murefu kunyange munhu wose anokuitai varanda kana anokubirai kana anokutapai kana anokuzvidzai kana anokurovai kumeso. 
2Corinthians11:21 Ndichizvishora ndinobvuma kuti takanga tisina simba rokuti tiite izvozvo. Zvinotsunga vamwe vose kuti vazvirumbidze pamusoro pazvo, ndinotaura sebenzi, ini ndinotsungawo kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pazvo." 
2Corinthians11:22 Ivo vaHebheru here? Neniwo ndiri. Ivo vaIsraeri here? Neniwo ndiri. Ivo zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahama here? Neniwo ndiri. 
2Corinthians11:23 Ivo varanda vaKristu here? Ndava kupenga, kana ndichitaura zvakadai. Ini ndiri muranda wake zvikuru. Ndakashanda zvokuvapfuura, ndakaiswa mutorongo kakawanda kuvapfuura, ndakarohwa zvikuru kwazvo, uye ndakatarisana norufu kazhinji." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kanosvika kashanu ndakarohwa navaJudha shamhu makumi matatu nepfumbamwe. 
2Corinthians11:25 Katatu ndakarohwa netsvimbo, kamwe chete ndakatakwa namabwe, katatu ndakaita tsaona nechikepe, ndakapedza usiku humwe namasikati ndiri pagungwa," 
2Corinthians11:26 ndakanga ndiri parwendo nguva zhinji. Ndakava panjodzi dzenzizi, panjodzi dzamakororo, panjodzi dzovorudzi rwokwangu, panjodzi dzavaHedheni, panjodzi muguta, napanjodzi murenje, panjodzi mugungwa, napanjodzi pakati pehama dzenhema." 
2Corinthians11:27 Ndakabata basa nokutambura uye nguva zhinji ndichishayiwa hope; ndinoziva nzara nenyota uye kushayiwa zvokudya nguva zhinji; chando nokushayiwa chokupfeka. 
2Corinthians11:28 Kunze kwaizvozvi zvose, ndinoremedzwa zuva rimwe nerimwe nokurangarira kereke dzose." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ndianiko anoshayiwa simba uye ndikasanzwa kushayiwa simba? Ndianiko anotungamirirwa muchivi uye ndikasarwadziwa mukati mangu? 
2Corinthians11:30 Kana ndichifanira kuzvirumbidza, ndichazvirumbidza pamusoro pezvinhu zvinoratidza utera hwangu." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mwari naBaba vaIshe Jesu, uyo anofanira kurumbidzwa nokusingaperi, anoziva kuti handirevi nhema." 
2Corinthians11:32 MuDhamasiko mubati pasi pamambo Aretasi akaita kuti guta ravaDhamasiko ririndwe achida kuti andisunge. 
2Corinthians11:33 Asi ndakaburutswa ndiri mudengu napahwindo parusvingo uye ndikapunyuka pamaoko ake. 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndinofanira kuramba ndichizvirumbidza. Kunyange zvisina zvazvinobatsira, ndichapfuurira mberi ndigotaura pamusoro pezviratidzo nezvakazarurwa zvaShe." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndinoziva mumwe munhu ari muna Kristu, uyo makore gumi namana akapfuura akakwidzwa kudenga rechitatu. Kana zvakaitwa mumuviri kana kunze kwomuviri handizivi, Mwari ndiye anoziva." 
2Corinthians12:3 Uye ndinoziva kuti munhu uyu, kana akanga ari mumuviri kana kuti akanga asiri mumuviri handizivi, asi Mwari ndiye anoziva," 
2Corinthians12:4 akakwidzwa kuparadhiso. Akanzwa zvinhu, zvinhu zvisingatsananguriki namashoko, zvinhu zvisingabvumirwi kuti munhu ataure." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ndichazvirumbidza pamusoro pomunhu akadai, asi handingazvirumbidzi pachangu, kunze kwoutera hwangu." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kunyange dai ndikasarudza kuzvirumbidza, handingavi benzi nokuti ndinenge ndichitaura chokwadi. Asi ndinorega zvangu, kuitira kuti pashayikwe munhu angafunga kuti ndiri mukuru kupfuura zvandinoita kana kutaura." 
2Corinthians12:7 Kuti ndirege kunyanya kuzvikudza nokuda kwoukuru kwazvo hwezvandakazarurirwa, ndakapiwa munzwa munyama yangu, mutumwa waSatani, kuti anditambudze." 
2Corinthians12:8 Katatu ndakakumbira kuna Ishe kuti aubvise pandiri. 
2Corinthians12:9 Asi iye akati kwandiri, “Nyasha dzangu dzakakukwanira, nokuti simba rangu rinozadziswa muutera.” Naizvozvo ndichanyanya kuzvirumbidza pamusoro poutera hwangu, kuitira kuti simba raKristu rigova pamusoro pangu." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ndokusaka, nokuda kwaKristu ndichifara muutera, mukutukwa, mumatambudziko, nomunhamo, nomukuomerwa. Nokuti kana ndine utera, ipapo ndipo pandine simba." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndakazviita benzi, asi imi ndimi makandisundira ikoko. Ndaifanira kunge ndichirumbidzwa nemi, nokuti handisi muduku duku pakati pa“vapostori vanopfuura vamwe vose,” kunyange zvangu ndisiri chinhu." 
2Corinthians12:12 Zvinhu zvinoratidza upostori, zviratidzo, zvishamiso namabasa esimba, zvakaitwa pakati penyu nokutsungirira kukuru." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ko, imi makanga muri vaduku sei kune dzimwe kereke, kunze kwokuti ndakanga ndisiri mutoro pakati penyu? Ndiregererei pakutadza uku!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Zvino ndagadzirira kukushanyirai kechitatu, uye handichazovi mutoro kwamuri, nokuti zvandinoda kwamuri haisi pfuma yenyu asi imi. Pamusoro pezvo vana havafaniri kuchengetera vabereki, asi vabereki ndivo vanofanira kuchengetera vana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Saka naizvozvo ndichafara zvikuru kuti ndipedze zvose zvandinazvo nokuzvipedzawo ini pachangu nokuda kwenyu. Kana ndichikudai zvakanyanya, mungandida zvishoma here?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ngazvive saizvozvo, nokuti ndakanga ndisiri mutoro pakati penyu. Asi zvandakanga ndine njere, ndakakubatai namano!" 
2Corinthians12:17 Ndakakutorerai chinhu here kubudikidza navarume vandakatuma kwamuri? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndakurudzira Tito kuti auye kwamuri uye ndatumira hama yedu pamwe chete naye. Tito haana kukutorerai chinhu, akakutorerai here? Hatina kufamba nomweya mumwe chete here uye tikatevera nzira imwe chete?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Makanga muchizvifunga here nguva yose iyi kuti takanga tichizvidavirira? Takanga tichitaura pamberi paMwari savaya vari muna Kristu; uye zvose, zvatinoita, vadikani, tinozviita kuti musimbiswe." 
2Corinthians12:20 Nokuti ndinotya kuti pandichauya kwamuri handingakuwanei muri zvandinoda kuti muve, uye mungandiwana ndisiri zvamunonditarisira kuti ndive. Ndinotya kuti kana ndauya kwamuri zvimwe ndingawana pakati penyu paine gakava, godo, kutsamwa kukuru, kupesana, kucherana, makuhwa, manyawi nenyonganiso." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndinotya kuti kanaGoudy ndauya kwamuri zvakare, Mwari wangu achandininipisa pamberi penyu, uye ndicharwadziwa nokuda kwavazhinji vakaita zvivi kare uye vasina kutendeuka kubva pakusachena kwavo, chivi choupombwe noutera hwavakaita." 
2Corinthians13:1 Uku ndiko kuchava kushanya kwangu kwechitatu kwamuri. Nyaya yose inofanira kusimbiswa nezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu. 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndakakupai yambiro kare pandakanga ndinemi kechipiri. Zvino ndava kuzvipamhazve ndisipo: Pakuuya kwangu handizorege vaya vakatadza pakutanga kana vamwe vose," 
2Corinthians13:3 sezvo muchitsvaka chiratidzo chokuti Kristu ndiye anotaura kubudikidza neni. Haana utera pakubata kwake pakati penyu, asi ane simba kwazvo pakati penyu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Nokuti kuti muve nechokwadi, akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa muutera, asi anorarama nesimba raMwari. Zvimwe chetezvo nesuwo tinorarama muutera maari, asi nesimba raMwari tiri vapenyu pamwe chete naye kuti tikushumirei." 
2Corinthians13:5 Zviedzei imi pachenyu muone kana muri pakutenda; zviedzei pachenyu. Munoziva here kuti Jesu ari mukati menyu, kunze kwokutoti makakundikana?" 
2Corinthians13:6 Uye ndinovimba kuti muchaona kuti hatina kukundikana. 
2Corinthians13:7 Zvino tinonyengetera kuna Mwari kuti murege kuita chinhu chimwe chakaipa. Kwete kuti vanhu vaone kuti isu takakunda, asi kuti imi muite zvakarurama kunyange zvedu isu tichiita setakakundikana." 
2Corinthians13:8 Nokuti hatigoni kuita chinhu chinopikisana nechokwadi, asi chinobatsira chokwadi chete." 
2Corinthians13:9 Nokuti tinofara kana isu tichishayiwa simba asi imi muine simba; uye munyengetero wedu ndowokuti imi mukwaniswe. 
2Corinthians13:10 Ndokusaka ndichinyora zvinhu izvi ndisipo, kuti kana ndauya ndirege kuzoita nehasha pakushandisa simba rangu, simba randakapiwa naIshe kuti ndikuvakei naro, kwete kukuparadzai." 
2Corinthians13:11 Pakupedzisira, hama, chisarai. Shingairai kuti mukwaniswe, teererai kuchikumbiro changu, ivai nomufungo mumwe, garai murugare. Uye Mwari worudo norugare achava nemi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Kwazisanai nokutsvodana kutsvene. 
2Corinthians13:13 Vatsvene vose vanokukwazisai. 
2Corinthians13:14 Nyasha dzaIshe Jesu Kristu, norudo rwaMwari, nokuwadzana kwoMweya Mutsvene ngazvive nemi mose." 
Galatians1:1 Pauro mupostori, asina kutumwa zvichibva kuvanhu kana navanhu, asi naJesu Kristu uye naMwari Baba, iye akamumutsa kubva kuvakafa," 
Galatians1:2 nehama dzose dzineni, Kukereke dziri muGaratia:" 
Galatians1:3 Nyasha norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba vedu nokuna Ishe Jesu Kristu ngazvive nemi," 
Galatians1:4 akazvipa nokuda kwezvivi zvedu kuti atisunungure kubva munyika yakaipa yazvino, maererano nokuda kwaMwari Baba vedu," 
Galatians1:5 ngaave nokubwinya nokusingaperi. Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Ndinoshamiswa kuti munokurumidza kusiya uyo akakudanai nenyasha dzaKristu uye muchitsaukira kune rimwe vhangeri," 
Galatians1:7 risati riri vhangeri chairo kana napaduku. Zviri pachena kuti vamwe vanhu vanoda kukukanganisai vachiedza kushandura vhangeri raKristu. 
Galatians1:8 Asi kunyange isu kana mutumwa anobva kudenga akaparidza vhangeri risati riri ratakakuparidzirai, ngaatukwe nokusingaperi!" 
Galatians1:9 Sezvatakamboreva, tinodarozve zvino tichiti: Kana kuno munhu upi zvake ari kuparidza kwamuri vhangeri kunze kweramakagamuchira, ngaave akatukwa nokusingaperi!" 
Galatians1:10 Ko, ndiri kuedza kuzviratidza kuvanhu here kana kuti kuna Mwari? Kana kuti ndiri kuedza kufadza vanhu here? Dai ndakanga ndichiri kuedza kufadza vanhu, ndingadai ndisiri muranda waKristu." 
Galatians1:11 Ndinoda kuti muzive, hama, kuti vhangeri randakaparidza harisi chimwe chinhu chakangomuka mumunhu." 
Galatians1:12 Handina kurigamuchira kubva kumunhu upi zvake uye handina kuridzidziswa, asi ndakarigamuchira nokuzarurirwa kunobva kuna Jesu Kristu." 
Galatians1:13 Nokuti makanzwa zvamararamiro angu akare muchiJudha, kuti ndakatambudza zvikuru sei kereke yaMwari uye ndikaedza kuiparadza." 
Galatians1:14 Ndakanga ndichishingaira kwazvo muchiJudha ndichipfuura vaJudha vazhinji vezera rangu uye ndakanga ndichishingairira tsika dzamadzibaba angu. 
Galatians1:15 Asi Mwari akanditsaura kubva pakuzvarwa kwangu uye akandidana nenyasha dzake, uye akafadzwa nazvo," 
Galatians1:16 kuti aratidze Mwanakomana wake mandiri kuti ndimuparidze pakati pavaHedheni, handina kutongobvunza munhu," 
Galatians1:17 uye handina kuenda kuJerusarema kuti ndinoona vaya vakanga vari vapostori vakanditangira, asi nokukurumidza ndakaenda kuArabhia uye ndikazodzokazve kuDhamasiko pashure." 
Galatians1:18 Ipapo shure kwamakore matatu, ndakakwira kuJerusarema kuti ndinozivana naPetro uye ndikandogara naye kwamazuva gumi namashanu." 
Galatians1:19 Handina kuona vamwe vavapostori, kunze kwaJakobho munun'una waShe." 
Galatians1:20 Ndinotaura chokwadi pamberi paMwari kuti zvandinokunyorerai izvi hadzisi nhema. 
Galatians1:21 Pashure ndakaenda kuSiria nokuSirisia. 
Galatians1:22 Ndakanga ndisingazikanwi pachiso kukereke dzeJudhea dziri muna Kristu. 
Galatians1:23 Vakangonzwa zvakaziviswa bedzi zvokuti, “Munhu uya aititambudza kare ava kuparidza zvino kutenda kuya kwaakanga achiedza kuparadza.”" 
Galatians1:24 Uye vakarumbidza Mwari nokuda kwangu. 
Galatians2:1 Mushure mamakore gumi namana ndakakwirazve kuJerusarema, panguva iyi ndakanga ndina Bhanabhasi. Ndakaendawo naTito." 
Galatians2:2 Ndakaenda nokuda kwokuzarurirwa uye ndikarondedzera pamberi pavo vhangeri randakaparidza pakati pavaHedheni. Asi ndakaita izvi kuna avo vakanga vari vatungamiri vari voga, nokuti ndaitya kuti ndakanga ndichimhanya kana kuti ndatomhanya nhangemutange yangu pasina." 
Galatians2:3 Asi kunyange naTito, akanga aneni, haana kumanikidzwa kuti adzingiswe, kunyange zvazvo akanga ari muGiriki." 
Galatians2:4 Nyaya iyi yakamutswa nokuda kwedzimwe hama dzenhema dzakanga dzapinda munzvimbo dzedu kuti vazosora rusununguko rwatinarwo muna Kristu Jesu uye kuti vagotiita nhapwa. 
Galatians2:5 Hatina kuvapa mukana napaduku, kuitira kuti chokwadi chevhangeri chigare mamuri." 
Galatians2:6 Kana vari vaya vanonzi vanoremekedzwa, hazvinei kuti vakanga vakadii kwandiri hazvina mutsauko; Mwari haatongi nezvinoonekwa zvokunze, varume ivavo havana chavakawedzera pashoko rangu." 
Galatians2:7 Zvisinei hazvo, vakaona kuti ndakapiwa basa rokuparidza vhangeri kuvaHedheni, sezvakaitwawo Petro kuvaJudha." 
Galatians2:8 Nokuti Mwari, iye akanga achishanda muushumiri hwaPetro somupostori kuvaJudha, akanga achishandawo muushumiri hwangu somupostori kuvaHedheni." 
Galatians2:9 Jakobho, Petro, naJohani, ivo vainzi mbiru, vakandimbunda ini naBhanabhasi noruoko rworudyi rwokuwadzana pavakaona nyasha dzandakanga ndapiwa. Vakabvuma kuti tinofanira kuenda kuvaHedheni, uye ivo vaende kuvaJudha." 
Galatians2:10 Zvavakangokumbira zvakanga zviri zvokuti isu tirambe tichirangarira varombo, chinova ndicho chinhu chandaidisa kuita." 
Galatians2:11 Petro akati asvika kuAndioki, ndakamutsoropodza pachena, nokuti akanga akanganisa zviri pachena." 
Galatians2:12 Vamwe varume vakabva kuna Jakobho vasati vasvika, akanga achimbodya navaHedheni. Asi pavakasvika, akatanga kusuduruka uye akazvitsaura kubva kuvaHedheni nokuti akanga achitya vaya vakanga vari veboka rokudzingiswa." 
Galatians2:13 Vamwe vaJudha vakabatana naye pakunyengera kwake, zvokuti nokunyengera kwavo, naBhanabhasi akanga atsauswawo." 
Galatians2:14 Ndakati ndaona kuti vakanga vasingafambi muchokwadi chevhangeri, ndakati kuna Petro pamberi pavo vose, “Iwe uri muJudha, asi unoda kurarama somuHedheni, kwete somuJudha. Seiko, zvino, uchimanikidza vaHedheni kuti vatevere tsika dzechiJudha?" 
Galatians2:15 “Isu tiri vaJudha pakuzvarwa uye hatisi vatadzi ve‘chiHedheni’ 
Galatians2:16 uye tinoziva kuti munhu haashayirwi mhosva nokuchengeta murayiro, asi nokutenda muna Jesu Kristu. Saka nesuwo, takaisa kutenda kwedu muna Kristu Jesu kuti tishayirwe mhosva nokutenda muna Kristu, uye kwete nokuchengeta murayiro, nokuti hakuna munhu achashayirwa mhosva nokuchengeta murayiro." 
Galatians2:17 “Kana tichitsvaka kuti tishayirwe mhosva muna Kristu, zvikazoonekwa kuti isu pachedu tiri vatadzi, zvinoreva here kuti Kristu anosimudzira chivi? Kwete napaduku!" 
Galatians2:18 Kana ndikavakazve chandakamboputsa, ndinoratidza kuti ndiri mudariki womurayiro." 
Galatians2:19 Nokuti kubudikidza nomurayiro ndakafa kumurayiro kuitira kuti ndiraramire Mwari. 
Galatians2:20 Ndakarovererwa pamwe chete naKristu uye handichisiri ini ndinorarama, asi Kristu anorarama mandiri. Kurarama kwandinako munyama, ndinorarama nokutenda muMwanakomana waMwari, akandida uye akazvipa nokuda kwangu." 
Galatians2:21 Handikonesi nyasha dzaMwari, nokuti kana kururama kuchigona kuwanikwa nomurayiro, Kristu akafira pasina!”" 
Galatians3:1 Imi vaGaratia vokusafunga! Ndianiko akakuroyai? Jesu akaratidzwa pachena akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa pamberi penyu chaipo. 
Galatians3:2 Ndinoda kuziva chinhu chimwe chete kubva kwamuri kuti: Makagamuchira Mweya nokuda kwokuchengeta murayiro here, kana nokuda kwokutenda zvamakanzwa?" 
Galatians3:3 Muri vokusafunga zvakadai seiko? Mushure mokunge mambotanga muMweya, zvino moda kuedza kupedzisa chinangwa chenyu nesimba ravanhu here?" 
Galatians3:4 Makatambudzika zvakadai pasina here, dai zvakanga zviri pasina?" 
Galatians3:5 Ko, Mwari anokupai Mweya wake uye achiita zvishamiso pakati penyu nokuda kwokuti munochengeta murayiro here, kana kuti nokuda kwokutenda zvamakanzwa?" 
Galatians3:6 Fungai Abhurahama kuti, “Akatenda Mwari, uye zvikanzi kwaari ndiko kururama.”" 
Galatians3:7 Nzwisisai zvino, kuti avo vanotenda ndivo vana vaAbhurahama." 
Galatians3:8 Rugwaro rwakaona zviri mberi kuti Mwari aizoruramisa vaHedheni nokutenda, uye rukazivisa zvevhangeri kare kuna Abhurahama kuti, “Ndudzi dzose dzicharopafadzwa kubudikidza newe.”" 
Galatians3:9 Saka avo vanokutenda ndivo vakaropafadzwa pamwe chete naAbhurahama, murume wokutenda." 
Galatians3:10 Vose vanovimba nokuchengeta murayiro vakatukwa, nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: “Vakatukwa vose vasingarambiri pakuita zvinhu zvose zvakanyorwa muBhuku roMurayiro.”" 
Galatians3:11 Zviri pachena kuti hapana munhu anoshayirwa mhosva nomurayiro pamberi paMwari, nokuti, “Vakarurama vachararama nokutenda.”" 
Galatians3:12 Murayiro hauna kuvakwa pakutenda; asi hazvo, “Munhu anoita zvinhu izvi achararama nazvo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristu akatidzikinura kubva pakutukwa kwomurayiro paakava chakatukwa iye nokuda kwedu, nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: “Vakatukwa vose vanoturikwa pamuti.”" 
Galatians3:14 Akatidzikinura kuitira kuti kuropafadzwa kwakapiwa Abhurahama kugosvika kuvaHedheni kubudikidza naKristu Jesu, kuitira kuti nokutenda tigogamuchira chipikirwa choMweya." 
Galatians3:15 Hama dzangu, regai ndipe muenzaniso woupenyu hwamazuva ose. Sezvo pasina munhu angakonesa kana kuwedzera kusungano yakaitwa navanhu kana yakatosimbiswa, zvakadarowo pana izvozvi." 
Galatians3:16 Zvipikirwa zvakataurwa kuna Abhurahama uye nokumwana wake. Rugwaro harutauri ruchiti “uye kuvana,” zvichireva vanhu vazhinji, asi “uye kumwana wako,” kureva munhu mumwe, anova ndiye Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Zvandinoreva ndezvizvi: Murayiro, wakaziviswa mushure mamakore mazana mana ana makumi matatu, haungakonesi sungano yakasimbiswa kare naMwari uye nokudaro uchibvisa chipikirwa." 
Galatians3:18 Nokuti kana nhaka ichiwanikwa nokuda kwomurayiro, naizvozvo haichawanikwi nokuda kwechipikirwa; asi Mwari nenyasha dzake akaipa kuna Abhurahama kubudikidza nechipikirwa." 
Galatians3:19 Zvino, chinangwa chomurayiro chakanga chiri cheiko? Wakawedzerwa nokuda kwokudarika kusvikira Mwana akanga achirehwa nechivimbiso asvika. Murayiro wakashanda kubudikidza navatumwa uye nomurevereri." 
Galatians3:20 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, murevereri, haamiririri munhu mumwe chete; asi Mwari ndomumwe." 
Galatians3:21 Naizvozvo, murayiro unopikisana nechipikirwa chaMwari here? Kwete napaduku! Nokuti kana murayiro wakapiwa wakanga uchigona kupa upenyu, ipapo zvirokwazvo kururama kwaizouyawo nomurayiro." 
Galatians3:22 Asi Rugwaro runotaura kuti nyika yose yakapfigirwa nechivi, kuitira kuti chiya chakavimbiswa, chiri chakapiwa kubudikidza nokutenda kuna Jesu Kristu, chipiwe kuna avo vanotenda." 
Galatians3:23 Kutenda uku kusati kwasvika, takanga tiri vasungwa vomurayiro, takapfigirwa kusvikira kutenda kuchizoratidzwa." 
Galatians3:24 Saka murayiro wakaiswa kuti utitungamirire kuna Kristu kuitira kuti tigoshayirwa mhosva nokutenda. 
Galatians3:25 Zvino kutenda zvakwasvika, hatichisiri pasi pomurayiro." 
Galatians3:26 Imi mose muri vanakomana vaMwari kubudikidza nokutenda muna Kristu Jesu," 
Galatians3:27 nokuti imi mose makabhabhatidzwa muna Kristu makazvifukidza naKristu. 
Galatians3:28 Hakuchina muJudha kana muGiriki, mutapwa kana akasununguka, murume kana mukadzi, nokuti imi mose muri vamwe muna Kristu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Kana muri vaKristu, ipapo muri vana vaAbhurahama, uye vadyi venhaka maererano nechipikirwa." 
Galatians4:1 Zvandinoreva ndezvokuti kana mudyi wenhaka achiri mwana, haana kusiyana nenhapwa, kunyange hazvo ari muridzi wezvinhu zvose." 
Galatians4:2 Ari pasi pavatariri navachengeti kusvikira panguva yakatarwa nababa vake. 
Galatians4:3 Saizvozvowo, patakanga tiri vana, takanga tiri muutapwa pasi pezvokuvamba zvenyika." 
Galatians4:4 Asi nguva yakati yazara kwazvo, Mwari akatuma Mwanakomana wake, akaberekwa nomukadzi, akaberekwa pasi pomurayiro," 
Galatians4:5 kuti adzikinure avo vari pasi pomurayiro, kuti tigamuchire kodzero yakazara yavanakomana." 
Galatians4:6 Nokuda kwokuti muri vanakomana, Mwari akatuma Mweya woMwanakomana wake mumwoyo yedu, Mweya anodana achiti, “Abha, Baba.”" 
Galatians4:7 Saka hauchisiri nhapwa, asi mwanakomana; uye sezvo uri mwanakomana, Mwari akakuitawo mudyi wenhaka." 
Galatians4:8 Kare, pamakanga musingazivi Mwari, makanga muri nhapwa kuna avo vakanga vasiri vamwari chaivo." 
Galatians4:9 Asi zvino zvamava kuziva Mwari, kana kuti munozivikanwa naMwari, seiko mava kudzokera kune zvokuvamba zvisina simba uye zvinonzwisa urombo? Munodazve kuitwa nhapwa nazvo here?" 
Galatians4:10 Muri kucherechedza mazuva akasarudzika uye mwedzi nemwaka namakore! 
Galatians4:11 Ndinotya nokuda kwenyu, zvokuti ndinenge ndakatambisa simba rangu pamusoro penyu." 
Galatians4:12 Ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, hama, kuti muve seni, nokuti ini ndakaita semi. Hamuna kunditadzira." 
Galatians4:13 Sezvamunoziva imi, kuti nokuda kwourwere ndakatanga kuparidza vhangeri kwamuri." 
Galatians4:14 Kunyange zvazvo kurwara kwangu kwaiva muedzo kwamuri, hamuna kundisema kana kundimhura. Asi, makandigamuchira sokunge ndaiva mutumwa waMwari, sokunge ndakanga ndiri Jesu Kristu chaiye." 
Galatians4:15 Ko, chii chakaitika kumufaro wenyu wose uya? Ndinogona kupupura kuti dai makanga maita izvozvo, maidai makatumbura meso enyu makaapa kwandiri." 
Galatians4:16 Zvino ndava muvengi wenyu zvandakuudzai chokwadi here? 
Galatians4:17 Vanhu ivavo vanoshingaira kuti vakubatei, asi pazvinhu zvisina kunaka. Zvavanoda ndezvokukutsausai kubva kwatiri, kuitira kuti imi mugovashingairira." 
Galatians4:18 Zvakanaka kwazvo kushingaira, kana chinangwa chacho chakanaka, uye kuti muite izvozvo nguva dzose kwete kana ndinemi bedzi." 
Galatians4:19 Vana vangu vanodikanwa, vandinotamburirazve pakubereka kusvikira Kristu aumbwa mamuri," 
Galatians4:20 ndaida sei kuti ndive nemi zvino uye ndishandure inzwi rangu, nokuti ndiri kukanganisika nokuda kwenyu." 
Galatians4:21 Ndiudzei, imi munoda kuva pasi pomurayiro, hamuzivi here zvinoreva murayiro?" 
Galatians4:22 Nokuti kwakanyorwa kuti Abhurahama akanga ana vanakomana vaviri, mumwe nomukadzi woutapwa uye mumwe nomukadzi akasununguka." 
Galatians4:23 Mwanakomana wake womukadzi mutapwa akaberekwa nenzira yenyama; asi mwanakomana wake womukadzi akasununguka akaberekwa nokuda kwechipikirwa. 
Galatians4:24 Zvinhu izvi zvinofananidzira, nokuti vakadzi ava vanomirira sungano mbiri. Imwe sungano inobva paGomo reSinai uye inobereka vana vanofanira kuva nhapwa: Ndiye Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Zvino Hagari anomirira Gomo reSinai muArabhia uye rakaenzana neguta reJerusarema razvino, nokuti riri pautapwa navana varo." 
Galatians4:26 Asi Jerusarema riri kumusoro rakasununguka, uye ndivo mai vedu." 
Galatians4:27 Nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: “Fara iwe mukadzi asingabereki, asingabereki vana; iwe usingarwadziwi nokubereka; nokuti vana vomukadzi akasiyiwa vazhinji kupfuura vouyo ano murume.”" 
Galatians4:28 Zvino imi hama, muri vana vechipikirwa saIsaka." 
Galatians4:29 Panguva iyoyo mwanakomana akazvarwa nenzira yenyama akatambudza mwanakomana akaberekwa nesimba roMweya. Zvakadaro nanhasi. 
Galatians4:30 Asi Rugwaro runoti kudiniko? “Dzinga murandakadzi nomwanakomana wake, nokuti mwanakomana womurandakadzi haangatongogovani nhaka nomwanakomana womukadzi akasununguka.”" 
Galatians4:31 Naizvozvo, hama, isu hatizi vana vomurandakadzi, asi vomukadzi akasununguka." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu akatisunungura kuti tive vakasununguka. Zvino, mirai nesimba, uye murege kuzviremedza zvakare nejoko routapwa." 
Galatians5:2 Batai mashoko angu! Ini, Pauro, ndinokuudzai kuti kana muchidzingiswa, Kristu haachakosheswi kwamuri napaduku." 
Galatians5:3 Uyezve, ndinotaura kumunhu wose anoda kudzingiswa kuti anofanira kuteerera murayiro wose." 
Galatians5:4 Imi munoedza kushayirwa mhosva nomurayiro makaparadzaniswa naKristu; makabva panyasha. 
Galatians5:5 Asi nokutenda tinoshinga kwazvo kumirira kururama, kunova ndiko kwatine tariro nako kubudikidza noMweya." 
Galatians5:6 Nokuti muna Kristu Jesu kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hazvina maturo. Chinhu chinokosha chete ndiko kutenda kunozviratidza kubudikidza norudo. 
Galatians5:7 Makanga muchimhanya nhangemutange yakanaka. Ndianiko akakudzivisai uye akakukonesai kuteerera chokwadi? 
Galatians5:8 Kugombedzera ikoko hakuna kubva kuna iye anokudanai. 
Galatians5:9 Mbiriso shoma inovirisa bundu rose rakakanyiwa. 
Galatians5:10 Ndinovimba muna She kuti hamuchazogamuchiri dzimwe pfungwa. Iyeye anokunyonganisai achazviripira mhaka, yake angava ani zvake." 
Galatians5:11 Hama dzangu, kana ndichiri kuparidza nezvokudzingiswa, ko, ndichiri kutambudzirwei hangu? Naizvozvo kugumbusa kwomuchinjikwa kwabviswa." 
Galatians5:12 Kana vari vaya vanokukuchidzirai, ndaida hangu kuti vazvigure zvinhu zvavo." 
Galatians5:13 Imi, hama dzangu, makadanirwa kusununguka. Asi regai kushandisa kusununguka kwenyu munyama; asi shandiranai murudo." 
Galatians5:14 Murayiro wose unobatanidzwa mumurayiro mumwe chete unoti: “Ude wokwako sezvaunozvida iwe.” 
Galatians5:15 Kana muchiramba muchirumana uye nokudyana, chenjererai kuti murege kuparadza mumwe nomumwe wenyu." 
Galatians5:16 Saka ndinoti, raramai noMweya, uye hamungazofadzi nyama nokuchiva kwayo." 
Galatians5:17 Nokuti nyama inoshuva zvinopesana noMweya, uye Mweya anopesanawo nezvinoshuviwa nenyama. Izvi zvinorwisana pachazvo, kuti murege kuita zvamunoda." 
Galatians5:18 Asi kana muchitungamirirwa noMweya, hamusi pasi pomurayiro." 
Galatians5:19 Mabasa enyama ndiwo aya: upombwe, tsvina, utere;" 
Galatians5:20 kunamata zvifananidzo uye uroyi, ruvengo, gakava, godo, kutsamwa, kuzvikudza, kuparadzana, dzidziso dzakatsauka" 
Galatians5:21 nokugodorana; kudhakwa, kutamba kwakaipa, nezvimwe zvakadaro. Ndinokuyambirai, sezvandakamboita kare kuti avo vana mararamiro iwaya havangagari nhaka youmambo hwaMwari." 
Galatians5:22 Asi chibereko choMweya ndirwo rudo, mufaro, rugare, mwoyo murefu, unyoro, kunaka, kutendeka," 
Galatians5:23 kupfava uye kuzvidzora. Hakuna murayiro unopesana nezvizvi. 
Galatians5:24 Avo vari vaKristu Jesu vakaroverera pamuchinjikwa nyama nokuchiva kwayo uye nezvainoshuva. 
Galatians5:25 Sezvo tichirarama noMweya, ngatifambei noMweya." 
Galatians5:26 Ngatiregei kuzvikudza, tichimutsana mwoyo uye nokugodorana." 
Galatians6:1 Hama dzangu, kana mumwe akabatwa ari muchivi, imi vari mumweya munofanira kumudzora nounyoro. Asi muzvingwarire pachenyu, kuti murege kuedzwa." 
Galatians6:2 Takuriranai mitoro yenyu, uye nokudaro muchazadzisa murayiro waKristu." 
Galatians6:3 Kana munhu achifunga kuti iye chinhu iye asiri chinhu, anozvinyengera." 
Galatians6:4 Mumwe nomumwe anofanira kuedza mabasa ake. Ipapo angazvikudza hake, asingazvienzanise nomumwe munhuwo," 
Galatians6:5 nokuti mumwe nomumwe anofanira kutakura mutoro wake. 
Galatians6:6 Ani naani anogamuchira dzidziso mushoko anofanira kugovana nouno mudzidzisa pazvinhu zvose zvakanaka. 
Galatians6:7 Musanyengerwa: Mwari haasekwi. Munhu anokohwa zvaanodyara. 
Galatians6:8 Anodyarira nyama yake, achakohwa kuparadzwa kunobva panyama iyoyo; uyo anodyarira mweya, achakohwa upenyu husingaperi hunobva paMweya iwoyo." 
Galatians6:9 Ngatiregei kuneta pakuita zvakanaka, nokuti nenguva yakafanira tichakohwa kana tisingaori mwoyo." 
Galatians6:10 Naizvozvo, zvatine mukana, ngatiitei zvakanaka kuvanhu vose, zvikuru kuna avo vari mumhuri yavatendi." 
Galatians6:11 Tarirai kukura kwamavara andinoshandisa sezvo ndichikunyorerai imi noruoko rwangu! 
Galatians6:12 Avo vanoda kuzviratidza kuti vakanaka nechokunze vanoedza kukumanikidzai kuti mudzingiswe. Vanongoita izvi kuti varege kutambudzwa nokuda kwomuchinjikwa waKristu. 
Galatians6:13 Kunyange naivo vakadzingiswa havateereri murayiro, asi vanoda kuti imi mudzingiswe, kuti vagozvikudza pamusoro penyama yenyu." 
Galatians6:14 Ini ngandirege kutongozvikudza kunze kwomumuchinjikwa waIshe wedu Jesu Kristu, uyo kubudikidza nawo nyika yakarovererwa kwandiri, uye ini kunyika." 
Galatians6:15 Kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hazvirevi chinhu; chinokosha ndiko kuva chisikwa chitsva. 
Galatians6:16 Rugare nengoni kuna avo vanotevera murayiro uyu, kunyange kuIsraeri yaMwari." 
Galatians6:17 Pakupedzisira, ngakurege kuva nomunhu anonditambudza, nokuti ndakatakura mumuviri wangu mavanga aJesu." 
Galatians6:18 Nyasha dzaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzive nomweya wenyu, hama dzangu. Ameni." 
Ephesians1:1 Pauro, mupostori waKristu Jesu nokuda kwaMwari, Kuvatsvene vari muEfeso, vakatendeka muna Kristu Jesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Nyasha norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba vedu nokuna Ishe Jesu Kristu ngazvive kwamuri. 
Ephesians1:3 Kurumbidza ngakuve kuna Mwari Baba vaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu, iye akatiropafadza muchadenga nokuropafadza kwose kwomweya muna Kristu Jesu." 
Ephesians1:4 Nokuti akatisarudza maari nyika isati yasikwa kuti tive vatsvene vasina chavanopomerwa pamberi pake. Murudo 
Ephesians1:5 akatitemera kare kuti tiitwe savana vake kubudikidza naJesu Kristu, maererano nomufaro wake uye nokuda kwake," 
Ephesians1:6 kuti kunakisisa kwenyasha dzake dzaakangotipa hake muna Iye waanoda kurumbidzwe. 
Ephesians1:7 Iye watine dzikunuro maari kubudikidza neropa rake, iko kuregererwa kwezvivi, zviri maererano nokupfuma kwenyasha dzaMwari" 
Ephesians1:8 dzaakawanza pamusoro pedu nouchenjeri hwose uye nokunzwisisa kwose. 
Ephesians1:9 Uye akazivisa kwatiri chakavanzika chokuda kwake, maererano nomufaro wake wakanaka, waakafunga muna Kristu, kuti kuitwe pakukwana kwenguva," 
Ephesians1:10 auyise pamwe chete zvinhu zvose zviri kudenga nezviri panyika pasi pomusoro mumwe, anova Kristu." 
Ephesians1:11 Iye watakasarudzwawo maari, tatemerwa kare nhaka maererano nokuronga kwaiye anoita zvose mukusimbisa vavariro yokuda kwake," 
Ephesians1:12 kuitira kuti isu, vakatanga kuva netariro muna Kristu, tive rumbidzo yokubwinya kwake." 
Ephesians1:13 Nemi makaiswawo muna Kristu pamakanzwa shoko rechokwadi, iro vhangeri rokuponeswa kwenyu. Makati matenda, makaiswa rupau maari nechisimbiso, icho chivimbiso choMweya Mutsvene," 
Ephesians1:14 anova ndiye rubatso runotitsidzira nhaka yedu kusvikira rudzikinuro rwaavo vari vaMwari chaivo rwaratidzwa, kuti kubwinya kwake kurumbidzwe." 
Ephesians1:15 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, pandakanzwa nezvokutenda kwenyu muna Ishe Jesu uye rudo rwenyu kuvatsvene vose," 
Ephesians1:16 handina kurega kuvonga nokuda kwenyu, ndichikurangarirai muminyengetero yangu." 
Ephesians1:17 Ndinoramba ndichikumbira kuti Mwari waIshe wedu Jesu Kristu, Baba vokubwinya, akupei mweya wouchenjeri nokuzarurirwa, kuitira kuti mumuzive zviri nani." 
Ephesians1:18 Ndinonyengeterawo kuti meso emwoyo wenyu avhenekerwe kuitira kuti mugoziva pfuma yenhaka yake yokubwinya muvatsvene," 
Ephesians1:19 uye nesimba rake guru risingagoni kuenzaniswa kwatiri isu vanotenda. Iroro simba rakaita sokubata kwesimba rake guru," 
Ephesians1:20 raakaita muna Kristu paakamumutsa kubva kuvakafa akamugarisa kuruoko rwake rworudyi mudenga," 
Ephesians1:21 pamusoro poutongi hwose noukuru, nesimba noushe, uye namazita ose angagona kurehwa, kwete panyika yazvino chete asiwo pane ichauya." 
Ephesians1:22 Uye Mwari akaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake akamugadza kuti ave musoro wezvinhu zvose nokuda kwekereke," 
Ephesians1:23 iwo muviri wake, kuzara kwaiye anozadza zvinhu zvose munzira dzose." 
Ephesians2:1 Kana muri imi, makanga makafa mukudarika kwenyu nomuzvivi," 
Ephesians2:2 izvo zvamaigara mazviri pamaitevera nzira dzenyika ino uye nedzomutongi woushe hwomuchadenga, iwo mweya unoshanda zvino muna avo vasingateereri." 
Ephesians2:3 Isu tose taigara pakati pavo pane imwe nguva, tichikudza kuchiva kwenyama yedu yezvivi uye tichitevera zvido zvedu nezvataifunga. Sezvakangoita vamwe vose, pakuzvarwa kwedu takanga tiri vana vokutsamwirwa." 
Ephesians2:4 Asi nokuda kworudo rwake rukuru kwatiri, Mwari, iye akapfuma pangoni," 
Ephesians2:5 akatiita vapenyu muna Kristu kunyange zvedu takanga takafa mukudarika kwedu, makaponeswa nenyasha." 
Ephesians2:6 Uye Mwari akatimutsa pamwe chete naKristu akatigarisa muchadenga muna Kristu Jesu," 
Ephesians2:7 kuitira kuti munguva dzinouya aratidze pfuma yake huru yenyasha dzake, zvichiratidzwa muunyoro hwake kwatiri muna Kristu Jesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Nokuti makaponeswa nenyasha, kubudikidza nokutenda, uye izvi hazvibvi kwamuri, chipo chaMwari," 
Ephesians2:9 kwete namabasa, kuti parege kuva nomunhu anozvikudza." 
Ephesians2:10 Nokuti tiri basa raMwari, rakasikwa muna Kristu Jesu kuti tiite mabasa akanaka, akagadzirwa naMwari kare kuti tiaite." 
Ephesians2:11 Naizvozvo, rangarirai kuti kare imi vaHedheni pakuzvarwa uye muchinzi “vasina kudzingiswa” naavo vaizviti “vakadzingiswa” (uko kunoitwa pamuviri namaoko avanhu)," 
Ephesians2:12 rangarirai kuti panguva iyoyo makanga makaparadzaniswa naKristu, musingaverengwi muzvizvarwa zveIsraeri uye muri vatorwa musungano dzechipikirwa, musina tariro uye musina Mwari munyika." 
Ephesians2:13 Asi zvino muna Kristu Jesu, imi makanga muri kure kare, makaswededzwa pedyo kubudikidza neropa raKristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Nokuti iye pachake ndiye rugare rwedu, akaita kuti vaviri vave chinhu chimwe uye akaparadza mukaha, irwo rusvingo rwaiparadzanisa rwokuvengana," 
Ephesians2:15 nokuparadza munyama yake murayiro nezvakarayirwa zvawo uye zvakatemwa. Vavariro yake yakanga iri yokusika maari munhu mumwe chete mutsva kubva pavaviri, naizvozvo aite rugare," 
Ephesians2:16 uye mumuviri mumwe chete ayananise vose vari vaviri kuna Mwari kubudikidza nomuchinjikwa, akauraya kuvengana kwavo nawo." 
Ephesians2:17 Akauya akaparidza rugare kwamuri imi makanga muri kure uye rugare kuna avo vakanga vari pedyo. 
Ephesians2:18 Nokuti kubudikidza naye isu tose tinopinda kuna Baba noMweya mumwe chete. 
Ephesians2:19 Saka, hamuchisiri vatorwa navaeni, asi vagari pamwe chete navanhu vaMwari uye neveimba yaMwari," 
Ephesians2:20 makavakwa panheyo dzavapostori navaprofita, naKristu Jesu pachake ari dombo rapakona." 
Ephesians2:21 Maari imba yose yakabatanidzwa pamwe chete uye inokura kuti ive temberi tsvene muna She. 
Ephesians2:22 Uye maari nemiwo makavakwa pamwe chete kuti muve ugaro hwaMwari muMweya. 
Ephesians3:1 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, ini Pauro, musungwa waKristu Jesu nokuda kwenyu imi vaHedheni:" 
Ephesians3:2 Zvirokwazvo makanzwa zvokugoverwa kwenyasha dzaMwari dzakapiwa kwandiri nokuda kwenyu," 
Ephesians3:3 kuti chakavanzika chakaziviswa kwandiri nokuzarurirwa, sezvandakatonyora zvishoma." 
Ephesians3:4 Mukuverenga izvi, ipapo muchagona kunzwisisa kuziva kwangu muchakavanzika chaKristu," 
Ephesians3:5 chisina kuziviswa kuvanhu kana mamwe marudzi sezvachakaratidzwa zvino noMweya kuvapostori navaprofita vatsvene vaMwari. 
Ephesians3:6 Chakavanzika ichi ndechokuti, kubudikidza nevhangeri, vaHedheni vadyi venhaka pamwe chete navaIsraeri uye inhengo pamwe chete dzomuviri mumwe chete, vagovani pamwe chete muchivimbiso chiri muna Kristu Jesu." 
Ephesians3:7 Ndakava muranda wevhangeri iri nechipo chenyasha dzaMwari dzakapiwa kwandiri kubudikidza nokushanda kwesimba rake. 
Ephesians3:8 Kunyange ndiri muduku pavanhu vose vaMwari, idzi nyasha dzakapiwa kwandiri: kuti ndiparidze vhangeri kuvaHedheni pfuma yaKristu isingawanikwi;" 
Ephesians3:9 uye kuti ndiratidze pachena kuvanhu vose kugoverwa kwechakavanzika ichi, icho panguva yakare chakanga chakavigwa muna Mwari, iye akasika zvinhu zvose." 
Ephesians3:10 Zvaaida zvino ndezvokuti, kubudikidza nekereke, uchenjeri hwaMwari hukuru huziviswe kuvatongi navane simba vari muchadenga," 
Ephesians3:11 maererano nevavariro yake isingaperi yaakakwanisa muna Kristu Jesu Ishe wedu. 
Ephesians3:12 Maari uye kubudikidza nokutenda kwaari tigone kusvika kuna Mwari takasununguka uye tisingatyi. 
Ephesians3:13 Naizvozvo, ndinokukumbirai, kuti murege kuora mwoyo nokuda kwamatambudziko angu nokuda kwenyu, ndiko kukudzwa kwenyu." 
Ephesians3:14 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, ndinopfugama namabvi pamberi paBaba," 
Ephesians3:15 avo kubva kwavari mhuri yavo yose iri mudenga uye napanyika inowana zita rayo. 
Ephesians3:16 Ndinonyengetera kuti kubva papfuma yokubwinya kwavo vakusimbisei nesimba noMweya wavo mumunhu womukati," 
Ephesians3:17 kuti Kristu agare mumwoyo yenyu nokutenda. Uye ndinonyengetera kuti imi, muve nemidzi uye musimbiswe murudo," 
Ephesians3:18 muve nesimba, pamwe chete navatsvene vose, kuti mubate kuti kupamhamha, nokureba uye kukwirira, nokudzika kworudo rwaKristu kwakadii," 
Ephesians3:19 uye muzive rudo urwu runopfuura ruzivo, kuti muzadzwe kusvikira pachiyero chokuzara kwose kwaMwari." 
Ephesians3:20 Zvino iye anogona kuita zvikuru zvisingagoni kuyerwa kupfuura zvose zvatingakumbira kana kufunga, maererano nesimba rake riri kushanda mukati medu," 
Ephesians3:21 ngaave nokubwinya mukereke uye muna Kristu Jesu kumarudzi namarudzi, nokusingaperi-peri! Ameni." 
Ephesians4:1 Sezvo ndiri musungwa waShe, zvino ndinokukurudzirai kuti murarame upenyu hwakafanira kudanwa kwamakagamuchira." 
Ephesians4:2 Muzvininipise zvachose uye mupfave; muite mwoyo murefu, muchiitirana mwoyo murefu murudo." 
Ephesians4:3 Mushingaire kuchengeta humwe hwoMweya kubudikidza nechisungo chorugare. 
Ephesians4:4 Pano muviri mumwe noMweya mumwe, sezvo makadanirwa kutariro imwe chete pamakadanwa," 
Ephesians4:5 Ishe mumwe, kutenda kumwe, rubhabhatidzo rumwe;" 
Ephesians4:6 Mwari mumwe uye Baba vavose, ari pamusoro pavose, uye kubudikidza navose, uye muna vose." 
Ephesians4:7 Asi kuno mumwe nomumwe wedu kwakapiwa nyasha sokugoverwa kwadzakaitwa naKristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Ndokusaka zvichinzi: “Paakakwira kudenga, akatapa utapwa uye akapa zvipo kuvanhu vake.”" 
Ephesians4:9 (Zvinorevei kuti “akakwira” asi kuti akaburukawo kumativi ari pasi enyika? 
Ephesians4:10 Iye akaburuka ndiye chaiye akakwira kumusoro-soro kupfuura kudenga denga, kuitira kuti azadze pasi pose.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Ndiye akapa vamwe kuti vave vapostori, vamwe kuti vave vaprofita, vamwe kuti vave vavhangeri, uye vamwe kuti vave vafudzi navadzidzisi," 
Ephesians4:12 kuti vagadzirire vanhu vaMwari pabasa rokushumira, kuitira kuti muviri waKristu uvakwe" 
Ephesians4:13 kudzamara isu tose tasvika pahumwe hwokutenda uye nomukuziva Mwanakomana waMwari napamunhu akura, asvika pachiyero chose chokuzara kwaKristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Ipapo hatingazorambi tiri vacheche, vanosundirwa shure nemberi vachipeperetswa kuno nouko nemhepo ipi zvayo yedzidziso, uye nokunyengera nousvinu hwavanhu mukutsausa kwokunyengera kwavo." 
Ephesians4:15 Asi, tichitaura chokwadi murudo, tichakura pazvinhu zvose maari iye musoro, iye Kristu." 
Ephesians4:16 Kubva maari muviri wose, wakasanganiswa uye wakabatanidzwa pamwe chete nenhengo dzose dzichiusimbisa, unokura uye unozvivaka murudo, sezvo mutezo mumwe nomumwe uchiita basa rawo." 
Ephesians4:17 Saka ndinokuudzai izvi, uye murambire pazviri muna She, kuti hamufaniri kuramba muchirarama savaHedheni, muupenzi hwendangariro dzavo." 
Ephesians4:18 Vakasvibiswa mukunzwisisa kwavo uye vakaparadzaniswa noupenyu hwaMwari nokuda kwokusaziva kuri mavari nokuda kwoukukutu hwemwoyo yavo. 
Ephesians4:19 Vasisina hanya, vakasvika kuutera kuitira kuti vagoita mabasa ose etsvina, nokuchiva zvakawanda." 
Ephesians4:20 Kunyange zvakadaro, imi hamuna kuziva Kristu saizvozvo." 
Ephesians4:21 Zvirokwazvo makanzwa nezvake uye makadzidziswa maari maererano nechokwadi chiri muna Jesu. 
Ephesians4:22 Makadzidziswa, maererano namafambiro enyu ekare, kuti mubvise munhu wenyu wekare, anoodzwa nokuchiva kwokunyengera;" 
Ephesians4:23 kuti muitwe vatsva mukufunga kwendangariro dzenyu; 
Ephesians4:24 uye mufuke munhu mutsva, akasikwa kuti afanane naMwari mukururama kwechokwadi noutsvene." 
Ephesians4:25 Naizvozvo mumwe nomumwe wenyu anofanira kubvisa nhema uye ataure chokwadi kuno muvakidzani wake, nokuti isu tose tiri nhengo dzomuviri mumwe." 
Ephesians4:26 “Mukutsamwa kwenyu, musatadza.” Musarega zuva richivira muchaka-ngotsamwa," 
Ephesians4:27 uye musapa dhiabhori chinzvimbo. 
Ephesians4:28 Uyo akanga achimboba ngaarege kuzobazve, asi anofanira kushanda, achiita zvinhu zvinobatsira namaoko ake, kuti ave nechaangagovera avo vanoshayiwa." 
Ephesians4:29 Musarega kutaura kwakaora kuchibuda mumiromo yenyu, asi chete zvinobatsira pakuvaka vamwe maererano nezvavanoshayiwa, kuti zvigobatsira avo vanonzwa." 
Ephesians4:30 Uye musachemedza Mweya Mutsvene waMwari, uyo wakaitwa chisimbiso chenyu pazuva rokudzikinurwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Bvisai shungu dzose, hasha nokutsamwa, kupopota namakuhwa pamwe chete nokuvenga kwose." 
Ephesians4:32 Muitirane mwoyo munyoro uye munzwirane tsitsi, muchikanganwira mumwe nomumwe wenyu, sezvamakakanganwirwa naMwari muna Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Naizvozvo, ivai vateveri vaMwari, savana vanodikanwa" 
Ephesians5:2 uye murarame upenyu hworudo, sezvatakadikanwa naKristu akazvipa nokuda kwedu sechipiriso chinonhuwira uye sechibayiro kuna Mwari." 
Ephesians5:3 Asi pakati penyu hapafaniri kutaurwa kunyange zvoupombwe, kana tsvina yemhando ipi zvayo, kana kukara, nokuti izvi hazvina kunaka kuvanhu vatsvene vaMwari." 
Ephesians5:4 Uye kufunga kusina maturo, nokutaura kwoupenzi kana kunemera, izvo zvisina kufanira, asi zviri nani kuvonga." 
Ephesians5:5 Nokuti naizvozvi munogona kuva nechokwadi kuti: Hakuna mhombwe, kana munhu ane tsvina kana ane nhafu, munhu akadaro ndiye anonamata zvifananidzo, anowana nhaka muumambo hwaKristu nohwaMwari." 
Ephesians5:6 Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anokunyengerai namashoko asina maturo, nokuti nokuda kwezvinhu zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwaMwari kunouya pamusoro paavo vasingateereri." 
Ephesians5:7 Naizvozvo musashamwaridzana navo. 
Ephesians5:8 Nokuti kare maiva rima, asi zvino mava chiedza muna She. Garai savana vechiedza" 
Ephesians5:9 (nokuti chibereko chechiedza chino kunaka kwose, kururama nechokwadi)" 
Ephesians5:10 uye muzive zvinofadza Ishe. 
Ephesians5:11 Musayanana namabasa erima, asi zviri nani kuafumura." 
Ephesians5:12 Nokuti zvinonyadza kureva zvinoitwa muchivande navana vasingateereri. 
Ephesians5:13 Asi zvinhu zvose zvinoratidzwa pachena nechiedza zvinobva zvaonekwa," 
Ephesians5:14 nokuti chiedza ndicho chinoratidza zvinhu zvose. Ndokusaka zvichinzi: “Muka, iwe muvati, muka kubva kuvakafa, Kristu achavhenekera pauri.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Zvino, muchenjere kuti munorarama sei, kwete savasina kuchenjera asi savakachenjera," 
Ephesians5:16 muchishandisa mikana yose, nokuti mazuva akaipa." 
Ephesians5:17 Naizvozvo musava mapenzi, asi munzwisise kuti kuda kwaShe ndokupi." 
Ephesians5:18 Musadhakwa newaini, nokuti ndipo pano kusazvidzora. Asi, muzadzwe noMweya." 
Ephesians5:19 Mutaure kuno mumwe nomumwe namapisarema, nedzimbo uye nenziyo dzomweya. Muimbe uye muridzire Ishe mimhanzi mumwoyo yenyu," 
Ephesians5:20 muchivonga Mwari Baba pazvinhu zvose, muzita raIshe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
Ephesians5:21 Muzviise pasi pomumwe nomumwe muchitya Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Vakadzi, muzviise pasi pavarume venyu sezvamunoita kuna She." 
Ephesians5:23 Nokuti murume musoro womukadzi saKristu ari musoro wekereke, iwo muviri wake, iyo yaari muponesi wayo." 
Ephesians5:24 Zvino sezvo kereke ichizviisa pasi paKristu, saizvozvowo vakadzi vanofanira kuzviisa pasi pavarume vavo pazvinhu zvose." 
Ephesians5:25 Varume, idai vakadzi venyu, saKristu akada kereke uye akazvipa nokuda kwayo" 
Ephesians5:26 kuti aiite tsvene, akaishambidza nokushambidza kwemvura neshoko," 
Ephesians5:27 uye ayiuyise kwaari sekereke inobwinya, isina gwapa kana kuunyana kana chipi zvacho chainopomerwa." 
Ephesians5:28 Nenzira imwe cheteyo, varume vanofanira kuda vakadzi vavo semiviri yavo chaiyo. Uyo anoda mukadzi wake anozvida iye pachake." 
Ephesians5:29 Pana izvozvo zvose, hakuna munhu akatongovenga muviri wake, asi anoupa zvokudya uye anouchengeta, sezvinoita Kristu kukereke," 
Ephesians5:30 nokuti tiri nhengo dzomuviri wake. 
Ephesians5:31 “Nokuda kwaizvozvi, murume achasiya baba namai vake uye asanganiswe nomukadzi, uye vaviri vachava nyama imwe chete.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Ichi ndicho chakavanzika chakadzika, asi ndiri kutaura pamusoro paKristu nekereke." 
Ephesians5:33 Kunyange zvakadaro, mumwe nomumwe wenyuwo anofanira kuda mukadzi wake sezvaanozvida iye, uye mukadzi anofanira kuremekedza murume wake." 
Ephesians6:1 Vana, teererai vabereki venyu muna She, nokuti ndizvo zvakanaka." 
Ephesians6:2 “Kudza baba namai vako,” ndiwo murayiro wokutanga une chipikirwa," 
Ephesians6:3 “kuti uitirwe zvakanaka uye kuti ugare upenyu hurefu panyika.” 
Ephesians6:4 Vanababa, regai kutsamwisa vana venyu; asi, muvarere mukurovedza nokurayira kwaShe." 
Ephesians6:5 Varanda, teererai vatenzi venyu vapanyika noruremekedzo uye nokutya, uye nomwoyo wakatendeka, sokuteerera kwamunoita Kristu." 
Ephesians6:6 Musangovateerera kuti vakufarirei pavanenge vachikuonai chete, asi savaranda vaKristu, vanoita kuda kwaMwari zvichibva pamwoyo yavo." 
Ephesians6:7 Mushande nomwoyo wose, sokunge munoshandira Ishe, kwete munhu," 
Ephesians6:8 nokuti munoziva kuti Ishe achapa mubayiro mumwe nomumwe pane zvose zvakanaka zvaanoita, angava muranda kana akasununguka." 
Ephesians6:9 Uye imi vatenzi, mubate varanda venyu nenzira imwe cheteyo. Musavatyisa, sezvo muchiziva kuti Tenzi wavo nowenyu ari kudenga, uye haana rusaruro maari." 
Ephesians6:10 Pakupedzisira, ivai nesimba muna She nomusimba rake guru." 
Ephesians6:11 Shongai nhumbi dzose dzokurwa nadzo dzaMwari kuti mugogona kumira muchirwa namano adhiabhori. 
Ephesians6:12 Nokuti hatirwi nenyama neropa, asi navabati, navanesimba, namasimba enyika ino yerima uye namasimba emweya yakaipa ari muchadenga." 
Ephesians6:13 Naizvozvo shongai nhumbi dzose dzokurwa nadzo dzaMwari, kuti panosvika zuva rakaipa, mugokwanisa kumira, uye mushure mokunge maita zvinhu zvose, kuti mumire." 
Ephesians6:14 Zvino mirai nesimba, makasunga bhanhire rechokwadi muchiuno chenyu, nechidzitiro chechipfuva chokururama," 
Ephesians6:15 uye tsoka dzenyu dzakashongedzwa negadziriro inobva pavhangeri rorugare. 
Ephesians6:16 Pamusoro paizvozvi zvose, torai nhoo yokutenda, iyo yamunogona kudzima nayo miseve inopfuta yowakaipa." 
Ephesians6:17 Torai ngowani yoruponeso nomunondo womweya, iro shoko raMwari." 
Ephesians6:18 Uye munyengetere muMweya nguva dzose nemhando dzose dzeminyengetero nemikumbiro. Muine izvi mupfungwa dzenyu, murinde uye murambe muchinyengeterera vatsvene." 
Ephesians6:19 Munyengeterere neniwo, kuti pose pandinoshama muromo wangu, ndipiwe mashoko kuitira kuti ndigozivisa chakavanzika chevhangeri ndisingatyi," 
Ephesians6:20 iro randiri nhume yakasungwa nengetani. Nyengeterai kuti ndiritaure ndisingatyi, sezvandinofanira." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikiko, hama inodikanwa nomuranda akatendeka muna She, achakuudzai zvinhu zvose, kuitira kuti nemiwo muzive zvandiri nezvandinoita." 
Ephesians6:22 Ndiri kumutuma kwamuri nokuda kwechinangwa ichi, kuti muzive kuti takaita sei, uye kuti akukurudzirei." 
Ephesians6:23 Rugare kuhama, norudo nokutenda zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba naIshe Jesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Nyasha kuna vose vanoda Ishe wedu Jesu Kristu norudo rusingaperi. 
Philippians1:1 Pauro naTimoti, varanda vaKristu Jesu, Kuvatsvene vose muna Kristu Jesu vari paFiripi, pamwe chete navatariri navadhikoni vekereke:" 
Philippians1:2 Nyasha norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba nokuna Ishe Jesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:3 Ndinovonga Mwari wangu nguva dzose pandinokurangarirai. 
Philippians1:4 Muminyengetero yangu yose nokuda kwenyu mose, ndinogara ndichinyengetera nomufaro" 
Philippians1:5 nokuda kwokunzwanana kwenyu muvhangeri kubvira pazuva rokutanga kusvikira zvino," 
Philippians1:6 ndichiziva izvi, kuti iye akatanga basa rakanaka mamuri acharipedzisa kusvikira pazuva raKristu Jesu." 
Philippians1:7 Zvakanaka kwandiri kuti ndifunge saizvozvo pamusoro penyu mose, sezvo ndinemi mumwoyo; nokuti kunyange ndakasungwa kana kuti ndichidzivirira nokusimbisa vhangeri, imi mose munogovana neni munyasha dzaMwari." 
Philippians1:8 Mwari anogona kupupura kuti ndinokufungai sei imi mose norudo rwaKristu Jesu. 
Philippians1:9 Uye uyu ndiwo munyengetero wangu: kuti rudo rwenyu ruwande uye muwanze kuziva nokunzwisisa," 
Philippians1:10 kuitira kuti mugogona kunzwisisa kuti zvakaisvonaka ndezvipi uye muve vakachena uye mushayiwe chamungapomerwa kusvikira pazuva raKristu," 
Philippians1:11 muzere nechibereko chokururama chinouya kubudikidza naJesu Kristu, kuti kubwinya nokurumbidzwa zvive kuna Mwari." 
Philippians1:12 Zvino ndinoda kuti muzive, hama, kuti zvakaitika kwandiri zvakabatsira zvikuru kufambisa vhangeri." 
Philippians1:13 Nokuda kwaizvozvo, zvava pachena kuvarindi vomuzinda wose nokuna vose kuti ndiri mungetani nokuda kwaKristu." 
Philippians1:14 Nokuda kwengetani dzangu, hama zhinji muna She dzakakurudzirwa kuti vataure shoko raMwari vakashinga zvikuru uye vasingatyi." 
Philippians1:15 Ichokwadi kuti vamwe vanoparidza Kristu negodo uye negakava, asi vamwe nenzira yakanaka." 
Philippians1:16 Vamwe vanoita izvozvo murudo, vachiziva kuti ndakaiswa muno nokuda kwokudzivirira vhangeri." 
Philippians1:17 Vamwe vaiparidza Kristu nomwoyo woruchiva, vasina kutendeka, vachifungidzira kuti vangandimutsira dambudziko ndichiri mungetani." 
Philippians1:18 Asi zvisinei hazvo, chinhu chinokosha ndechokuti munzira dzose, dzingava ndangariro dzenhema kana dzechokwadi, Kristu ari kuparidzwa hake. Uye nokuda kwaizvozvi ndinofara. Hongu, uye ndicharamba ndichifara," 
Philippians1:19 nokuti ndinoziva kuti kubudikidza neminyengetero yenyu uye norubatsiro runopiwa noMweya waJesu Kristu, zvakaitika kwandiri zvichashanduka zvikava kusunungurwa kwangu." 
Philippians1:20 Ndinoshuva zvikuru nokutarira kuti handingazonyadziswi, asi ndichava nokushinga kwakakwana kuitira kuti zvino senguva dzose Kristu achakudzwa mumuviri wangu, hungava upenyu kana rufu." 
Philippians1:21 Nokuti kwandiri, kurarama ndiKristu uye kufa kupfuma." 
Philippians1:22 Kana ndikaramba ndichirarama mumuviri, izvi zvichareva kubata kune zvibereko kwandiri. Asi ndichasarudzeiko? Handizivi!" 
Philippians1:23 Ndiri pakati pezvinhu zviviri izvi: Ndinoda kuenda kuti ndive naKristu, zvinova ndizvo zviri nani nokupfuuridza;" 
Philippians1:24 asi zvinokosha zvikuru kwamuri kuti ndigare mumuviri uyu. 
Philippians1:25 Ndichitenda chinhu ichi, ndinoziva kuti ndichagara, uye ndicharamba ndinemi mose kuti mupfuurire mberi uye mufare mukutenda," 
Philippians1:26 kuitira kuti ndichinge ndinemi zvakare, mufaro wenyu muna Kristu Jesu ugozadziswa nokuda kwangu." 
Philippians1:27 Zvisinei hazvo, mufambe henyu nenzira yakafanira vhangeri raKristu. Ipapo, kunyange ndikauya kuzokuonai kana kunzwa nezvenyu ndisipo hangu, ndichaziva kuti mumire nesimba mumweya mumwe, muchirwa somunhu mumwe nokuda kwokutenda kwevhangeri," 
Philippians1:28 musingatyiswi nenzira ipi zvayo naavo vanopikisana nemi. Ichi ndicho chiratidzo kwavari kuti vachaparadzwa, uye kuti imi muchaponeswa, uye naiye Mwari." 
Philippians1:29 Nokuti makapiwa imi nokuda kwaKristu kuti musangotenda kwaari bedzi, asi kuti mutambudzike nokuda kwake," 
Philippians1:30 sezvo muri mukurwa kumwe chete uku kwamakandiona ndinako, uye kwamunoziva zvino kuti ndichinako." 
Philippians2:1 Kana muine kurudziro inobva pakubata naKristu, kana paine kunyaradza kunobva parudo rwake, kana pano kuwadzana noMweya, kana paino unyoro netsitsi," 
Philippians2:2 ipapo itai kuti mufaro wangu uzare nokuva nomurangariro wakadaro, muine rudo rumwe chete, muri vamwe mumweya nechinangwa." 
Philippians2:3 Musaita chinhu nomwoyo wokuchiva kana kuzvikudza, asi mukuzvininipisa muchionawo vamwe kuti vari nani kupfuura imi." 
Philippians2:4 Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaarege kungotsvaka zvake, asi zvavamwewo." 
Philippians2:5 Kufunga kwenyu ngakuve sokwaKristu Jesu: 
Philippians2:6 Uyo, kunyange aiva Mwari chaiye, haana kufunga kuti kuenzana naMwari chinhu chingabatisiswa," 
Philippians2:7 asi akazviita chinhu pasina, akatora chimiro chomuranda chaiye, akaitwa somunhu." 
Philippians2:8 Uye akati awanikwa ane chimiro chomunhu, akazvininipisa uye akateerera kusvikira pakufa, kunyange rufu pamuchinjikwa." 
Philippians2:9 Naizvozvo Mwari akamukudza panzvimbo yapamusoro-soro, uye akamupa zita riri pamusoro pamazita ose," 
Philippians2:10 kuti muzita raJesu mabvi ose apfugame, mudenga napanyika uye napasi penyika," 
Philippians2:11 uye ndimi dzose dzipupure kuti Jesu Kristu ndiye She, kuti Mwari Baba vakudzwe." 
Philippians2:12 Naizvozvo, shamwari dzangu dzinodiwa, sezvamunogara muchiteerera, kwete ndiripo bedzi, asi zvino zvikuru ndisipo, rambai muchishandira ruponeso rwenyu nokutya nokudedera," 
Philippians2:13 nokuti ndiMwari anoshanda mukati menyu kuti mude uye muite maererano nokuda kwake kwakanaka. 
Philippians2:14 Itai zvose musinganyunyuti kana kukakavara," 
Philippians2:15 kuitira kuti mugova vasina chavangapomerwa uye vakachena, vana vaMwari vasina mhosva murudzi urwu rwakakombama uye rwakatsauka, rwamunovhenekera senyeredzi munyika" 
Philippians2:16 sezvamunobatirira pashoko roupenyu, kuitira kuti ndigozvirumbidza pazuva raKristu uye kuti handina kumhanya kana kushanda pasina." 
Philippians2:17 Asi kunyange dai ndadururwa hangu sechipiriso chinonwiwa pamusoro pechibayiro noushumiri hunobva pakutenda kwenyu, ndinofara uye ndinofarisisa nemi mose." 
Philippians2:18 Saka nemiwo munofanira kufara nokufarisisa neni.
