Philippians2:19 Ndine tariro muna Ishe Jesu kuti nditume Timoti kwamuri nokukurumidza, kuti neniwo ndifare pandichanzwa mashoko pamusoro penyu." 
Philippians2:20 Handina mumwe akaita saye, ane hanya kwazvo nokugara kwenyu kwakanaka." 
Philippians2:21 Nokuti munhu wose anozvitsvakira zvake, zvisati zviri zvaJesu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Asi munoziva kuti Timoti akaratidza kutendeka kwake, nokuti somwanakomana ana baba vake akashanda neni mubasa revhangeri." 
Philippians2:23 Naizvozvo, ndine tariro yokuti ndimutume nokukurumidza kana ndaona kuti zvinhu zvinondifambira sei." 
Philippians2:24 Ndinovimba muna She kuti ini pachangu ndichauya nokukurumidza. 
Philippians2:25 Asi ndinofunga kuti zvakafanira kuti nditumirezve kwamuri Epafrodhito, hama yangu, mubati pamwe chete neni uye murwi pamwe chete neni, iye nhume yenyuwo, wamakatuma kuti azoona nezvokushayiwa kwangu." 
Philippians2:26 Nokuti anokushuvai mose uye ari kutambudzika nokuti makanzwa kuti akanga achirwara. 
Philippians2:27 Zvechokwadi akanga achirwara, uye akapotsa afa. Asi Mwari akava nengoni naye, uye kwete kwaari oga asi kwandiriwo, kuti ndirege kuva nokusuwa pamusoro pokusuwa." 
Philippians2:28 Naizvozvo ndinoshinga kwazvo kuti ndimutume, kuti pamunomuonazve mugofara uye ini ndive nokufunganya kushoma." 
Philippians2:29 Mugamuchirei muna She nomufaro mukuru, uye mukudze munhu akaita saiyeye," 
Philippians2:30 nokuti akapotsa afa nokuda kwebasa raKristu, akaisa upenyu hwake pangozi kuti akwanise kubatsira kwamakanga musingagoni kundiitira imi." 
Philippians3:1 Pakupedzisira, hama dzangu, farai muna She! Harisi dambudziko kwandiri kuti ndinyore zvinhu zvimwe chetezvo zvakare kwamuri, uye zvinokuchengetedzai imi." 
Philippians3:2 Chenjererai imbwa dziya, vanhu vanoita zvakaipa, vaya vokucheka nyama." 
Philippians3:3 Nokuti tisu vokudzingiswa, tisu tinonamata noMweya waMwari, vanozvirumbidza muna Kristu Jesu, uye vasingavimbi nenyama," 
Philippians3:4 kunyange zvangu ini ndine chikonzero chokuvimba kwakadaro. Kana pano munhu zvake anofunga kuti ane chikonzero chokuvimba nenyama, ini ndinazvo zvakawanda:" 
Philippians3:5 ndakadzingiswa pazuva rorusere, ndiri mumwe wavanhu veIsraeri, worudzi rwaBhenjamini, muHebheru wavaHebheru; pamurayiro, ndiri muFarisi;" 
Philippians3:6 kana kuri kushingaira, ndichitambudza kereke; kana kuri kururama kwomurayiro, handina mhosva." 
Philippians3:7 Asi zvose zvakanga zviri pfuma kwandiri, ndakaona kuri kurasikirwa nokuda kwaKristu." 
Philippians3:8 Chimwezve ndakati zvinhu zvose kurasikirwa hako kana zvichienzaniswa noukuru hunopfurikidza hwokuziva Kristu Jesu, Ishe wangu, nokuti nokuda kwake ndakarasikirwa nezvinhu zvose. Ndakazviita marara, kuti ndiwane Kristu." 
Philippians3:9 Uye kuti ndiwanikwe maari, ndisina kururama kwangu kunobva pamurayiro, asi uko kunouya kubudikidza nokutenda kuri muna Kristu, iko kururama kunobva kuna Mwari uye kuri kwokutenda." 
Philippians3:10 Ndinoda kuziva Kristu nesimba rokumuka kwake uye nokuwadzana kwokugovana naye mumatambudziko ake, ndifanane naye pakufa kwake," 
Philippians3:11 uye kuti, zvimwe, ndiwane kumuka kubva kuvakafa." 
Philippians3:12 Kwete kuti ndatowana zvose izvi kare, kana kuti ndatokwaniswa, asi ndinoshingaira kuti ndichibate icho Kristu Jesu akandibatira." 
Philippians3:13 Hama, handioni kuti ndatochibata. Asi ndinoita chinhu chimwe: Ndinokanganwa zviri shure ndichinanavira zviri mberi," 
Philippians3:14 ndinoshingairira kunharidzano kuti ndiwane mubayiro wandakadanirwa naMwari kudenga muna Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians3:15 Isu tose takura tinofanira kuva nepfungwa iyoyo. Uye kana pane dzimwe nguva imi muchifunga zvakasiyana, izvozvowo Mwari achazvijekesa kwamuri." 
Philippians3:16 Ngatiraramei bedzi nezvatakawana. 
Philippians3:17 Batanai navamwe mukutevera muenzaniso wangu, hama, uye mucherechedze avo vanorarama zviri maererano netsika dzatakakudzidzisai." 
Philippians3:18 Nokuti, sezvandaimbokuudzai kare uye ndinodarozve kunyange zvino nemisodzi kuti, vazhinji vanorarama savavengi vomuchinjikwa waKristu." 
Philippians3:19 Magumo avo ndiko kuparadzwa kwavo, Mwari wavo idumbu ravo, uye kuzvirumbidza kwavo ndiko kunyadziswa kwavo. Pfungwa dzavo dzinofunga zvinhu zvenyika." 
Philippians3:20 Asi nyika yedu iri kudenga. Uye tinomirira Muponesi anobva ikoko, iye Ishe Jesu Kristu," 
Philippians3:21 uyo ane simba rinomugonesa kuti auyise zvinhu zvose pasi pesimba rake, achavandudza miviri yedu yokuninipisa kuti ifanane nomuviri wake wokubwinya." 
Philippians4:1 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu, iyemi vandinoda uye vandinoshuva, mufaro wangu nekorona yangu, ndiko kuti mumire nesimba muna She, hama dzinodiwa!" 
Philippians4:2 Ndinokumbira zvikuru kuna Yudhia uyewo ndinokumbira zvikuru Sindike kuti vatenderane muna She. 
Philippians4:3 Hongu, uye ndinokukumbira iwe wakatendeka musungwa pamwe chete neni pajoko, batsira vakadzi ava vakarwa pamwe chete neni mubasa revhangeri, pamwe chete naKiremendi uye navamwe vose vakabata basa pamwe chete neni, mazita avo ari mubhuku roupenyu." 
Philippians4:4 Farai muna She nguva dzose. Ndichapamhidzazve: Farai! 
Philippians4:5 Unyoro hwenyu ngahuonekwe kuna vose. Ishe ari pedyo. 
Philippians4:6 Musafunganya pamusoro pechimwe chinhu, asi muzvinhu zvose, nomunyengetero uye nomukumbiro, nokuvonga, isai zvikumbiro kuna Mwari." 
Philippians4:7 Uye rugare rwaMwari, runopfuura kunzwisisa kwose, rucharinda mwoyo yenyu nemifungo yenyu muna Kristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Pakupedzisira hama, zvose zvechokwadi, zvose zvinokudzwa, zvose zvakarurama, zvose zvakachena, zvose zvinodikanwa, zvose zvinoyevedza, kana paine chinhu chakaisvonaka kana chinorumbidzwa, fungai pamusoro pezvinhu izvi zvakadai." 
Philippians4:9 Zvipi zvazvo zvamakadzidza kana zvamakagamuchira kana zvamakanzwa kubva kwandiri, kana zvamakaona mandiri, itai izvozvo. Uye Mwari worugare ngaave nemi." 
Philippians4:10 Ndinofara zvikuru muna She kuti pakupedzisira makavandudza hanya yenyu nokuda kwangu. Zvirokwazvo, makanga mune hanya henyu, asi makanga musina mukana wokuti muzviratidze." 
Philippians4:11 Handirevi izvi nokuda kwokuti ndinoshayiwa, nokuti ndakadzidza kugutsikana nezvinenge zviripo." 
Philippians4:12 Ndinoziva kuti kushayiwa chii, uye ndinoziva kuva nezvakawanda. Ndakadzidza chakavanzika chokugutsikana mune zvipi zvazvo uye mumamiriro ose zvawo, kungava kuguta kana kunzwa nzara, kana kuva nezvakawanda kana kushayiwa." 
Philippians4:13 Ndinogona kuita zvinhu zvose kubudikidza naiye anondipa simba. 
Philippians4:14 Asi makaita zvakanaka kuti makagovana neni mumatambudziko angu. 
Philippians4:15 Pamusoro paizvozvo, sezvamunoziva imi vaFiripi, pamazuva enyu okutanga kundiziva nevhangeri, pandakasimuka kubva kuMasedhonia, hakuna kereke yakagovana neni panyaya yokupa nokugamuchira, kunze kwenyu chete;" 
Philippians4:16 nokuti kunyange pandakanga ndiri muTesaronika, makanditumira rubatsirozve uye mukapamha pandainge ndiri pakushayiwa." 
Philippians4:17 Handirevi kuti ndinotsvaka chipo, asi ndinotsvaka izvo zvamungazopfumiswa nazvo." 
Philippians4:18 Ndakagamuchira mubayiro uzere uye kunyange zvizhinji; ndava nezvakakwana, zvino zvandagamuchira kubva kuna Epafrodhito chipo chamakanditumira. Zvakaita sechipiriso chinonhuwira, chibayiro chakafanira, chinofadza Mwari." 
Philippians4:19 Uye Mwari wangu achazadzisa zvamunoshayiwa zvose maererano nokubwinya kwepfuma yake muna Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians4:20 Mwari naBaba vedu ngaave nokubwinya nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni. 
Philippians4:21 Kwazisai vatsvene vose muna Kristu Jesu. Hama dzandinadzo dzinokukwazisai. 
Philippians4:22 Vatsvene vose vanokukwazisai, kunyanya avo veimba yaKesari." 
Philippians4:23 Nyasha dzaIshe Jesu Kristu ngadzive nomweya wenyu. Ameni. 
Colossians1:1 Pauro, mupostori waKristu Jesu nokuda kwaMwari, naTimoti hama yedu," 
Colossians1:2 Kuhama tsvene uye dzakatendeka dziri muna Kristu paKorose: Nyasha norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba ngazvive nemi. 
Colossians1:3 Tinogara tichivonga Mwari, Baba vaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu, patinokunyengetererai," 
Colossians1:4 nokuti takanzwa nezvokutenda kwenyu muna Kristu Jesu uye nezvorudo rwamunarwo kuvatsvene vose," 
Colossians1:5 kutenda norudo zvinobva patariro yamakachengeterewa kudenga uye iyo yamakatonzwa nezvayo mushoko rezvokwadi, iro vhangeri" 
Colossians1:6 rakasvika kwamuri. Munyika yose vhangeri iri riri kubereka zvibereko uye richikura sezvarakanga richiita pakati penyu kubvira pazuva ramakarinzwa uye mukanzwisisa nyasha dzaMwari muzvokwadi yose. 
Colossians1:7 Makazvidzidza kubva kuna Epafrodhito, muranda pamwe chete nesu anodikanwa, mushumuri akatendeka waKristu nokuda kwedu," 
Colossians1:8 uye akatiudzawo nezvorudo rwenyu muMweya. 
Colossians1:9 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, kubvira pazuva ratakanzwa nezvenyu, hatina kurega kukunyengetererai uye tichikumbira Mwari kuti akuzadzei nokuziva kuda kwake kubudikidza nouchenjeri hwose hwomweya uye nokunzwisisa." 
Colossians1:10 Uye tinonyengeterera izvi kuitira kuti mugare upenyu hwakafanira uye kuti mumufadze iye mune zvose: muchibereka zvibereko mumabasa ose akanaka, muchikura mukuziva Mwari," 
Colossians1:11 muchisimbiswa nesimba rose maererano nokubwinya kwesimba rake kuti muve nokutsunga kukuru uye nomwoyo murefu, muchifara kwazvo" 
Colossians1:12 muchivonga ivo Baba, vakaita kuti mukodzere kugovana nhaka yavatsvene muumambo hwechiedza." 
Colossians1:13 Nokuti akatinunura kubva pasimba rerima uye akatiuyisa kuumambo hwoMwanakomana waanoda," 
Colossians1:14 watine dzikinuro maari, iko kuregererwa kwezvivi." 
Colossians1:15 Ndiye mufananidzo waMwari asingaonekwi, dangwe rezvisikwa zvose." 
Colossians1:16 Nokuti zvinhu zvose zvakasikwa naye: zviri kudenga nezviri panyika, zvinoonekwa nezvisingaonekwi, zvigaro zvoushe kana masimba kana vatongi kana vane simba; zvinhu zvose zvakasikwa naye uye zvakasikirwa iye." 
Colossians1:17 Iye anotangira zvose, uye zvinhu zvose zvinobatana maari." 
Colossians1:18 Ndiye musoro womuviri, iyo kereke; ndiye wokutanga uye ndiye dangwe ravakamuka kuvakafa, kuitira kuti pazvinhu zvose iye ave mukuru." 
Colossians1:19 Nokuti Mwari akafadzwa nazvo kuti uzere hwake hwose hugare maari," 
Colossians1:20 uye kubudikidza naye ayananise kwaari zvinhu zvose, zvingava zvinhu zviri panyika kana zvinhu zviri kudenga, nokuita rugare kubudikidza neropa rake, rakateerwa pamuchinjikwa." 
Colossians1:21 Kare makanga muri vatorwa kuna Mwari uye maiva vavengi mupfungwa dzenyu nokuda kwetsika dzenyu dzakaipa. 
Colossians1:22 Asi zvino akakuyananisai nomuviri waKristu kubudikidza norufu kuti akuisei pamberi pake muri vatsvene, vasina chavanopomerwa uye makasunungurwa kubva pakupomerwa" 
Colossians1:23 kana muchirambira mukutenda kwenyu, makasimbiswa uye makasimba, musingazungunuswi kubva patariro iri muvhangeri. Ndiro vhangeri ramakanzwa uye rakaparidzirwa kuzvisikwa zvose pasi pedenga, uye iro ini, Pauro, ndakaitwa muranda nokuda kwaro." 
Colossians1:24 Zvino ndinofara mune zvamakatamburirwa imi, uye ndinozadzisa munyama yangu izvo zvichiri kushayikwa maererano nokutambudzika kwaKristu, nokuda kwomuviri wake, iyo kereke." 
Colossians1:25 Ini ndava muranda wayo nokutumwa kwandakaitwa naMwari kuti ndiise kwamuri shoko raMwari nokuzara kwaro," 
Colossians1:26 chakavanzika chakanga chakavigwa kubvira kare uye kumarudzi namarudzi, asi zvino zvakazarurirwa vatsvene." 
Colossians1:27 Kuna ivo, Mwari akasarudza kuti azivise pakati pavahedheni, pfuma inobwinya yechakavanzika ichi, iye Kristu mamuri, tariro yokubwinya." 
Colossians1:28 Tinomuparidza, tichirayira uye tichidzidzisa munhu wose nouchenjeri hwose, kuitira kuti tiise munhu wose akakwana muna Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, ndinoshanda nesimba, ndichirwisa nesimba rake rose, rinoshanda zvikuru mandiri." 
Colossians2:1 Ndinoda kuti muzive kuti ndiri kurwa sei pamusoro penyu uye naavo vari paRaodhikea, navose vasina kuonana neni pachangu." 
Colossians2:2 Vavariro yangu ndeyokuti vakurudzirwe mumwoyo uye vabatane murudo, kuitira kuti vave nepfuma izere yokunzwisisa kwakakwana, kuti vagoziva chakavanzika chaMwari, iye Kristu," 
Colossians2:3 maari pfuma yose youchenjeri nokuziva yakachengetwamo. 
Colossians2:4 Ndinokuudzai izvi kuitira kuti parege kuva nomunhu anokunyengerai namashoko anobata kumeso. 
Colossians2:5 Nokuti kunyange ndisipo pamuri mumweya uye ndinofara ndichiona kuti mugere zvakanaka sei uye kuti makasimba sei mukutenda kwenyu muna Kristu. 
Colossians2:6 Saka zvino, sezvamakagamuchira Kristu Jesu saShe, rambai muchifamba maari," 
Colossians2:7 mune midzi uye makavakwa maari, makasimbiswa mukutenda sezvamakadzidziswa, uye muzere nokuvonga." 
Colossians2:8 Muone kuti parege kuva nomunhu anokutapai nokutaura kusina maturo kunonyengera, kunosendamira patsika dzavanhu uye nezvokuvamba kwenyika ino, asingateveri Kristu." 
Colossians2:9 Nokuti muna Kristu kuzara kwouMwari kunogara maari pamuviri," 
Colossians2:10 nemiwo makapiwa kuzara uku muna Kristu, iye ari pamusoro poushe hwose nesimba." 
Colossians2:11 Nemiwo makadzingiswa maari, mukubviswa kwomunhu wezvivi, kwete nokudzingiswa kunoitwa namaoko avanhu, asi nokudzingiswa kunoitwa naKristu," 
Colossians2:12 makavigwa pamwe chete mukubhabhatidzwa uye mukamutswa pamwe chete naye nokutenda kwenyu musimba raMwari, akamumutsa kuvakafa." 
Colossians2:13 Pamakanga makafa muzvivi zvenyu uye nokusadzingiswa kwomunhu wenyu wekare, Mwari akakuitai vapenyu muna Kristu. Akatikanganwira zvivi zvedu zvose," 
Colossians2:14 akadzima mutemo wakanyorwa, nezvirevo zvawo, uyo wakanga uchirwa nesu uye waimira uchipikisana nesu; akaubvisa, achiuroverera pamuchinjikwa." 
Colossians2:15 Uye akati abvisa ushe namasimba, akazvibudisa pachena, akazvikunda nomuchinjikwa." 
Colossians2:16 Naizvozvo ngakurege kuva nomunhu anokutongai pamusoro pezvamunodya kana kunwa, kana nezvemitambo yechitendero, kupemberera Kugara kwoMwedzi kana zuva reSabata." 
Colossians2:17 Izvi mumvuri wezvinhu zvaizouya, kunyange zvakadaro, chokwadi chinowanikwa muna Kristu." 
Colossians2:18 Musarega munhu upi zvake anofarira kuzvininipisa kwenhema uye kunamata vatumwa achikutorerai mubayiro wenyu. Munhu akadaro anorondedzera zvikuru pamusoro pezvaakaona, uye nokufunga kwake kwenyama anozvikudza pasina." 
Colossians2:19 Akarasika kubva paMusoro, uyo kubva pauri muviri wose, wakasimbiswa uye wakabatanidzwa pamwe chete nemitezo yawo uye namarunda, unokura sezvinoda Mwari." 
Colossians2:20 Sezvo makafa pamwe chete naKristu kune mitemo yenyika ino, seiko muchiita kunge muchiri vayo, munozviisa pasi pemitemo yayo here inoti:" 
Colossians2:21 “Usabata! Usaravira! Usagunzva!”? 
Colossians2:22 Izvi zvose zvichaparadzwa nokubata kwazvo, nokuti zvakavakwa pamirayiro yavanhu nokudzidzisa kwavanhu." 
Colossians2:23 Zvirokwazvo mitemo yakadai inoita seino uchenjeri, nokunamata kwavo kwokuzvipa, kuzvininipisa kwavo kwenhema uye nokubata kwavo muviri kwakaipa, asi havakoshesi kudzivisa kuchiva kwomuviri." 
Colossians3:1 Sezvo, zvino, makamutswa pamwe chete naKristu, isai mwoyo yenyu pazvinhu zviri kumusoro, uko kugere Kristu kuruoko rworudyi rwaMwari." 
Colossians3:2 Isai pfungwa dzenyu pazvinhu zviri kumusoro, kwete pazvinhu zvenyika." 
Colossians3:3 Nokuti makafa, uye upenyu hwenyu hwakavigwa zvino naKristu muna Mwari." 
Colossians3:4 Panoonekwa Kristu, iye upenyu hwenyu, ipapo nemiwo muchaonekwa pamwe chete naye mukubwinya." 
Colossians3:5 Naizvozvo, urayai zvose zvenyu zvenyika zvinoti: upombwe, netsvina, nokusachena, nokuchiva, nokuda zvakaipa uye kukara, ndiko kunamata zvifananidzo." 
Colossians3:6 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, kutsamwa kwaMwari kuri kuuya." 
Colossians3:7 Imi maimbofamba mazviri, muupenyu hwamaimborarama." 
Colossians3:8 Asi zvino munofanira kuzvidzora pane zvose zvakadai sezvizvi zvinoti: kutsamwa, hasha, ruvengo, makuhwa, nokutaura zvakaora zvichibva pamiromo yenyu." 
Colossians3:9 Musareverana nhema, sezvo makabvisa munhu wenyu wekare namabasa ake" 
Colossians3:10 uye mukafuka munhu mutsva, anovandudzwa mukuziva mumufananidzo woMusiki wake." 
Colossians3:11 Apa hapachina muGiriki kana muJudha, kudzingiswa kana kusadzingisa, mutorwa kana muSitia, nhapwa kana akasununguka, asi Kristu ndiye zvose, uye ari mune zvose." 
Colossians3:12 Naizvozvo savasanangurwa vaMwari, vatsvene uye vanodikanwa kwazvo, zvifukidzei netsitsi, nounyoro, nokuzvininipisa, nokupfava uye nomwoyo murefu." 
Colossians3:13 Munzwirane tsitsi uye mukanganwirane pamhosva ipi zvayo yamunenge matadzirana. Mukanganwire sezvamakakanganwirwa naShe. 
Colossians3:14 Uye pazvinhu zvose izvi fukai rudo, runokusunganidzai pamwe chete muhumwe hwakakwana." 
Colossians3:15 Rugare rwaKristu ngarutonge mumwoyo yenyu, sezvo senhengo dzomuviri mumwe makadanirwa kurugare. Uye munofanira kuvonga." 
Colossians3:16 Shoko raKristu ngarigare zvakakwana mamuri pamunenge muchidzidzisana muchirayirana nouchenjeri hwose, uye muchiimba mapisarema, nedzimbo uye nenziyo dzomweya muchivonga Mwari mumwoyo yenyu." 
Colossians3:17 Uye zvose zvamunoita, mushoko kana mumabasa, itai zvose muzita raIshe Jesu, muchivonga Mwari ivo Baba kubudikidza naye." 
Colossians3:18 Vakadzi, zviisei pasi pavarume venyu, sezvazvakafanira muna She." 
Colossians3:19 Varume, idai vakadzi venyu musingavabati nehasha." 
Colossians3:20 Vana, teererai vabereki venyu pazvinhu zvose, nokuti izvi zvinofadza Ishe." 
Colossians3:21 Madzibaba, musanetsa vana venyu, nokuti vanozoora mwoyo." 
Colossians3:22 Varanda, teererai vatenzi venyu vapanyika muzvinhu zvose; uye muzviite, kwete kuti vakuonei chete uye kuti mudikanwe navo, asi nokutendeka kwomwoyo uye nokutya Ishe." 
Colossians3:23 Zvose zvamunoita, itai zvose nomwoyo wose, savanhu vanoshandira Ishe, kwete munhu," 
Colossians3:24 sezvo muchiziva kuti muchagamuchira nhaka kubva kuna She somubayiro. NdiIshe Kristu wamunoshumira. 
Colossians3:25 Ani naani anoita zvakaipa achatsiviwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake, uye hapana kutsaura vanhu." 
Colossians4:1 Vatenzi, ipai varanda venyu zvinhu zvakanaka uye zvakaenzana, nokuti munozviziva kuti nemiwo muna vaTenzi kudenga." 
Colossians4:2 Muzvipire pakunyengetera, makanyatsorinda uye muchivonga." 
Colossians4:3 Uye mutinyengetererewo kuti Mwari azarure mukova weshoko redu, kuitira kuti tigoparidza chakavanzika chaKristu, icho chandakasungirwa." 
Colossians4:4 Nyengeterai kuti ndigone kuparidza zvakajeka, sezvandinofanira." 
Colossians4:5 Muve vakachenjera pamafambiro enyu kuna vari kunze; mungwarire nguva yenyu. 
Colossians4:6 Kutaura kwenyu ngakugare kwakazara nenyasha nguva dzose, kwakarungwa nomunyu, kuitira kuti muzive mapinduriro amunoita vanhu vose." 
Colossians4:7 Tikiko achakuudzai mashoko ose pamusoro pangu. Iye ihama inodikanwa kwazvo, mushumiri akatendeka nomushandi pamwe chete neni muna She." 
Colossians4:8 Ndiri kumutuma kwamuri nechinangwa ichi kuti muzive zvatiri uye kuti akurudzire mwoyo yenyu. 
Colossians4:9 Ari kuuya pamwe chete naOnesimo, hama yedu yakatendeka uye inodikanwa, anova mumwe wenyu. Vachakuudzai zvose zviri kuitika kuno." 
Colossians4:10 Musungwa pamwe chete neni Aristakusi anokukwazisai, naMako, hama yaBhanabhasi anokukwazisaiwo. (Makarayirwa zvokuita naye; kana asvika kwamuri, mumugamuchire.)" 
Colossians4:11 Jesu anonzi Jasitasi, anokukwazisaiwo. Ava ndivo vaJudha bedzi pakati pavamwe vandinoshanda navo muumambo hwaMwari, uye vanondinyaradza." 
Colossians4:12 Epafurasi, mumwe wenyu nomuranda waKristu Jesu, anokukwazisai. Anogara achirwa muminyengetero nokuda kwenyu, kuti mumire makasimba mukuda kwose kwaMwari, makura uye muzere nokuziva." 
Colossians4:13 Ndinomupupurira kuti anokushandirai nesimba pamwe chete naavo vari paRaodhikea, napaHirapori." 
Colossians4:14 Shamwari yedu inodikanwa Ruka, chiremba, naDhemasi vanokukwazisai." 
Colossians4:15 Ndikwazisirei hama dziri paRaodhikea, naNimufa nekereke iri mumba make." 
Colossians4:16 Mushure mokuverengwa kwetsamba kwamuri, muone kuti yaverengwawo mukereke yeRaodhikea uye kuti nemiwo muverenge tsamba inobva kuRaodhikea." 
Colossians4:17 Muudze Akipasi kuti, “Ona kuti wapedza basa rawakagamuchira muna She.”" 
Colossians4:18 Ini, Pauro ndanyora kwaziso iyi noruoko rwangu pachangu. Rangarirai ngetani dzangu. Nyasha ngadzive nemi." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Pauro, Sirasi naTimoti, Kukereke yavaTesaronika muna Mwari Baba naIshe Jesu Kristu: Nyasha norugare ngazvive nemi." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tinogara tichivonga Mwari nokuda kwenyu mose, tichikutaurai muminyengetero yedu." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Tinoramba tichirangarira pamberi paMwari wedu naBaba vedu, basa renyu rinobva pakutenda, nokushanda kwenyu kunobva parudo, uye nokutsungirira kwenyu kunobva patariro iri muna Ishe Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Nokuti tinoziva, hama dzinodikanwa naMwari, kuti akakusarudzai," 
1Thessalonians1:5 nokuti vhangeri redu harina kuuya kwamuri namashoko bedzi, asi nesimbawo, noMweya Mutsvene uye nokuziva kwakadzama. Munoziva kuti takagara sei pakati penyu nokuda kwenyu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Makava vateveri vedu uye navaIshe; pakati pokutambudzika kukuru, makagamuchira shoko nomufaro unopiwa naMweya Mutsvene." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Nokudaro makava muenzaniso kuvatendi vose vari muMasedhonia neAkaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Shoko raShe rakanzwika kubva kwamuri kwete muMasedhonia neAkaya bedzi, kutenda kwenyu muna Mwari kwakazivikanwa kwose kwose. Naizvozvo hatifaniri kutaura chinhu pamusoro pazvo," 
1Thessalonians1:9 nokuti ivo pachavo vanozivisa kuti takagamuchirwa sei navo. Vanotaura kuti makadzokera sei kuna Mwari muchibva kuzvifananidzo kuti mushumire Mwari mupenyu uye wechokwadi," 
1Thessalonians1:10 uye kuti mumirire Mwanakomana wake anobva kudenga, uyo waakamutsa kubva kuvakafa, Jesu, anotinunura kubva pakutsamwa kuchauya." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Munoziva, hama, kuti kushanya kwedu kwamuri hakuna kuva pasina." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Takanga tambotambudzika uye tikatukwa muFiripi, sezvamunoziva, asi norubatsiro rwaMwari wedu hatina kurega kukuparidzirai vhangeri rake pakati pokupikiswa kukuru." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Nokuti chikumbiro chatinoita hachibvi pakukanganisa kana pamufungo usina kunaka, uye hatisi kuedza kukunyengerai." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Asi, tinotaura savanhu vakatenderwa naMwari kuti tipiwe vhangeri. Hatisi kuedza kufadza vanhu asi Mwari, iye anoedza mwoyo yedu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Munozviziva kuti isu hatibati kumeso, uye hatina kuisa chifukidzo chokufukidza kukarira pfuma, Mwari ndiye chapupu chedu." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Takanga tisingatsvaki kurumbidzwa kunobva kuvanhu, kwete kunobva kwamuri kana ani zvake. Savapostori vaKristu tingadai takava mutoro kwamuri," 
1Thessalonians2:7 asi takanga tiri vanyoro pakati penyu, samai vanochengeta vana vavo vaduku." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Taikudai zvikuru zvokuti takafara kuti tigoverane nemi, kwete vhangeri raMwari bedzi, asi noupenyu hweduwo, nokuti makanga madikanwa nesu kwazvo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Zvirokwazvo munorangarira, hama, kutambudzika kwedu nokuomerwa kwedu; takashanda usiku namasikati kuti tirege kuremedza munhu upi zvake patakanga tichiparidza vhangeri raMwari kwamuri." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imi muri zvapupu, uye naMwariwo, kuti takanga tiri vatsvene sei, vakarurama uye vasina chavangapomerwa pakati penyu imi vanotenda." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Nokuti munoziva kuti takabata mumwe nomumwe wenyu sababa vanobata vana vavo," 
1Thessalonians2:12 tichikukurudzirai tichikunyaradzai uye tichikukurudzirai kuti murarame zvakafanira kuna Mwari, iye anokudanai kuumambo hwake nokukubwinya kwake." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Nesuwo tinotenda Mwari nguva dzose, nokuti pamakagamuchira shoko raMwari, ramakanzwa kwatiri, makarigamuchira, kwete seshoko ravanhu, asi sezvariri, iro shoko raMwari, riri kubata mamuri imi vanotenda." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Nokuti imi, hama, makava vateveri vekereke dzaMwari dziri muJudhea, dziri muna Kristu Jesu: Makatambudzwa navanhu vomunyika menyu saizvozvo kereke idzodzo dzakatambudzwa zvimwe chete navaJudha," 
1Thessalonians2:15 ivo vakauraya Ishe Jesu uye navaprofita uye vakatidzinga nesuwo. Havana kufadza Mwari uye vanorwa navanhu vose 
1Thessalonians2:16 mukushinga kwavo kutidzivisa kuti titaure kuvahedheni kuti vaponeswe. Nenzira iyi vanoramba vachiunganidza zvivi zvavo kusvikira kumagumo. Kutsamwa kwaMwari kwazosvika pamusoro pavo pakupedzisira. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Asi, hama, patakanga taparadzaniswa nemi kwechinguva chiduku (pakuonekwa, kwete mupfungwa), mukushuva kwedu kukuru takaedza chose kukuonai." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Nokuti takanga tichida kuuya kwamuri, chokwadi, ini Pauro, ndakada kuita izvozvo, nguva nenguva, asi Satani akatidzivisa." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Nokuti tariro yedu ndeipiko, mufaro wedu kana korona yatichazvirumbidza nayo pamberi paIshe wedu Jesu paanouya? Ko, hamuzimi here?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Zvirokwazvo ndimi kubwinya kwedu nomufaro wedu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Saka patakanga tisingagoni kuramba takamira, takafunga kuti zvaiva nani kuti tisare toga paAtene." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Takatuma Timoti, anova ndiye hama yedu nomushandi waMwari pamwe chete nesu pakuparadzira vhangeri raKristu, kuti akusimbisei nokukukurudzirai mukutenda kwenyu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 kuti parege kuva nomunhu anozungunutswa nemiedzo iyi. Munozviziva chose kuti takanga takagadzirirwa izvozvo. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Kunyanya pataiva nemi, takaramba tichikuudzai kuti tichatambudzwa. Uye zvakabva zvaita saizvozvo, sezvamunoziva kwazvo." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Nokuda kwaizvozvo, pandakanga ndisisagoni kutsunga, ndakatuma shoko kuti ndizive nezvokutenda kwenyu. Ndakatya kuti zvimwe muedzi angadaro akakuedzai uye kubata kwedu kwakava pasina." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Asi Timoti achangosvika kwatiri zvino achibva kwamuri uye akauya namashoko akanaka ezvokutenda kwenyu norudo rwenyu. Akatiudza kuti munogara muchifunga zvakanaka nezvedu uye kuti munoshuva kutiona, sezvatinoshuva nesuwo kukuonai." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Naizvozvo, hama, mukutambudzika kwedu kwose uye nokutambudzwa kwedu, takakurudzirwa pamusoro penyu nokuda kwokutenda kwenyu." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Nokuti zvino tiri vapenyu chose, sezvo imi mumire nesimba muna She." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Tichavonga Mwari zvizere sei nokuda kwenyu kuti tidzorere mufaro wose watinawo pamberi paMwari wedu nokuda kwenyu? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Usiku namasikati tinonyengetera zvikuru kuti tikuoneizve uye kuti tizadzise zvinotayira pakutenda kwenyu. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Zvino Mwari wedu, Baba pachavo naIshe wedu Jesu ngavatizarurire nzira kuti tiuye kwamuri." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Ishe ngaakurise rudo rwenyu uye rupfachukire kuno mumwe nomumwe nokuvanhu vose, sezvinoita rwedu kwamuri." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Ngaasimbise mwoyo yenyu kuitira kuti mushayiwe chamunopomerwa uye muve vatsvene pamberi paMwari wedu naBaba vedu, pakuuya kwaIshe wedu Jesu navatsvene vake vose." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Pakupedzisira, hama, takakurayirai kuti munofanira kurarama sei kuitira kuti mugofadza Mwari, sezvamuri kurarama. Zvino tinokukumbirai uye tinokukurudzirai muna She Jesu kuti murambe muchiita izvi uye muchiwedzera." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Nokuti munoziva zvatakakurayirai nesimba raIshe Jesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Kuda kwaMwari kuti muitwe vatsvene: 
1Thessalonians4:4 kuti murege upombwe; kuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu adzidze kudzora muviri wake nenzira tsvene uye inokudzwa," 
1Thessalonians4:5 asingaiti mukuchiva sezvinoitwa navahedheni, vasingazivi Mwari;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 uye kuti pane izvozvi parege kuva nomunhu anotadzira hama yake kana kumutorera chinhu. Ishe acharanga vanhu nokuda kwezvivi zvakadaro zvose, sezvatakakuudzai kare uye tikakuyambirai." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Nokuti Mwari haana kutidanira kutsvina, asi kuti tirarame upenyu hutsvene." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Naizvozvo, uyo anoramba kurayira uku haasi kuramba munhu asi Mwari, iye anokupai Mweya wake Mutsvene." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Zvino kana rwuri rudo kuhama, hatitsvaki kukunyorerai, nokuti imi pachenyu makadzidziswa naMwari kuti mudanane." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Uyezve, munoda hama dzose muMasedhonia yose. Asi tinokukurudzirai, hama, kuti muite izvozvo uye muchiwedzera." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Shingirirai kuti mugare upenyu hworunyararo, muchibata basa renyu namaoko enyu, sezvatakakuudzai," 
1Thessalonians4:12 kuitira kuti upenyu hwamazuva ose huwane kukudzwa navari kunze uye kuitira kuti murege kusendamira kuno mumwe munhu. 
1Thessalonians4:13 Hama, hatidi kuti muve vasingazivi pamusoro paavo vavete, kana kuchema savamwe vavo, vasina tariro." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Isu tinotenda kuti Jesu akafa uye akamukazve, nokudaro isu tinotenda kuti Mwari achauyisa pamwe chete naJesu avo vakavata maari." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Samashoko aShe pachake, tinokuudzai kuti isu vachiri vapenyu, vachasara kusvikira pakuuya kwaShe, zvirokwazvo hatizotangiri avo vakavata." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Nokuti Ishe pachake achaburuka achibva kudenga, nokurayira kukuru, nenzwi romutumwa mukuru uye nokurira kwehwamanda yaMwari, uye vakafa muna Kristu vachatanga kumuka." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Shure kwaizvozvo, isu vachiri vapenyu uye vakasara, tichatorwa pamwe chete navo mumakore kuti tisangane naShe mudenga. Nokudaro tichava naShe nokusingaperi." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Naizvozvo kurudziranai namashoko aya. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Zvino, hama, kana dziri nguva kana misi hatifaniri kuti tikunyorerei," 
1Thessalonians5:2 nokuti imi munoziva kwazvo kuti zuva raShe richauya sembavha usiku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Vanhu pavanenge vachiti, “Rugare norunyararo,” kuparadzwa kuchasvika pamusoro pavo nokukurumidza, somukadzi ane mimba worwadziwa, uye havangapunyuki." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Asi imi, hama, hamusi murima zvokuti zuva iri rikusvikirei sembavha." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Imi mose muri vanakomana vechiedza navanakomana vamasikati. Hatizi vousiku kana verima. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Saka zvino, ngatiregei kuita savamwe vavete, asi ngatisvinurei uye tive vanozvidzora." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Nokuti avo vanovata, vanovata usiku, uye avo vanodhakwa, vanodhakwa usiku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Asi sezvo tiri vamasikati, ngatizvidzorei, takapfeka kutenda norudo sechidzitiro chechipfuva, netariro yoruponeso senguwani." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Nokuti Mwari haana kutisarudza kuti tive vokutsamwirwa asi kuti tigamuchire ruponeso kubudikidza naIshe wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Thessalonians5:10 Akatifira isu kuitira kuti, kunyange takasvinura kana tivete, tigare pamwe chete naye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Naizvozvo kurudziranai uye muvakane, sezvamunoita zvino." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Zvino tinokukumbirai, hama, kuti muremekedze avo vanoshanda nesimba pakati penyu, vari pamusoro penyu muna She uye vanokurayirai." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Muvakudze zvikuru murudo nokuda kwebasa ravo. Garai murunyararo nomumwe nomumwe wenyu. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Uye tinokukurudzirai, hama, kuti muyambire avo vano usimbe, mukurudzire vanotya, batsirai vasina simba, muite mwoyo murefu kuvanhu vose." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Muve nechokwadi kuti kurege kuva nomunhu anodzorera chakaipa nechakaipa, asi edzai kuva nomwoyo munyoro kuno mumwe nomumwe wenyu uye nokuna vose." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Farai nguva dzose; 
1Thessalonians5:17 rambai muchinyengetera; 
1Thessalonians5:18 vongai pazvinhu zvose, nokuti ndiko kuda kwaMwari kwamuri muna Kristu Jesu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Musadzima moto woMweya; 
1Thessalonians5:20 musazvidza zviprofita. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Edzai zvinhu zvose. Batirirai kune zvakanaka. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Regai zvakaipa zvose. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Mwari pachake, iye Mwari worugare, ngaakuitei vatsvene kwazvo kwazvo. Mweya wenyu wose, nomwoyo uye nomuviri zvichengetwe zvisina mhosva pakuuya kwaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Iye anokudanai akatendeka uye achazviita. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Hama, tinyengeterereiwo." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Kwazisai hama dzose nokutsvoda kutsvene. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndinokurayirai pamberi paIshe kuti tsamba iyi iverengerwe hama dzose. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Nyasha dzaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzive nemi. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Pauro, Sirasi naTimoti, Kukereke yavaTesaronika muna Mwari Baba vedu naIshe Jesu Kristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Nyasha norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari ivo Baba nokuna Ishe wedu Jesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Tinofanira kuramba tichivonga Mwari nguva dzose nokuda kwenyu, hama, uye zvakanaka izvozvo, nokuti kutenda kwenyu kuri kukura zvakanyanya, uye rudo rwamunarwo kuno mumwe nomumwe wenyu rwuri kukura." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Naizvozvo, pakati pekereke dzaMwari tinozvirumbidza pamusoro pokutsungirira kwenyu uye nokutenda kwenyu nomukutambudzika kwose nokuedzwa kwamunotsunga makuri." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Zvose izvi ndizvo zvinoratidza kuti kutonga kwaMwari kwakarurama, uye nokuda kwaizvozvi muchanzi makafanirwa noumambo hwaMwari, ihwo hwamunotamburira." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Mwari akarurama: Achatsiva nokutambudzika kuna avo vanokutambudzai," 
2Thessalonians1:7 uye agozorodza imi vari kutambudzika, uye nesuwo. Izvi zvichaitika Ishe Jesu paacharatidzwa kubva kudenga mumurazvo womo-to unopfuta ane vatumwa vake vane simba." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Acharanga vaya vasingazivi Mwari uye vasingateereri vhangeri raIshe wedu Jesu. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Vacharangwa nokuparadzwa kusingaperi, uye vachapfigirwa kunze pamberi paIshe, uye napaukuru hwesimba rake," 
2Thessalonians1:10 pazuva raanouya kuzokudzwa muvanhu vake vatsvene uye sechishamiso pakati paavo vose vakatenda. Izvi zvinosanganisira imi, nokuti makatenda uchapupu hwedu kwamuri." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nomurangariro uyu, isu tinoramba tichikunyengetererai, kuti Mwari wedu ati makafanira kudana kwake, uye kuti nesimba rake azadzise zvinangwa zvenyu zvose zvakanaka uye basa rose rakamutswa nokutenda kwenyu." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Tinonyengeterera izvi kuitira kuti zita raIshe wedu Jesu rikudzwe mamuri, uye imi maari, maererano nenyasha dzaMwari wedu naIshe Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Pamusoro pezvokuuya kwaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu uye nokuungana kwedu kwaari, tinokukumbirai, hama," 
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti murege kuzungunuswa kana kuvhundutswa nechimwe chiprofita, chiziviso kana tsamba inonzi yakabva kwatiri, ichiti zuva raShe ratosvika." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Musarega munhu upi zvake achikunyengerai nenzira ipi zvayo, nokuti zuva iro harisviki kusvikira kumukira kwaitika uye munhu wokutsauka aratidzwa, iye munhu akatongerwa kuparadzwa." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Achapikisa uye achazvisimudzira pamusoro pezvinhu zvinonzi Mwari kana zvinonamatwa, nokudaro anozvigadza mutemberi yaMwari achizviita Mwari." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Hamurangariri here kuti pandaiva nemi ndaisikuudzai zvinhu izvi? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Uye iye zvino munoziva chinomudzivisa, kuti aratidzwe nenguva yakafanira." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Nokuti chakavanzika chesimba rokutsauka chotoshanda basa; asi uyo anomudzivisa zvino acharamba achiita izvozvo kusvikira iye abviswa. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Uye ipapo munhu wokutsauka achazoratidzwa, uyo achaparadzwa naIshe Jesu nokufema kwomuromo wake, achimuparadza nokubwinya kwokuuya kwake." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Kuuya kwomunhu wokutsauka kuchaitika sebasa raSatani kuchiratidza nemhando dzose dzezvishamiso zvenhema, zviratidzo neminana," 
2Thessalonians2:10 uye nokuipa kwose kunonyengera avo vanoparara. Vanoparara nokuti vakaramba kuda chokwadi uye kuti vagoponeswa. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Nokuda kwaizvozvi, Mwari anovatumira mweya une simba wokunyengera kuti vatende nhema" 
2Thessalonians2:12 uye kuti vose vagotongwa, avo vasina kutenda chokwadi, asi vakafarira zvakaipa." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Asi tinofanira kuvonga Mwari nguva dzose nokuda kwenyu, hama dzinodiwa naIshe, nokuti kubva pakutanga Mwari akakusarudzai kuti muponeswe nebasa rokuchenesa roMweya uye nokutenda chokwadi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Akakudanirai izvi nevhangeri redu, kuti mugovane mukubwinya kwaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Saka zvino, hama mirai nesimba uye mubatirire kudzidziso dzatakakudzidzisai, neshoko romuromo kana netsamba." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ishe wedu Jesu Kristu pachake uye Mwari Baba vedu, iye akatida uye nenyasha dzake akatipa upenyu husingaperi, kurudziro netariro yakanaka," 
2Thessalonians2:17 ngaakurudzire mwoyo yenyu uye akusimbisei mumabasa nomumashoko ose akanaka. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Pakupedzisira, hama, mutinyengetererewo kuti shoko raShe rikurumidze kuparadzirwa uye kuti rikudzwe, sezvazvakanga zvakaita kwamuri." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Uye munyengetere kuti tirwirwe kubva pano wakaipa, nokuti havasi vose vanotenda." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Asi Ishe akatendeka, uye achakusimbisai nokukudzivirirai kubva kunowakaipa." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tinotenda muna She kuti muri kuita uye mucharamba muchiita zvinhu zvatinokurayirai. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Mwari ngaatungamirire mwoyo yenyu murudo rwaMwari uye nomukutsungirira kwaKristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Muzita raIshe Jesu Kristu, tinokurayirai hama, kuti mubve pahama imwe neimwe inoita zvousimbe uye isingararami maererano nedzidziso yamakagamuchira kubva kwatiri." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Nokuti imi pachenyu munoziva kuti munofanira kutevera sei muenzaniso wedu. Takanga tisiri simbe patakanga tinemi," 
2Thessalonians3:8 uye hatina kudya chokudya chomunhu tisingaripi. Asi, takashanda usiku namasikati, tichishanda zvikuru uye tichitambudzika kuitira kuti tirege kuva mutoro kwamuri." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Takaita izvi, kwete nokuda kwokuti hatina kodzero yokuti tibatsirwe pakadaro, asi kuitira kuti tive muenzaniso kwamuri wokuti mutevere." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Nokuti kunyange pataiva nemi, takakupai murayiro uyu wokuti: “Kana munhu asingashandi, ngaarege kudya.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Tinonzwa kuti vamwe pakati penyu vane usimbe. Havashandi; havaregi zvavamwe. 
2Thessalonians3:12 Vanhu vakadaro tinovarayira uye tinovakurudzira muna Ishe Jesu Kristu kuti vashande chinyararire vagodya chingwa chavanoshandira. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Uye kana murimi, hama, musaneta pakuita zvakanaka." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kana pano munhu asingateereri kurayira kwedu mutsamba iyi, mumungwarire. Musafambidzana naye, kuitira kuti anyare." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Asi musamutora somuvengi, asi mumuyambire sehama." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Zvino Ishe worugare ngaakupei rugare nguva dzose nomunzira dzose. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ini Pauro, ndanyora kwaziso iyi noruoko rwangu, chinova ndicho chiratidzo mutsamba dzangu dzose." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Nyasha dzaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzive nemi mose. 
1Timothy1:1 Pauro, mupostori waKristu Jesu nokurayira kwaMwari Muponesi wedu naKristu Jesu tariro yedu," 
1Timothy1:2 Kuna Timoti mwanakomana wangu chaiye pakutenda: Nyasha, ngoni norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba naKristu Jesu Ishe wedu." 
1Timothy1:3 Sezvandakakumbira zvikuru kwauri pandakaenda kuMasedhonia, gara paEfeso kuitira kuti ugorayira vamwe varume kuti varege kudzidzisa dzidziso dzenhema," 
1Timothy1:4 kana kuzvipira kungano nokunhoroondo dzamazita amadzitateguru dzisingaperi. Izvi zvinongomutsa nharo panzvimbo yebasa raMwari rinoitwa nokutenda. 
1Timothy1:5 Chinovavarirwa nomurayiro uyu ndirwo rudo runobva pamwoyo wakachena, hana yakanaka nokutenda kwechokwadi." 
1Timothy1:6 Vamwe vakarasika kubva pazvinhu izvi uye vakatsaukira mukutaura kusina maturo. 
1Timothy1:7 Vanoda kuva vadzidzisi vomurayiro, asi havazivi zvavari kutaura pamusoro pazvo kana izvo zvavari kushingira kusimbisa." 
1Timothy1:8 Tinoziva kuti murayiro wakanaka kana munhu achiushandisa zvakanaka. 
1Timothy1:9 Tinozivawo kuti murayiro hauna kuitirwa vakarurama asi vanodarika murayiro navanomukira, vasina umwari navatadzi, vasiri vatsvene navasina chinamato; vaya vanouraya vanababa vavo kana vanamai vavo, vanouraya vanhu," 
1Timothy1:10 mhombwe navanopomba navamwe varume, navanotengesa vanhu kuti vave varanda, varevi venhema, navanopika nhema, uye kana chimwe chipi zvacho chinopesana nedzidziso yechokwadi" 
1Timothy1:11 inosimbisa vhangeri rokubwinya, raMwari akaropafadzwa, iro raakapa kwandiri." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndinovonga Kristu Jesu Ishe wedu, akandipa simba, akati ndakatendeka, akandiisa pabasa rake." 
1Timothy1:13 Kunyange zvazvo ndaimbomhura Mwari ndiri mutambudzi nomunhu wokumanikidza, ndakaitirwa ngoni nokuti ndakazviita mukusaziva uye nomukusatenda." 
1Timothy1:14 Nyasha zhinji dzaIshe wedu dzakadururwa pamusoro pangu, pamwe chete nokutenda norudo zviri muna Kristu Jesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Herino shoko rezvokwadi rinofanira kutendwa kwazvo: Kristu Jesu akauya munyika kuti aponese vatadzi, ini ndiri mukuru wavo." 
1Timothy1:16 Asi nokuda kwechikonzero ichochi ndakaitirwa ngoni kuitira kuti mandiri ini mutadzi mukuru, Kristu Jesu aratidze mwoyo murefu wake usingaperi kuti ndive muenzaniso kuna avo vachatenda kwaari uye vagowana upenyu husingaperi." 
1Timothy1:17 Zvino iye Ishe asingaperi, asingafi, asingaonekwi, iye Mwari oga, ngaave nokukudzwa nokubwinya nokusingaperiperi." 
1Timothy1:18 Timoti, mwanakomana wangu, ndinokupa murayiro uyu maererano nezvakaprofitwa kare pamusoro pako, kuti kana ukautevera ucharwa kurwa kwakanaka." 
1Timothy1:19 Wakabata kutenda uye nehana yakanaka. Vamwe vakaramba mirayiro iyi vakarasikirwa nokutenda kwavo. 
1Timothy1:20 Vamwe vavo ndiHimenio naArekizanda, avo vandakaisa kuna Satani kuti vadzidziswe kuti varege kumhura Mwari." 
1Timothy2:1 Naizvozvo, pakutanga kwezvose, ndinokurayirai kuti vanhu vose vakumbirirwe, vanyengetererwe, varevererwe, vavongerwe," 
1Timothy2:2 madzimambo uye navose vari vakuru, kuti tigare norugare uye norunyararo pakurarama muumwari hwose nomuutsvene." 
1Timothy2:3 Izvi zvakanaka uye zvinofadza Mwari muponesi wedu. 
1Timothy2:4 Anoda kuti vanhu vose vaponeswe uye kuti vazive chokwadi. 
1Timothy2:5 Nokuti kuna Mwari mumwe chete, nomurevereri mumwe chete pakati paMwari navanhu, ndiye munhu Kristu Jesu." 
1Timothy2:6 Uyo akazvipa sorudzikinuro kuvanhu vose, uchapupu hwakapiwa panguva yakafanira." 
1Timothy2:7 Uye nokuda kwechikonzero ichi ndakaitwa muparidzi nomupostori, ndinokuudzai chokwadi, handisi kureva nhema, uye ndiri mudzidzisi wokutenda kwechokwadi kuvaHedheni." 
1Timothy2:8 Ndinoda kuti varume kwose kwose vasimudze maoko matsvene pakunyengetera, vasina kutsamwa kana nharo." 
1Timothy2:9 Ndinodawo kuti vakadzi vapfeke zvakafanira, zvakanaka zvino kuzvidzora, kwete nebvudzi rakarukwa kana negoridhe kana namaperera kana nguo dzemari zhinji," 
1Timothy2:10 asi ngavave namabasa akanaka, sezvakafanira vakadzi vanoti vanonamata Mwari." 
1Timothy2:11 Mukadzi ngaadzidze akanyarara uye nokuzviisa pasi kwose. 
1Timothy2:12 Handitenderi kuti mukadzi adzidzise kana kuti ave nesimba pamusoro pomurume; anofanira kunyarara. 
1Timothy2:13 Nokuti Adhamu ndiye akatanga kuumbwa, tevere Evha." 
1Timothy2:14 Uye Adhamu haasi iye akanyengerwa; mukadzi ndiye akanyengerwa uye akava mutadzi. 
1Timothy2:15 Asi vakadzi vachaponeswa nokubereka vana kana vachirambira mukutenda, murudo noutsvene, uye nokuzvidzora." 
1Timothy3:1 Herino shoko rechokwadi: kana munhu achitsvaka basa romutariri, anoda basa rinokudzika." 
1Timothy3:2 Zvino mutariri anofanira kuva munhu asina chaangapomerwa, murume womukadzi mumwe chete, anozvidzora, anokudzwa, anoitira vaeni rudo, anoziva kudzidzisa," 
1Timothy3:3 asingadhakwi, asingarwi uye ano unyoro, asina gakava, asingakariri mari." 
1Timothy3:4 Anofanira kubata imba yake zvakanaka nokuona kuti vana vake vanomuteerera uye vachimukudza zvakanaka. 
1Timothy3:5 (Kana munhu asingazivi kubata imba yake zvakanaka, angachengeta seiko kereke yaMwari?)" 
1Timothy3:6 Asava mutendi mutsva, nokuti angazozvikudza uye akazotongwa zvimwe chetezvo sadhiabhori." 
1Timothy3:7 Anofanirawo kupupurirwa zvakanaka navari kunze, kuitira kuti arege kuzvidzwa, uye agowira mumusungo wadhiabhori." 
1Timothy3:8 Saizvozvowo, madhikoni ngavave vanhu vanokudzwa, vanorevesa, vasinganwi waini zhinji, uye vasingatsvaki pfuma yakaipa." 
1Timothy3:9 Vanofanira kuchengetedza zvakadzikadzika zvokutenda nehana yakanaka. 
1Timothy3:10 Vanofanira kutanga vaedzwa, uye kana pasina chavangapomerwa, ngavashumire samadhikoni." 
1Timothy3:11 Nenzira imwe cheteyo, vakadzi vavo ngavave vanokudzwa, vasingacheri vamwe asi vanozvidzora, vakatendeka pazvinhu zvose." 
1Timothy3:12 Mudhikoni anofanira kuva murume ano mukadzi mumwe chete uye anofanira kugona kubata vana vake nemba yake zvakanaka. 
1Timothy3:13 Vaya vakashumira zvakanaka vanozviwanira zita rakanaka uye nokutsunga kukuru pakutenda kwavo muna Kristu Jesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Kunyange zvazvo ndine tariro yokuuya kwauri nokukurumidza, ndinokunyorera dzidziso idzi kuitira kuti," 
1Timothy3:15 kana ndikanonoka, uchaziva kuti vanhu vanofanira kuzvibata sei mumba maMwari, inova kereke yaMwari mupenyu, mbiru nenheyo yechokwadi." 
1Timothy3:16 Pasina kana mubvunzo, chakavanzika choumwari chikuru kwazvo: Iye akaratidzwa panyama, akaruramiswa noMweya, akaonekwa navatumwa, panyika vakatenda kwaari, akakwidzwa mukubwinya." 
1Timothy4:1 Mweya anotaura pachena kuti panguva dzinouya vamwe vachatsauka kubva pakutenda uye vagotevera mweya inonyengera nedzidziso dzamadhimoni. 
1Timothy4:2 Dzidziso dzakadai dzinouya navaya vanoreva nhema, vane hana dzakapiswa sokunge nesimbi inopisa." 
1Timothy4:3 Vanodzivisa vanhu kuwanana uye vachivarayira kuti varege kudya zvimwe zvokudya, izvo zvakasikwa naMwari kuti zvigamuchirwe nokuvonga naavo vanotenda uye vanoziva chokwadi." 
1Timothy4:4 Nokuti chose chakasikwa naMwari chakanaka, uye hapana chinofanira kuraswa kana chichigamuchirwa nokuvonga," 
1Timothy4:5 nokuti chinoitwa chitsvene neshoko raMwari nokunyengetera. 
1Timothy4:6 Kana ukadzidzisa hama zvinhu izvi, uchava mushumiri akanaka waKristu Jesu, akarerwa muzvokwadi yokutenda uye nedzidziso yakanaka yawakatevera." 
1Timothy4:7 Siyana nengano dzisina umwari uye nengano dzechembere; asi uzvirovedzere paumwari. 
1Timothy4:8 Nokuti kurovedza muviri kunobatsira zvishoma hako asi umwari hunokosha pazvinhu zvose, hune vimbiso kune zvose muupenyu huno uye nomuupenyu hunouya." 
1Timothy4:9 Iri ishoko rechokwadi rinofanira kutendwa zvizere 
1Timothy4:10 uye nokuda kwaizvozvi tinoshingaira nokurwa, nokuti takaisa tariro yedu muna Mwari mupenyu, anova ndiye muponesi wavanhu vose uye zvikuru sei vaya vanotenda." 
1Timothy4:11 Rayira uye udzidzise zvinhu izvi. 
1Timothy4:12 Munhu ngaarege kuvapo anokuzvidza nokuda kwouduku hwako, asi uve muenzaniso kuvatendi mukutaura, muupenyu, murudo, mukutenda uye napakuchena kwomwoyo." 
1Timothy4:13 Kusvikira ndauya, shingaira pakuverenga Rugwaro kukereke, kuparidza nokudzidzisa." 
1Timothy4:14 Usarega kushandisa chipo chako, chakapiwa kwauri kubudikidza neshoko rechiprofita pawakaiswa maoko pamusoro navakuru." 
1Timothy4:15 Shingaira pazvinhu izvi, uzviite nomwoyo wako wose, kuitira kuti munhu wose aone kupfuurira mberi kwako." 
1Timothy4:16 Uzvichengete kwazvo iwe nedzidziso yako. Utsungirire pazviri, nokuti kana ukazviita, uchazviponesa iwe navanokunzwa." 
1Timothy5:1 Usatsiura murume mukuru nehasha, asi utaure naye sounotaura nababa vako. Vaduku uvabate savanun'una vako." 
1Timothy5:2 Vakadzi vakuru savanamai, uye vakadzi vaduku sehanzvadzi, nokuchena kwose kwomwoyo." 
1Timothy5:3 Ipa rukudzo rwakafanira kuchirikadzi dziri chirikadzi chaidzo. 
1Timothy5:4 Asi kana chirikadzi ina vana kana vazukuru, ava ngavatange ivo kudzidza kurarama chinamato chavo kumhuri dzavo uye vadzosere zvakafanira kuvabereki vavo uye navakwegura, nokuti izvi zvinofadza Mwari." 
1Timothy5:5 Chirikadzi iri chirikadzi chaiyo uye yakasara ichingova yoga inoisa tariro yayo kuna Mwari uye inogara ichinyengetera nokukumbira kuna Mwari usiku namasikati. 
1Timothy5:6 Asi chirikadzi inoraramira kuzvifadza yakafa ichiri mhenyu. 
1Timothy5:7 Rayirawo vanhu zvinhu izvi, kuitira kuti kurege kuva nomunhu angapomerwa." 
1Timothy5:8 Kana munhu asingachengeti hama dzake, uye zvikuru sei veimba yake, arasa kutenda, uye akaipa kukunda asingatendi." 
1Timothy5:9 Hakuna chirikadzi inganyorwa pamazita echirikadzi kana isina makore anopfuura makumi matanhatu, yakanga yakatendeka kumurume wayo," 
1Timothy5:10 uye ichinyatsozivikanwa pamabasa ayo akanaka, akafanana nokurera vana, nokubata vaeni zvakanaka, kushambidza tsoka dzavatsvene, kubatsira vaya vari mumatambudziko, uye yakazvipira kuita pamabasa ose akanaka." 
1Timothy5:11 Asi kana dziri chirikadzi duku usadzinyora pamazita aya. Nokuti kana nyama yadzo yakunda kuzvipira kwadzo kuna Kristu, dzichazotsvaka kuwanikwa." 
1Timothy5:12 Naizvozvo dzichazvivigira kutongwa, nokuti dzinenge dzaputsa kutenda kwadzo kwokutanga." 
1Timothy5:13 Pamusoro pezvo, dzinoita tsika dzokuva nousimbe uye dzichipota nedzimba. Uye hadzizi simbe bedzi, asi vaitiwo vamakuhwa, uye vasina basa ravanoita, vachitaura zvisakafanira." 
1Timothy5:14 Naizvozvo ndinoti kuchirikadzi duku ngadziwanikwe, kuti dzibereke vana, dzichengete dzimba dzadzo uye kuti dzisapa muvengi mukana wokupomera nawo." 
1Timothy5:15 Vamwe vakatotsauka kare vachitevera Satani. 
1Timothy5:16 Kana mukadzi upi zvake mutendi aine chirikadzi mumhuri yake, anofanira kudzibatsira uye arege kuita kuti kereke iremedzwe nadzo, kuitira kuti kereke igone kubatsira chirikadzi dziri kushayiwa zvechokwadi." 
1Timothy5:17 Vakuru vanobata kereke zvakanaka vakafanira kukudzwa zvakapetwa kaviri, zvikuru sei vaya vanoita basa rokuparidza nokudzidzisa." 
1Timothy5:18 Nokuti Rugwaro runoti, “Usasunga muromo wenzombe kana ichipura zviyo,” uye “Mushandi akafanirwa nomubayiro wake.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Usagamuchira mhaka inopomerwa mukuru kunze kwokunge yauyiswa nezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu. 
1Timothy5:20 Avo vanotadza vanofanira kutsiurwa pamberi pavanhu, kuitira kuti vamwe vagoyambirwa." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndinokurayira, pamberi paMwari naKristu Jesu uye napamberi pavatumwa vakasanangurwa, kuti uchengete mirayiro iyi zvakanaka, uye usingaiti uchitsaura vanhu." 
1Timothy5:22 Usakurumidza kuisa maoko pamusoro pomunhu, uye usabatana nezvivi zvavamwe. Zvichengete kuti uve wakachena." 
1Timothy5:23 Rega kunwa mvura yoga, uye unwe waini shoma nokuda kwomudumbu mako uye nokurwararwara kwako." 
1Timothy5:24 Zvivi zvavamwe vanhu zvinoonekwa pachena, zvichivatangira kusvika panzvimbo yokutongwa; zvivi zvavamwe zvinotevera mushure mavo." 
1Timothy5:25 Nenzira imwe cheteyo, mabasa akanaka anoonekwawo pachena, uye kunyange naasina kudaro haangavanzwi." 
1Timothy6:1 Vose varanda vari pasi pejoko rouranda vanofanira kukudza vatenzi vavo zvizere, kuitira kuti zita raMwari uye nedzidziso yedu zvirege kumhurwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Avo vana vatenzi vanotenda ngavarege kuvazvidza nokuda kwokuti ihama. Asi kutoti vanofanira kuvashumira zviri nani, nokuti vaya vanobatsirwa nebasa ravo vatendi, uye vadikanwi kwavari. Izvi ndizvo zvinhu zvaunofanira kuvadzidzisa uye nokuvarayira." 
1Timothy6:3 Kana munhu achidzidzisa dzidziso dzenhema uye asingabvumi dzidziso yakanaka yaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu uye nedzidziso youmwari," 
1Timothy6:4 anongozvikudza uye haazivi chinhu. Anongofarira nharo nokukakavara pamusoro pamashoko asingabatsiri, anongomutsa godo, gakava, kutukana nokufungidzirana zvakaipa," 
1Timothy6:5 uye nokupesana kusingaperi pakati pavanhu vane murangariro wakaora, vakabirwa zvokwadi uye vanofunga kuti umwari inzira yokuwana nayo mari." 
1Timothy6:6 Asi umwari nokugutsikana nezvatinazvo zvinopfumisa kwazvo. 
1Timothy6:7 Nokuti hatina kuuya nechinhu panyika, uye hatigoniwo kubuda nechinhu kubva mairi." 
1Timothy6:8 Asi kana tine zvokudya nezvokupfeka, tichagutsikana nazvo." 
1Timothy6:9 Vanhu vanotsvaka kupfuma vanowira mukuedzwa nomumusungo uye nomukuchiva kwoupenzi kuzhinji uye kunokuvadza kunoisa vanhu mukuparadzwa nokuraswa. 
1Timothy6:10 Nokuti kuda mari ndiwo mudzi wezvakaipa zvose. Vamwe vanhu vanoda mari zvikuru, vakatsauka kubva pakutenda uye vakazvibaya neshungu zhinji." 
1Timothy6:11 Asi iwe, munhu waMwari, tiza kubva pane izvi zvose, uye utevere kururama, umwari, kutenda, rudo, kutsungirira nounyoro." 
1Timothy6:12 Irwa kurwa kwakanaka kwokutenda. Ubatisise upenyu husingaperi hwawakadanirwa kwahuri pawakapupura kupupura kwakanaka pamberi pezvapupu zvizhinji. 
1Timothy6:13 Ndinokurayira, pamberi paMwari, anopa upenyu kuzvinhu zvose, napamberi paKristu Jesu akapupura zvakanaka paakapa uchapupu pamberi paPondio Pirato," 
1Timothy6:14 kuti uchengete murayiro uyu, usina chinongo kana chaungapomerwa kusvikira pakuonekwa kwaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu," 
1Timothy6:15 uyo achazoratidzwa naMwari panguva yake iye Mwari, iye oga Mutongi akaropafadzwa, Mambo wamadzimambo naIshe wamadzishe." 
1Timothy6:16 Iye oga ndiye asingafi uye agere pachiedza chisingaswederwi, uyo asina akambomuona kana angamuona. Kukudzwa nesimba ngazvive kwaari nokusingaperi. Ameni." 
1Timothy6:17 Rayira vapfumi panyika ino kuti varege kuzvikudza kana kuisa tariro yavo mupfuma, isingagari, asi kuti vaise tariro yavo kuna Mwari, anotipa zvose zvizhinji kuti tifare nazvo." 
1Timothy6:18 Varayire kuti vaite zvakanaka, uye kuti vafarire kupa vamwe uye nokugovana." 
1Timothy6:19 Vachazviunganidzira pfuma senheyo yakasimba kunguva dzinouya, kuti vagobatisisa upenyu hunova upenyu kwechokwadi." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoti, chengeta icho chawakapiwa. Furatira unhu husina umwari nepfungwa dzinopikisa, dzezvinonzi pakutaura kwenhema zivo," 
1Timothy6:21 idzo dzakapupurwa navamwe uye nokudaro vakatsauka kubva pakutenda. Nyasha ngadzive newe. 
2Timothy1:1 Pauro, mupostori waKristu Jesu nokuda kwaMwari, maererano nechipikirwa choupenyu huri muna Kristu Jesu," 
2Timothy1:2 Kuna Timoti mwanakomana wangu anodikanwa: Nyasha, ngoni norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba naKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndinovonga Mwari, wandinoshumira sezvakaitwa namadzitateguru angu, nehana yakachena, sezvo ndichikurangarira muminyengetero yangu usiku namasikati." 
2Timothy1:4 Ndichirangarira misodzi yako, ndinoshuva kukuona, kuti ndigozadzwa nomufaro." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndinoyeuchidzwa kutenda kwako kusinganyengeri, kwakanga kuri muna mbuya vako Roisi uye nomuna mai vako Yunisi pakutanga, uye zvino ndinoziva kuti kunogarawo mauri." 
2Timothy1:6 Nokudaro ndinokuyeuchidza kuti ukuchidzire chipo chaMwari chiri mauri nokuiswa kwamaoko angu pamusoro wako. 
2Timothy1:7 Nokuti Mwari haana kutipa mweya wokutya, asi mweya wesimba, noworudo nowokuzvidzora." 
2Timothy1:8 Saka usanyadziswa nokupupura Ishe wedu, kana kunyadziswa neni musungwa wake. Asi utambudzike pamwe chete neni nokuda kwevhangeri, nesimba raMwari," 
2Timothy1:9 akatiponesa uye akatidanira kuupenyu hutsvene, kwete nokuda kwechinhu chatakaita asi kuti nokuda kwake iye, uye nenyasha. Nyasha idzi takadzipiwa muna Kristu Jesu nguva dzisati dzavapo," 
2Timothy1:10 asi zvino dzakaratidzwa nokuonekwa kwoMuponesi wedu Kristu Jesu, akaparadza rufu uye akabudisa pachena upenyu nokusafa kubudikidza nevhangeri." 
2Timothy1:11 Uye ndakaitwa muparidzi, mupostori nomudzidzisi wevhangeri iri." 
2Timothy1:12 Ndokusaka ndichitambudzika sezvandiri kuita. Asi handinyadziswi, nokuti ndinoziva wandakatenda, uye ndinoziva kwazvo kuti anogona kuchengeta chandakamupa kusvikira zuva iroro." 
2Timothy1:13 Zvawakanzwa kubva kwandiri, zvichengete sedzidziso yechokwadi, nokutenda norudo muna Kristu Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Chengetedza chakanaka chiri mauri chawakapiwa, chichengetedze uchibatsirwa naMweya Mutsvene anogara matiri." 
2Timothy1:15 Unoziva kuti vose vari mudunhu reEzhia vakandisiya, kusanganisirawo naFigero naHerimogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Ishe ngaaitire imba yaOnisifero ngoni, nokuti kazhinji anondisimbisa uye haana kunyadziswa nengetani dzangu." 
2Timothy1:17 Asi kutoti, paakanga ari muRoma, akanditsvaga kwazvo kusvikira andiwana." 
2Timothy1:18 Ishe ngaamuitire chinhu ichi kuti awane ngoni kubva kuna Ishe pazuva iro! Iwe unoziva kwazvo kuti akandibatsira zvikuru sei muEfeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Zvino iwe mwanakomana wangu, iva nesimba munyasha dziri muna Kristu Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Uye zvinhu zvawakanzwa ndichitaura pamberi pezvapupu zvizhinji zvipe kuvanhu vakatendeka avo vachazozvidzidzisawo vamwe. 
2Timothy2:3 Tsungirira pamwe chete nesu somurwi akanaka waKristu Jesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Hakuna munhu anoshanda somurwi anozviisa pazvinhu zvoupenyu hwavasiri varwi, anoda kufadza mukuru wake wehondo." 
2Timothy2:5 Zvimwe chetezvo, kana munhu achikwikwidza somumhanyi, haagoni kuwana korona yokukunda kunze kwokunge apedza nhangemutange sezvakarayirwa." 
2Timothy2:6 Murimi anoshanda nesimba ndiye anofanira kutanga kudya zvibereko. 
2Timothy2:7 Funga pamusoro pezvandinoreva, nokuti Ishe achakupa kunzwisisa pane izvi zvose." 
2Timothy2:8 Rangarirai Jesu Kristu, akamuka kubva kuvakafa, worudzi rwaDhavhidhi. Iri ndiro vhangeri rangu," 
2Timothy2:9 randinotambudzikira kunyange kusvikira pakusungwa segororo. Asi shoko raMwari harina kusungwa. 
2Timothy2:10 Naizvozvo ndinotsungirira pazvinhu zvose nokuda kwavasanangurwa, kuti naivowo vawane ruponeso rwuri muna Kristu Jesu, nokubwinya kusingaperi." 
2Timothy2:11 Herino shoko rechokwadi: Kana takafa pamwe chete naye, tichararamawo pamwe chete naye;" 
2Timothy2:12 kana tikatsungirira, tichabata ushe pamwe chete naye. Kana tikamuramba, iye achatirambawo;" 
2Timothy2:13 kana tikasava nokutenda, iye anoramba akatendeka, nokuti haangazvirambi." 
2Timothy2:14 Ramba uchivayeuchidza zvinhu izvi. Uvayambire pamberi paMwari kuti varege kuita nharo pamusoro pamashoko; hazvina maturo, zvinongoparadza chete vaya vanoteerera." 
2Timothy2:15 Shingaira kuti uzviratidze pamberi paMwari, somunhu anogamuchirwa, mushandi asingafaniri kunyadziswa uye anonyatsoruramisa shoko rechokwadi." 
2Timothy2:16 Nzvenga kutaura kusinei naMwari, nokuti vaya vanhu vanodaro vacharamba vachirasikirwa noumwari." 
2Timothy2:17 Dzidziso yavo ichanyenga seronda. Pakati pavo pana Himenayo naFireto," 
2Timothy2:18 vakatsauka kubva pazvokwadi. Vanoti kumuka kwavakafa kwakatopfuura, uye vanoparadza kutenda kwavamwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Kunyange zvakadaro, nheyo dzakasimba dzaMwari dzinomira, dzine chisimbiso ichi chinoti: “Ishe anoziva vanhu vake,” uye, “Ani naani anopupura zita raShe anofanira kubva pane zvakaipa.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Muimba huru mune midziyo kwete yegoridhe kana yesirivha chete, asiwo yamatanda, neyevhu; mimwe inokudzwa, mimwe isingakudzwi." 
2Timothy2:21 Kana munhu achizvinatsa kwazvo pazvinhu izvi, achava mudziyo unokudzwa, wakaitwa mutsvene, wakawanirwa basa naTenzi uye wakagadzirirwa basa rose rakanaka." 
2Timothy2:22 Tiza kuchiva kwose kwoujaya, uye utevere kururama, kutenda, rudo norugare navose vanodana kuna Ishe nomwoyo wakachena." 
2Timothy2:23 Usava nechokuita nemibvunzo youpenzi isina maturo, nokuti unoziva kuti inongomutsa kukakavara." 
2Timothy2:24 Zvino muranda waIshe haafaniri kukakavara; asi anofanira kuva munyoro kumunhu wose, achigona kudzidzisa, asingatsamwi." 
2Timothy2:25 Vaya vanomupikisa anofanira kuvadzidzisa nounyoro, aine tariro yokuti Mwari achavapa kutendeuka vagoziva chokwadi," 
2Timothy2:26 uye kuti vachapengenuka vagopunyuka kubva mumusungo wadhiabhori, akavaita nhapwa kuti vaite kuda kwake." 
2Timothy3:1 Asi uzive chinhu ichi: Kuchava nenguva dzokutambudzika pamazuva okupedzisira. 
2Timothy3:2 Vanhu vachava vanozvida, vanoda mari, vanozvirumbidza, vanozvikudza, vanotuka, vasingateereri vabereki, vasingatendi, vasina utsvene," 
2Timothy3:3 vasina rudo, vasingaregereri, vanochera vamwe, vasingazvidzori, vane utsinye, vasingadi zvinhu zvakanaka," 
2Timothy3:4 vanomukira, vanoita manyawi, vanonyengera, vanoda kuzvifadza nezvenyika kupfuura Mwari;" 
2Timothy3:5 vane mufananidzo bedzi wokunamata Mwari asi vachiramba simba racho. Siyana navanhu ivavo. 
2Timothy3:6 Nokuti ndivo vaya vanoverevedza vachipinda mudzimba vachitapa vakadzi vasingazvibati vakaremedzwa nezvivi zvizhinji," 
2Timothy3:7 vanogara vachidzidza asi vasingatongosviki pakuziva chokwadi. 
2Timothy3:8 Sezvakaita Jonasi naJambiresi vakadzivisa Mozisi, varume avawo vanodzivisa zvokwadi, vanhu vane ndangariro dzakaora, kana pari pazvinhu zvokutenda, vakarasika." 
2Timothy3:9 Asi havangasviki kure, nokuti upenzi hwavo huchaonekwa navanhu vose." 
2Timothy3:10 Asi kunyange zvakadaro, iwe unoziva kudzidzisa kwangu kwose, mararamiro angu, chinangwa changu, kutenda kwangu, mwoyo murefu wangu, norudo, nokutsungirira," 
2Timothy3:11 matambudziko, nhamo, zvinhu zvose zvakaitika kwandiri muAndioki, Ikoniamu nomuRistra, kutambudzwa kwose kwandakasangana nako. Asi Ishe akandinunura kubva pazviri zvose." 
2Timothy3:12 Zvirokwazvo munhu wose anoda kurarama upenyu woumwari muna Kristu Jesu achatambudzwa," 
2Timothy3:13 asi vanhu vakaipa navanonyengera vachanyanyisa kuipa, vachinyengera nokunyengerwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Asi iwe, rambira pazvinhu zvawakadzidza uye ukatenda mazviri, nokuti unoziva kuti wakazvidzidza kubva kuna ani," 
2Timothy3:15 uye kuti kubva pauduku wakaziva Magwaro matsvene, anogona kukupa uchenjeri hunosvitsa kukuponeswa kubudikidza nokutenda muna Kristu Jesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Rugwaro rwose rwakafemerwa naMwari uye runobatsira pakudzidzisa, kurayira, kutsiura nokurairidza mukururama," 
2Timothy3:17 kuti munhu waMwari akwaniswe kwazvo agadzirirwa mabasa ose akanaka. 
2Timothy4:1 Ndinokurayira pamberi paMwari naKristu Jesu, achatonga vapenyu navakafa uye pamusoro pokuonekwa kwake noushe hwake kuti:" 
2Timothy4:2 Paridza shoko; ugare wakagadzirira panguva yakafanira kunyange isakafanira; rayira, tsiura, uye ukurudzire nomwoyo murefu zvikuru uye nokudzidzisa zvakanaka." 
2Timothy4:3 Nokuti nguva ichasvika vanhu pavacharamba kuteerera dzidziso yakarurama. Asi vachida zvinovafadza ivo, vachazviunganidzira vadzidzisi vazhinji kuti vadzidzise zvinodiwa nenzeve dzavo." 
2Timothy4:4 Vachafuratidza nzeve dzavo kuchokwadi uye vachatsaukira kungano. 
2Timothy4:5 Asi iwe, usvinure pazvinhu zvose, tsungirira pamatambudziko, uite basa romuvhangeri, uite mabasa ose oushumiri hwako." 
2Timothy4:6 Nokuti ini ndava kutodururwa sechipiriso chinonwiwa, uye nguva yangu yokuenda yasvika." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndarwa kurwa kwakanaka, ndapedza nhangemutange yangu, ndachengeta kutenda kwangu." 
2Timothy4:8 Zvino ndakachengeterwa korona yangu yokururama, yandichapiwa, naIshe, mutongi akarurama pazuva iro, uye kwete ini ndoga, asiwo nokuna vose vanoshuva kuonekwa kwake." 
2Timothy4:9 Ita napaunogona napo pose kuti ukurumidze kuuya kwandiri," 
2Timothy4:10 nokuti Dhemasi akada nyika yazvino, akandisiya akaenda kuTesaronika. Kiresenzi akaenda kuGaratia, uye Tito akaenda kuDharimatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ruka oga ndiye aneni. Tora Mako uuye naye, nokuti anondibatsira kwazvo paushumiri hwangu." 
2Timothy4:12 Ndakatuma Tikiko kuEfeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Paunouya, uuye nejasi randakasiya naKapasi paTiroasi, uye uuye nebhuku rangu, zvikuru magwaro amatehwe." 
2Timothy4:14 Arekizanda, mupfuri wendarira, akandiitira zvakaipa zvizhinji. Ishe achamutsiva pane zvaakaita." 
2Timothy4:15 Newewo umuchenjerere, nokuti akapikisa zvikuru mashoko edu." 
2Timothy4:16 Pakuzvidavirira kwangu kwokutanga, hapana munhu akandibatsira, asi vose vakandisiya. Ngavarege kupiwa mhosva nokuda kwaizvozvo." 
2Timothy4:17 Asi Ishe akamira neni uye akandipa simba, kuti kubudikidza neni shoko riparidzwe zvakakwana uye kuti vaHedheni vose varinzwe. Uye ndakarwirwa kubva pamuromo weshumba." 
2Timothy4:18 Ishe achandirwira kubva pakurwiswa kwose kwakaipa uye achandiuyisa murugare kuumambo hwake hwokudenga. Kubwinya ngakuve kwaari nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni. 
2Timothy4:19 Ndikwazisire Pirisira naAkwira neveimba yaOnesifero. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasito akasara kuKorinde, uye ndakasiya Tirofimo paMireto achirwara." 
2Timothy4:21 Ita napaunogona napo pose kuti uuye kuno chando chisati chasvika. Yubhuro anokukwazisa, uyewo naPudhenzi, naRino, naKiraudhiyo uye nehama dzose." 
2Timothy4:22 Ishe ngaave nomweya wako. Nyasha ngadzive newe. 
Titus1:1 Pauro, muranda waMwari nomupostori waJesu Kristu nokuda kwokutenda kwavasanangurwa vaMwari nokuziva chokwadi chinotungamirira kuumwari," 
Titus1:2 kutenda nokuziva kunobva patariro youpenyu husingaperi, hwakapikirwa naMwari, iye asingatongonyepi, akavimbisa idzo nguva dzisati dzavapo," 
Titus1:3 panguva yake yakatarwa akazivisa shoko rake nokuparidza kwandakapiwa nokurayira kwaMwari Muponesi wedu," 
Titus1:4 Kuna Tito, mwanakomana wangu chaiye pakutenda kwedu tose: Nyasha norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba naKristu Jesu Muponesi wedu." 
Titus1:5 Ndakakusiya paKirete kuti upedzise zvakasara zvisina kupera uye kuti ugadze vakuru mumaguta ose, sezvandakakurayira." 
Titus1:6 Mukuru anofanira kuva munhu asina chaangapomerwa, murume womukadzi mumwe chete, munhu ane vana vanotenda uye vasingapiwi mhosva yokuti havazvidzori kana kuti havateereri." 
Titus1:7 Sezvo mutariri akapiwa basa raMwari, anofanira kuva munhu asina chaangapomerwa, asingakurumidzi kutsamwa, asingadhakwi, asingarwi, asingafariri pfuma yakaipa." 
Titus1:8 Asi anoitira vaeni rudo, munhu anoda zvakanaka, anozvidzora, akarurama, mutsvene uye anozvibata." 
Titus1:9 Anofanira kubatisisa shoko rechokwadi sezvarakadzidziswa, kuitira kuti agokurudzira vamwe nedzidziso yakarurama uye agodzivisa vaya vanoipikisa." 
Titus1:10 Nokuti kune vazhinji vasingateereri vanongotaura zvisina maturo uye vanyengeri, zvikuru sei vaya veboka rokudzingiswa." 
Titus1:11 Vanofanira kunyaradzwa miromo yavo, nokuti vari kuparadza mhuri dzizere vachidzidzisa zvinhu zvavasingafaniri kudzidzisa, uye vachizviita kuti vawane pfuma yakaipa." 
Titus1:12 Kunyange mumwe wavaprofita wavo akati, “VaKirete vanogara vachireva nhema, zvikara zvakaipa, simbe dzinokara.”" 
Titus1:13 Uchapupu uhu ndohwechokwadi. Naizvozvo vatsiure zvikuru, kuti varurame pakutenda" 
Titus1:14 uye kuti varege kuteerera ngano dzavaJudha, kana kurayira kwavanhu vakaramba chokwadi." 
Titus1:15 Kune vakachena, zvinhu zvose zvakachena, asi kuna avo vakaora uye vasingatendi, hakuna chinhu chakachena. Asi kutoti zvose pfungwa dzavo nehana dzavo zvakaora." 
Titus1:16 Vanoti vanoziva Mwari, asi vanomuramba namabasa avo. Vanonyangadza, havateereri uye havana kufanirwa nokuita chinhu chakanaka." 
Titus2:1 Unofanira kudzidzisa zviri maererano nedzidziso yakarurama. 
Titus2:2 Dzidzisa varume vakuru kuti vave vanozvibata, vakafanira kukudzwa, vanozvidzora, uye vakarurama pakutenda naparudo uye nomukutsungirira." 
Titus2:3 Saizvozvowo, dzidzisa vakadzi vakuru kuti vave nomufambiro wakafanira, vasingacheri, kana kuda waini zhinji, asi kuti vadzidzise zvakanaka." 
Titus2:4 Uye kuti vadzidzise vakadzi vaduku kuti vade varume vavo navana vavo," 
Titus2:5 kuti vave vanozvidzora uye vakachena, vanoshanda kumba, vave vanyoro uye kuti vazviise pasi pavarume vavo, kuitira kuti pashayikwe angazvidza shoko raMwari." 
Titus2:6 Zvimwe chetezvo, kurudzira majaya kuti azvidzore." 
Titus2:7 Pazvinhu zvose iwe uvaratidze somuenzaniso nokuita zvakanaka. Pakudzidzisa kwako udzidzise zvakakwana, uchirevesa" 
Titus2:8 uye nokutaura kwakarurama kusingagoni kushorwa, kuitira kuti vaya vanokupikisa vanyadziswe nokuti havana chinhu chavangareva pamusoro pedu." 
Titus2:9 Udzidzise varanda kuti vazviise pasi pavatenzi vavo pazvinhu zvose kuti vavafadze, kuti varege kupindurana navo," 
Titus2:10 uye kuti varege kuvabira, asi kuti varatidze kuti vakatendeka zvikuru kwazvo, kuitira kuti vashongedze dzidziso yaMwari Muponesi wedu pazvinhu zvose." 
Titus2:11 Nokuti nyasha dzaMwari dzinouyisa ruponeso dzakaratidzwa kuvanhu vose. 
Titus2:12 Dzinotidzidzisa kuti tirambe zvinhu zvisina umwari nokuchiva kwenyika, uye tirarame upenyu hwokuzvidzora, hwokururama uye hwoumwari munguva ino," 
Titus2:13 takamirira tariro yakaropafadzwa, kuonekwa kwokubwinya kwaMwari wedu mukuru noMuponesi, Jesu Kristu," 
Titus2:14 akazvipa nokuda kwedu kuti atidzikinure kubva pakuipa kwose, nokuzvinatsira vanhu vari vake chaivo, vanoshingaira kuita zvinhu zvakanaka." 
Titus2:15 Zvino, izvi ndizvo zvinhu zvaunofanira kudzidzisa. Kurudzira uye utsiure nesimba rose. Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anokuzvidza." 
Titus3:1 Uyeuchidze kuti vanhu vazviise pasi pavatongi navane simba, kuti vave vanoteerera, kuti vave vanhu vakagadzirira kuita zvose zvakanaka," 
Titus3:2 kuti varege kuchera vamwe, kuti vagare murunyararo uye vaitire vamwe zvakanaka, uye kuti varatidze kuzvininipisa kwechokwadi kuvanhu vose." 
Titus3:3 Pane imwe nguva nesuwo takanga tiri mapenzi, tisingateereri, takanyengerwa, uye takatapwa nokuchiva kwose uye nezvinofadza. Taigara muruvengo negodo, tichivengwa nokuvengana." 
Titus3:4 Asi pakaratidzwa ngoni norudo rwaMwari Muponesi wedu," 
Titus3:5 akatiponesa, kwete nokuda kwezvinhu zvakarurama zvatakaita, asi nokuda kwetsitsi dzake. Akatiponesa kubudikidza nokuberekwa patsva nokuvandudzwa noMweya Mutsvene," 
Titus3:6 uyo waakadurura wakawanda kwazvo pamusoro pedu kubudikidza naJesu Kristu Muponesi wedu," 
Titus3:7 kuitira kuti mushure mokunge tashayirwa mhosva nenyasha dzake, tive vadyi venhaka tine tariro youpenyu husingaperi." 
Titus3:8 Iri ishoko rezvokwadi. Uye ndinoda kuti usimbise kwazvo zvinhu izvi, kuitira kuti vaya vakatenda Mwari vachenjere kuti varambe vachiita mabasa akanaka. Zvinhu izvi zvakanaka uye zvinobatsira munhu wose." 
Titus3:9 Asi unzvenge mibvunzo youpenzi nenhoroondo dzamazita amadzitateguru, negakava nokukakavara pamusoro pomurayiro, nokuti izvi hazvina maturo uye hazvibatsiri." 
Titus3:10 Yambira munhu anotsausa, kokutanga uye ugomuyambirazve kechipiri. Mushure mezvo usava nechokuita naye." 
Titus3:11 Uve nechokwadi chokuti munhu akadaro akatsauka uye mutadzi; akazvirasa iye amene. 
Titus3:12 Pandichatuma Atema kana Tikiko kwauri, edza napaunogona napo pose kuti uuye kwandiri paNikopori, nokuti ndichagarako panguva yechando." 
Titus3:13 Ita zvose zvaungagona kuti ubatsire Zenasi mududziri womurayiro naAporo parwendo rwavo uye uite kuti varege kushayiwa chinhu. 
Titus3:14 Vanhu vedu vanofanira kudzidza kuzvipira kuita zvakanaka, kuitira kuti vagone kutibatsira pazvinhu zvinodiwa mazuva ose uye kuti vasararama upenyu husina zvibereko." 
Titus3:15 Vose vari kwandiri vanokukwazisa. Ukwazise vose vanotida mukutenda. Nyasha ngadzive nemi mose. 
Philemon1:1 Pauro, musungwa waKristu Jesu, naTimoti hama yedu, Kuna Firimoni shamwari yedu inodikanwa uye nomushandi pamwe chete nesu," 
Philemon1:2 kuna Afia hanzvadzi yedu, kuna Akipo murwi pamwe chete nesu uye nokukereke inosangana mumba mako:" 
Philemon1:3 Nyasha ngadzive nemi norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari Baba vedu naIshe Jesu Kristu. 
Philemon1:4 Ndinovonga Mwari wangu nguva dzose pandinokurangarira muminyengetero yangu," 
Philemon1:5 nokuti ndinonzwa nezvokutenda kwako muna Ishe Jesu uye norudo rwako kuvatsvene vose. 
Philemon1:6 Ndinokunyengeterera kuti ugovane navamwe nesimba, kuitira kuti uve noruzivo rwakazara pamusoro pezvinhu zvose zvakanaka zvatinazvo muna Kristu." 
Philemon1:7 Rudo rwako rwakandipa mufaro mukuru nokukurudzirwa, nokuti iwe, hama yangu, wakazorodza mwoyo yavatsvene." 
Philemon1:8 Naizvozvo, kunyange zvazvo ndisingatyi muna Kristu kuti ndikurayire zvaunofanira kuita," 
Philemon1:9 asi ndinokukumbira nokuda kworudo. Saka ini, saPauro mutana uye zvino musungwa waKristu Jesu" 
Philemon1:10 ndinokumbira kwauri pamusoro pomwanakomana wangu Onesimo, akava mwanakomana wangu pakusungwa kwangu." 
Philemon1:11 Akanga asingabatsiri kwauri kare, asi zvino ava kubatsira kwatiri tose iwe neni." 
Philemon1:12 Ndiri kumudzosera kwauri, iye mwoyo wangu chaiwo." 
Philemon1:13 Ndaida kuti iye agare neni kuti agotora nzvimbo yako pakundibatsira zvandiri muusungwa nokuda kweVhangeri. 
Philemon1:14 Asi handina kuda kuita chinhu iwe usina kuchitendera, kuitira kuti zvose zvakanaka zvauchaita zvirege kuva zvokurovedzerwa asi nokuda kwako." 
Philemon1:15 Nokuti zvimwe wakaparadzaniswa naye kwechinguva kuti ugozova naye nokusingaperi," 
Philemon1:16 asisiri somuranda, asi ava nani kupfuura muranda, sehama inodikanwa. Munhu anodikanwa kwandiri, asi kutonyanya kwauri, zvose somunhu uye sehama muna She." 
Philemon1:17 Saka kana uchindiona somumwe wako, mugamuchire sokugamuchira kwaungandiita." 
Philemon1:18 Kana ane zvaakakutadzira kana kuti ane mungava newe, uzvireve kwandiri." 
Philemon1:19 Ini, Pauro, ndanyora izvi noruoko rwangu. Ndichazviripira, ndisingarevi kuti iwe pachako uri mungava kwandiri." 
Philemon1:20 Hama, ndinoshuva, kuti ndiwane rubatsiro kubva kwauri muna She; zorodza mwoyo wangu muna Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Ndanyora kwauri ndichivimba nokuteerera kwako, ndichiziva kuti uchaita kunyange kupfuura zvandakukumbira." 
Philemon1:22 Uye chimwe chinhuzve: Ndigadzirirewo pokugara, nokuti ndinotarira kuti ndichapiwa kwamuri pakupindurwa kweminyengeretero yenyu." 
Philemon1:23 Epafurasi, musungwa pamwe chete neni muna Kristu Jesu, anokukwazisai," 
Philemon1:24 uyewo Mako, Aristako, Dhemasi, naRuka, vashandi pamwe chete neni." 
Philemon1:25 Nyasha dzaIshe Jesu Kristu ngadzive nomweya wako. 
Hebrews1:1 Kare, Mwari akataura kumadzitateguru edu kubudikidza navaprofita panguva zhinji, uye nenzira dzakasiyana-siyana," 
Hebrews1:2 asi mumazuva ano okupedzisira akataura kwatiri nomuMwanakomana wake, waakaita mudyi wenhaka yezvinhu zvose, uye naiyewo waakaita naye nyika." 
Hebrews1:3 Mwanakomana ndiye chadzera chokubwinya kwaMwari uye ndiye mufananidzo wake chaiwo, anochengeta zvinhu zvose neshoko rake rine simba. Mushure mokunge apedza kunatswa kwezvivi, akagara kurudyi rwamambo kudenga." 
Hebrews1:4 Saka akava mukuru kupfuura vatumwa sezvo zita raakapiwa nhaka yaro rakanyanya kunaka kupfuura ravo. 
Hebrews1:5 Nokuti ndoupi pakati pavatumwa, Mwari waakamboti kwaari: “Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu; nhasi ndava baba vako?” kana kutizve, “Ndichava Baba vake, naiye achava Mwanakomana wangu?”" 
Hebrews1:6 Uyezve, Mwari paanouyisa dangwe rake munyika, anoti: “Vatumwa vose vaMwari ngavamunamate.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Achitaura pamusoro pavatumwa anoti: “Anoita vatumwa vake mhepo, varanda vake mirazvo yomoto.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Asi pamusoro poMwanakomana anoti: “Chigaro chenyu choushe, imi Mwari, chichagara nokusingaperi-peri, uye kururama kuchava tsvimbo youshe hwenyu." 
Hebrews1:9 Makada kururama uye mukavenga kusarurama; naizvozvo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, akakuisai pamusoro peshamwari dzenyu nokukuzodzai namafuta okufara.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Anotizve: “Pakutanga, imi Ishe, makateya nheyo dzenyika, uye matenga ndiwo basa ramaoko enyu." 
Hebrews1:11 Zvichaparara, asi imi mucharamba muripo; zvichasakara zvose senguo." 
Hebrews1:12 Muchazvipeta sejasi; senguo zvichashandurwa. Asi imi munoramba makadaro, uye makore enyu haatongogumi.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Ndoupi pakati pavatumwa Mwari waakamboti kwaari: “Gara kurudyi rwangu kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako”? 
Hebrews1:14 Ko, vatumwa vose havazi mweya inoshumira yakatumwa kuzobatsira vaya vachadya nhaka yoruponeso here?" 
Hebrews2:1 Saka tinofanira kuteerera zvikuru, izvo zvatakanzwa, kuitira kuti tirege kutsauka." 
Hebrews2:2 Nokuti kana shoko rakataurwa navatumwa rakanga rakasimba, uye kana kudarika nokusateerera kwose kwakapiwa chirango chakafanira," 
Hebrews2:3 ko, isu tichapunyuka sei kana tisina hanya noruponeso rwakakura zvakadai? Ruponeso urwu rwakatanga kuziviswa naIshe, rwakasimbiswa kwatiri naavo vakamunzwa." 
Hebrews2:4 Mwariwo akarupupurira nezviratidzo nezvishamiso namabasa esimba akasiyana-siyana, uye nezvipo zvoMweya Mutsvene nokuda kwake." 
Hebrews2:5 Hapazi pasi pavatumwa pakaiswa nyika inouya, yatiri kutaura nezvayo." 
Hebrews2:6 Asi mumwe akapupura kwazvo pane imwe nzvimbo achiti: “Ko, munhu chii zvamunomufunga, kana mwanakomana womunhu zvamune hanya naye?" 
Hebrews2:7 Makamuita muduku zvishoma kuvatumwa; makamushongedza korona yokubwinya nokukudzwa 
Hebrews2:8 uye mukaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake.” Pakuisa zvinhu zvose pasi pake, Mwari haana kusiya chinhu chimwe chete chisina kuiswa pasi pake. Asi panguva ino hationi zvinhu zvose zvakaiswa pasi pake." 
Hebrews2:9 Asi tinoona Jesu, akaitwa muduku zvishoma kuvatumwa, zvino ashongedzwa korona yokubwinya nokukudzwa nokuti akatambudzika murufu, kuitira kuti nenyasha dzaMwari anzwe rufu nokuda kwavose." 
Hebrews2:10 Mukuuyisa vanakomana vazhinji pakubwinya, zvakanga zvakafanira kuti Mwari iye akaitirwa zvinhu zvose uye akaita kuti zvinhu zvose zvivepo, aite muvambi woruponeso rwazvo rwakakwana nenzira yokutambudzika." 
Hebrews2:11 Vose, iye anoita kuti vanhu vave vatsvene uye avo vanoitwa vatsvene ndevemhuri imwe chete. Saka Jesu haana nyadzi kuti avaidze hama." 
Hebrews2:12 Anoti, “Ndichaparidza zita renyu kuhama dzangu; pamberi peungano ndichaimba nziyo dzokukurumbidzai.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Uyezve anoti: “Ndichavimba naye.” Uyezve anoti: “Ndiri pano, navana vandakapiwa naMwari.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Sezvo vana vane ropa nenyama, naiyewo akagovana navo pakuva nyama kwavo, kuitira kuti rufu rwake ruparadze iye ane simba rorufu, iye dhiabhori" 
Hebrews2:15 uye agosunungura vaya vakanga vakasungwa muuranda upenyu hwavo hwose nokutya kwavo rufu. 
Hebrews2:16 Nokuti zvirokwazvo havasi vatumwa vaakabatsira, asi zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahama." 
Hebrews2:17 Nokuda kwemhaka iyi aifanira kuitwa sehama dzake nenzira yose, kuitira kuti agova muprista mukuru ane tsitsi uye akatendeka muushumiri kuna Mwari, uye kuti ayananise vanhu nokuda kwezvivi zvavo." 
Hebrews2:18 Nokuti iye amene akatambudzika paakaedzwa, anokwanisa kubatsira vanoedzwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Naizvozvo, hama tsvene, vagovani neni pakudanwa kunobva kudenga, isai pfungwa dzenyu pana Jesu, Mupostori nomuprista mukuru uyo watinopupura nezvake." 
Hebrews3:2 Akanga akatendeka kuna iye akamugadza, saMozisi akanga akatendeka muimba yose yaMwari." 
Hebrews3:3 Jesu akaonekwa kuti akafanira kukudzwa kupfuura Mozisi, somuvaki weimba anokudzwa kupfuura imba yacho." 
Hebrews3:4 Nokuti imba imwe neimwe inovakwa nomunhu, asi Mwari ndiye muvaki wezvinhu zvose." 
Hebrews3:5 Mozisi akanga akatendeka somuranda muimba yose yaMwari, achipupura pamusoro pezvaizotaurwa munguva yaizotevera." 
Hebrews3:6 Asi Kristu akatendeka somwanakomana pamusoro peimba yaMwari. Uye isu tiri imba yake, kana tikabatisisa pakushinga kwedu uye netariro yatinozvirumbidza pamusoro payo." 
Hebrews3:7 Naizvozvo, sezvinotaura Mweya Mutsvene achiti: “Nhasi, kana muchinzwa inzwi rake," 
Hebrews3:8 musaomesa mwoyo yenyu sezvamakaita panguva dzokumukira, panguva yokuedzwa murenje," 
Hebrews3:9 mandakaedzwa namadzibaba enyu uye kwamakore makumi mana vakaona zvandakaita. 
Hebrews3:10 Ndokusaka ndakatsamwira rudzi irworwo, uye ndikati, ‘Mwoyo yavo inogara ichitsauka, havana kuziva nzira dzangu.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Naizvozvo ndakapika mhiko pakutsamwa kwangu ndikati, ‘Havangazopindi pazororo rangu.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Hama dzangu, chenjererai kuti pakati penyu pasava nomunhu ano mwoyo usingatendi, une zvivi, unotsauka kubva kuna Mwari mupenyu." 
Hebrews3:13 Asi simbisanai zuva rimwe nerimwe, kana kuchinzi Nhasi, kuitira kuti kusava nomumwe wenyu anoomeswa nokunyengera kwezvivi." 
Hebrews3:14 Takauya kuzogovana muna Kristu kana tichibatisisa kuvamba kwokutenda kwedu kusvikira pakuguma. 
Hebrews3:15 Sezvazvakataurwa zvichinzi: “Nhasi, kana muchinzwa inzwi rake, musaomesa mwoyo yenyu sezvamakaita panguva dzokumukira.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Ndivanaaniko vakanzwa uye vakamukira? Havazivo here vaya vose vakatungamirirwa naMozisi pakubuda muIjipiti? 
Hebrews3:17 Uye ndivanaaniko vaakatsamwira kwamakore makumi mana? Havazivo here vaya vakatadza, vane mitumbi yakawira murenje?" 
Hebrews3:18 Uye ndivanaaniko vakapikirwa mhiko naMwari kuti havangapindi muzororo rake kana vasiri ivo vaya vasina kuteerera? 
Hebrews3:19 Saka tinoona kuti havana kukwanisa kupinda, nokuda kwokusatenda kwavo." 
Hebrews4:1 Naizvozvo, sezvo chipikirwa chokupinda muzororo rake chichiripo, ngatichenjerei kuti kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu angatadza kusvikako." 
Hebrews4:2 Nokuti nesuwo takanzwa vhangeri richiparidzwa kwatiri, saivo; asi shoko ravakanzwa harina kuvabatsira, nokuti ivo vakarinzwa havana kuribatanidza nokutenda." 
Hebrews4:3 Zvino isu tinotenda tinopinda muzororo iroro, sezvakareva Mwari achiti: “Naizvozvo ndakapika mhiko mukutsamwa kwangu, kuti, ‘Havazopindi muzororo rangu.’ ” Uye kunyange zvakadaro basa rake akapedza kubva pakusikwa kwenyika." 
Hebrews4:4 Nokuti pane imwe nzvimbo akataura mashoko aya pamusoro pezuva rechinomwe. “Zvino pazuva rechinomwe Mwari akazorora kubva pabasa rake rose.” 
Hebrews4:5 Uyezve mundima iri pamusoro anoti, “Havazopindi muzororo rangu.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Ichokwadi kuti vamwe vachapinda muzororo iroro, uye vaya vakatanga kuparidzirwa vhangeri kare havana kupinda, nokuda kwokusateerera kwavo." 
Hebrews4:7 Naizvozvo Mwari akaisazve rimwe zuva rinonzi Nhasi, paakataura kare kubudikidza naDhavhidhi, sezvazvakataurwa pakutanga zvichinzi: “Nhasi, kana muchinzwa inzwi rake, musaomesa mwoyo yenyu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Nokuti dai Joshua akanga avapa zororo, Mwari angadai asina kuzotaurazve nezverimwe zuva." 
Hebrews4:9 Naizvozvo richiripo, zororo reSabata ravanhu vaMwari;" 
Hebrews4:10 nokuti ani naani anopinda muzororo raMwari anozororawo pabasa rake, sezvakaita Mwari pane rake."
